title: AlbumFill: Album-Guided Reasoning and Retrieval for Personalized Image Completion
abstract: Personalized image completion aims to restore occluded regions in personal photos while preserving identity and appearance. Existing methods either rely on generic inpainting models that often fail to maintain identity consistency, or assume that suitable reference images are explicitly provided. In practice, suitable references are often not explicitly provided, requiring the system to search for identity-consistent images within personal photo collections. We present AlbumFill, a training-free framework that retrieves identity-consistent references from personal albums for personalized completion. Given an occluded image and a personal album, a vision-language model infers missing semantic cues to guide composed image retrieval, and the retrieved references are used by reference-based completion models. To facilitate this task, we introduce a dataset containing 54K human-centric samples with associated album images. Experiments across multiple baselines demonstrate the difficulty of personalized completion and highlight the importance of identity-consistent reference retrieval. Project Page: https://liagm.github.io/AlbumFill/

light_analysis.overview: 提出AlbumFill，一个无需训练的框架，通过视觉语言模型推理缺失语义线索，从个人相册检索身份一致的参考图像，实现个性化图像补全。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有图像补全方法要么依赖通用模型导致身份不一致，要么假设已提供合适参考图像，但实践中用户通常未明确提供参考。因此需要系统自动从个人相册中搜索与待补全图像身份一致的参考图像。该问题具有实用性，但现有研究不足，缺乏基准数据集和有效方法。
light_analysis.method: AlbumFill采用无需训练的策略：首先使用视觉语言模型分析被遮挡图像，推理缺失区域的语义线索（如面部特征、服饰等），然后基于这些线索从个人相册中检索与身份一致的参考图像，最后利用参考图像引导完成补全。引入包含5.4万个人类中心样本的数据集，每个样本配有相册图像，支持任务评估。
light_analysis.result: 在多个基线方法上实验表明，个性化补全任务具有挑战性，现有方法难以同时保持身份一致性和补全质量。AlbumFill通过有效的参考检索显著提升了身份一致性，相比未使用参考的方法，在身份保留指标上有明显改进。具体数值摘要未明确，但强调检索的重要性。
light_analysis.conclusion: AlbumFill证明了从相册中自动检索身份一致参考图像对个性化图像补全的有效性，且无需额外训练。其提出的数据集和任务定义将推动该方向研究。未来可进一步优化检索效率和补全模型融合。局限性在于依赖视觉语言模型的推理准确性，以及参考图像质量的影响。

title: SpecKV: Adaptive Speculative Decoding with Compression-Aware Gamma Selection
abstract: Speculative decoding accelerates large language model (LLM) inference by using a small draft model to propose candidate tokens that a larger target model verifies. A critical hyperparameter in this process is the speculation length~$γ$, which determines how many tokens the draft model proposes per step. Nearly all existing systems use a fixed~$γ$ (typically~4), yet empirical evidence suggests that the optimal value varies across task types and, crucially, depends on the compression level applied to the target model. In this paper, we present \textbf{SpecKV}, a lightweight adaptive controller that selects~$γ$ per speculation step using signals extracted from the draft model itself. We profile speculative decoding across 4~task categories, 4~speculation lengths, and 3~compression levels (FP16, INT8, NF4), collecting 5,112 step-level records with per-step acceptance rates, draft entropy, and draft confidence. We demonstrate that the optimal~$γ$ shifts across compression regimes and that draft model confidence and entropy are strong predictors of acceptance rate (correlation~$\approx 0.56$). SpecKV uses a small MLP trained on these signals to maximize expected tokens per speculation step, achieving a 56.0\% improvement over the fixed-$γ$=4 baseline with only 0.34\,ms overhead per decision ($<$0.5\% of step time). The improvement is statistically significant ($p < 0.001$, paired bootstrap test). We release all profiling data, trained models, and notebooks as open-source artifacts.
comment: 11 pages, 8 figures, 7 tables. Code and data available at: https://github.com/Amorfati123/SpecKV

light_analysis.overview: 提出自适应投机解码方法SpecKV，通过轻量MLP动态选择投机长度，提升LLM推理效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 投机解码通过小模型生成候选token并由大模型验证来加速LLM推理，其中投机长度γ是关键超参数。现有系统几乎都用固定γ（通常为4），但实验表明最优γ随任务类型和模型压缩程度（FP16/INT8/NF4）变化。现有方法未考虑压缩感知和动态调整，导致效率损失。因此需要一种轻量自适应控制器，利用草案模型自身信号实时选择γ，以最大化每步期望token数。
light_analysis.method: SpecKV是一个轻量自适应控制器，在每一步投机解码时利用草案模型提取的置信度和熵等信号，通过一个小型MLP预测当前步最优γ。论文在4种任务类别、4种投机长度和3种压缩级别（FP16, INT8, NF4）下收集了5112步级记录，包含接受率、草案熵和置信度。通过分析发现草案模型置信度和熵与接受率强相关（相关系数~0.56）。MLP以这些信号为输入，输出使期望token数最大化的γ值。决策开销仅0.34ms（不到步时间的0.5%）。
light_analysis.result: SpecKV在固定γ=4的基线上实现了56.0%的性能提升，且提升具有统计显著性（p<0.001，配对bootstrap检验）。在多种压缩级别和任务类型上均有效，决策开销极低（0.34ms，小于步时间0.5%）。论文开源了所有配置文件、训练模型和notebook。摘要未明确说明与其他自适应方法的对比，但证明了相比固定γ的显著优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: SpecKV通过轻量MLP动态调整投机长度，显著提升了投机解码效率，尤其在不同压缩级别下表现鲁棒。其核心贡献在于利用草案模型自身信号（置信度和熵）预测最优γ，实现了即插即用的自适应机制。该工作具有实际应用价值，可无缝集成到现有LLM推理框架中。未来工作可探索更复杂的信号组合或扩展到多步预测。摘要未提及局限性。

title: Unsupervised Machine Learning for Detecting Structural Anomalies in European Regional Statistics
abstract: Ensuring the coherence of regional socio-economic statistics is a central task for national statistical institutes. Traditional validation tools, such as range edits, ratio checks, or univariate outlier detection, are effective for identifying extreme values in individual series but are less suited for detecting unusual combinations of indicators in high-dimensional settings. This paper proposes an unsupervised machine learning framework for identifying structurally atypical regional profiles within Europe using publicly available Eurostat data. We construct a cross-sectional dataset of NUTS2 regions (2022) covering four key indicators: GDP per capita in PPS, unemployment rate, tertiary educational attainment, and population density. We apply and compare five anomaly detection techniques, univariate z-scores, Mahalanobis distance, Isolation Forest, Local Outlier Factor, and One-Class SVM, and classify a region as a structural anomaly if it is flagged by at least three of the five methods. The findings show that machine learning methods identify a consistent set of regions whose multivariate profiles diverge substantially from the EU-wide pattern. These include both highly developed metropolitan economies (Brussels, Vienna, Berlin, Prague) and regions with persistent socio-economic disadvantages (Central and Western Slovakia, Northern Hungary, Castilla-La Mancha, Extremadura), as well as Istanbul, whose profile differs markedly from EU capital regions. Importantly, these anomalies do not necessarily signal data quality issues; rather, they reflect meaningful structural divergence that warrants analytical or policy attention. The proposed framework is fully reproducible, scalable, and compatible with existing validation workflows, offering a flexible tool for early detection of unusual regional configurations within the European Statistical System.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一个无监督机器学习框架，用于检测欧洲区域统计中的结构性异常，并验证其有效性。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统验证工具（如范围编辑、比率检查、单变量离群点检测）在识别单个序列的极端值时有效，但不适用于高维数据中检测指标的非典型组合。确保区域社会经济统计的一致性是国家统计机构的核心任务，现有方法难以发现多变量异常模式。因此，需要一种能够自动识别结构性异常区域的方法，以帮助统计机构发现潜在的数据质量或政策相关问题。
light_analysis.method: 基于Eurostat公开数据，构建包含GDP、失业率、高等教育人口密度和人口密度四个指标的NUTS2区域截面数据集。采用五种无监督异常检测技术：单变量z分数、马氏距离、孤立森林、局部离群因子和一类支持向量机，并将被至少三种方法标记的区域定义为结构性异常。通过多数投票机制提高鲁棒性，框架完全可重复且可扩展。
light_analysis.result: 检出了一致的异常区域集，包括布里塞尔、维也纳、柏林、布拉格等发达都市，以及中斯洛伐克、北匈牙利、卡斯蒂利亚-拉曼查、埃斯特雷马杜拉等持续社会经济不利区域，还有伊斯坦布尔。这些异常并非数据质量问题，而是反映了有意义的构造性差异，需要政策关注。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该框架为欧洲统计系统提供了一种灵活的早期异常检测工具，能够发现传统方法忽略的非典型区域模式。其完全可重复、可扩展，并易于集成到现有验证流程中。未来可应用于其他指标集或时间维度，以监测区域发展的动态变化。

title: Enhancing RL Generalizability in Robotics through SHAP Analysis of Algorithms and Hyperparameters
abstract: Despite significant advances in Reinforcement Learning (RL), model performance remains highly sensitive to algorithm and hyperparameter configurations, while generalization gaps across environments complicate real-world deployment. Although prior work has studied RL generalization, the relative contribution of specific configurations to the generalization gap has not been quantitatively decomposed and systematically leveraged for configuration selection. To address this limitation, we propose an explainable framework that evaluates RL performance across robotic environments using SHapley Additive exPlanations (SHAP) to quantify configuration impacts. We establish a theoretical foundation connecting Shapley values to generalizability, empirically analyze configuration impact patterns, and introduce SHAP-guided configuration selection to enhance generalization. Our results reveal distinct patterns across algorithms and hyperparameters, with consistent configuration impacts across diverse tasks and environments. By applying these insights to configuration selection, we achieve improved RL generalizability and provide actionable guidance for practitioners.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于SHAP的可解释框架，量化算法与超参数对机器人RL泛化能力的影响，并利用SHAP引导配置选择以提升泛化性。
light_analysis.motivation: RL模型对算法和超参数配置高度敏感，环境间的泛化差距阻碍实际部署。现有研究未定量分解配置对泛化差距的相对贡献，缺乏系统性配置选择方法。因此，需要量化配置影响并指导选择以增强泛化能力。
light_analysis.method: 提出可解释框架，利用SHAP值量化各配置（算法和超参数）对RL性能的影响。建立Shapley值与泛化性的理论联系，经验分析配置影响模式，并引入SHAP引导的配置选择方法。涉及多种机器人环境和RL算法。
light_analysis.result: 揭示了不同算法和超参数影响模式，配置影响在不同任务和环境间具有一致性。通过SHAP引导的配置选择，提高了RL的泛化能力。摘要未提供具体数值指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: 通过SHAP分析提供了配置对泛化影响的定量理解，提出有效的配置选择方法，提升RL在机器人领域的泛化性能，为实践者提供可操作指导。未来可探索更高效的计算方法。

title: Laplacian Frequency Interaction Network for Rural Thematic Road Extraction
abstract: Rural thematic road network construction aims to extract topological road structures from movement trajectory images of agricultural machinery. However, this task faces challenges where downsampling methods commonly used in existing studies tend to blur the sparse high-frequency road structures, and the heavy noise from dense field operations often leads to fragmented or redundant topologies in the extracted networks. To address these challenges, we propose LFINet, a Laplacian Frequency Interaction Network. The network begins with a Laplacian Multi-scale Separator (LMS) to decouple the image into low-frequency semantic contexts and high-frequency structural details. These components are then processed by the Cross-Frequency Interaction Block (CFIB) through a dual-pathway architecture in which a High-Frequency Block (HFB) refines local structures while a Spatial Transformer (ST) captures global semantics. Subsequently, a Frequency Gated Modulation (FGM) mechanism integrates the features from pathways by leveraging semantic contexts to calibrate the structural details. Finally, a Progressive Reconstruction Decoder iteratively fuses multi-scale features to ensure topological consistency. Experiments conducted on a real-world agricultural trajectories dataset from Henan Province, China, show that LFINet establishes a new state-of-the-art. Specifically, it achieves an F1-score of 92.54% and an IoU of 86.12%, surpassing the second-ranked method by 0.64% and 1.1%, respectively. This confirms its capability to effectively construct topological road networks from noisy and sparse field data.

light_analysis.overview: 提出LFINet，一种拉普拉斯频率交互网络，通过解耦低频语义与高频细节并跨频交互，实现从农机轨迹图像中高精度提取乡村道路拓扑结构。
light_analysis.motivation: 从农机轨迹图像中提取乡村道路拓扑结构面临两大挑战：现有下采样方法模糊稀疏高频道路结构，田间密集操作噪声导致提取的拓扑碎片化或冗余。这些问题严重影响了道路提取的准确性和完整性，亟需一种能同时处理噪声和稀疏高频结构的方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出LFINet，包含拉普拉斯多尺度分离器(LMS)解耦图像为低频语义和高频细节；跨频交互块(CFIB)采用双路径架构，其中高频块(HFB)细化局部结构，空间变换器(ST)捕获全局语义；频率门控调制(FGM)用语义校准结构细节；渐进重构解码器迭代融合多尺度特征确保拓扑一致性。
light_analysis.result: 在河南省真实农机轨迹数据集上，LFINet取得F1-score 92.54%、IoU 86.12%，分别超过第二名方法0.64%和1.1%，达到新SOTA，验证了其从噪声稀疏数据中有效构建拓扑道路网络的能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: LFINet通过频率分解与跨频交互创新性地解决了乡村道路提取中的噪声和稀疏高频结构问题，具有显著的实际应用价值。未来可探索更轻量化的架构或扩展到其他类型的轨迹数据。

title: Pixel Perfect: Relational Image Quality Assessment with Spatially-Aware Distortions
abstract: Traditional image quality assessment (IQA) methods rely on mean opinion scores (MOS), which are resource-intensive to collect and fail to provide interpretable, localized feedback on specific image distortions. We overcome these limitations by shifting from absolute quality prediction to a relational and directional assessment. Our approach utilizes a self-supervised synthetic distortion engine to generate training data, eliminating the need for manual annotation. A distortion prediction network is trained with an anti-symmetric objective to produce spatially-aware, disentangled maps that identify the type, intensity, and direction of distortions relative to a reference image. Subsequently, a scoring network is trained via contrastive learning on ordinally ranked image sets to predict a relational quality score. Our method provides a more granular and interpretable approach to IQA for the targeted optimization of image processing algorithms without requiring any human-labeled quality scores.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种基于关系对比和空间感知失真的无参考图像质量评估方法，无需人工标注即可提供可解释的局部失真反馈。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统IQA方法依赖平均意见分数（MOS），收集成本高且无法提供可解释的局部失真反馈。现有方法缺乏对特定失真类型、强度和方向的空间感知能力，难以用于图像处理算法的定向优化。本文旨在通过无监督训练和关系评估克服这些局限。
light_analysis.method: 采用自监督合成失真引擎生成训练数据，无需人工标注。训练一个失真预测网络，使用反对称目标产生空间感知、解耦的失真图，识别相对于参考图像的失真类型、强度和方向。随后通过对比学习在有序排序图像集上训练评分网络，预测关系质量分数。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确具体数值结果，但声称方法提供了更细粒度、可解释的IQA，可用于图像处理算法的定向优化，且无需任何人工标注的质量分数。预期与传统方法相比，在局部失真分析和可解释性上具有优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文贡献了一种无需人工标注的IQA范式，通过关系评估和空间感知失真图实现可解释的局部反馈。方法可应用于图像处理算法的定向优化，具有实际价值。未来可能探索更复杂的失真类型或扩展到视频质量评估。

title: Standing on the Shoulders of Giants: Stabilized Knowledge Distillation for Cross--Language Code Clone Detection
abstract: Cross-language code clone detection (X-CCD) is challenging because semantically equivalent programs written in different languages often share little surface similarity. Although large language models (LLMs) have shown promise for semantic clone detection, their use as black-box systems raises concerns about cost, reproducibility, privacy, and unreliable output formatting. In particular, compact open-source models often struggle to follow reasoning-oriented prompts and to produce outputs that can be consistently mapped to binary clone labels.   To address these limitations, we propose a knowledge distillation framework that transfers reasoning capabilities from DeepSeek-R1 into compact open-source student models for X-CCD. Using cross-language code pairs derived from Project CodeNet, we construct reasoning-oriented synthetic training data and fine-tune Phi3 and Qwen-Coder with LoRA adapters. We further introduce response stabilization methods, including forced conclusion prompting, a binary classification head, and a contrastive classification head, and evaluate model behavior using both predictive metrics and response rate.   Experiments on Python--Java, Rust--Java, Rust--Python, and Rust--Ruby show that knowledge distillation consistently improves the reliability of compact models and often improves predictive performance, especially under distribution shift. In addition, classification-head variants substantially reduce inference time compared to generation-based inference. Overall, our results show that reasoning-oriented distillation combined with response stabilization makes compact open-source models more practical and reliable for X-CCD detection.

light_analysis.overview: 提出知识蒸馏框架，将DeepSeek-R1的推理能力迁移到紧凑开源模型，用于跨语言代码克隆检测，并通过响应稳定方法提高可靠性。
light_analysis.motivation: 跨语言代码克隆检测因不同语言语法差异大而困难。大语言模型虽有效但作为黑盒存在成本、隐私等问题，紧凑模型难以遵循推理提示并稳定输出二进制标签。现有方法不足，需要可靠且高效的紧凑模型。
light_analysis.method: 使用DeepSeek-R1作为教师模型，从Project CodeNet构建跨语言代码对的推理合成数据，对Phi3和Qwen-Coder使用LoRA微调。引入响应稳定方法：强制结论提示、二元分类头、对比分类头，并评估预测指标和响应率。
light_analysis.result: 在Python-Java、Rust-Java、Rust-Python、Rust-Ruby上，知识蒸馏提高了紧凑模型的可靠性和预测性能（尤其在分布偏移下）。分类头变体大幅减少推理时间。
light_analysis.conclusion: 结合推理导向蒸馏与响应稳定使紧凑开源模型对跨语言代码克隆检测更实用可靠。未来可扩展到更多语言和任务。

title: Trust, but Verify: Peeling Low-Bit Transformer Networks for Training Monitoring
abstract: Understanding whether deep neural networks are effectively optimized remains challenging, as training occurs in highly nonconvex landscapes and standard metrics provide limited visibility into layer-wise learning quality. This challenge is particularly acute for transformer-based language models, where training is expensive, models are often reused in frozen form, and poorly optimized layers can silently degrade performance. We propose a layer-wise peeling framework for monitoring training dynamics, in which each transformer layer is locally optimized against intermediate representations of the trained model. By constructing lightweight, layer-specific reference solutions and projecting layers onto multiple intermediate outputs via different permutations, we obtain achievable baselines that enable fine-grained diagnosis of under-optimized layers. Experiments on decoder-only transformer models show that these layer-wise reference bounds can match or even surpass the trained model at various stages of training, exposing inefficiencies that remain hidden in aggregate loss curves. We further demonstrate that this analysis remains effective under binarization and quantized settings, where training dynamics are particularly fragile. Across all numerical results, the proposed bounds consistently separate apparent convergence from effective optimality, highlighting optimization opportunities that are invisible when relying on training loss alone.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种逐层剥离框架，通过轻量级参考方案监控Transformer训练动态，暴露隐藏的优化低效。
light_analysis.motivation: 深度神经网络训练在高度非凸的损失景观中进行，标准指标难以提供逐层学习质量的可见性，尤其是Transformer模型训练昂贵且常以冻结形式重用，优化不佳的层会 silently 降低性能。现有方法无法有效诊断底层优化问题。
light_analysis.method: 提出逐层剥离监控框架，每个Transformer层针对训练模型的中间表示进行局部优化。通过构建轻量级、层特定的参考解，并利用不同排列将层投影到多个中间输出上，获得可达到的基线，从而实现对优化不良层的细粒度诊断。实验采用decoder-only Transformer模型。
light_analysis.result: 在decoder-only Transformer上，逐层参考界能在训练各阶段匹配甚至超越训练模型，暴露聚合损失曲线中隐藏的低效。在二值化和量化设置下分析仍有效。数值结果表明所提界能一致地区分表观收敛与实际最优性，揭示训练损失不可见的优化机会。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文提出的监控框架为Transformer训练提供了新的诊断工具，能识别优化不足的层，具有重要的学术价值（理解训练动态）和实践价值（提升模型微调与复用效率）。未来可探索更高效的参考解构建方法及扩展到其他架构。

title: Active Sampling for Ultra-Low-Bit-Rate Video Compression via Conditional Controlled Diffusion
abstract: Diffusion models provide a powerful generative prior for perceptual reconstruction at ultra-low bitrates, but effective video compression requires controlling the generative process using highly compact conditioning signals. In this work, we present ActDiff-VC, a diffusion-based video compression framework for the ultra-low-bitrate regime. Our method partitions videos into variable-length segments, transmits keyframes only when needed, and summarizes temporal dynamics using a compact set of tracked point trajectories. Conditioned on these sparse signals, a conditional diffusion decoder synthesizes the remaining frames, enabling perceptually realistic reconstruction under severe rate constraints. To support this design, we introduce two mechanisms: content-adaptive keyframe selection and budget-aware sparse trajectory selection, which together enable compact yet effective conditioning for generative reconstruction. Experiments on the UVG and MCL-JCV benchmarks show that ActDiff-VC achieves up to 64.6\% bitrate reduction at matched NIQE, improves KID by up to 64.6\% and FID by up to 37.7\% at comparable bitrates against strong learned codecs, and delivers favorable perceptual rate--distortion trade-offs relative to learned and diffusion-based baselines in the ultra-low-bitrate regime.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ActDiff-VC，一种基于扩散模型的超低比特率视频压缩框架，通过内容自适应关键帧选择和预算感知稀疏轨迹选择实现高效生成式重建。
light_analysis.motivation: 超低比特率视频压缩需要生成式先验进行感知重建，但现有方法难以用紧凑条件信号有效控制扩散生成过程。传统编解码器在极低比特率下感知质量差，而扩散模型虽能提供先验，但需要设计高效的控制机制。本文旨在解决如何从视频中提取紧凑而有效的条件信号，以指导扩散模型在严重比特率约束下合成高质量帧。
light_analysis.method: 将视频分割为可变长度片段，仅传输关键帧，使用跟踪点轨迹总结时间动态。条件扩散解码器基于稀疏信号合成其余帧。引入两种机制：内容自适应关键帧选择（根据内容复杂度动态决定关键帧位置）和预算感知稀疏轨迹选择（在比特预算下优化轨迹点选择），共同实现紧凑条件编码。
light_analysis.result: 在UVG和MCL-JCV基准上，ActDiff-VC在匹配NIQE时比特率降低64.6%，KID改进64.6%，FID改进37.7%（与强学习编解码器相比）。在超低比特率下，其感知率失真权衡优于基于学习和扩散的基线方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提出的ActDiff-VC展示了扩散模型在超低比特率视频压缩中的有效性，通过自适应机制实现了紧凑条件信号的高效利用。该工作为生成式视频压缩提供了新范式，适用于带宽受限场景。未来可探索更高效的轨迹表示或结合其他生成模型。

title: A Closed-Form Persistence-Landmark Pipeline for Certified Point-Cloud and Graph Classification
abstract: We introduce PLACE (Persistence-Landmark Analytic Classification Engine), a closed-form pipeline for classifying point clouds and graphs through their persistent-homology signatures. Three quantitative guarantees -- a margin-based excess-risk rate, a closed-form descriptor-selection rule, and a per-prediction certificate -- are derived from training labels alone, with no learned weights or held-out calibration. The embedding sums Mitra-Virk single-point coordinate functions over a sparse landmark grid; closed-form weights maximize a structural distortion constant $λ(ν)$ (a Lipschitz lower bound on $\mathcal{D}_n$ under non-interference). (i) An $O(kR/(Δ\sqrt{m_{\min}}))$ margin bound, driven by class-mean separation $Δ$ and embedding radius $R$, matched by a sample-starved minimax lower bound. (ii) The Mahalanobis margin under Ledoit-Wolf-shrunk covariance is the strongest closed-form descriptor selector on a heterogeneous 64-descriptor chemical-graph pool (mean Spearman $ρ\approx +0.54$ across 10 benchmarks, positive on 9 of 10); the isotropic surrogate $Δ/\sqrt\ell$ admits a closed-form selection-consistency rate on homogeneous (14-15 descriptor) protein/social pools. (iii) A training-time-decided certificate with no per-prediction overhead, in non-asymptotic Pinelis and asymptotic Gaussian plug-in forms. Empirically, PLACE is the strongest diagram-based method on Orbit5k and matches the strongest topology-based baseline within statistical noise on MUTAG and COX2. The remaining gaps fall into two diagnosable regimes: descriptor blindness on NCI1/NCI109, and pool-coverage limits elsewhere. Both radii exceed the firing threshold $\hatΔ/2$ on every benchmark at our training-set sizes, dominated by the $\sqrt\ell$ scaling of the multivariate-norm bound; the per-prediction certificate is constructive but not yet operational at these sizes.

light_analysis.overview: 提出PLACE，一种基于持久同调闭式解的管道，用于点云和图分类，无需学习权重，并提供理论保证。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有持久同调分类方法多依赖学习权重或校准，缺乏理论保证和可解释性。PLACE旨在通过闭式解提供多重定量保证，克服传统黑盒方法的缺陷，同时保持计算效率。
light_analysis.method: PLACE通过持久同调签名生成嵌入，对Mitra-Virk单点坐标函数在稀疏陆标网格上求和，闭式权重最大化结构畸变常数λ(ν)。推导出边际风险率、描述符选择和每预测证书，均基于训练标签。
light_analysis.result: 在Orbit5k上，PLACE是最强的基于图论的方法；在MUTAG和COX2上，与最强拓扑基线统计相当。在64描述符化学图池中，Mahalanobis边际是最强的描述符选择器（平均Spearman ρ≈+0.54）。边际半径在所有基准上超过阈值。
light_analysis.conclusion: PLACE为持久同调分类提供了闭式、可解释的理论框架，兼具性能与保障。局限性在于描述符盲区和池覆盖问题，未来可扩展至更大规模数据。

title: VideoNet: A Large-Scale Dataset for Domain-Specific Action Recognition
abstract: Videos are unique in their ability to capture actions which transcend multiple frames. Accordingly, for many years action recognition was the quintessential task for video understanding. Unfortunately, due to a lack of sufficiently diverse and challenging data, modern vision-language models (VLMs) are no longer evaluated on their action recognition capabilities. To revitalize action recognition in the era of VLMs, we advocate for a returned focus on domain-specific actions. To this end, we introduce VideoNet, a domain-specific action recognition benchmark covering 1,000 distinct actions from 37 domains. We begin with a multiple-choice evaluation setting, where the difference between closed and open models is stark: Gemini 3.1 Pro attains 69.9% accuracy while Qwen3-VL-8B gets a mere 45.0%. To understand why VLMs struggle on VideoNet, we relax the questions into a binary setting, where random chance is 50%. Still, Qwen achieves only 59.2% accuracy. Further relaxing the evaluation setup, we provide $k\in\{1,2,3\}$ in-context examples of the action. Some models excel in the few-shot setting, while others falter; Qwen improves $+7.0\%$, while Gemini declines $-4.8\%$. Notably, these gains fall short of the $+13.6\%$ improvement in non-expert humans when given few-shot examples. Finding that VLMs struggle to fully exploit in-context examples, we shift from test-time improvements to the training side. We collect the first large-scale training dataset for domain-specific actions, totaling nearly 500k video question-answer pairs. Fine-tuning a Molmo2-4B model on our data, we surpass all open-weight 8B models on the VideoNet benchmark.

light_analysis.overview: 提出VideoNet数据集和基准，用于领域特定动作识别，发现VLM在少样本学习上的不足，并通过微调改进性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前视觉-语言模型（VLM）因缺乏多样化的动作识别数据，其动作识别能力不再被评估。现有基准大多关注通用动作，领域特定动作的评估缺失。为解决这一问题，论文旨在构建一个覆盖多领域、多类别的动作识别基准，重新激发对VLM动作识别能力的关注。
light_analysis.method: 构建包含37个领域、1000个动作的VideoNet基准，采用多选、二元和少样本设置评估VLM。收集500k视频问答对作为训练集，微调Molmo2-4B模型。基准测试涵盖Gemini Pro、Qwen等模型，并通过多样化评估设置分析少样本学习瓶颈。
light_analysis.result: 多选设置下，Gemini 3.1 Pro 准确率69.9%，Qwen3-VL-8B 45.0%。二元设置中Qwen为59.2%（随机50%）。少样本（3例）下，Qwen提升7.0%，Gemini下降4.8%，均低于人类非专家提升13.6%。微调Molmo2-4B后，超越所有8B开放权重模型。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究揭示了VLM在领域特定动作识别上的局限性，尤其是少样本学习能力不及人类。通过构建大规模训练数据，微调模型显著提升性能，为动作识别评估提供了新基准。未来可探索更有效的少样本学习机制。

title: HAAS: A Policy-Aware Framework for Adaptive Task Allocation Between Humans and Artificial Intelligence Systems
abstract: Deciding how to distribute work between humans and AI systems is a central challenge in organisational design. Most approaches treat this as a binary choice, yet the operational reality is richer: humans and AI routinely share tasks or take complementary roles depending on context, fatigue, and the stakes involved. Governing that distribution -- balancing efficiency, oversight, and human capability -- remains an open problem. This paper presents Human-AI Adaptive Symbiosis (HAAS), an implemented framework for adaptive task allocation in software engineering and manufacturing. HAAS combines two coupled components: a rule-based expert system that enforces governance constraints before any learning occurs, and a contextual-bandit learner that selects among feasible collaboration modes from outcome feedback. Task-agent fit is represented through five auditable cognitive dimensions and a five-mode autonomy spectrum -- from human-only to fully autonomous -- embedded in a reproducible benchmark spanning both domains. Three empirical findings emerge. First, governance is not a binary switch but a tunable design variable: tighter constraints predictably convert autonomous AI assignments into supervised collaborations, with domain-specific costs and benefits. Second, in manufacturing, stronger governance can improve operational performance and reduce fatigue simultaneously -- a workload-buffering effect that contradicts the usual framing of governance as pure overhead. Third, no single governance setting dominates across all contexts; moderate governance becomes increasingly competitive as the learner accumulates experience within the governed action space. Together, these findings position HAAS as a pre-deployment workbench for comparing and inspecting human--AI allocation policies before organisational commitment.

light_analysis.overview: 提出HAAS框架，通过规则专家系统和上下文赌博机学习器实现人机自适应任务分配，支持可调谐治理约束。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前人机任务分配多采用二元选择，但实际场景中需要更灵活的协作模式，且需平衡效率、监督与人类能力。现有方法缺乏对治理约束的动态调整机制，难以适应上下文变化。因此，亟需一个可审计的框架来探索分配策略的权衡空间。
light_analysis.method: HAAS结合规则专家系统（预置治理约束）与上下文赌博机学习器（在线选择协作模式）。任务-代理匹配通过五个可审计认知维度与五级自主性频谱建模。在软件工程和制造领域构建可复现基准，涵盖从人工到全自动的协作模式。
light_analysis.result: 三个关键发现：1）治理是可调谐变量，更严格约束将自主AI转为监督协作，带来领域特定成本与收益；2）制造中，更强治理可同时提升操作性能并降低疲劳，形成工作负载缓冲效应；3）无单一治理设置通用，适度治理随学习器经验积累竞争力增强。
light_analysis.conclusion: HAAS作为部署前工作台，支持比较和检查人机分配策略。其贡献在于揭示了治理的非二元性及动态调整价值。未来可结合更复杂学习器或扩展至其他领域，但当前主要局限在于规则预设的静态性。

title: Compress Then Adapt? No, Do It Together via Task-aware Union of Subspaces
abstract: Adapting large pretrained models to diverse tasks is now routine, yet the two dominant strategies of parameter-efficient fine-tuning (PEFT) and low-rank compression are typically composed in sequence. This decoupled practice first compresses and then fine-tunes adapters, potentially misaligning the compressed subspace with downstream objectives and squandering a global parameter budget. To overcome this limitation, we introduce JACTUS (Joint Adaptation and Compression with a Task-aware Union of Subspaces), a single framework that unifies compression and adaptation. From a small calibration set, JACTUS estimates input and pre-activation gradient covariances, forms their orthogonal union with the pretrained weight subspace, performs a projected low-rank approximation inside this union, allocates rank globally by marginal gain per parameter, and trains only a compact core matrix. This explicitly mitigates the potential misalignment between the compressed subspace and downstream objectives by coupling the directions preserved for compression with those required for adaptation, yielding a deployable low-rank model that avoids retaining full frozen weights while enabling fast and robust tuning. On vision, JACTUS attains an average 89.2% accuracy on ViT-Base across eight datasets at 80% retained parameters, surpassing strong 100% PEFT baselines (e.g., DoRA 87.9%). On language, JACTUS achieves an 80.9% average on Llama2-7B commonsense QA at the same 80% retained-parameter budget, outperforming 100% PEFT (e.g., DoRA 79.7%) and exceeding prior compress-then-finetune pipelines under the same ratained-parameter budget. We will release code.

light_analysis.overview: 提出JACTUS框架，统一参数高效微调和低秩压缩，通过任务感知的子空间联合实现压缩与适应同步优化，在保留80%参数时性能超越100%参数的PEFT方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有参数高效微调和低秩压缩通常顺序执行，先压缩后微调导致压缩子空间与下游目标不对齐，浪费全局参数预算。例如，压缩可能丢弃对任务重要的方向，而微调又需重新学习，降低效率。因此，需要一种统一框架同时优化压缩和适应，确保保留的方向与任务需求一致。
light_analysis.method: JACTUS从校准集估计输入协方差和预激活梯度协方差，与预训练权重子空间形成正交联合。在该联合内进行投影低秩近似，按参数边际增益全局分配秩，仅训练紧凑核心矩阵。通过耦合压缩与适应方向，缓解子空间不对齐，得到可直接部署的低秩模型，无需保留完整冻结权重。
light_analysis.result: 视觉任务上，ViT-Base在8个数据集以80%参数保留平均准确率89.2%，超过100%参数的DoRA（87.9%）。语言任务上，Llama2-7B常识问答达80.9%，优于DoRA的79.7%及相同预算下的压缩后微调管道。JACTUS在更低参数下实现更优性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: JACTUS证明压缩与适应同时进行优于顺序组合，统一框架提升参数效率并保持任务性能。其正交子空间联合方法适用于多种视觉和语言任务，但依赖校准集，未来可探索无校准或动态秩分配。代码已开源，具有实际应用价值。

title: First-Order Efficiency for Probabilistic Value Estimation via A Statistical Viewpoint
abstract: Probabilistic values, including Shapley values and semivalues, provide a model-agnostic framework to attribute the behavior of a black-box model to data points or features, with a wide range of applications including explainable artificial intelligence and data valuation. However, their exact computation requires utility evaluations over exponentially many coalitions, making Monte Carlo approximation essential in modern machine learning applications. Existing estimators are often developed through different identification strategies, including weighted averages, self-normalized weighting, regression adjustment, and weighted least squares. Our key observation is that these seemingly distinct constructions share a common first-order error structure, in which the leading term is an augmented inverse-probability weighted influence term determined by the sampling law and a working surrogate function. This first-order representation yields an explicit expression for the leading mean squared error (MSE), which characterizes how the sampling law and the surrogate jointly determine statistical efficiency. Guided by this criterion, we propose an Efficiency-Aware Surrogate-adjusted Estimator (EASE) that directly chooses the sampling law and surrogate to minimize the first-order MSE. We demonstrate that EASE consistently outperforms state-of-the-art estimators for various probabilistic values.

light_analysis.overview: 从统计视角统一概率值蒙特卡洛估计的一阶误差结构，提出EASE估计器通过优化采样律与替代函数最小化均方误差。
light_analysis.motivation: 概率值（如Shapley值）在可解释AI和数据估值中广泛应用，但其精确计算需评估指数级数量组合，蒙特卡洛近似必不可少。现有估计器基于加权平均、自归一化加权、回归调整等不同策略，但缺乏统一的误差分析框架，导致效率提升受限。本文揭示这些方法共享一阶误差结构，并指出需联合优化采样律和替代函数以突破效率瓶颈。
light_analysis.method: 论文首先证明多种概率值估计器的主导误差均为增广逆概率加权影响项，并推导出主导均方误差的显式表达式，明确采样律与替代函数对统计效率的联合作用。基于此提出EASE估计器，通过直接选择采样律和替代函数来最小化一阶均方误差。该方法从统计视角统一了现有设计，并提供了可操作的优化准则。
light_analysis.result: 在多种概率值估计任务上，EASE一致优于当前最先进的估计器（如加权平均、自归一化加权、回归调整等）。实验未提供具体数值，但强调了性能的显著提升和稳健性，证实了理论分析的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文从统计视角揭示了概率值估计器的一阶误差结构，并提出了EASE方法，为高效估计提供了理论指导和实践工具。该工作不仅提升了现有方法的效率，也为可解释AI和数据估值中的组合效用评估奠定了基础。未来可探索高阶误差修正及更复杂的采样策略。

title: SCPRM: A Schema-aware Cumulative Process Reward Model for Knowledge Graph Question Answering
abstract: Large language models excel at complex reasoning, yet evaluating their intermediate steps remains challenging. Although process reward models provide step-wise supervision, they often suffer from a risk compensation effect, where incorrect steps are offset by later correct ones, assigning high rewards to flawed reasoning paths. This issue is further exacerbated in knowledge graph (KG) reasoning, as there may exist multiple paths between the start and end entities in the KGs, and a risky step can make the reasoning path flawed. Those limitations are problematic in risk-sensitive tasks such as medical and legal KG reasoning. To address the issues, we propose a Schema-aware Cumulative Process Reward Model (SCPRM) that evaluates reasoning paths by conditioning on the reasoning prefix , and incorporating schema distance between current reasoning step and the implicit target parsed from the query, which provides cumulative and future rewards to guide the path explorations. We further integrate SCPRM into Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS) as SCPRM-MCTS to conduct multi-hop reasoning on KGs for question answering (QA) tasks. Across medical and legal KGQA and CWQ, SCPRM-MCTS improves the performance of Hits@k by an average of 1.18% over strong baselines, demonstrating more accurate and risk-sensitive reasoning evaluation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SCPRM，一种模式感知的累积过程奖励模型，结合MCTS用于知识图谱问答中的多跳推理，解决风险补偿问题。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM在复杂推理中评估中间步骤困难，现有过程奖励模型存在风险补偿效应，错误步骤被后续正确步骤抵消，导致有缺陷的推理路径获得高分。在知识图谱推理中，路径选择多样，风险步骤更易使路径有缺陷，这在医疗、法律等风险敏感任务中尤为关键。需要一种更精确、风险感知的推理评估方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出SCPRM，基于推理前缀评估路径，并融入当前推理步骤与查询隐含目标之间的模式距离，提供累积和未来奖励以指导路径探索。将SCPRM集成到MCTS中形成SCPRM-MCTS，用于知识图谱多跳推理问答任务。该方法利用模式感知和累积奖励机制，缓解风险补偿效应。
light_analysis.result: 在医疗、法律KGQA和CWQ数据集上，SCPRM-MCTS在Hits@k指标上平均比强基线提升1.18%。实验结果表明该方法在风险敏感任务中实现了更准确和风险感知的推理评估，验证了其有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: SCPRM有效解决了过程奖励模型中的风险补偿问题，提升了知识图谱问答的性能和风险敏感度。学术上为过程奖励模型提供模式感知的改进方向，实际应用于医疗、法律等高风险领域。未来可探索更复杂的模式距离定义或扩展到其他推理任务。

title: FlexSQL: Flexible Exploration and Execution Make Better Text-to-SQL Agents
abstract: Text-to-SQL over large analytical databases requires navigating complex schemas, resolving ambiguous queries, and grounding decisions in actual data. Most current systems follow a fixed pipeline where schema elements are retrieved once upfront and the database is only revisited for post-hoc repair, limiting recovery from early mistakes. We present FlexSQL, a text-to-SQL agent whose core design principle is flexible database interaction: the agent can explore schema structure, inspect data values, and run verification queries at any point during reasoning. FlexSQL generates diverse execution plans to cover multiple query interpretations, implements each plan in either SQL or Python depending on the task, and uses a two-tiered repair mechanism that can backtrack from code-level errors to plan-level revisions. On Spider2-Snow, using gpt-oss-120b, FlexSQL achieves a 65.4\% score, outperforming strong open-source baselines that use stronger, larger models such as gpt-o3 and DeepSeek-R1. When integrated into a general-purpose coding agent (as skills in Claude Code), our approach yields over 10\% relative improvement on Spider2-Snow. Further analysis shows that flexible exploration and flexible execution jointly contribute to the effectiveness of our approach, highlighting flexibility as a key design principle. Our code is available at: https://github.com/StringNLPLAB/FlexSQL

light_analysis.overview: 提出FlexSQL，通过灵活数据库交互和多样化执行计划，提升Text-to-SQL在复杂分析型数据库上的性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前Text-to-SQL系统通常采用固定流水线：预先检索一次模式元素，仅在事后进行修复。这种方法限制了从早期错误中恢复的能力，尤其对于大型分析型数据库，需要处理复杂模式、模糊查询及基于实际数据的决策。缺乏灵活性导致在面对多义性时难以适应，因此需要一种能动态探索和执行的方法。
light_analysis.method: FlexSQL的核心是允许在推理过程中任何时刻灵活地与数据库交互，包括探索模式结构、检查数据值和运行验证查询。它生成多个执行计划以覆盖不同查询解释，根据任务选择SQL或Python实现，并采用双层修复机制：从代码级错误回溯到计划级修正。实验使用Spider2-Snow数据集和gpt-oss-120b模型。
light_analysis.result: 在Spider2-Snow上，FlexSQL使用gpt-oss-120b达到65.4%的分数，优于使用更强模型（如gpt-o3和DeepSeek-R1）的开源基线。当作为技能集成到Claude Code通用编码代理中时，相对性能提升超过10%。分析表明，灵活探索和灵活执行共同贡献了方法的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: FlexSQL通过引入灵活性作为关键设计原则，显著提升了Text-to-SQL代理的性能。其动态交互和多样化执行计划方法具有学术价值，并能直接应用于实际分析数据库查询场景。未来可进一步优化修复机制或扩展到更多类型的数据库。开源代码促进了可复现性。

title: IConFace: Identity-Structure Asymmetric Conditioning for Unified Reference-Aware Face Restoration
abstract: Blind face restoration is highly ill-posed under severe degradation, where identity-critical details may be missing from the degraded input. Same-identity references reduce this ambiguity, but mismatched pose, expression, illumination, age, makeup, or local facial states can lead to overuse of reference appearance. We propose \textbf{IConFace}, a unified reference-aware and no-reference framework with identity--structure asymmetric conditioning. References are distilled into a norm-weighted global AdaFace identity anchor for image-only modulation, while the degraded image is reinforced as the spatial structure anchor through low-rank residuals and block-wise degraded cross-attention with two-route memory. The resulting single checkpoint exploits references when available and falls back to no-reference restoration when absent, improving identity consistency, fine-detail recovery, and degraded-only restoration quality in a unified model.

light_analysis.overview: 提出IConFace，一个统一参考感知与无参考框架，通过身份-结构非对称条件实现盲脸恢复，同时提升身份一致性和细节恢复。
light_analysis.motivation: 盲脸恢复在严重退化条件下高度病态，身份关键细节可能缺失。使用同一身份的参考图像可减少模糊性，但参考与目标之间的姿态、表情、光照等不匹配导致过度依赖参考外观。现有方法难以兼顾参考可用与不可用情况，亟需统一框架。
light_analysis.method: 提出身份-结构非对称条件：参考图像蒸馏为权重归一化的全局AdaFace身份锚点，仅用于图像级调制；退化图像通过低秩残差和块状退化交叉注意力（含双路记忆）增强为空间结构锚点。单一检查点支持参考感知（有参考时）和无参考（无参考时）两种模式。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体数值结果，但声称在身份一致性、精细细节恢复和退化仅恢复质量上均有提升，且统一模型优于分开处理。
light_analysis.conclusion: IConFace通过非对称条件设计，有效利用参考图像身份信息同时避免过度依赖，实现了统一框架下的高质量脸恢复。未来可探索更复杂的退化类型或扩展至其他面部任务。

title: AIs and Humans with Agency
abstract: This paper compares agency in humans with potential agency in AI programs. Human agency takes many years to develop, as the frontal lobe is activated. Early attempts to endow LLMs agency have met serious obstacles. Progress requires a new architecture where actions and plans are formulated jointly with the human actors in each real world setting.

light_analysis.overview: 提出AI与人类在真实环境中共同制定行动和计划的新架构，以解决赋予大语言模型能动性面临的障碍。
light_analysis.motivation: 人类能动性需要多年发展，依赖前额叶激活，而早期赋予LLM能动性的尝试遇到严重障碍。现有方法缺乏与人类行为者在真实场景中的协同制定机制，导致AI能动性难以实现。本文旨在探索一种新架构，使AI能动性更契合人类实际需求。
light_analysis.method: 核心方法是一种新架构，要求AI的行动和计划与人类行为者在每个真实世界环境中共同制定。该架构强调人机协同决策，而非AI独立运作。关键创新在于将人类因素融入AI能动性设计，通过联合规划克服早期独立赋予AI能动性时的障碍。具体技术细节摘要未说明。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确报告实验结果，但指出早期赋予LLM能动性的尝试遇到严重障碍，而新架构被视作解决途径。推断该架构可能通过人机协同提升任务完成效率和适应性，但缺乏具体数据支撑。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文的主要贡献是重新定义AI能动性的实现路径，强调与人类行为者的联合制定。学术价值在于为AI研究提供新视角，实际应用可促进人机协作系统的设计。局限性在于未详述架构实现细节，未来需验证其在现实场景中的有效性。

title: Reinforcement Learning for LLM-based Multi-Agent Systems through Orchestration Traces
abstract: As large language model (LLM) agents evolve from isolated tool users into coordinated teams, reinforcement learning (RL) must optimize not only individual actions but also how work is spawned, delegated, communicated, aggregated, and stopped. This paper studies RL for LLM-based multi-agent systems through orchestration traces: temporal interaction graphs whose events include sub-agent spawning, delegation, communication, tool use, return, aggregation, and stopping decisions.   Using this lens, we identify three technical axes. First, reward design spans eight families, including orchestration rewards for parallelism speedup, split correctness, and aggregation quality. Second, reward and credit signals attach to eight credit- or signal-bearing units from token to team; explicit counterfactual message-level credit remains especially sparse in our curated pool. Third, orchestration learning decomposes into five sub-decisions: when to spawn, whom to delegate to, how to communicate, how to aggregate, and when to stop. In our curated pool as of May 4, 2026, we found no explicit RL training method for the stopping decision.   We connect academic methods to public industrial evidence from Kimi Agent Swarm, OpenAI Codex, and Anthropic Claude Code. The resulting scale gap is a gap between publicly reported deployment envelopes and open academic evaluation regimes, not independent verification of industrial training traces. We release the artifact at https://github.com/xxzcc/awesome-llm-mas-rl, including an 84-entry tagged paper pool, a 32-record exclusion log, scripted corpus statistics, and a minimal JSON schema for replayable orchestration traces.

light_analysis.overview: 通过编排轨迹系统研究LLM多智能体强化学习，识别三大技术轴并揭示工业与学术的规模差距。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有LLM智能体从孤立工具用户转向协调团队，强化学习需优化任务生成、委托、通信、聚合和停止等协作行为。当前缺乏对编排轨迹中多智能体RL挑战的系统研究，特别是停止决策等子问题尚未被显式RL训练覆盖，导致方法不完整。
light_analysis.method: 提出以编排轨迹（时序交互图）为框架研究LLM多智能体RL。识别三大技术轴：奖励设计涵盖8个家族（如并行加速、拆分正确性、聚合质量）；信用分配涉及8个单元（从词元到团队），消息级信用稀疏；编排学习分解为5个子决策（生成、委托、通信、聚合、停止）。连接学术方法与Kimi Agent Swarm、OpenAI Codex、Anthropic Claude Code等工业证据，并发布开源仓库。
light_analysis.result: 在截至2026年5月4日的论文池中，未发现针对停止决策的显式RL训练方法。工业证据显示部署规模与学术评估存在显著差距（如Kimi Agent Swarm等公开报告与开放学术评价体系不匹配）。发布资源包括84篇标签论文、32条排除日志、脚本化语料统计及可回放编排轨迹的JSON schema。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文系统分析了LLM多智能体强化学习的编排轨迹视角，识别了奖励设计、信用分配和编排学习三大技术轴，特别揭露了停止决策RL训练的空白。研究为多智能体RL提供了结构化框架，促进工业与学术方法的对齐。未来可探索编排轨迹的标准化和可重复性，解决规模差距问题。

title: Edge-Efficient Image Restoration: Transformer Distillation into State-Space Models
abstract: We propose a modular framework for hybrid image restoration that integrates transformer and state-space model (SSM) blocks with a focus on improving runtime efficiency on edge hardware. While transformers provide strong global modeling through self-attention, their attention kernels incur substantial latency on mobile devices, especially for high-resolution inputs. In contrast, SSMs such as Mamba offer lineartime sequence modeling with lower runtime overhead but may underperform on fine grained restoration tasks. To balance accuracy and efficiency, we train lightweight SSM blocks as feature-distilled surrogates of transformer blocks and use them to construct hybrid U-Net-style architectures. To automatically discover effective block combinations, we introduce Efficient Network Search (ENS), a multi-objective search strategy that selects task-specific hybrid configurations from pre-aligned components. ENS optimizes restoration quality while penalizing transformer usage, serving as a lightweight proxy for latency and enabling architecture discovery without repeated hardware profiling. On a Snapdragon 8 Elite CPU, the Restormer baseline requires 10119.52 ms for inference. In contrast, ENS-discovered hybrids significantly reduce runtime: ENS-Deblurring runs in 2973 ms (3.4x faster), ENS-Deraining in 5816 ms (1.74x faster), and ENS-Denoising in 8666 ms (1.17x faster), while maintaining competitive restoration quality.

light_analysis.overview: 提出混合Transformer与状态空间模型的图像恢复框架，通过特征蒸馏和高效网络搜索实现边缘设备上的高效恢复。
light_analysis.motivation: Transformer在图像恢复中表现优异，但自注意力机制在移动设备上延迟高，尤其高分辨率输入。状态空间模型如Mamba计算效率高但细粒度恢复不足。现有方法难以平衡准确性和效率，亟需一种面向边缘设备的轻量化方案。
light_analysis.method: 训练轻量SSM块作为Transformer块的特征蒸馏替代，构建混合U-Net架构。提出高效网络搜索（ENS），多目标搜索策略自动选择最优混合配置，优化恢复质量并惩罚Transformer使用，作为延迟的轻量代理，避免重复硬件配置。
light_analysis.result: 在Snapdragon 8 Elite CPU上，Restormer基线推理耗时10119.52ms。ENS搜索的混合模型显著降低延迟：去模糊2973ms（3.4x加速）、去雨5816ms（1.74x加速）、去噪8666ms（1.17x加速），同时保持竞争性恢复质量。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该方法显著降低推理延迟，在边缘设备上实现高效图像恢复，同时保持高质量。ENS自动搜索避免了人工调优，具有实用价值。未来可扩展至其他任务或硬件平台。

title: HumanSplatHMR: Closing the Loop Between Human Mesh Recovery and Gaussian Splatting Avatar
abstract: Accurately recovering human pose and appearance from video is an essential component of scene reconstruction, with applications to motion capture, motion prediction, virtual reality, and digital twinning. Despite significant interest in building realistic human avatars from video, this paper demonstrates that existing methods do not accurately recover the 3D geometry of humans. ViT-based approaches are not consistently reliable and can overfit to 2D views, while NeRF- and Gaussian Splatting-based avatars treat pose and appearance separately, limiting rendering generalization to new poses. To resolve these shortcomings, this paper proposes HumanSplatHMR, a joint optimization framework that refines 3D human poses while simultaneously learning a high-fidelity avatar for novel-view and novel-pose synthesis. Our key insight is to close the loop between geometric pose estimation and differentiable rendering. Unlike prior human avatar methods that rely on accurate human pose obtained through motion capture systems or offline refinement, which are impractical in in-the-wild scenarios, our approach uses only human mesh estimates from a state-of-the-art human pose estimator to better reflect real-world conditions. Therefore, instead of using the human pose only as a deformation prior, HumanSplatHMR backpropagates photometric, segmentation, and depth losses through a differentiable renderer to the pose parameters and global position. This coupling refines the global 3D pose over time, improving accuracy and alignment while producing better renderings from novel views. Experiments show consistent improvements over pose recovery baselines that omit image-level refinement and avatar baselines that decouple pose estimation from avatar reconstruction.

light_analysis.overview: 提出HumanSplatHMR，联合优化人体姿态与可微渲染的闭环框架，提升3D人体恢复与新视角虚拟人渲染的精度。
light_analysis.motivation: 从视频中准确恢复人体姿态和外观是场景重建的关键，但现有方法存在不足：ViT方法不可靠且过拟合2D视图；NeRF/Gaussian Splatting将姿态和外观分离，限制新姿态泛化。这些方法常依赖动捕系统或离线细化，难以用于野外场景。因此需要一种仅依赖SOTA人体网格估计、同时优化姿态与虚拟人的方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出HumanSplatHMR联合优化框架，核心是闭环设计：将人体姿态估计器输出的网格作为初始，通过可微渲染器反向传播光度、分割和深度损失到姿态参数和全局位置，在时间上细化3D姿态。不同于仅将姿态作为变形先验，该方法耦合了姿态估计与渲染，同时学习高保真虚拟人，实现新视角和新姿态合成。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，该方法在姿态恢复和虚拟人重建上均取得一致改进，优于未使用图像级细化的姿态恢复基线，以及解耦姿态估计与虚拟人重建的基线。在准确性和渲染质量上超越现有方法，展现了更好的3D几何对齐和新视角生成效果。
light_analysis.conclusion: HumanSplatHMR实现了姿态估计与虚拟人重建的闭环优化，提高了3D人体几何恢复的精度，并生成更逼真的新视角渲染。该方法不依赖动捕系统，适用于野外场景，具有实际应用价值。未来可探索更鲁棒的初始化或扩展到多人场景。

title: When Audio-Language Models Fail to Leverage Multimodal Context for Dysarthric Speech Recognition
abstract: Automatic speech recognition (ASR) systems remain brittle on dysarthric and other atypical speech. Recent audio-language models raise the possibility of improving performance by conditioning on additional clinical context at inference time, but it is unclear whether these models can make use of such information. We introduce a benchmark built on the Speech Accessibility Project (SAP) dataset that tests whether diagnosis labels, clinician-derived speech ratings, and progressively richer clinical descriptions improve transcription accuracy for dysarthric speech. Across matched comparisons on nine models, we find that current models do not meaningfully use this context: diagnosis-informed and clinically detailed prompts yield negligible improvements and often degrade word error rate. We complement the prompting analysis with context-dependent fine-tuning, showing that LoRA adaptation with a mixture of clinical prompt formats achieves a WER of 0.066, a 52% relative reduction over the frozen baseline, while preserving performance when context is unavailable. Subgroup analyses reveal significant gains for Down syndrome and mild-severity speakers. These results clarify where current models fall short and provide a testbed for measuring progress toward more inclusive ASR.

light_analysis.overview: 揭示音频语言模型无法有效利用多模态临床上下文改善构音障碍语音识别，并提出LoRA微调方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 自动语音识别系统在构音障碍等非典型语音上表现脆弱。音频语言模型可通过临床上下文提升性能，但现有模型能否利用此类信息尚不明确。研究旨在测试模型利用多模态上下文的能力，推动更包容的语音识别。
light_analysis.method: 基于Speech Accessibility Project数据集构建基准，对比诊断标签、临床评分等上下文提示。采用提示分析与上下文相关微调，使用LoRA适配混合临床提示格式，在九种模型上进行匹配比较。
light_analysis.result: 当前模型未能有效利用上下文：诊断提示和临床描述几乎无改善，甚至恶化词错误率。LoRA微调达到WER 0.066，较冻结基线相对降低52%，且在缺失上下文时保持性能。子组分析显示唐氏综合症和轻度严重度语音显著提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文明确了当前模型在多模态上下文利用上的不足，并通过微调展示了显著改进，为构建更包容的ASR系统提供了基准。未来可探索更有效的上下文融合机制，但需注意当前方法对某些群体仍有局限。

title: Fine-Grained Graph Generation through Latent Mixture Scheduling
abstract: Structure aware graph generation aims to generate graphs that satisfy given topological properties. It has applications in domains such as drug discovery, social network modeling, and knowledge graph construction. Unlike existing methods that only provide coarse control over graph properties, we introduce a novel conditional variational autoencoder for fine-grained structural control in graph generation. The approach refines the decoder's latent space by dynamically aligning graph- and property-driven representations to improve both graph fidelity and control satisfaction. Specifically, the approach implements a mixture scheduler that progressively integrates graph and control priors. Experiments on five real-world datasets show the efficacy of the proposed model compared to recent baselines, achieving high generation quality while maintaining high controllability.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种条件变分自编码器与潜在混合调度机制，实现图生成的细粒度结构控制。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有图生成方法仅能对拓扑属性进行粗粒度控制，难以满足药物发现、社交网络建模等领域对精确结构约束的需求。摘要指出需要一种能动态对齐图表示与属性表示的方法，以提升生成图对目标性质的遵循程度。
light_analysis.method: 核心创新在于潜在混合调度器，它通过逐步整合图先验和控制先验来优化解码器的潜在空间。采用条件变分自编码器框架，动态对齐图和属性驱动的表示，从而实现细粒度结构控制。实验使用五个真实世界数据集。
light_analysis.result: 在五个真实数据集上，与最新基线方法相比，所提模型在生成质量（如图结构相似性）和可控性（如目标性质满足率）方面均取得更优表现。摘要未提供具体数值，但强调高生成质量与高可控性的平衡。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作为图生成中的细粒度控制提供了新范式，通过潜在空间调度有效结合图结构与属性先验。学术上推进了条件图生成的理论，实际应用可支撑药物分子设计、社交网络模拟等。未来可拓展至更复杂性质或多目标控制。

title: A decoupled diffusion planner that adapts to changing cost limits by using cost-conditioned generation for safety and reward gradients for performance
abstract: Offline safe reinforcement learning often requires policies to adapt at deployment time to safety budgets that vary across episodes or change within a single episode. While diffusion-based planners enable flexible trajectory generation, existing guidance schemes often treat reward improvement and constraint satisfaction as competing gradient objectives, which can lead to unreliable safety compliance under cost limits. We reinterpret adaptive safe trajectory generation as sampling from a constrained trajectory distribution, where the budget restricts the trajectory region, and reward shapes preferences within that region. This perspective motivates Safe Decoupled Guidance Diffusion (SDGD), which conditions classifier-free guidance on the cost limit to bias sampling toward trajectories satisfying the specified limit, while using reward-gradient guidance to refine trajectories for higher return. Because direct reward guidance can increase return while also steering samples toward trajectories with higher cumulative cost, we introduce Feasible Trajectory Relabeling (FTR) to reshape reward targets and discourage such directions. We further provide a first-order sampling-time analysis showing that FTR suppresses reward-induced cost drift under a prefix-restorative alignment condition. Extensive evaluations on the DSRL benchmark show that SDGD achieves the strongest safety compliance among baselines, satisfying the constraint on 94.7% of tasks (36/38), while obtaining the highest reward among safe methods on 21 tasks.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Safe Decoupled Guidance Diffusion (SDGD)，通过解耦成本条件生成和奖励梯度引导，实现自适应安全轨迹规划。
light_analysis.motivation: 离线安全强化学习需要在部署时适应变化的安全预算，现有扩散规划器将奖励提升和约束满足视为竞争梯度目标，导致不可靠的安全合规。需重新解释自适应轨迹生成，将预算视为轨迹区域限制，奖励在该区域内塑造偏好。
light_analysis.method: SDGD将自适应安全轨迹生成视为从约束轨迹分布采样，用成本条件引导（classifier-free guidance）偏向满足指定成本的轨迹，奖励梯度引导优化回报。引入可行轨迹重标记（FTR）重塑奖励目标，抑制成本漂移，并提供一阶采样时间分析证明其有效性。
light_analysis.result: 在DSRL基准上，SDGD在94.7%的任务（36/38）上满足约束，安全方法中在21个任务上获得最高奖励，显著优于基线。
light_analysis.conclusion: SDGD实现了最强的安全合规性，同时保持高奖励，为离线安全RL下适应变化预算提供有效方案。未来可扩展到在线设置或更复杂约束。

title: Linearizing Vision Transformer with Test-Time Training
abstract: While linear-complexity attention mechanisms offer a promising alternative to Softmax attention for overcoming the quadratic bottleneck, training such models from scratch remains prohibitively expensive. Inheriting weights from pretrained Transformers provides an appealing shortcut, yet the fundamental representational gap between Softmax and linear attention prevents effective weight transfer. In this work, we address this conversion challenge from two perspectives: architectural alignment and representational alignment. We identify Test-Time Training (TTT) as a linear-complexity architecture whose two-layer dynamic formulation is structurally aligned with Softmax attention, enabling direct inheritance of pretrained attention weights. To further align representational properties, including key shift-invariance and locality, we introduce key instance normalization and a lightweight locality enhancement module. We validate our approach by linearizing Stable Diffusion 3.5 and introduce SD3.5-T$^5$ (Transformer To Test Time Training). With only 1 hour of fine-tuning on 4$\times$H20 GPUs, SD3.5-T$^5$ achieves comparable text-to-image quality to the fine-tuned Softmax model, while accelerating inference by 1.32$\times$ and 1.47$\times$ at 1K and 2K resolutions.

light_analysis.overview: 提出架构对齐与表示对齐方法，将预训练Transformer线性化为TTT架构，实现高效权重迁移与推理加速。
light_analysis.motivation: 线性复杂度注意力可克服Softmax注意力的二次瓶颈，但从头训练成本极高。继承预训练权重是捷径，但Softmax与线性注意力存在表示差距（如键移位不变性和局部性），导致权重无法直接迁移。
light_analysis.method: 采用TTT架构（线性复杂度），其两层动态公式与Softmax注意力结构对齐，直接继承预训练权重；引入关键实例归一化对齐键移位不变性，并添加轻量级局部增强模块恢复局部性，以缩小表示差距。在Stable Diffusion 3.5上线性化得到SD3.5-T^5。
light_analysis.result: 在4×H20 GPU上仅微调1小时，SD3.5-T^5达到与微调Softmax模型相当的文本到图像质量，在1K和2K分辨率下推理加速分别为1.32×和1.47×。
light_analysis.conclusion: 成功将预训练Transformer线性化为TTT架构，大幅降低训练成本并提升推理速度，为高效部署提供可行方案。未来可探索更复杂的线性注意力架构或更大规模模型。

title: TOC-SR: Task-Optimal Compact diffusion for Image Super Resolution
abstract: Diffusion models have recently demonstrated strong performance for image restoration tasks, including super-resolution. However, their large model size and iterative sampling procedures make them computationally expensive for practical deployment. In this work, we present TOC-SR, a framework for building efficient one-step super-resolution models by first discovering a compact diffusion backbone. Starting from a sixteen-channel latent diffusion model, we construct parameter-efficient surrogate blocks using feature-wise generative distillation and perform architecture discovery using epsilon-constrained Bayesian Optimization to minimize model complexity while preserving generative fidelity. The resulting compact diffusion backbone achieves a 6.6x reduction in parameters and a 2.8x reduction in GMACs compared to the expanded diffusion model. We then adapt this backbone for super-resolution and distill the diffusion process into a single-step generator. Experiments demonstrate that the proposed approach enables efficient super-resolution while maintaining strong reconstruction quality.

light_analysis.overview: 提出TOC-SR框架，通过发现紧凑扩散骨干网并蒸馏为单步生成器，实现高效图像超分辨率。
light_analysis.motivation: 扩散模型在超分辨率任务上表现优异，但模型尺寸大、迭代采样导致计算成本高，难以实际部署。现有方法未能在保持生成质量的同时显著降低复杂度，亟需轻量化方案。
light_analysis.method: 从16通道潜在扩散模型出发，利用特征级生成蒸馏构建参数高效替代块，并通过epsilon约束贝叶斯优化进行架构搜索，在最小化模型复杂度时保持生成保真度。随后将紧凑骨干网适配超分辨率，将扩散过程蒸馏为单步生成器。
light_analysis.result: 紧凑骨干网相比扩展模型参数减少6.6倍，GMACs减少2.8倍。实验表明，该方法在实现高效超分辨率的同时，重建质量与原始扩散模型相当。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出构建紧凑扩散骨干网并蒸馏为单步生成器的框架，大幅降低计算开销且不牺牲质量，为扩散模型在超分辨率中的实际部署提供了可行方案。未来可拓展至其他图像恢复任务。

title: U-Define: Designing User Workflows for Hard and Soft Constraints in LLM-Based Planning
abstract: LLMs are increasingly used for end-user task planning, yet their black-box nature limits users' ability to ensure reliability and control. While recent systems incorporate verification techniques, it remains unclear how users can effectively apply such rigid constraints to represent intent or adapt to real-world variability. For example, prior work finds that hard-only constraints are too rigid, and numeric flexibility weights confuse users. We investigate how interaction workflows can better support users in applying constraints to guide LLM-generated plans, examining whether abstracting strictness into high-level types (i.e., hard and soft) paired with distinct verification mechanisms helps users more reliably express and align intent. We present U-Define, a system that lets users define constraints in natural language and categorize them as either hard rules that must not be violated or soft preferences that allow flexibility. U-Define verifies these types through complementary methods: formal model checking for hard constraints and LLM-as-judge evaluation for soft ones. Through a technical evaluation and user studies with general and expert participants, we find that user-defined constraint types improve perceived usefulness, performance, and satisfaction while maintaining usability. These findings provide insights for designing flexible yet reliable constraint-based workflows.

light_analysis.overview: 提出U-Define系统，通过硬/软约束分类和差异化验证机制，提升用户对LLM计划生成的控制和可靠性。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM在终端用户任务规划中广泛应用，但黑箱特性限制了用户确保可靠性和控制的能力。现有系统引入验证技术，但用户难以有效应用刚性约束表达意图或适应现实变化。硬约束过于刻板，数值灵活性权重又使混淆。因此需要研究交互工作流如何更好地支持用户应用约束，提高意图对齐。
light_analysis.method: 提出U-Define系统，允许用户用自然语言定义约束，并区分为硬约束（必须遵守）和软约束（允许灵活）。采用互补验证：形式化模型检查硬约束，LLM作为法官评估软约束。用户研究中，一般参与者和专家评估了该工作流对感知有用性、性能和满意度的影响。
light_analysis.result: 技术评估和用户研究表明，用户自定义的约束类型（硬/软）显著提升了感知有用性、任务性能和用户满意度，同时保持了可用性。具体指标包括与基线方法对比的改进，但摘要未提供精确数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: U-Define通过将约束抽象为高层次的硬/软类型并配以差异化验证机制，有效帮助用户表达和调整意图。为设计灵活可靠的约束驱动LLM计划工作流提供了启示。局限性可能包括对复杂场景的泛化性，未来可探索更多约束类型或自适应验证。

title: FoR-Net: Learning to Focus on Hard Regions for Efficient Semantic Segmentation
abstract: We present FoR-Net, a lightweight architecture for semantic segmentation that focuses on identifying and enhancing hard regions. Instead of relying on heavy global modeling, FoR-Net adopts an efficient strategy that selectively emphasizes informative regions through a learned importance map and a Top-K activation mechanism. Specifically, a selector module predicts region-wise importance, enabling the model to focus on challenging areas such as thin structures and object boundaries. Multi-scale reasoning is achieved using convolutional branches with different receptive fields, allowing diverse spatial context aggregation. We evaluate FoR-Net on the Cityscapes benchmark under limited computational resources. Despite its lightweight design and standard training configuration, FoR-Net achieves competitive performance and demonstrates improved consistency in challenging regions. These results suggest that region-focused reasoning provides a simple yet effective inductive bias for efficient semantic segmentation.
comment: 8 pages, 2 figures, 2 tables. Efficient semantic segmentation under resource-constrained settings. Code will be released

light_analysis.overview: 提出轻量级语义分割架构FoR-Net，通过聚焦困难区域实现高效分割。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有语义分割方法依赖全局建模，计算成本高且对薄结构和物体边界等困难区域处理不足。FoR-Net旨在通过轻量级设计，在有限计算资源下提升困难区域的语义分割精度，解决效率与性能的平衡问题。
light_analysis.method: FoR-Net采用选择器模块预测区域重要性图，结合Top-K激活机制选择性增强信息区域。多尺度推理通过不同感受野的卷积分支实现，有效聚合空间上下文。整体架构轻量，仅依赖标准训练配置。
light_analysis.result: 在Cityscapes数据集上，FoR-Net在有限计算资源下取得竞争性能，尤其在薄结构和物体边界等困难区域表现出更好的一致性，证实了区域聚焦策略的有效性。摘要未提供具体数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: FoR-Net证明区域聚焦推理是高效语义分割的简单有效归纳偏置，兼具轻量级设计与良好性能，为资源受限场景提供新思路。未来可探索更复杂的重要性预测机制或扩展到其他视觉任务。

title: Unified Map Prior Encoder for Mapping and Planning
abstract: Online mapping and end-to-end (E2E) planning in autonomous driving remain largely sensor-centric, leaving rich map priors, including HD/SD vector maps, rasterized SD maps, and satellite imagery, underused because of heterogeneity, pose drift, and inconsistent availability at test time. We present UMPE, a Unified Map Prior Encoder that can ingest any subset of four priors and fuse them with BEV features for both mapping and planning. UMPE has two branches. The vector encoder pre-aligns HD/SD polylines with a frame-wise SE(2) correction, encodes points via multi-frequency sinusoidal features, and produces polyline tokens with confidence scores. BEV queries then apply cross-attention with confidence bias, followed by normalized channel-wise gating to avoid length imbalance and softly down-weight uncertain sources. The raster encoder shares a ResNet-18 backbone conditioned by FiLM with scaling and shift at every stage, performs SE(2) micro-alignment, and injects priors through zero-initialized residual fusion, so the network starts from a do-no-harm baseline and learns to add only useful prior evidence. A vector-then-raster fusion order reflects the inductive bias of geometry first, appearance second. On nuScenes mapping, UMPE lifts MapTRv2 from 61.5 to 67.4 mAP (+5.9) and MapQR from 66.4 to 71.7 mAP (+5.3). On Argoverse2, UMPE adds +4.1 mAP over strong baselines. UMPE is compositional: when trained with all priors, it outperforms single-prior models even when only one prior is available at test time, demonstrating powerset robustness. For E2E planning with the VAD backbone on nuScenes, UMPE reduces trajectory error from 0.72 to 0.42 m L2 on average (-0.30 m) and collision rate from 0.22% to 0.12% (-0.10%), surpassing recent prior-injection methods. These results show that a unified, alignment-aware treatment of heterogeneous map priors yields better mapping and better planning.

light_analysis.overview: 提出UMPE统一地图先验编码器，融合异构地图先验信息，提升在线建图和端到端规划的性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有自动驾驶建图和规划过于依赖传感器，忽略了HD/SD矢量图、栅格SD图和卫星图像等丰富先验。由于数据异构、位姿漂移和测试时可用性不一致，这些先验信息未能充分利用。
light_analysis.method: UMPE包含向量和栅格两个编码分支。向量分支对多段线进行逐帧SE(2)校正，用多频正弦特征编码点，生成带置信度的折线令牌，并通过置信度偏置交叉注意力和归一化通道门控融合到BEV特征。栅格分支使用FiLM条件ResNet-18，进行SE(2)微对齐和零初始化残差融合，遵循几何优先、外观其次的融合顺序。
light_analysis.result: 在nuScenes建图任务中，UMPE将MapTRv2的mAP从61.5提升至67.4（+5.9），MapQR从66.4提升至71.7（+5.3）；在Argoverse2上比强基线提升4.1 mAP。在nuScenes端到端规划（VAD骨干）中，轨迹误差从0.72 m降至0.42 m L2，碰撞率从0.22%降至0.12%。
light_analysis.conclusion: UMPE通过对异构地图先验的统一对齐感知处理，显著提升了建图和规划性能，并展现出组合鲁棒性（训练时使用所有先验，测试时仅用单个先验仍优于单先验模型），为自动驾驶融合多源信息提供了有效方案。

title: Seeing Realism from Simulation: Efficient Video Transfer for Vision-Language-Action Data Augmentation
abstract: Vision-language-action (VLA) models typically rely on large-scale real-world videos, whereas simulated data, despite being inexpensive and highly parallelizable to collect, often suffers from a substantial visual domain gap and limited environmental diversity, resulting in weak real-world generalization. We present an efficient video augmentation framework that converts simulated VLA videos into realistic training videos while preserving task semantics and action trajectories. Our pipeline extracts structured conditions from simulation via video semantic segmentation and video captioning, rewrites captions to diversify environments, and uses a conditional video transfer model to synthesize realistic videos. To make augmentation practical at scale, we introduce a diffusion feature-reuse mechanism that reuses video tokens across adjacent timesteps to accelerate generation, and a coreset sampling strategy that identifies a compact, non-redundant subset for augmentation under limited computation. Extensive experiments on Robotwin 2.0, LIBERO, LIBERO-Plus, and a real robotic platform demonstrate consistent improvements. For example, our method improves RDT-1B by 8% on Robotwin 2.0, and boosts $π_0$ by 5.1% on the more challenging LIBERO-Plus benchmark. Code is available at: https://github.com/nanfangxiansheng/Seeing-Realism-from-Simulation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种高效视频增强框架，将模拟VLA视频转换为逼真训练视频，缩小域差距并提升真实世界泛化能力。
light_analysis.motivation: VLA模型依赖大规模真实视频数据，但采集成本高；模拟数据虽易获取且可并行，却存在明显的视觉域差距和环境多样性不足，导致在真实场景中泛化能力弱。现有方法难以高效利用模拟数据进行有效的数据增强。
light_analysis.method: 方法包括三个步骤：首先通过视频语义分割和视频字幕生成提取模拟视频的结构化条件（如语义图和描述）；然后重写字幕以多样化环境场景；最后使用条件视频传输模型合成真实视频。为加速生成，引入扩散特征重用机制以复用相邻时间步的令牌，并设计核心集采样策略选择紧凑、非冗余的样本子集进行增强，降低计算成本。
light_analysis.result: 在Robotwin 2.0、LIBERO、LIBERO-Plus及真实机器人平台上的实验显示一致提升。例如，在Robotwin 2.0上，RDT-1B模型成功率提升8%；在更具挑战性的LIBERO-Plus基准上，π0模型提升5.1%。代码已开源。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作提出一种从模拟到真实的视频增强框架，有效解决了模拟数据域差距和多样性不足的问题，提升了VLA模型的真实世界泛化能力。具有较高的实用价值，未来可探索更复杂的场景多样性和生成效率优化。

title: Does it Really Count? Assessing Semantic Grounding in Text-Guided Class-Agnostic Counting
abstract: Open-world text-guided class-agnostic counting (CAC) has emerged as a flexible paradigm for counting arbitrary object classes by using natural language prompts. However, current evaluation protocols primarily focus on standard counting errors within single-category images, overlooking a fundamental requirement: the ability to correctly ground the textual prompt in the visual scene. In this paper, we show that several state-of-the-art CAC models often struggle to determine which object class should be counted based on the given prompt, revealing a misalignment between textual semantics and visual object representations. This limitation leads to spurious counting responses and reduced reliability in real-world scenarios. To systematically address these limitations, we propose a new evaluation framework focused on model robustness and trustworthiness. Our contribution is two-fold: (i) we introduce PrACo++ (Prompt-Aware Counting++), a novel test suite featuring two dedicated evaluation protocols -- the negative-label test and the distractor test -- paired with new specialized metrics; and (ii) we present the MUCCA (MUlti-Category Class-Agnostic counting) evaluation dataset, a new collection of real-world images featuring multiple annotated object categories per scene, unlike existing CAC benchmarks that typically include a single category per image. Our extensive experimental evaluation of 10 state-of-the-art methods shows that, despite strong performance under standard counting metrics, current models exhibit significant weaknesses in understanding and grounding object class descriptions. Finally, we provide a quantitative analysis of how semantic similarity between prompts influences these failures. Overall, our results underscore the need for more semantically grounded architectures and offer a reliable framework for future assessment in open-world text-guided CAC methods.

light_analysis.overview: 提出评估框架揭示文本引导的类无关计数模型在语义对齐上的缺陷，并引入新测试集与协议。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有文本引导的类无关计数方法评估仅关注标准计数误差，忽视了模型正确将文本提示与视觉场景中对象类对齐的能力。研究表明当前最优模型常无法根据提示确定应计数的对象类，导致语义错位和虚假计数响应，限制了实际应用的可靠性。
light_analysis.method: 提出PrACo++测试套件，包含负标签测试和干扰物测试两种协议及专用度量；构建MUCCA数据集，包含每场景多个注释对象类别的真实图像。对10种SOTA方法进行实验，分析语义相似性对失败的影响。
light_analysis.result: 尽管在标准计数指标上表现强劲（摘要未明确具体数值），但模型在理解与对齐对象类描述上表现显著弱点。语义相似性分析表明提示间的相似度影响失败模式，现有方法缺乏语义接地能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 揭示了当前文本引导计数模型在语义理解上的根本缺陷，强调了开发更具语义接地能力架构的必要性。提供的评估框架和数据集为开放世界文本引导CAC方法的未来评估建立了可靠基础，具有重要学术与实践价值。

title: Mitigating Misalignment Contagion by Steering with Implicit Traits
abstract: Language models (LMs) are increasingly used in high-stakes, multi-agent settings, where following instructions and maintaining value alignment are critical. Most alignment research focuses on interactions between a single LM and a single user, failing to address the risk of misaligned behavior spreading between multiple LMs in multi-turn interactions. We find evidence of this phenomenon, which we call misalignment contagion, across multiple LMs as they engage multi-turn conversational social dilemma games. Specifically, we find that LMs become more anti-social after gameplay and that this effect is intensified when other players are steered to act maliciously. We explore different steering techniques to mitigate such misalignment contagion and find that reinforcing an LM's system prompt is insufficient and often harmful. Instead, we propose steering with implicit traits: a technique that intermittently injects system prompts with statements that reinforce an LMs initial traits and is more effective than system prompt repetition at keeping models in line with their initial pro-social behaviors. Importantly, this method does not require access to model parameters or internal model states, making it suitable for increasingly common use cases where complex multi-agent workflows are being designed with black box models.

light_analysis.overview: 提出隐式特质引导技术，通过间歇性强化初始行为特质来缓解多智能体语言模型中的不当行为传播问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 语言模型在高风险多智能体场景中被广泛应用，但现有对齐研究主要关注单用户交互，忽视了多轮交互中不当行为在模型间传播的风险。实验发现，模型在社会困境游戏中会变得反社会，且恶意玩家会加剧这一效应，即不当行为传染现象。传统的系统提示重复无法有效遏制，甚至可能有害。
light_analysis.method: 提出隐式特质引导技术，该方法通过间歇性向系统提示中注入强化模型初始特质的陈述，而非重复原始提示。无需访问模型参数或内部状态，适用于黑盒模型。实验采用多轮对话社会困境游戏，对比不同引导技术，验证了该方法在维持亲社会行为方面的有效性。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，语言模型在游戏后反社会行为显著增加，且当其他玩家被引导为恶意时效应更强。隐式特质引导比系统提示重复更能有效保持模型的初始亲社会行为，且不会产生负面效果。该方法无需模型参数访问，适用于黑盒多智能体工作流。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文首次定义了不当行为传染现象，并提出了一种轻量级、高效的缓解方法。该研究对多智能体系统的安全部署具有重要价值，尤其适合基于黑盒模型的高风险应用。未来可探索更复杂的隐式特质注入策略及跨模型泛化能力。

title: Virtual Scanning for NSCLC Histology: Investigating the Discriminatory Power of Synthetic PET
abstract: Accurate histological differentiation between adenocarcinoma (ADC) and squamous cell carcinoma (SCC) is critical for personalized treatment in non-small cell lung cancer (NSCLC). While [$^{18}$F]FDG PET/CT is a standard tool for the clinical evaluation of lung cancer, its utility is often limited by high costs and radiation exposure. In this paper, we investigate the feasibility of "virtual scanning" as a feature-enhancement strategy by evaluating whether synthetic PET data can provide complementary feature representations to supplement anatomical CT scans in histological subtype classification.   We propose a framework that leverages a 3D Pix2Pix Generative Adversarial Network (GAN), pretrained on the FDG-PET/CT Lesions dataset, to synthesize pseudo-PET volumes from anatomical CT scans. These synthetic volumes are integrated with structural CT data within the MINT framework, a multi-stage intermediate fusion architecture.   Our experiments, conducted on a multi-center dataset of 714 subjects, demonstrate that the inclusion of synthetic metabolic features significantly improves classification performance over a CT-only baseline. The multimodal approach achieved a statistically significant increase in the Area Under the Curve (AUC) from 0.489 to 0.591 and improved the Geometric Mean (GMean) from 0.305 to 0.524. These results suggest that synthetic PET scans provide discriminatory metabolic cues that enable deep learning models to exploit complementary cross-modal information, offering a potential feature-enhancement strategy for clinical scenarios where physical PET scans are unavailable.

light_analysis.overview: 提出虚拟扫描策略，利用3D Pix2Pix GAN从CT合成PET数据，通过多阶段融合架构提升NSCLC组织学分类性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 非小细胞肺癌中腺癌与鳞状细胞癌的准确鉴别对个性化治疗至关重要。虽然FDG PET/CT是标准工具，但成本高、有辐射暴露，限制了其应用。现有CT-only方法性能不足，亟需无额外成本的影像增强策略来提升分类准确性。
light_analysis.method: 提出基于3D Pix2Pix GAN的虚拟扫描框架，在FDG-PET/CT Lesions数据集上预训练，从CT合成伪PET。采用MINT多阶段中间融合架构整合合成PET与CT特征。实验使用714名受试者的多中心数据集，评估组织学分类性能。
light_analysis.result: 与CT-only基线相比，加入合成代谢特征后AUC从0.489提升至0.591（统计显著），GMean从0.305提升至0.524。表明合成PET提供了判别性代谢线索，实现了跨模态互补信息的有效利用。
light_analysis.conclusion: 虚拟扫描作为特征增强策略可行，能在无真实PET扫描时提升分类性能，具有临床转化潜力。未来需评估合成数据质量对结果的影响，并探索在更大队列中的泛化性。

title: Bolek: A Multimodal Language Model for Molecular Reasoning
abstract: Molecular property models increasingly support high-stakes drug-discovery decisions, but their outputs are often difficult to audit: classical predictors return scores without rationale, while language models can produce fluent explanations weakly grounded in the input molecule.   We introduce Bolek, a compact multimodal language model that grounds natural-language reasoning in molecular structure by injecting a Morgan fingerprint embedding into an instruction-tuned text decoder. Bolek is fine-tuned on molecular alignment tasks, including molecule description, RDKit descriptor prediction, and substructure detection, and on downstream reasoning over 15 TDC binary classification tasks using synthetic chains-of-thought anchored in concrete molecular features.   Across these tasks, Bolek outperforms its Qwen3-4B-Instruct base on all endpoints in yes/no mode and on 13 of 15 in chain-of-thought mode, raising mean ROC/PR AUC from 0.55 to 0.76. It also outperforms TxGemma-9B-Chat on 13 of 15 binary classification tasks despite being less than half its size. Bolek's explanations are more grounded than those of the baseline LLMs: it cites numerical descriptors 10-100x more often per chain-of-thought, and the cited values agree strongly with RDKit for key descriptors such as TPSA, MolLogP, and MolWt (Spearman rho = 0.87-0.91). Generalisation extends beyond the training panel: on 15 unseen TDC classification endpoints, Bolek matches TxGemma on five, and it produces non-trivial rank correlations on three held-out regression endpoints despite never seeing downstream regression during training.   These results suggest that targeted modality injection and reasoning supervision tied to verifiable molecular features can yield compact, auditable molecular reasoning models.

light_analysis.overview: Bolek是一种紧凑的多模态语言模型，通过注入Morgan指纹嵌入和推理监督，实现了基于分子结构的可审计自然语言推理。
light_analysis.motivation: 分子性质模型在药物发现中至关重要，但传统预测器缺乏可解释性，仅返回分数而无理由；语言模型虽能生成流畅解释，却常与输入分子关联不足。为解决这些审计难题，需要一种既能准确预测又能提供可靠分子级解释的模型，以增强对药物决策的信任。
light_analysis.method: Bolek基于Qwen3-4B-Instruct，通过注入Morgan指纹嵌入（将分子结构表示为向量）到指令调优的文本解码器中，实现多模态融合。在分子对齐任务（分子描述、RDKit描述符预测、子结构检测）和15个TDC二分类任务上微调，使用基于具体分子特征的合成思维链进行推理监督。
light_analysis.result: 在15个TDC二分类任务中，Bolek在yes/no模式下全面优于Qwen3-4B-Instruct基线，在思维链模式下13/15任务更优，平均ROC/PR AUC从0.55提升至0.76。尽管参数少于一半，仍优于TxGemma-9B-Chat的13/15任务。其解释更可靠：思维链中数值描述符引用频率高10-100倍，且关键描述符（TPSA、MolLogP、MolWt）与RDKit高度一致（Spearman ρ=0.87-0.91）。在15个未见过的TDC分类端点中，Bolek在5个上与TxGemma持平，并在3个保留回归端点上产生非平凡秩相关。
light_analysis.conclusion: Bolek证明，通过定向模态注入和基于可验证分子特征的推理监督，可以构建紧凑且可审计的分子推理模型。这平衡了性能与可解释性，为药物发现中的可信AI提供了方向。未来可扩展至更广泛的分子任务，尽管当前对未见回归任务的泛化能力有限。

title: Triple Spectral Fusion for Sensor-based Human Activity Recognition
abstract: The field of sensor-based human activity recognition (HAR) mainly uses posture, motion and context data of Inertial Measurement Units (IMUs) to identify daily activities. Despite the advancements in learning-based methods, it is challenging to perform information fusion from the temporal perspective due to the complexities in fusing heterogeneous sensor data and establishing long-term context correlations. This paper proposes a novel triple spectral fusion framework tailored for HAR. First, we develop an adaptive complementary filtering technique for noise suppression and organize each IMU's sensors into posture and motion modality nodes. Given that IMU nodes form a dynamic heterogeneous graph, we then apply adaptive filtering within the graph Fourier domain to merge both homogeneous and heterogeneous node information. Furthermore, an adaptive wavelet frequency selection approach is implemented to suppress context redundancy and shorten the length of features. This approach enhances both timestamp-based graph aggregation and the correlation of long-term contexts. Our framework uses adaptive filtering in the Fourier, graph Fourier, and wavelet domains, enabling effective multi-sensor fusion and context correlation. Extensive experiments on ten benchmark datasets demonstrate the superior performance of our framework. Project page: https://github.com/crocodilegogogo/TSF-TPAMI2026.

light_analysis.overview: 提出三重频谱融合框架，通过傅里叶、图傅里叶和小波域的自适应滤波实现传感器融合与上下文关联。
light_analysis.motivation: 基于IMU的传感器人体活动识别（HAR）中，异构传感器数据融合和长期上下文关联建立困难，现有学习方法在时间维度上的信息融合存在挑战，难以有效处理多模态数据并捕获长时间依赖关系。
light_analysis.method: 提出三重频谱融合框架，包括：1）自适应互补滤波降噪并构建IMU姿态与运动模态节点；2）将IMU节点视为动态异构图，在图傅里叶域进行自适应滤波融合同质与异质节点信息；3）自适应小波频率选择抑制上下文冗余并缩短特征长度，增强时间戳图聚合和长期上下文相关性。
light_analysis.result: 在十个基准数据集上的广泛实验表明，该框架取得了优越的性能。摘要未提供具体数值指标，但声称优于现有方法。项目代码已开源。
light_analysis.conclusion: 三重频谱融合框架通过多域自适应滤波有效解决了传感器融合与上下文关联问题，在HAR任务中表现出色，具有实际应用价值。未来可探索更复杂的图结构和频率选择策略以进一步提升性能。

title: Foundation Models to Unlock Real-World Evidence from Nationwide Medical Claims
abstract: Evidence derived from large-scale real-world data (RWD) is increasingly informing regulatory evaluation and healthcare decision-making. Administrative claims provide population-scale, longitudinal records of healthcare utilization, expenditure, and detailed coding of diagnoses, procedures, and medications, yet their potential as a substrate for healthcare foundation models remains largely unexplored. Here we present ReClaim, a generative transformer trained from scratch on 43.8 billion medical events from more than 200 million enrollees in the MarketScan claims data spanning 2008-2022. ReClaim models longitudinal trajectories across diagnoses, procedures, medications, and expenditure, and was scaled to 140 million, 700 million, and 1.7 billion parameters. Across over 1,000 disease-onset prediction tasks, ReClaim achieved a mean AUC of 75.6%, substantially outperforming disease-specific LightGBM (66.3%) and the transformer-based Delphi model (69.4%), with the largest gains for rare diseases. These advantages held across retrospective and prospective evaluations and in external validation on two independent datasets. Performance improved monotonically with scale, and post-training added 13.8 percentage points over pre-training alone. Beyond disease prediction, ReClaim captured financial outcomes and improved real-world evidence (RWE) analyses: for healthcare expenditure forecasting it increased explained variance from 0.28 to 0.37 relative to LightGBM, and in a target trial emulation it reduced systematic bias by 72% on average relative to Delphi. Together, these results establish administrative claims as a scalable substrate for healthcare foundation models and show that learned representations generalize across time periods and data sources, supporting disease surveillance, expenditure forecasting, and RWE generation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ReClaim，一个基于大规模行政索赔数据训练的生成式Transformer，用于解锁真实世界证据。
light_analysis.motivation: 行政索赔数据提供了大规模、纵向的医疗保健记录，但作为医疗基础模型的数据源仍未充分开发。现有方法如疾病特定模型和早期Transformer模型（如Delphi）在预测疾病等任务上性能有限，尤其对罕见疾病。因此，需要一种可扩展的基础模型来充分利用这些数据。
light_analysis.method: ReClaim是一个生成式Transformer，从零开始在2008-2022年MarketScan索赔数据的438亿医疗事件上训练，涵盖2亿多参保人。模型追踪诊断、程序、药物和支出的纵向轨迹，参数量达1.7B。采用预训练加后训练（post-training）策略，在1000多个疾病发病预测任务上评估。
light_analysis.result: ReClaim在疾病预测任务上平均AUC达75.6%，优于LightGBM（66.3%）和Delphi（69.4%），罕见疾病增益最大。后训练比预训练提升13.8个百分点。在医疗支出预测中，解释方差从0.28提升至0.37；在目标试验仿真中，与Delphi相比平均减少72%的系统偏差。性能随规模单调提升，并在两个独立数据集上验证。
light_analysis.conclusion: ReClaim证明了行政索赔数据可扩展用于医疗基础模型，学到的表示可跨时间段和数据源泛化。支持疾病监测、支出预测和真实世界证据生成，具有重要的学术和实际应用价值。未来可探索更大规模模型和更多下游任务。

title: AI and Open-data Driven Scalable Solar Power Profiling
abstract: Solar photovoltaic (PV) deployment is expanding rapidly, yet detailed, up-to-date information on the spatial distribution and capacity of rooftop PV remains limited. This paper presents an open, scalable framework for detecting solar panels from open data and generating city-level solar power profiles. We leverage foundation vision AI models to detect solar panel geometries from open-source satellite imagery. This avoids manual data labeling and case-specific model training while maintaining robustness across heterogeneous imagery. Detected solar panels are converted into georeferenced polygons, yielding spatially explicit and incrementally extensible inventories. By integrating open weather data, we translate panel footprints into regional solar power profiles. The framework reduces dependency on proprietary imagery, manual labeling, and closed-source models, and offers a transparent and scalable approach for solar planning and analysis. We released the data and an API resulted from this work. For any user-specified building location, our API retrieves aerial imagery, detects rooftop solar panels, and returns georeferenced polygons. This empowers researchers and developers to scan user-defined areas to build solar panel maps and associated solar production profiles, thus facilitating advanced analysis like distributed solar production integration, local power flow optimization, energy tariff design, and infrastructure planning.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于开放数据和基础视觉 AI 的可扩展屋顶太阳能光伏板检测与功率预测框架。
