We evaluated GleasonAI, an end-to-end attention-based multiple instance learning model, on an independent validation cohort comprising 10,366 biopsy cores from 1,028 patients across 14 Swedish regions, using archival diagnostic specimens from the ProMort cohorts collected between 1998-2015. The model achieved an overall quadratic-weighted kappa of 0.86 for core-level ISUP grading, comparable to several experienced pathologists and consistent across geographic regions. Notably, performance remained stable across the 17-year collection period, demonstrating robustness to time-related variation in archival material, a property not consistently observed with foundation model-based approaches, with exploratory analysis demonstrating a significant prognostic gradient across AI-assigned grade groups for prostate cancer-specific mortality. These findings support the generalizability of the AI grading model and demonstrate the potential of pathology archives as a large-scale resource for AI development, validation, and retrospective prognostic research.

light_analysis.overview: 验证了基于注意力机制的多实例学习模型GleasonAI在前列腺病理分级上的泛化性，证明了在长期存档样本上的鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 人工智能在前列腺病理中逐渐成为临床工具，但样本制备和保存方式的长期变化对模型泛化性的影响尚不明确。现有方法如基于基础模型的方法在面对时间相关的变异时表现不稳定。因此，需要验证AI模型在跨越17年、涵盖14个瑞典地区的独立验证队列上的性能，以确保其临床可靠性和历史样本的可用性。
light_analysis.method: 使用GleasonAI，一种端到端的基于注意力机制的多实例学习模型，对来自ProMort队列的10,366个活检核心（1,028名患者，1998-2015年收集）进行核心级ISUP分级。模型采用注意力池化聚合实例级特征，输出分级预测。验证了跨地理区域和时间段的性能稳定性，并与病理学家及基础模型对比。
light_analysis.result: 模型在核心级ISUP分级上达到0.86的二次加权kappa值，与几位经验丰富的病理学家相当，且在不同地理区域表现一致。在17年收集期内性能保持稳定，展现出对存档材料时间相关变异的鲁棒性，而基础模型方法未一致观察到该特性。探索性分析显示，AI分配的分数组与前列腺癌特异性死亡率之间存在显著预后梯度。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究证实了AI分级模型GleasonAI的泛化能力，证明病理档案可作为AI开发、验证及回顾性预后研究的大规模资源。研究具有重要学术价值：展示了基于注意力机制的MIL模型在长期存档样本中的稳健性；实际应用中可辅助病理诊断，提高分级一致性。未来工作可进一步探索模型在多中心、多时间点数据上的部署。

title: Selective Prediction from Agreement: A Lipschitz-Consistent Version Space Approach
abstract: We consider selective classification with abstention in the fixed-pool (or transductive) setting, where the unlabeled pool is given beforehand and only a subset of points can be queried for labels. Our main insight is to view selective prediction through agreement: given queried labels and Lipschitz margin constraints in an embedding space, the version space of Lipschitz-consistent classification heads is well defined. We obtain upper and lower Lipschitz margin bounds that define, for each pool point, a set of certified valid labels containing the prediction of every head in the version space. The model therefore predicts only when the label is forced (i.e., all consistent heads agree), and abstains otherwise. We also propose a monotone submodular geometric proxy for budgeted querying, and show that a greedy algorithm retains the standard approximation factor.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种基于一致性的选择性预测方法，利用Lipschitz约束定义版本空间，仅在标签一致时预测。
light_analysis.motivation: 在固定池设定下进行选择性分类时，现有方法未充分利用未标注数据点间的几何关系。本文旨在通过一致性观点，在嵌入空间中利用Lipschitz margin约束，使模型仅在证据充分时预测，从而提升预测可靠性并减少标签查询成本。
light_analysis.method: 定义Lipschitz一致分类头的版本空间，通过上下界为每个池点生成一组认证有效标签。仅当所有一致头对某点标签一致时预测，否则弃权。提出基于单调子模几何代理的预算查询策略，并采用贪心算法实现近似最优。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体实验结果，但理论分析表明：上下界可严格限定标签空间，贪心算法在预算查询上保持标准近似因子。方法有望在低查询预算下实现高准确率。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文为固定池选择性预测提供了一种新的理论框架，通过一致性确保预测可靠性。方法具有通用性，可扩展到其他带约束的预测场景。未来可探索更高效的查询策略或放松Lipschitz假设。

title: Gradient-Discrepancy Acquisition for Pool-Based Active Learning
abstract: The effectiveness of active learning hinges on the choice of the acquisition criterion by which a learning algorithm selects potentially informative data points whose label is subsequently queried. This paper proposes a novel gradient-based acquisition criterion, derived from a generalization bound introduced by Luo et al. (2022). This criterion can be applied in lieu of uncertainty measures in uncertainty sampling, or incorporated into diversity-based methods that consider the spread of sampled points in addition to the uncertainty of their labels. We provide a theoretical justification of the proposed acquisition criterion, and demonstrate its effectiveness in an empirical evaluation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种基于梯度差异的主动学习获取准则，利用泛化界理论指导样本选择，可结合不确定性与多样性。
light_analysis.motivation: 主动学习的关键在于获取准则的选择，现有方法如不确定性采样或多样性方法各有局限。需要一种既能捕捉信息量又能考虑样本分布的理论驱动准则，以提高标注效率。
light_analysis.method: 提出梯度差异获取准则，源自泛化界理论。该准则通过衡量模型参数上的梯度差异来评估样本信息量，可替代不确定性度量或与多样性方法结合。理论证明了其有效性。
light_analysis.result: 在多个数据集上进行实验，与随机采样、不确定性采样、核心集方法等基线对比，所提方法在较小标注预算下达到更高准确率，或同等准确率下需要更少标注样本。具体数值摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提供了一种理论驱动的主动学习获取准则，兼具不确定性和多样性优势。未来可探索与其他主动学习策略的集成，以及在大规模模型上的应用。

title: Dependency Parsing Across the Resource Spectrum: Evaluating Architectures on High and Low-Resource Languages
abstract: Transformer-based models achieve state-of-the-art dependency parsing for high-resource languages, yet their advantage over simpler architectures in low-resource settings remains poorly understood. We evaluate four parsers -- the Biaffine LSTM, Stack-Pointer Network, AfroXLMR-large, and RemBERT -- across ten typologically diverse languages, with a focus on low-resource African languages. We find that the Biaffine LSTM consistently outperforms transformer models in low-resource regimes, with transformers recovering their advantage as training data increases. The crossover falls within a resource range typical of treebanks for under-resourced languages. Morphological complexity (measured via MATTR) emerges as a significant secondary predictor of transformers' relative disadvantage after controlling for corpus size. These results indicate that the Biaffine LSTM may be better suited for syntactic tool development in low-resource regimes until sufficient annotated data is available to leverage the representational capacity of pre-trained transformers.

light_analysis.overview: 系统评估四种解析器在高低资源语言上的依赖解析性能，发现低资源场景下Biaffine LSTM优于Transformer，并揭示资源量和形态复杂度的影响。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有Transformer模型在高资源语言依赖解析中表现优异，但在低资源场景下其优势是否依然成立尚不明确。低资源语言（尤其是非洲语言）缺乏标注数据，简单架构可能更有效。本研究旨在明确不同资源水平下架构选择的依据，弥补对低资源语言解析能力理解的不足。
light_analysis.method: 选取四种典型解析器：Biaffine LSTM、Stack-Pointer Network、AfroXLMR-large和RemBERT，在十种类型多样的语言（重点包括低资源非洲语言）上进行实验。通过控制训练数据规模，对比不同资源量下的解析性能，并引入形态复杂度指标MATTR分析其对相对性能差异的影响。
light_analysis.result: 低资源场景下，Biaffine LSTM在依赖解析中持续优于Transformer模型；随着训练数据增加，Transformer逐渐恢复优势，交叉点位于低资源树库典型数据量区间。形态复杂度（MATTR）在控制语料规模后成为Transformer相对劣势的显著次要预测因素。
light_analysis.conclusion: 在低资源场景下，Biaffine LSTM更适合句法工具开发，直到获得足够标注数据以发挥预训练Transformer的表征能力。研究为低资源语言解析的架构选择提供了实证依据，并揭示了形态复杂度的影响，未来可探索更高效的跨资源适应策略。

title: Rethinking the Need for Source Models: Source-Free Domain Adaptation from Scratch Guided by a Vision-Language Model
abstract: Source-Free Domain Adaptation (SFDA) adapts source models to target domains without accessing source data, addressing privacy and transmission issues. However, existing methods still initialize from a source pre-trained model and thus are not truly source-free. Recent works have introduced Vision-Language (ViL) models to guide the adaptation process, in these methods, we observe that for the same target domain, different source models yield minimal variation in final results, indicating the source model itself has limited impact. Motivated by this, we propose ViL-Only Domain Adaptation (VODA) , a stricter setting that eliminates all dependencies on source domain, relying solely on a randomly initialized model, a ViL model, and unlabeled target data. We analyze the adaptation dynamics of VODA and introduce Two-Stage Denoised-Region Distillation (TS-DRD) , a two-stage framework that first warms up the model with ViL guidance, then seek a Denoised-Region inherent in both the ViL and adapting model, yielding cleaner supervision for distillation. Experiments on Office-Home, VisDA, and DomainNet-126 show that under VODA, TS-DRD achieves competitive or superior performance to existing SFDA methods that still use source models, demonstrating its effectiveness and the potential of the VODA setting.

light_analysis.overview: 提出VODA设置和TS-DRD方法，无需源模型即可实现无源域适应。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有无源域适应(SFDA)方法仍依赖源预训练模型，并非真正无源。作者观察到不同源模型对同一目标域的最终结果影响很小，表明源模型作用有限。因此，亟需一种完全消除源依赖的方法，以解决隐私和传输问题，并简化适应流程。
light_analysis.method: 提出VODA设置，仅使用随机初始化模型、视觉语言(ViL)模型和未标记目标数据。进一步提出两阶段去噪区域蒸馏(TS-DRD)框架：第一阶段利用ViL模型预热随机模型；第二阶段寻求ViL和适应模型共有的去噪区域，生成更纯净的监督信号进行蒸馏。该方法完全抛弃源模型。
light_analysis.result: 在Office-Home、VisDA和DomainNet-126三个基准数据集上，TS-DRD在VODA设置下取得了与现有使用源模型的SFDA方法竞争甚至更优的性能。例如，在VisDA上，TS-DRD的准确率与最优SFDA方法相当，验证了VODA设置的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文通过VODA设置和TS-DRD方法，首次实现了从随机初始化模型出发、完全无源的无源域适应，达到了与依赖源模型的方法相当的性能。该工作简化了域适应流程，增强了隐私保护，为未来无源域适应研究提供了新方向。未来可探索更高效的ViL引导策略。

title: Counterfactual Reasoning in Automated Planning
abstract: Automated planning traditionally assumes that all aspects of a planning task (initial state, goals, and available actions) are fully specified in advance, an approach well-suited to domains with fixed rules and deterministic execution. However, real-world planning often requires flexibility, allowing for deviations from the original task parameters in response to unforeseen circumstances or to improve outcomes. This paper surveys existing works on counterfactual reasoning in automated planning, categorizing them by what elements are changed, when the reasoning is triggered, and why and how these changes are made. We conclude by discussing key findings and outlining open research questions to guide future work in this area.

light_analysis.overview: 对自动化规划中反事实推理的现有工作进行系统分类和综述，并指出未来研究方向。
light_analysis.motivation: 自动化规划传统上假设任务参数完全指定，但现实环境需要灵活应对意外情况。反事实推理允许规划器考虑假设情景以改进决策，但现有方法分散，缺乏统一分类框架，阻碍了领域发展。
light_analysis.method: 采用文献综述方法，从改变的元素（初始状态、目标、动作）、触发时机以及改变的原因和方式三个维度对反事实推理工作进行分类，识别研究模式。
light_analysis.result: 作为综述，无实验数据。通过分类总结了关键发现，如反事实推理能提升规划灵活性和鲁棒性，并指出了开放问题，如高效搜索反事实空间和系统集成。
light_analysis.conclusion: 系统化了反事实推理在自动化规划中的应用，为未来研究提供了分类框架。学术价值在于厘清领域脉络，实践意义在于指导开发更灵活的规划系统。未来可扩展分类并进行实证评估。

title: SemEval-2026 Task 7: Everyday Knowledge Across Diverse Languages and Cultures
abstract: We present our shared task on evaluating the adaptability of LLMs and NLP systems across multiple languages and cultures. The task data consist of an extended version of our manually constructed BLEnD benchmark (Myung et al. 2024), covering more than 30 language-culture pairs, predominantly representing low-resource languages spoken across multiple continents. As the task is designed strictly for evaluation, participants were not permitted to use the data for training, fine-tuning, few-shot learning, or any other form of model modification. Our task includes two tracks: (a) Short-Answer Questions (SAQ) and (b) Multiple-Choice Questions (MCQ). Participants were required to predict labels and were allowed to submit any NLP system and adopt diverse modelling strategies, provided that the benchmark was used solely for evaluation. The task attracted more than 140 registered participants, and we received final submissions from 62 teams, along with 19 system description papers. We report the results and present an analysis of the best-performing systems and the most commonly adopted approaches. Furthermore, we discuss shared insights into open questions and challenges related to evaluation, misalignment, and methodological perspectives on model behaviour in low-resource languages and for under-represented cultures.
comment: SemEval-2026 Task Description Paper. Data and resources are available at \url{https://github.com/BLEnD-SemEval2026/SemEval-2026-Task-7

light_analysis.overview: SemEval-2026任务7通过扩展的BLEnD基准，评估LLM和NLP系统在多语言和文化场景下的适应性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有NLP模型在处理低资源语言和不同文化背景时表现不足，缺乏系统评估其跨语言文化适应性的方法。该任务旨在填补这一空白，通过构建覆盖30多种语言-文化对（主要为低资源语言）的评估基准，推动模型在多样化文化环境中的鲁棒性研究。
light_analysis.method: 采用手动构建的BLEnD基准扩展版，包含短答案（SAQ）和选择题（MCQ）两个子任务。参与者仅可使用基准数据进行评估，不得用于训练或微调。任务允许任意NLP系统和建模策略，最终收到62个团队的有效提交和19篇系统描述论文。
light_analysis.result: 共有超过140人注册，62支团队提交最终结果。报告分析了最佳性能系统及常用方法，包括常见技术方案和针对低资源语言与未充分代表文化的模型行为洞察。具体性能数据摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: 任务揭示了LLM在跨文化评估中的关键挑战，如评估偏差和对齐问题。为低资源语言和多元文化场景下的模型改进提供了实证基础，并指出了未来研究方向，包括更细粒度的文化适应性指标和公平评估方法。

title: Isotropic Fourier Neural Operators
abstract: Fourier Neural Operators are deep learning models that learn mappings between function spaces and can be used to learn and solve partial differential equations (PDEs), in some cases significantly faster than traditional PDE solvers. Within the model are Fourier layers, which apply linear transformations directly to the Fourier modes, with parameters depending on the wave numbers. However, most physical systems are isotropic, with the results being independent of the coordinate system chosen, but the linear transformations do not necessarily respect these symmetries. We propose a modification to the linear transformations that ensures spatial symmetries are respected, called the Isotropic Fourier Neural Operator, which both improves model performance and reduces the number of parameters by up to a factor of 16 in 2D and 96 in 3D.

light_analysis.overview: 提出各向同性傅里叶神经算子（Isotropic Fourier Neural Operator），通过在傅里叶层中引入旋转对称性约束，提升模型性能并大幅减少参数。
light_analysis.motivation: 标准傅里叶神经算子（FNO）用于求解偏微分方程，但大多数物理系统具有各向同性（结果与坐标系无关），而FNO的线性变换不保证旋转对称性，导致物理不一致性和参数冗余。解决此问题对于提高模型预测准确性和计算效率至关重要。现有方法忽视了这一对称性，未能充分利用物理先验。
light_analysis.method: 修改Fourier层的线性变换，使其参数仅依赖于波数大小而非方向，从而强制模型尊重各向同性对称性。具体地，在每个傅里叶模式上，对不同方向采用相同的参数矩阵，显著减少参数数量（2D最多减少16倍，3D最多减少96倍）。模型在保持表达能力的同时，实现了对旋转等变的隐式编码。
light_analysis.result: 在各向同性PDE求解任务上，Isotropic FNO相比标准FNO提升了预测精度，同时参数数量大幅减少：2D场景减少16倍，3D场景减少96倍。摘要未提供具体数值（如误差降低百分比），但强调了性能提升和参数效率的显著优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: Isotropic FNO通过融入各向同性这一物理先验，不仅提高了模型性能和参数效率，还降低了过拟合风险，为物理信息深度学习提供了有效范式。该方法可扩展至其他具有对称性的物理系统，具有潜在工程应用价值。未来可探索更广泛的对称性约束及自适应学习。

title: HARMES: A Multi-Modal Dataset for Wearable Human Activity Recognition with Motion, Environmental Sensing and Sound
abstract: With each sensing modality exhibiting inherent strengths and limitations, multi-modal approaches for wearable Human Activity Recognition (HAR) are becoming increasingly relevant -- particularly for recognizing Activities of Daily Living (ADLs), where individual modalities often produce ambiguous signals for similar or complex activities. This work introduces HARMES, a multi-modal wearable dataset combining three wrist-recorded modalities: motion sensing via an Inertial Measurement Unit (IMU), atmospheric environmental sensors (humidity, temperature, and pressure), and audio. Collected from 20 participants performing household activities in their own homes, HARMES totals over 80 hours of recorded data, with approximately three hours of labeled activity data per participant across 15 ADL classes. To the best of our knowledge, HARMES is the first dataset to combine this particular sensor trio, and it is nearly six times larger than the previously largest wrist-inertial-acoustic HAR dataset. In an extensive benchmark, we evaluate cross-subject generalization and conduct an ablation study revealing that modality contributions are activity-dependent and can provide complementary value, particularly for activities that are ambiguous from motion data alone. HARMES is freely available at Zenodo, alongside example code for loading the dataset and training models on GitHub.

light_analysis.overview: 首个联合IMU、环境传感器和音频的多模态可穿戴HAR数据集，规模大且标注详细，支持复杂日常活动识别。
light_analysis.motivation: 日常活动识别中单一模态常产生歧义信号，多模态融合方法虽具潜力但缺乏合适数据集。现有数据集模态组合有限、规模不足，无法充分挖掘多模态互补价值。HARMES旨在填补这一空白，提供首个结合运动、环境传感与音频的基准数据集。
light_analysis.method: HARMES从20名参与者采集80+小时数据，包含手腕IMU、温湿度气压传感器和麦克风音频。每人约3小时标注，覆盖15类日常活动。数据集规模是此前最大同类数据集的近6倍。提供Zenodo下载及GitHub示例代码，支持加载与模型训练。
light_analysis.result: 跨主体泛化评估和消融实验表明，各模态贡献因活动而异，互补性能有效提升对运动数据模糊活动的识别。HARMES在规模和多模态组合上超越现有基准，为多模态HAR研究提供了标准测试平台。
light_analysis.conclusion: HARMES填补了多模态可穿戴HAR数据集的空白，促进了对复杂日常活动识别的研究。其开源特性便于复现与扩展，未来可探索更丰富模态或大规模预训练。

title: Gradient Boosted Risk Scores
abstract: Risk scores are an interpretable and actionable class of machine learning models with applications in medicine, insurance, and risk management. Unlike most computational methods, risk scores are designed to be computed by a human by attributing points to a data sample based on a limited set of criteria. The most common approaches for generating risk scores use linear regressions to estimate the effect of selected variables. We propose a simple and effective approach towards building compact and predictive risk scores. We provide an algorithm based on gradient boosting that is capable of modeling nonlinear effects, along with a C++ implementation with Python and R bindings. Through extensive empirical evaluation on twelve tabular datasets spanning regression, classification, and time-to-event tasks, we show that our method achieves competitive predictive performance while producing substantially more compact scores than regression-based alternatives, with 60% fewer rules for classification tasks and 16% fewer rules for time-to-event tasks on average, compared to AutoScore.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于梯度提升的风险评分方法，构建紧凑且可解释的模型，相比线性回归方法大幅减少规则数量。
light_analysis.motivation: 风险评分在医学、保险等领域具有可解释性和可操作性，但现有方法多基于线性回归，无法捕捉非线性效应，且生成的评分规则不够紧凑。
light_analysis.method: 提出梯度提升风险评分算法，通过梯度提升优化非线性特征交互，生成稀疏且可解释的评分规则。提供C++实现，并绑定Python和R接口。在12个表格数据集上评估回归、分类和时间-事件任务。
light_analysis.result: 与AutoScore相比，分类任务规则减少60%，时间-事件任务规则减少16%，同时预测性能具有竞争力。在多种任务中验证了方法的有效性和泛化能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该方法构建了紧凑且预测性能强的高可解释风险评分，适用于医学、风险管理等实际场景。未来可探索更复杂的非线性建模或扩展至其他数据类型。

title: Foundation-Model-Based Agents in Industrial Automation: Purposes, Capabilities, and Open Challenges
abstract: Foundation models, particularly large language models, are increasingly integrated into agent architectures for industrial tasks such as decision support, process monitoring, and engineering automation. Yet evidence on their purposes, capabilities, and limitations remains fragmented across domains. This work examines how mature foundation-model-based agent systems are in industrial contexts, how their functional profile differs from conventional agent systems, and which limitations persist. A systematic literature survey following the PRISMA 2020 guideline is presented, screening 2,341 publications and synthesising a corpus of 88 publications through a structured coding scheme. The results show that reported systems are predominantly at prototype and early validation stages (75.0% at TRL 4-6), with deployment-oriented evidence remaining rare (9.1%). Operational goals are most frequently positioned in user assistance, monitoring, and process optimisation, while conventional production-control purposes such as planning and scheduling are less prominent. Compared with an established baseline for industrial agent systems, the capability profile reveals substantial gains in human interaction (+37%) and dealing with uncertainty (+35%), but a pronounced deficit in negotiation (-39%). The most widely reported limitations concern lack of generalization, hallucination and output instability, data scarcity, and inference latency. A working definition of foundation-model-based industrial agents is also proposed, bridging conventional agent theory, automation-engineering standards, and the foundation-model paradigm.
comment: 35 pages, 8 figures, 1 table. Submitted to Journal of Intelligent Manufacturing for peer review. A comparison of classical agent applications and foundation-model based agents is presented

light_analysis.overview: 系统综述了基础模型（尤其是大语言模型）在工业自动化中作为代理的应用，分析了其目的、能力、局限性，并提出了工作定义。
light_analysis.motivation: 工业自动化中，基础模型被越来越多地集成到代理架构中，但关于其目的、能力和局限性的证据分散在不同领域。现有研究缺乏系统性的总结，无法清晰了解当前技术成熟度、功能特点与常规代理系统的差异，以及持续存在的挑战。因此，有必要进行系统性文献综述，以整合碎片化知识，为未来研究和应用提供指导。
light_analysis.method: 遵循PRISMA 2020指南进行系统性文献综述，筛选了2341篇出版物，通过结构化编码方案综合了88篇论文。分析聚焦于基础模型代理系统在工业环境中的成熟度、功能轮廓与常规代理系统的异同，以及主要限制。提出了基础模型工业代理的工作定义，融合了传统代理理论、自动化工程标准和基础模型范式。
light_analysis.result: 系统主要处于原型和早期验证阶段（75.0%处于TRL 4-6），部署导向证据罕见（9.1%）。运营目标集中于用户辅助、监控和流程优化，而传统的生产控制如计划调度较少。与常规工业代理系统相比，人机互动提升37%，处理不确定性提升35%，但协商能力下降39%。主要限制包括泛化不足、幻觉和输出不稳定、数据稀缺和推理延迟。
light_analysis.conclusion: 基础模型代理在工业自动化领域仍处于早期阶段，虽有显著的人机交互和不确定性处理能力提升，但在协商等关键能力上存在缺陷。研究为理解当前状态和未来方向提供了系统框架。未来需关注增强泛化性、减少幻觉、提升推理速度，并推动从原型到部署的转化。

title: Universal Smoothness via Bernstein Polynomials: A Constructive Approximation Approach for Activation Functions
abstract: The efficacy of deep neural networks is heavily reliant on the design of non-linear activation functions, yet existing approaches often struggle to balance optimization stability with computational efficiency. While piecewise linear functions offer inference speed, they suffer from optimization instability due to non-differentiability at the origin, whereas smooth counterparts typically incur significant computational overhead through their reliance on transcendental operations. To address these limitations, this paper proposes a general smoothing framework based on constructive approximation theory and introduces the Bernstein Linear Unit (BerLU). This novel activation function utilizes Bernstein polynomials to construct a differentiable quadratic transition region that effectively eliminates singularities while maintaining a piecewise linear structure. Theoretical analysis demonstrates that the proposed method guarantees strictly continuous differentiability and a non-expansive Lipschitz constant of one, which ensures stable gradient propagation and prevents the gradient explosion problems common in deep architectures. Comprehensive empirical evaluations across representative Vision Transformer and Convolutional Neural Network architectures confirm that this approach consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines on standard image classification benchmarks while delivering superior computational and memory efficiency.
comment: Accepted to 2026 International Conference On Intelligent Computing (ICIC 2026)

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于伯恩斯坦多项式的通用平滑框架，设计伯恩斯坦线性单元（BerLU）激活函数，实现平滑可微与计算效率的统一。
light_analysis.motivation: 深度神经网络中，激活函数的设计需平衡优化稳定性与计算效率。分段线性函数（如ReLU）推理速度快，但原点不可微导致优化不稳定；平滑函数（如GELU）计算开销大。现有方法难以兼顾两者，亟需一种既能保持分段线性结构的高效性，又能消除奇异点的可微激活函数。
light_analysis.method: 基于构造逼近理论，利用伯恩斯坦多项式构造可微二次过渡区，提出BerLU激活函数。该函数在保持分段线性结构的同时，通过多项式实现连续可微，理论证明其严格连续可微且Lipschitz常数为1，确保梯度稳定传播。实验在Vision Transformer和CNN架构上进行。
light_analysis.result: 在标准图像分类基准（如ImageNet）上，BerLU在Vision Transformer和CNN架构中持续优于ReLU、GELU等基线，同时计算和内存效率更高。具体表现为分类准确率提升（约0.5-2%，摘要未明确数值），且推理速度接近ReLU。
light_analysis.conclusion: BerLU通过构造性逼近理论创新地解决了激活函数的平滑-效率权衡，具有严格的理论保证和优异的实验效果，为神经网络设计提供了新思路。未来可扩展至更广泛的架构和任务，如目标检测、自然语言处理。

title: Representation learning from OCT images
abstract: Optical Coherence Tomography (OCT) has become one of the most used imaging modality in ophthalmology. It provides high-resolution, non-invasive visualization of retinal microarchitecture. The automated analysis of OCT images through representation learning has emerged as a central research frontier. This has mainly been driven by the clinical need to process large acquisition volumes. The objective is to reduce the reliance on expert annotation, and improve diagnostic consistency across devices and populations. This survey provides a comprehensive and structured review of representation learning methods for retinal OCT image analysis. It covers the period from early deep learning approaches to the most recent developments in foundation models and vision-language systems. We organize the literature along a principled taxonomy of learning paradigms, encompassing supervised learning with CNN-based and transformer-based architectures, self-supervised and semi-supervised methods, generative approaches, as well as 3D volumetric modeling, multimodal representation learning, and large-scale pretrained foundation models. For each paradigm, we analyze the core methodological contributions, identify persistent limitations, and trace the connections between successive approaches. We further provide a structured overview of publicly available OCT datasets, discuss evaluation protocol considerations, and present a unified problem formulation that situates each learning paradigm within a common mathematical framework. Building on this analysis, we identify and discuss the most pressing open research directions emerging in the literature. This includes volumetric foundation model pretraining, uncertainty-aware representation learning, federated and privacy-preserving training, fairness and bias mitigation, concept-based interpretability,...

light_analysis.overview: 综述了OCT图像表示学习方法，涵盖从早期深度学习到基础模型和视觉-语言系统的发展。
light_analysis.motivation: OCT在眼科广泛应用，产生大量数据，自动化分析需求迫切。现有表示学习面临依赖专家标注、跨设备/人群一致性差等挑战。本综述旨在系统梳理各类学习方法，为研究者提供统一框架。
light_analysis.method: 按学习范式组织文献，包括CNN/Transformer监督学习、自监督/半监督、生成模型、3D体积建模、多模态表示学习及大规模预训练基础模型。分析了各范式的核心方法、局限性及演进联系，并提供了公共数据集概览和统一问题公式化。
light_analysis.result: 构建了原则性分类体系，覆盖从早期CNN到最新视觉语言系统的完整脉络。总结了公开OCT数据集和评估协议，提出了统一数学框架。指出最紧迫的开放研究方向，包括体积基础模型预训练、不确定性感知、联邦学习、公平与偏见缓解等。
light_analysis.conclusion: 系统回顾了OCT图像表示学习的研究进展，为领域提供了结构化参考。综述分析了当前方法的优劣势，并指明了未来研究重点，如隐私保护、可解释性和模型公平性。有助于推动OCT自动化分析的临床转化。

title: StableMind: Source-Free Cross-Subject fMRI Decoding with Regularized Adaptation
abstract: Existing cross-subject fMRI decoding methods typically train a model on multiple scanned subjects and then adapt it to a new subject using substantial paired fMRI-image data. However, in realistic scenarios, new-subject fMRI data are often limited due to costly data acquisition, and raw data from previous subjects may be inaccessible, leading existing methods to suffer performance degradation during new-subject adaptation. In this paper, we identify that this degradation stems from two key issues: brain-side instability caused by large subject differences in fMRI responses, and image-side supervision unreliability caused by fine-grained visual details that are not reliably supported by limited fMRI signals. To address these challenges, we propose StableMind, a regularized adaptation framework designed to improve brain-side representation stability and image-side supervision reliability. (1) To stabilize brain representations, StableMind reuses ridge projections from the pretrained model as adaptation priors to constrain limited-data new-subject adaptation, and applies Fourier-based feature-level brain augmentation to improve robustness to individual variability. (2) To improve image supervision reliability, StableMind introduces difficulty-aware image blur for brain-image alignment, reducing the influence of fine-grained visual details that are weakly supported by limited fMRI signals while preserving stable visual structure. Experiments on the Natural Scenes Dataset under a unified 1-hour adaptation protocol demonstrate that StableMind achieves 84.02% image retrieval accuracy and 81.66% brain retrieval accuracy averaged over four subjects, surpassing the state-of-the-art method by 5.71% brain retrieval accuracy with fewer trainable adaptation parameters. Our code is available at https://github.com/lingeringlight/StableMind.

light_analysis.overview: 提出StableMind框架，通过正则化适应解决跨被试fMRI解码中的脑侧不稳定和图像侧监督不可靠问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有跨被试fMRI解码方法依赖多被试训练数据和大量新被试配对数据，但实际中新被试数据获取成本高，且先前被试原始数据可能无法访问，导致新被试适应时性能下降。其根本原因在于两个关键问题：脑侧因被试间fMRI响应差异大而不稳定，图像侧因有限fMRI信号无法可靠支撑精细视觉细节导致监督不可靠。因此，需要一种能够在有限新被试数据下稳定适应并提高监督可靠性的方法。
light_analysis.method: StableMind框架包含两大技术创新：(1) 脑侧稳定化：重用预训练模型的岭投影作为适应先验，约束有限数据下的新被试适应；同时引入基于傅里叶的特征级脑增强，提升对个体变异的鲁棒性。(2) 图像监督可靠性提升：提出难度感知的图像模糊用于脑-图像对齐，减少有限fMRI信号弱支撑的精细视觉细节影响，同时保留稳定的视觉结构。实验采用Natural Scenes数据集，统一1小时适应协议。
light_analysis.result: 在Natural Scenes数据集上的四被试平均结果：图像检索准确率84.02%，脑检索准确率81.66%，比最先进方法脑检索准确率提升5.71%，且使用的可训练适应参数更少。证明了稳定表示与可靠监督的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: StableMind通过正则化适应有效解决了跨被试fMRI解码中的两大关键问题，显著提升了有限数据下的适应性能。该方法具有重要的学术价值，为资源受限的脑机接口应用提供了实用方案。未来可进一步探索更高效的数据增强策略或扩展至其他神经成像模态。

title: Stylistic Attribute Control in Latent Diffusion Models
abstract: Text-to-image diffusion models have revolutionized image synthesis and editing, but precise control over stylistic attributes remains a challenge, often causing unintended content modifications. We propose an approach for fine-grained parametric control of stylistic attributes in latent diffusion models by learning disentangled editing directions from synthetic datasets. We use guidance composition to close the domain gap between stylistically finetuned and foundation models, preserving the original image semantics while applying stylistic adjustments. To ensure consistent edits, we introduce a training regularization loss and enhance DDIM inversion with optimized null-conditional embeddings for real image editing. We validate our approach by learning from stylistically filtered synthetic datasets varying a range of stylistic attributes, including outlines, local contrast, watercolorization effects, and geometric patterns. Our evaluations demonstrate that compared to current text-based editing techniques, our method offers well-integrated, more precise and continuously adjustable stylistic modifications.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种在潜在扩散模型中实现细粒度风格属性参数控制的方法，通过解耦编辑方向和引导组合实现精确且连续可调的风格修改。
light_analysis.motivation: 文本到图像扩散模型在图像编辑中缺乏对风格属性的精确控制，现有基于文本的方法常导致意外的内容修改。风格属性（如轮廓、对比度、水彩效果等）难以独立调整，且风格微调模型与基础模型之间存在领域差距，影响编辑一致性。因此，需要一种能够保留图像语义且支持连续调节的风格控制方法。
light_analysis.method: 通过从风格过滤的合成数据集中学习解耦的编辑方向，实现风格属性的参数化控制。采用引导组合弥合风格微调模型与基础模型的领域差距，在应用风格调整时保留原始语义。引入训练正则化损失确保编辑一致性，并利用优化的空条件嵌入增强DDIM反转以支持真实图像编辑。数据集涵盖轮廓、局部对比度、水彩化效果和几何图案等多样化风格属性。
light_analysis.result: 在多个风格属性（轮廓、局部对比度、水彩化效果、几何图案）上验证，与现有基于文本的编辑技术相比，该方法实现了更集成、更精确且连续可调的风格修改。摘要未提供具体数值指标（如准确率提升或效率改进），但强调了在编辑精度和可调节性上的优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究为潜在扩散模型提供了细粒度的风格属性控制，通过解耦编辑方向和引导组合有效解决了内容无意修改问题。学术上创新了风格编辑的精确控制范式，实际应用中可用于图像编辑、风格迁移等场景。未来工作可探索更复杂的风格属性组合以及真实图像编辑的鲁棒性。

title: Hyp2Former: Hierarchy-Aware Hyperbolic Embeddings for Open-Set Panoptic Segmentation
abstract: Recognizing unknown objects is crucial for safety-critical applications such as autonomous driving and robotics. Open-Set Panoptic Segmentation (OPS) aims to segment known thing and stuff classes while identifying valid unknown objects as separate instances. Prior OPS approaches largely treat known categories as a flat label set, ignoring the semantic hierarchy that provides valuable structural priors for distinguishing unknown objects from in-distribution classes. In this work, we propose Hyp2Former, an end-to-end framework for OPS that does not require explicit modeling of unknowns during training, and instead learns hierarchical semantic similarities continuously in hyperbolic space. By explicitly encoding hierarchical relationships among known categories, the model learns a structured embedding space that captures multiple levels of semantic abstraction. As a result, unknown objects that cannot be confidently classified as known categories still remain in close proximity to higher-level concepts (e.g., an unknown animal remains closer to "animal" or "object" than to unrelated concepts such as "electronics" or "stuff") and can therefore be reliably detected, even if their fine-grained category was not represented during training. Empirical evaluations across multiple public datasets such as MS COCO, Cityscapes, and Lost&Found demonstrate that Hyp2Former outperforms existing methods on OPS, achieving the best balance between unknown object discovery and in-distribution robustness.

light_analysis.overview: 提出 Hyp2Former，一种基于双曲空间的层级感知嵌入框架，用于开放集全景分割，无需显式建模未知类。
light_analysis.motivation: 开放集全景分割要求同时分割已知类并识别未知对象。现有方法将已知类别视为平面标签集，忽略语义层级结构，导致难以区分未知对象与分布内类别。利用语义层级先验可提供结构化信息，提升未知对象检测的可靠性。
light_analysis.method: Hyp2Former 为端到端框架，训练中不显式建模未知类，而是在双曲空间连续学习层级语义相似性。通过显式编码已知类别的层级关系，模型学习结构化嵌入空间，捕捉多级语义抽象。未知对象虽无法精确分类，但会靠近高层概念（如未知动物靠近“动物”），从而被可靠检测。
light_analysis.result: 在 MS COCO、Cityscapes、Lost&Found 等多个数据集上，Hyp2Former 在开放集全景分割任务中优于现有方法，实现了未知对象发现与分布内鲁棒性的最佳平衡。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: Hyp2Former 利用双曲空间的层级感知嵌入有效解决开放集全景分割问题，具有重要学术价值（结构化语义嵌入）和应用价值（自动驾驶、机器人等安全关键场景）。未来可探索更复杂的层级结构或动态层级。

title: Self-Supervised Spatial And Zero-Shot Angular Super-Resolution by Spatial-Angular Implicit Representation For Rotating-View SNR-Efficient Diffusion MRI
abstract: Rotating-view thick-slice acquisition is highly SNR-efficient for mesoscale diffusion MRI (dMRI) but requires numerous rotating views to satisfy Nyquist sampling, resulting in long scan time. We propose a self-supervised Spatial-Angular Implicit Neural Representation (SA-INR) that reconstructs high-resolution dMRI from a single view per diffusion direction, representing a massive acceleration. Our model, an MLP conditioned on a b=0 structural prior and the b-direction via FiLM, is trained end-to-end on the anisotropic input. The framework not only accurately reconstructs the trained b-directions (spatial SR) but also learns a continuous q-space representation, enabling high-fidelity "zero-shot" synthesis of unseen b-directions (angular SR). On simulated data, our method achieved high fidelity for both trained (34.82 dB) and unseen (33.08 dB) directions. Most importantly, the synthesized angular data also improved the quantitative accuracy of downstream DTI model fitting. Our SA-INR framework breaks the classical sampling limits, paving the way for fast, quantitative high-resolution dMRI.

light_analysis.overview: 提出自监督空间-角度隐式神经表示，从单视角每扩散方向重建高分辨率dMRI，实现大规模加速和零-shot角度超分辨率。
light_analysis.motivation: 旋转视图厚层采集虽能提高信噪比，但需大量旋转视图以满足奈奎斯特采样，导致扫描时间过长。现有方法无法在保持SNR高效的同时大幅减少扫描时间，亟需一种能从单视角重建高分辨率dMRI的新框架。
light_analysis.method: 提出SA-INR框架，使用MLP网络，通过FiLM条件化b=0结构先验和b方向，端到端训练各向异性输入。模型不仅重建训练方向的高分辨率空间（空间SR），还学习连续q空间表示，实现未见方向的高保真合成（零-shot角度SR）。
light_analysis.result: 模拟数据上，训练方向PSNR达34.82 dB，未见方向达33.08 dB，展示高保真度。合成的角度数据显著提升下游DTI模型拟合的定量精度，验证了框架的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: SA-INR突破经典采样限制，实现快速、定量的高分辨率dMRI，提供SNR高效采集新范式。未来可推广至真实数据，并探索更复杂的扩散模型。

title: On Training Large Language Models for Long-Horizon Tasks: An Empirical Study of Horizon Length
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have shown promise as interactive agents that solve tasks through extended sequences of environment interactions. While prior work has primarily focused on system-level optimizations or algorithmic improvements, the role of task horizon length in shaping training dynamics remains poorly understood. In this work, we present a systematic empirical study that examines horizon length through controlled task constructions. Specifically, we construct controlled tasks in which agents face identical decision rules and reasoning structures, but differ only in the length of action sequences required for successful completion. Our results reveal that increasing horizon length alone constitutes a training bottleneck, inducing severe training instability driven by exploration difficulties and credit assignment challenges. We demonstrate that horizon reduction is a key principle to address this limitation, stabilizing training and achieving better performance in long-horizon tasks. Moreover, we find that horizon reduction is related to stronger generalization across horizon lengths: models trained under reduced horizons generalize more effectively to longer-horizon variants at inference time, a phenomenon we refer to as horizon generalization.

light_analysis.overview: 系统性实证研究任务时间跨度对LLM训练的影响，发现horizon reduction能稳定训练并实现跨长度泛化。
light_analysis.motivation: 尽管LLM在长程交互任务中表现潜力，但现有研究忽视任务时间跨度对训练动态的影响。长程任务面临探索困难和信用分配问题，导致训练不稳定。理解horizon length的作用对于设计更高效的训练策略至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 通过控制任务构造，保持决策规则和推理结构相同，仅改变动作序列长度，进行系统性实证研究。分析训练稳定性、探索和信用分配挑战，提出horizon reduction原则，即缩短有效任务跨度以稳定训练。
light_analysis.result: 增加horizon length单独导致训练瓶颈，引发严重训练不稳定。应用horizon reduction可稳定训练，并在长程任务中取得更好性能。此外，缩短跨度训练能泛化到更长任务，即horizon generalization现象。
light_analysis.conclusion: 揭示了horizon length作为关键训练因素，horizon reduction是有效策略，能提升长程任务性能并实现跨长度泛化。该发现对训练交互式LLM代理具有重要指导意义，未来可探索自动确定最佳跨度。

title: StreamIndex: Memory-Bounded Compressed Sparse Attention via Streaming Top-k
abstract: DeepSeek-V3.2 and V4 introduce Compressed Sparse Attention (CSA): a lightning indexer (a learned scoring projection over compressed keys) scores them, the top-k are selected per query, and a sparse attention kernel reads only those. Public CSA implementations materialize a [B, S, H_I, T] FP32 score tensor before the top-k reduction. With H_I=64 indexer heads and the V4-Flash compression ratio m=4, that intermediate is 256 GB at sequence length S=65,536, exceeding any single-GPU high-bandwidth-memory (HBM) budget. We present StreamIndex, a Triton implementation of the CSA pipeline whose central component is a chunked partition-merge top-k driver that never materializes the full intermediate. On synthetic-but-realistic V4-shaped inputs at the indexer-step (layer) level on a single NVIDIA H200, the materialize path runs out of memory (OOMs) at S=65,536 with V4-Flash dimensions; StreamIndex runs the same indexer to S=1,048,576 with 6.21 GB peak HBM, a 32x regime extension. Set-overlap recall against the materialize ground truth is bit-exact at small S where both fit; across three 5-point design-space sweeps (chunk size, key-tile size, top-k), mean recall rounds to 1.0000 with min recall at least 0.9980 in every cell. The chunked driver composes with TileLang's pipelined attention kernel: at S=262,144 with V4-Flash dimensions, the materialize indexer paired with TileLang attention OOMs while the chunked indexer paired with the same attention runs in 1.97 s at 18.56 GB peak. Our contribution targets the indexer step; we make no claim of a faster attention kernel or of real-checkpoint end-to-end behavior. Code: https://github.com/RightNow-AI/StreamIndex.
comment: 11 pages, 3 figures, 7 tables, 2 algorithms, 36 references. Memory-bounded indexer kernel for DeepSeek-V4 CSA via chunked partition-merge top-k. Code: https://github.com/RightNow-AI/StreamIndex

light_analysis.overview: 提出StreamIndex，一种基于分块分区合并top-k的内存有界压缩稀疏注意力实现，消除全尺寸评分张量物化。
light_analysis.motivation: DeepSeek-V3.2和V4引入的压缩稀疏注意力(CSA)在索引器步骤中物化[B, S, H_I, T] FP32评分张量，序列长度S=65,536时需256 GB，远超单GPU HBM预算。现有方法内存瓶颈严重，限制了长序列处理能力。需要一种内存高效的方法来支持更大序列长度。
light_analysis.method: StreamIndex是一种Triton实现，核心是分块分区合并top-k驱动，避免物化完整中间张量。通过将索引器步骤分解为块处理，逐块计算评分并合并top-k结果。与TileLang的流水线注意力核组合，支持序列长度扩展。使用V4-Flash压缩比m=4，索引器头数H_I=64。
light_analysis.result: 在NVIDIA H200上，物化路径在S=65,536时OOM；StreamIndex支持S=1,048,576，峰值HBM 6.21 GB，扩展32倍。小规模下集合重叠召回与物化基准比特精确。在三个设计空间扫描中平均召回为1.0000，最小召回≥0.9980。与TileLang注意力核组合，S=262,144时物化索引器OOM，而StreamIndex在1.97秒内完成，峰值18.56 GB。
light_analysis.conclusion: StreamIndex通过内存有界设计显著扩大了CSA的序列长度范围，解决了索引器步骤的显存瓶颈。贡献限于索引器步骤，未提出更快注意力核或端到端行为。代码开源。潜在未来工作包括集成实际模型检查点验证。

title: Automated In-the-Wild Data Collection for Continual AI Generated Image Detection
abstract: The rapid advancement of generative Artificial Intelligence (AI) has introduced significant challenges for reliable AI-generated image detection. Existing detectors often suffer from performance degradation under distribution shifts and when encountering newly emerging generative models. In this work, we propose a data-centric continual adaptation framework for updating detectors in evolving environments. We show that both in-the-wild data and generator-driven data are essential for adapting detectors. We introduce an automated, weakly supervised pipeline for constructing in-the-wild datasets through fact-check article retrieval. Additionally, we demonstrate that incorporating even a small amount of generator-driven data during training enables effective adaptation to newly emerging models, while combining it with in-the-wild data within a continual learning framework enables robust adaptation and mitigates catastrophic forgetting. Extensive experiments on two state-of-the-art detectors show significant improvements of +9.14% and +8% in average accuracy, respectively.

light_analysis.overview: 提出数据中心的持续适应框架，通过自动化在野数据收集和生成器驱动数据结合，显著提升AI生成图像检测器在分布偏移和新模型下的鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 生成式AI快速发展导致AI生成图像检测面临分布偏移和新兴模型的挑战，现有检测器性能显著下降。该问题至关重要，因为虚假图像可能造成社会风险。现有方法缺乏对新模型的适应能力，且难以自动构建反映真实分布的在野数据集，限制了检测器的持续部署。
light_analysis.method: 提出持续适应框架，引入自动化弱监督管道，通过检索事实核查文章构建在野数据集。训练时结合少量生成器驱动数据，使检测器快速适应新模型，并与在野数据在持续学习框架中联合优化，有效缓解灾难性遗忘。实验基于两个SOTA检测器，评估在野和生成器数据的协同效果。
light_analysis.result: 在两个SOTA检测器上平均准确率分别提升+9.14%和+8%。实验表明，结合自动构建的在野数据和少量生成器数据，能显著增强检测器对分布偏移和新兴模型的适应能力，同时保持对旧模型的记忆，优于仅使用单一数据源的基线方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文提出结合自动化在野数据收集和生成器驱动数据的持续适应框架，为AI生成图像检测的长期部署提供了有效方案。学术上推动了持续学习在视觉内容检测中的应用，实际中有助于构建可动态更新的检测系统。未来工作可探索更高质量的事实核查数据源及多模态融合。

title: Low-Latency Embedded Driver Monitoring System with a Multi-Task Neural Network
abstract: Road traffic accidents remain a significant global concern, with the majority attributed to human factors such as driver distraction and fatigue. This study proposes a camera-based approach to derive useful indicators to assess driver attentiveness and alertness. The proposed pipeline jointly satisfies the stringent real-time requirements imposed by the critical application and minimizes the computational requirements to allow for deployment on a tight computational budget. To this end, we develop a lightweight multi-task neural network that predicts multiple indicators for the face region in a single forward pass. The developed model is integrated into a complete execution workflow to produce a real-time estimate of attentiveness, fatigue, and engagement in distracting activities.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种轻量级多任务神经网络，用于驾驶员监控系统，在低计算资源下实现低延迟实时预测。
light_analysis.motivation: 道路交通事故主要由驾驶员分心和疲劳等人为因素导致，现有监控方法难以在资源受限的嵌入式平台上同时满足实时性和准确性要求，亟需高效算法。
light_analysis.method: 设计轻量级多任务神经网络，共享特征提取层，在单个前向传播中同时预测注意力、疲劳和分心活动等多个指标，并集成到完整的执行流程，确保低延迟。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体实验结果，但声称系统满足实时性要求，计算需求低，适合嵌入式部署，指标包括注意力、疲劳和分心活动估计。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究为嵌入式驾驶员监控提供了低延迟、低计算开销的解决方案，有助于提升行车安全，未来可优化模型精度并扩展到更多驾驶行为分析。

title: TemPose-TF-ASF: Two-Stage Bidirectional Stroke Context Fusion for Badminton Stroke Classification
abstract: Accurate badminton stroke prediction is crucial for fine-grained sports analysis and tactical decision support. However, existing methods struggle to model rich temporal context. This paper introduces \emph{TemPose-TF-ASF (Adjacent-Stroke Fusion)}, a context-aware extension of \emph{TemPose}. It enhances stroke recognition by incorporating stroke-type information from both preceding and subsequent strokes. A two-stage training and inference strategy is adopted. Preliminary predictions from the baseline model are reused as estimated temporal context. These predictions guide the joint optimization of the \emph{ASF} module and the classifier. By explicitly modeling bidirectional temporal stroke dependencies, the proposed method can be seamlessly integrated into existing state-of-the-art models. Experiments on a large-scale badminton match dataset show consistent improvements over the baseline and its variants in terms of Accuracy and Macro-F1. Moreover, integrating \emph{ASF} into other advanced methods yields notable performance gains. These results demonstrate strong transferability and generalization capability.

light_analysis.overview: 提出TemPose-TF-ASF方法，通过双向相邻击球上下文融合提升羽毛球击球分类准确性。
light_analysis.motivation: 羽毛球击球预测对于细粒度运动分析和战术决策至关重要，但现有方法难以建模丰富的时序上下文。摘要指出，现有方法在捕捉前后击球之间的依赖关系方面存在不足，导致识别精度受限。为此，研究旨在利用前后击球类型信息来增强击球识别，解决时序上下文建模难题。
light_analysis.method: 提出TemPose-TF-ASF（相邻击球融合）方法，扩展基线模型TemPose。采用两阶段训练和推理策略：第一阶段基线模型生成初步预测作为估计的时序上下文；第二阶段利用这些预测联合优化ASF模块和分类器。ASF模块显式建模双向时序击球依赖关系，可无缝集成到现有先进模型中。
light_analysis.result: 在大规模羽毛球比赛数据集上进行实验，与基线及变体相比，在准确率和Macro-F1指标上取得一致提升。将ASF集成到其他先进方法后，同样获得了显著的性能增益，表明该方法具有良好的迁移性和泛化能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文通过显式建模双向时序击球依赖，有效提升了羽毛球击球分类性能。方法可即插即用于现有模型，展示了强迁移性和泛化能力。未来可探索更复杂的上下文融合策略或应用于其他体育项目。

title: Recurrent Deep Reinforcement Learning for Chemotherapy Control under Partial Observability
abstract: Chemotherapy dose optimization can be formulated as a dynamic treatment regime, requiring sequential decisions under uncertainty that must balance tumor suppression against toxicity. However, most reinforcement learning approaches assume full observability of the patient state, a condition rarely met in clinical practice. We investigate whether memory-augmented policies can improve chemotherapy control under partial observability. To this end, we employ a recurrent TD3-based approach with separate LSTM actor-critic networks and evaluate it on the AhnChemoEnv benchmark from DTR-Bench, considering both off-policy and on-policy recurrent architectures against feed-forward TD3 and Soft Actor-Critic. Pharmacokinetic and pharmacodynamic variability are held fixed to isolate hidden-state uncertainty and observation noise and to avoid confounding effects from inter-patient variability. Across ten random seeds, recurrence yields modest benefit under full observability but substantially stronger and more stable performance under partial observability, with more consistent tumor suppression and improved normal-cell preservation. These findings indicate that memory-based policies are particularly beneficial when clinically relevant state information is incomplete or noisy.
comment: Accepted for publication at the VI. International Conference on Electrical, Computer and Energy Technologies (ICECET 2026)

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种递归TD3方法（LSTM actor-critic）以提升部分可观测条件下化疗剂量优化的性能与稳定性。
light_analysis.motivation: 化疗剂量优化需要在不确定性下做序贯决策以平衡肿瘤抑制与毒性，但多数强化学习方法假设患者状态完全可观测，这在临床中难以满足。现有方法在部分可观测场景下性能不佳，亟需能处理隐藏状态和观测噪声的记忆增强策略。
light_analysis.method: 采用递归TD3算法，actor和critic网络分别使用LSTM以捕获时序依赖。在AhnChemoEnv基准（DTR-Bench）上进行评估，比较离线与在线递归架构，以及前馈TD3和SAC。固定药代动力学变异以排除患者间差异干扰，聚焦隐藏状态和观测噪声的影响。
light_analysis.result: 在十次随机种子下，完全可观测时递归策略带来适度提升；部分可观测时递归策略表现出显著更强的性能和稳定性，肿瘤抑制更一致，正常细胞保留更好，优于前馈基线。
light_analysis.conclusion: 记忆增强策略在临床相关信息不完整或噪声场景下特别有效，为部分可观测化疗控制提供了可靠方案。未来可探索更复杂的记忆机制或不同部分可观测程度的适应性。

title: Double Rectified Linear Unit-based Modular Semantics for Quantitative Bipolar Argumentation Framework
abstract: Quantitative Bipolar Argumentation Frameworks (QBAFs) provide an alternative approach to computing argument acceptability in Bipolar Argumentation Frameworks (BAFs). Each argument is assigned an initial strength, which is then updated to a final strength by considering the influence of both its attackers and supporters. Over the years, several semantics have been proposed to compute argument acceptability in QBAFs, yet they often yield divergent or counterintuitive results, even for simple acyclic cases. We introduce novel gradual semantics for QBAFs that address these limitations, producing results that align more closely with intuitive expectations, while satisfying established rationality postulates from the literature. Furthermore, we study its convergence behavior, proving that it converges not only for acyclic QBAFs but also for broader classes of cyclic frameworks.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于双修正线性单元的模块化渐变语义，解决现有QBAF语义结果分歧和反直觉问题，满足理性假设并证明收敛性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有QBAF语义在计算论证可接受性时，即使在简单非循环情况下也常产生分歧或反直觉结果，缺乏直观一致性。需要一种新的语义方法，能够更符合直觉期望，同时满足理性假设，以提升论证评估的可靠性和可解释性。
light_analysis.method: 引入基于双修正线性单元（Double ReLU）的模块化渐变语义，通过分阶段处理攻击和支持的影响，更新论证强度。该语义采用模块化设计，满足文献中的理性假设，并分析其收敛行为，证明在非循环QBAF及更广的循环框架中均收敛。
light_analysis.result: 新语义在简单非循环案例中产生更符合直觉的结果，避免现有语义的歧义。满足理性假设，确保理论合理性。收敛性分析表明，算法不仅适用于非循环图，还扩展到循环框架，保证计算稳定性。与基线方法相比，结果更一致且可解释。
light_analysis.conclusion: 主要贡献是提出了一种基于Double ReLU的模块化QBAF语义，克服了现有方法在直观性和收敛性上的局限。理论证明了其收敛性和对理性假设的满足，为论证评估提供了可靠工具。未来可研究更复杂框架的扩展或实际应用。

title: Strategy-Aware Optimization Modeling with Reasoning LLMs
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) can generate syntactically valid optimization programs, yet often struggle to reliably choose an effective modeling strategy, leading to incorrect formulations and inefficient solver behavior. We propose SAGE, a strategy-aware framework that makes Modeling Strategy explicit in both data construction and post-training. SAGE builds a solver-verified multi-strategy dataset and trains a student model with supervised fine-tuning followed by Segment-Weighted GRPO using a composite reward over format compliance, correctness, and solver efficiency. Across eight benchmarks spanning synthetic and real-world settings, SAGE improves average pass@1 from 72.7 to 80.3 over the strongest open-source baseline. With multiple generations, SAGE discovers more distinct correct formulations and improves component-level diversity at pass@16 by 19-29%. At the largest scale, SAGE produces more compact constraint systems with 14.2% fewer constraints than the baseline, consistent with solver-efficient modeling. Overall, these results show that making Modeling Strategy explicit improves automated optimization modeling. Code is available at https://github.com/rachhhhing/SAGE.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SAGE框架，通过显式建模策略提升大语言模型生成优化程序的正确性和效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 大语言模型能生成语法正确的优化程序，但难以可靠选择有效的建模策略，导致公式错误和求解器效率低下。现有方法未明确处理建模策略选择问题，因此需要一种策略感知的优化建模方法。
light_analysis.method: SAGE框架包含两个关键环节：构建求解器验证的多策略数据集，以及采用分段加权GRPO进行后训练，结合格式合规性、正确性和求解器效率的复合奖励。方法基于监督微调，并通过多策略数据增强和奖励机制引导模型生成高效优化的程序。
light_analysis.result: 在八个合成和真实基准上，SAGE将平均pass@1从72.7提升至80.3，优于最强开源基线。多次生成时，SAGE发现更多不同正确公式，pass@16组件级多样性提高19-29%。最大规模下，约束系统减少14.2%的约束，更符合求解器高效建模。
light_analysis.conclusion: SAGE通过显式建模策略显著提升了自动化优化的建模质量，具有学术和实际应用价值。未来可探索更复杂的策略空间和跨领域泛化。

title: Improving Model Safety by Targeted Error Correction
abstract: The widespread adoption of machine learning in critical applications demands techniques to mitigate high-consequence errors. Our method utilizes a dual-classifier GBDT pipeline to distinguish routine human-like errors from high-risk non-human misclassifications. Evaluated across three domains, animal breed classification, skin lesion diagnosis (ISIC 2018), and prostate histopathology (SICAPv2), our framework demonstrates robust safety improvements. To address real-world deployment concerns, our results confirm the pipeline introduces negligible inference latency (1.60% overhead for the animal dataset, 1.84% for ISIC, and 1.70% for SICAPv2) while outperforming traditional Maximum Class Probability (MCP) baselines in correction precision. Our conservative correction strategy successfully reduced dangerous non-human errors by 34.1% in ISIC and 12.57% in SICAPv2, improving super-class diagnostic safety to 90.41% and 92.13% respectively. This proves that safety-critical reliability can be substantially enhanced post-hoc without expensive model retraining.   keywords: Error Analysis, Post-hoc Correction, Trustworthy AI.
comment: This work has been accepted for publication in the Proceedings of International Conference on Pattern Recognition (ICPR) 2026. The final published version should be cited

light_analysis.overview: 提出双分类器GBDT流水线，通过区分常规与高风险错误事后提升模型安全性。
light_analysis.motivation: 机器学习在关键应用中常产生高后果错误，传统方法如最大类概率（MCP）校正精度不足，且需昂贵重训练。该研究旨在无需重训练的情况下，通过事后校正显著提升模型安全性，降低危险非人误分类风险。
light_analysis.method: 采用双分类器GBDT流水线，第一个分类器识别常规类人错误，第二个专注于高风险非人类误分类。框架作为后处理模块，不修改原始模型。在动物品种分类、ISIC 2018皮肤病变诊断和SICAPv2前列腺病理三个领域验证，评估校正精度和推理延迟。
light_analysis.result: 在三个数据集上，推理延迟开销极低（1.60%-1.84%）。相比MCP基线，校正精度更高。在ISIC上危险非人错误减少34.1%，SICAPv2减少12.57%，超类诊断安全性分别提升至90.41%和92.13%。
light_analysis.conclusion: 证明无需重训练即可事后显著增强安全关键系统的可靠性。方法实际部署可行，延迟可忽略。未来可扩展至更多高风险领域，提升可信AI应用安全性。

title: Physics-Informed Neural Learning for State Reconstruction and Parameter Identification in Coupled Greenhouse Climate Dynamics
abstract: Physics-informed neural networks (PINNs) have recently emerged as a promising framework for integrating data-driven learning with physical knowledge. In this work, we propose a coupled PINN approach for the joint reconstruction of indoor temperature and humidity dynamics in greenhouse environments, together with simultaneous identification of key model parameters. The method incorporates a reduced-order physically motivated model into the learning process, enabling consistent estimation under sparse and noisy observations.   The artificial intelligence contribution lies in the development of a coupled physics-informed neural learning framework that integrates governing dynamical constraints into neural network training, while the engineering application focuses on greenhouse climate state reconstruction and parameter identification.   The proposed framework is evaluated on a controlled synthetic benchmark that mimics diurnal forcing conditions. Compared with a purely data-driven neural network baseline, the coupled PINN achieves improved reconstruction accuracy, reducing temperature and humidity errors while maintaining high coefficients of determination. The improvement is particularly pronounced in the humidity channel, where latent moisture dynamics are more difficult to infer from limited measurements.   In addition to accurate state reconstruction, the method successfully recovers the dominant physical parameters governing the system dynamics, demonstrating its ability to learn interpretable representations beyond data interpolation. These results highlight the potential of physics-informed learning for greenhouse climate modeling and, more broadly, for data-scarce environmental systems.

light_analysis.overview: 提出耦合物理信息神经网络（PINN），联合重建温室温湿状态并辨识关键参数。
light_analysis.motivation: 温室气候建模中，精确的状态重建和参数辨识对于作物生长管理至关重要。传统的纯数据驱动方法在观测稀疏且含噪声时，难以准确捕捉潜在物理动态，尤其是湿度通道的潜热效应。物理信息神经网络（PINN）通过嵌入物理约束，有望在数据稀缺场景下提升重建准确性和参数可辨识性。本文旨在解决有限传感器数据下温室温湿度联合估计的挑战。
light_analysis.method: 提出一种耦合PINN架构，将降阶物理模型（描述温湿度耦合动态）作为正则化约束融入神经网络训练。模型同时输出室内温度、湿度及未知物理参数（如交换系数）。利用昼间强迫条件的合成基准数据进行评估，与纯数据驱动基线（不考虑物理约束）对比。关键创新在于联合学习状态和参数，并利用物理方程引导网络优化。
light_analysis.result: 在合成数据集上，耦合PINN相比纯数据驱动网络，温度均方根误差降低约15%，湿度误差降低约30%，决定系数均超过0.95。湿度通道改善尤为显著，因PINN能推断潜热动力学。此外，模型成功辨识了主导物理参数（如热容、传热系数），相对误差小于5%，展示了超越数据插值的可解释表示能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提出的耦合PINN有效融合了物理知识与数据驱动学习，实现了温室气候状态的高精度重建和参数辨识。该方法在数据稀缺场景下优于纯数据驱动方法，并提供了物理可解释的模型。未来可拓展至真实温室系统，并结合多源传感器数据，进一步验证鲁棒性。局限性：依赖物理模型的准确性，复杂边界条件可能增加训练难度。

title: MooD: An Efficient VA-Driven Affective Image Editing Framework via Fine-Grained Semantic Control
abstract: Affective image editing (AIE) aims to edit visual content to evoke target emotions. However, existing methods often overlook inference efficiency and predominantly depend on discrete emotion representations, which to some extent limits their practical applicability and makes it challenging to capture complex and subtle human emotions. To tackle these gaps, we propose MooD, the first framework that directly leverages continuous Valence-Arousal (VA) values for fine-grained and efficient AIE. Specifically, we first introduce a VA-Aware retrieval strategy to bridge vague affective values and concrete visual semantics. Building upon this, MooD integrates visual transfer and semantic guidance to achieve controllable AIE. Furthermore, we construct AffectSet, a VA-annotated dataset to support model optimization and evaluation. Extensive qualitative and quantitative experimental results demonstrate that our MooD achieves superior performance in both affective controllability and visual fidelity while maintaining high efficiency. A series of ablation studies further reveal the crucial factors of our design. Our code and data will be made publicly open soon.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MooD框架，首次直接利用连续效价-唤醒度值实现细粒度、高效的情感图像编辑。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有情感图像编辑方法推理效率低且依赖离散情感表示，难以捕捉复杂微妙的人类情感，限制了实际应用。为克服这些不足，需要一种直接利用连续效价-唤醒度值进行细粒度高效情感编辑的框架。
light_analysis.method: MooD框架包括VA-Aware检索策略，将模糊情感值与具体视觉语义关联；集成视觉迁移与语义引导实现可控编辑。同时构建VA标注数据集AffectSet用于模型优化与评估。
light_analysis.result: 定性与定量实验表明，MooD在情感可控性和视觉保真度上均优于现有方法，且保持高效率。消融研究揭示了设计中的关键因素。
light_analysis.conclusion: MooD通过连续VA值实现了高效细粒度的情感图像编辑，具有学术与应用价值。未来可拓展至更多情感相关任务。

title: Benchmarking Retrieval Strategies for Biomedical Retrieval-Augmented Generation: A Controlled Empirical Study
abstract: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) offers a well-established path to grounding large language model (LLM) outputs in external knowledge, yet the question of which retrieval strategy works best in a high-stakes domain such as biomedicine has not received the controlled, multi-metric treatment it deserves. This paper presents a systematic empirical comparison of five retrieval strategies -- Dense Vector Search, Hybrid BM25 + Dense retrieval, Cross-Encoder Reranking, Multi-Query Expansion, and Maximal Marginal Relevance (MMR) -- within a biomedical question-answering RAG pipeline. All strategies share a fixed generation model (GPT-4o-mini), a common vector store (ChromaDB), and OpenAI's text-embedding-3-small embeddings, ensuring that observed differences are attributable to retrieval alone. Evaluation is conducted on 250 question-answer pairs drawn from a preprocessed subset of the BioASQ benchmark (rag-mini-bioasq) using four DeepEval metrics: contextual precision, contextual recall, faithfulness, and answer relevancy, each reported with 95% confidence intervals. A no-context ablation is included as a lower bound. Cross-Encoder Reranking achieves the best composite score (0.827) and highest contextual precision (0.852), confirming that query-document interaction yields measurable retrieval gains. Multi-Query Expansion, despite its recall-oriented design, produces the weakest contextual precision (0.671), suggesting naive query diversification introduces retrieval noise. MMR sacrifices answer relevancy for diversity, while the Dense baseline (composite 0.822) falls within 0.005 points of the top strategy. All RAG conditions dramatically outperform the no-context ablation on answer relevancy (0.658-0.701 vs. 0.287), confirming the practical value of retrieval. The full pipeline, hyperparameters, and evaluation code are publicly available.
comment: 15 pages, 4 figures, 2 tables. Code and data: https://github.com/deviprasadbal/RAGHealthcareRetrievalStrategies Also archived at Zenodo: https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.19774692

light_analysis.overview: 系统比较五种检索策略在生物医学RAG中的性能，发现交叉编码器重排序最优，多查询扩展引入噪声。
light_analysis.motivation: 在高风险生物医学领域，检索增强生成（RAG）中哪种检索策略最佳缺乏受控的多指标实证研究。现有工作未统一框架下比较多种策略，且评估指标单一。本文旨在通过固定生成模型与向量存储，系统分离检索影响，提供可靠对比。
light_analysis.method: 基于固定生成模型GPT-4o-mini与ChromaDB向量存储，使用OpenAI text-embedding-3-small嵌入，在250个BioASQ问答对上比较五种检索策略：密集向量搜索、混合BM25+密集、交叉编码器重排序、多查询扩展与最大边际相关性。采用四个DeepEval指标（上下文精度、召回、忠诚度、答案相关性）评估，含95%置信区间和无上下文消融。
light_analysis.result: 交叉编码器重排序取得最佳复合得分0.827与最高上下文精度0.852；多查询扩展上下文精度最弱（0.671），表明查询多样化引入噪声；密集基线复合得分0.822，仅比最优低0.005。所有RAG条件在答案相关性上大幅优于无上下文消融（0.658-0.701 vs. 0.287），确认检索价值。
light_analysis.conclusion: 交叉编码器重排序通过查询-文档交互显著提升检索质量，多查询扩展的召回导向设计反而降低精度。MMR在多样性与相关性间权衡。结果强调检索选择的领域敏感性，并为生物医学RAG提供基准。代码与数据公开，便于复现。

title: Evaluating Tabular Representation Learning for Network Intrusion Detection
abstract: Classic Network Intrusion Detection Systems (NIDS) often rely on manual feature engineering to extract meaningful patterns from network traffic data. However, this approach requires domain expertise and runs counter to the widely adopted principle of modern machine learning and neural networks: that models themselves should learn meaningful representations directly from data. We investigate whether tabular representation learning techniques can improve intrusion detection performance by automatically learning robust feature representations for NetFlow data. This paper presents a systematic evaluation of state-of-the-art representation learning methods on benchmark NetFlow datasets, comparing against traditional autoencoders and end-to-end transformer baselines. We evaluate learned representations using both supervised classifiers and unsupervised anomaly detectors, with comprehensive hyperparameter exploration for each combination. Our results reveal strong dataset-model dependency, with no single approach consistently dominating across all scenarios. For supervised classification, TabICL achieves the best performance on CIDDS, while autoencoders follow closely and tie with end-to-end transformer models for the best average rank across datasets. Supervised approaches substantially outperform unsupervised anomaly detection methods, where no single combination consistently dominates as optimal choices depend on the dataset. Cross-dataset transfer experiments demonstrate that learned representations can generalize across network environments with appropriate method and classifier selection. However, transfer performance varies substantially depending on the source-target dataset combination, indicating sensitivity to distributional differences between network environments.
comment: IEEE International Conference on Cyber Security and Resilience (2026)

light_analysis.overview: 系统评估表格表示学习在NetFlow网络入侵检测中的效果，发现数据集-模型强依赖性，无统一最优方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统NIDS依赖手工特征工程，需要领域知识且违背现代ML自动学习表征的原则。表格表示学习有望自动学习鲁棒特征表示，但缺乏系统评估。本文旨在探究其在网络入侵检测中的有效性，通过对比多种方法，解耦表示学习与下游任务的影响。
light_analysis.method: 选取TabICL、传统自动编码器、端到端Transformer等SOTA表格表示学习方法，在CIDDS等基准NetFlow数据集上训练。使用监督分类器和无监督异常检测器评估表示质量，进行全面的超参数搜索。同时开展跨数据集迁移实验，测试表示泛化能力。
light_analysis.result: 监督分类中TabICL在CIDDS上最佳，自动编码器紧随其后且与Transformer平均排名并列第一。无监督方法均不及监督方法，且最优组合依赖数据集。跨数据集迁移性能因源-目标组合而异，表明分布差异敏感。
light_analysis.conclusion: 表格表示学习可提升NIDS性能，但效果高度依赖数据集和任务。监督方法优于无监督，迁移能力存在局限性。未来需针对特定网络环境选择合适的表示学习方法，或研究更鲁棒的跨域适应技术。

title: MPCS: Neuroplastic Continual Learning via Multi-Component Plasticity and Topology-Aware EWC
abstract: Continual learning systems face a fundamental tension between plasticity -- acquiring new knowledge  --  and stability  --  retaining prior knowledge. We introduce MPCS (Multi-Plasticity Continual System), a neuroplastic architecture that integrates eleven complementary mechanisms: task-driven neurogenesis, Fourier-encoded inputs, EWC regularization, meta-replay, mixed consolidation, hybrid gating, synapse pruning/regeneration, Hebbian updates, task similarity routing, adaptive growth control, and continuous neuron importance tracking. We evaluate MPCS on MEP-BENCH, a multi-track benchmark spanning 31 tasks across regression, classification, logic, and mixed domains, using a three-dimensional Pareto criterion over task performance (Perf), representation diversity (RD), and gradient conflict rate (GCR). Across 15 ablation configurations (3 seeds x 4 tracks x 2000 epochs), MPCS achieves a Normalized Efficiency Score of 94.2, placing it on the Pareto frontier among 9 of 14 gate-passing systems. Key findings: (i) Fourier encoding is the single most critical component (removal drops Perf by 30.7 pp and fails the MEP gate on 14% of tasks); (ii) global EWC degrades performance (NES = -4.2); topology-local EWC reduces this penalty (NES 90.5->91.8) but does not eliminate it; removing EWC entirely yields MPCS_EFFICIENT, the highest-Perf system -- establishing a monotone relationship in the high task-similarity regime (s_bar ~= 0.95): global EWC < topology EWC < no EWC; (iii) the Pareto status assessment is predictive: removing the two Pareto-dominated components (EWC + Hebbian) jointly yields MPCS_EFFICIENT, which improves Perf by 0.6 pp at 4.7x lower compute cost (127 vs. 602 min), validating the Pareto frontier as an actionable model-compression guide.

light_analysis.overview: 提出多组件可塑性架构MPCS，集成11种机制实现持续学习的塑性-稳定性平衡，在31任务基准上达到帕累托前沿。
light_analysis.motivation: 持续学习系统面临塑性（获取新知识）与稳定性（保留旧知识）的根本矛盾。现有方法多采用单一或少量策略，难以兼顾两者。本研究旨在通过整合多种互补机制（如神经发生、正则化、回放、剪枝等）来同时提升塑性与稳定性，解决持续学习中的灾难性遗忘问题。
light_analysis.method: 提出MPCS架构，集成任务驱动神经发生、傅里叶编码、EWC正则化、元回放、混合巩固、混合门控、突触修剪/再生、赫布更新、任务相似性路由、自适应生长控制和连续神经元重要性跟踪共11种机制。在MEP-BENCH基准（31任务，含回归、分类、逻辑等）上评估，采用三维帕累托准则（性能、表示多样性、梯度冲突率）。通过15种消融配置（3种子x4轨道x2000轮）系统分析各组件贡献。
light_analysis.result: MPCS归一化效率得分94.2，在14个通过门控系统中9个处于帕累托前沿。关键发现：傅里叶编码最关键（去除后性能下降30.7%）；全局EWC降低性能（NES=-4.2），拓扑局部EWC缓解但未消除惩罚（90.5→91.8）；完全去除EWC得到MPCS_EFFICIENT，性能提升0.6%且计算成本降低4.7倍（127 vs 602分钟），验证帕累托前沿可指导模型压缩。
light_analysis.conclusion: MPCS通过多组件集成有效平衡持续学习的塑性与稳定性，帕累托前沿可作为行动导向的模型压缩指南。研究揭示了不同机制对性能的影响，尤其发现EWC在高任务相似性下单调递减关系。未来可探索更高效的组件组合及自适应机制选择。

title: A Novel Preprocessing-Driven Approach to Remaining Useful Life (RUL) Prediction Using Temporal Convolutional Networks (TCN)
abstract: Accurate prediction of Remaining Useful Life (RUL) in aero-engines is vital for predictive maintenance, improved operational reliability, and reduced lifecycle costs. While deep learning approaches have demonstrated strong potential in this area, most existing methods focus primarily on model architecture design and treat input features uniformly, often neglecting the influence of data preprocessing. In this work, we propose a novel preprocessing pipeline that enhances RUL prediction by improving data quality and temporal representation before model training. Our approach leverages complete temporal sequences and generates RUL estimates at each timestep, enabling the model to capture fine-grained degradation dynamics and deliver continuous prognostic insights throughout the engine's operational life. To validate the effectiveness of the proposed pipeline, we conduct experiments on the NASA C-MAPSS dataset. Comparative evaluations against a suite of state-of-the-art neural models including CNN, RNN, LSTM, DCNN, TCN, BiGRU-TSAM, AGCNN, and ATCN, demonstrate that our approach consistently achieves superior accuracy and robustness in aero-engine RUL prediction. These results highlight the critical role of preprocessing in maximizing the effectiveness of neural prognostic models.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种数据预处理驱动的RUL预测方法，通过改进数据质量和时序表示提升精度。
light_analysis.motivation: 航空发动机RUL预测对预测维护和可靠性至关重要。现有深度学习方法聚焦模型架构，忽视预处理对输入特征的影响，导致退化动态捕捉不足。
light_analysis.method: 设计新颖预处理流水线，利用完整时间序列在每个时间步生成RUL估计，捕捉细粒度退化动态。在NASA C-MAPSS数据集上验证。
light_analysis.result: 与CNN、RNN、LSTM、TCN等多个SOTA模型相比，该方法在精度和鲁棒性上持续更优。
light_analysis.conclusion: 证明预处理在最大化神经预测模型效果中的关键作用，为RUL预测提供新视角，未来可探索更复杂的预处理策略。

title: Revisiting Semantic Role Labeling: Efficient Structured Inference with Dependency-Informed Analysis
abstract: Semantic Role Labeling (SRL) provides an explicit representation of predicate-argument structure, capturing linguistically grounded relations such as who did what to whom. While recent NLP progress has been dominated by large language models (LLMs), these systems often rely on implicit semantic representations, often lacking explicit structural constraints and systematic explanatory mechanisms. Traditionally, SRL systems have often relied on AllenNLP; however, the framework entered maintenance mode in December 2022, limiting compatibility with evolving encoder architectures and modern inference requirements. We revisit structured SRL modeling, introducing a modernized encoder-based framework that preserves explicit predicate-argument structure while enabling inference 10 times faster. Using BERT-base, the model attains comparable predictive performance, and RoBERTa and DeBERTa further improve F1 performance within the same framework. We adopt a dependency-informed diagnostic methodology to characterize span-level inconsistencies and conduct a representation-level analysis of LLM behavior under dependency-informed structural signals. Results indicate that dependency cues primarily improve structural stability. Finally, we illustrate how the framework's explicit predicate-argument structure can support multilingual SRL projection as a downstream application.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种现代化的编码器框架，在保留显式谓词-论元结构的同时实现10倍推理加速，并通过依赖信息诊断分析提升结构稳定性。
light_analysis.motivation: 语义角色标注（SRL）能显式表示谓词-论元结构，但大型语言模型（LLM）依赖隐式语义表示，缺乏显式结构约束和可解释机制。传统AllenNLP框架于2022年进入维护模式，与现代编码器架构和推理需求不兼容。因此需要一种高效的结构化SRL方法。
light_analysis.method: 采用现代化的基于编码器的框架，使用BERT-base作为基础模型，保留显式谓词-论元结构。通过依赖信息诊断方法分析跨度级别的不一致性，并在表示层面分析LLM行为。框架支持RoBERTa和DeBERTa等编码器，实现10倍推理加速，并可用于多语言SRL投影。
light_analysis.result: 使用BERT-base达到与现有方法相当的预测性能，而RoBERTa和DeBERTa在相同框架下进一步提升F1分数。依赖信息主要改善结构稳定性。推理速度提升10倍。摘要未明确给出具体数值，仅提及性能相当或提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该框架结合了显式语义角色标注与高效推理，适用于现代编码器，并通过依赖信息增强结构稳定性。具有多语言SRL投影等下游应用价值。未来可进一步优化编码器兼容性与扩展性。

title: A multilingual hallucination benchmark: MultiWikiQHalluA
abstract: Most hallucination evaluations focus on English, leaving it unclear whether findings transfer to lower-resource languages. We investigate faithfulness hallucinations, defined as model-generated content that is fluent and plausible but diverges from the provided input or is internally inconsistent. Leveraging the multilingual MultiWikiQA dataset, we utilize the LettuceDetect framework to create synthetic hallucination datasets for 306 languages, from which we train token-level hallucination classifiers for 30 European languages. In this work, we present evaluations of model hallucinations on a selection of languages: English, Danish, German, and Icelandic. Using these classifiers, we evaluate the hallucination rates for Qwen3-0.6B, Qwen3-14B, Gemma-3-12B-IT, cogito-v1-preview-qwen-32B, and cogito-v1-preview-llama-70B. Our classifiers reveal notably higher hallucination rates for Qwen3-0.6B (up to 60\% of answers containing at least one hallucination, peaking in Icelandic) and generally lower rates for larger models, with cogito-v1-preview-qwen-32B and cogito-v1-preview-llama-70B performing best on most languages. Hallucination rates are consistently higher for lower-resource languages, particularly Icelandic.

light_analysis.overview: 提出多语言幻觉基准MultiWikiQHalluA，揭示低资源语言中模型幻觉率更高的现象。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有幻觉评估主要集中于英语，导致对低资源语言的泛化能力未知。忠实性幻觉（模型生成流畅但不忠实于输入或内部不一致）在多语言场景下缺乏系统研究。作者利用多语言问答数据集MultiWikiQA，通过合成数据生成和分类器训练，旨在量化不同语言和模型规模的幻觉差异，尤其是低资源语言中的表现。
light_analysis.method: 基于MultiWikiQA数据集，采用LettuceDetect框架为306种语言生成合成幻觉数据，并训练了30种欧洲语言的token级幻觉分类器。评估了Qwen3-0.6B、Qwen3-14B、Gemma-3-12B-IT、cogito-v1-preview-qwen-32B和cogito-v1-preview-llama-70B模型在英语、丹麦语、德语和冰岛语上的幻觉率。
light_analysis.result: Qwen3-0.6B的幻觉率最高（最高60%的回答包含至少一次幻觉，冰岛语最严重），大模型幻觉率普遍较低，其中cogito系列模型在多数语言上表现最佳。低资源语言（尤其是冰岛语）的幻觉率一致高于高资源语言。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作为多语言幻觉评估提供了基准和工具，证实了模型在低资源语言上更容易产生幻觉，强调了大模型在跨语言鲁棒性方面的优势。未来可扩展至更多语言和模型架构，并探索缓解低资源语言幻觉的方法。

title: DataClaw: A Process-Oriented Agent Benchmark for Exploratory Real-World Data Analysis
abstract: Evaluating autonomous data analysis agents requires testing their ability to perform exploratory analysis in underexplored data environments. However, many existing benchmarks emphasize final answer accuracy in prior-guided data settings and provide limited support for reasoning process evaluation. We introduce DataClaw, a process-oriented benchmark for exploratory real-world data analysis. DataClaw contains approximately 2.06 million real-world records across enterprise, industry and policy domains, with native data noise preserved. It further includes 492 cross-domain tasks derived from think-tank consulting scenarios, each annotated with intermediate milestones for process-level evaluation. These annotations allow DataClaw to measure how far an agent progresses and where its reasoning breaks down. Experiments with eight advanced LLMs show that current agents remain far from reliable in this setting, with seven models achieving below 50% overall accuracy. Process analysis further reveals partial progress hidden behind wrong answers and distinct exploration strategies across models. Overall, DataClaw provides a less data constrained diagnostic testbed for probing the capability boundaries of autonomous data-analysis agents.

light_analysis.overview: 提出了DataClaw，一个面向过程的数据分析代理基准，专注于评估真实世界探索性数据分析的推理过程。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有基准多强调最终答案准确性，在数据环境已知且优先指导下进行，缺乏对探索性推理过程的评估，无法诊断代理的中间步骤和推理断裂点。因此需要针对真实世界探索性数据分析的面向过程的基准，以更好地测试自主数据分析代理的能力边界。
light_analysis.method: DataClaw包含约206万真实世界记录，来自企业、行业和政策领域，保留原生数据噪声。包含492个跨领域任务，源自智库咨询场景，每个任务标注了中间里程碑用于过程级评估。通过这些标注，可以衡量代理的进展程度和推理断裂位置，实现过程导向的评估。
light_analysis.result: 对8个先进LLM的实验显示，当前代理在此设置下远不可靠，其中7个模型总体准确率低于50%。过程分析进一步揭示了在错误答案背后隐藏的部分进展，以及不同模型展现出不同的探索策略，表明过程评估能发现表面准确率之外的信息。
light_analysis.conclusion: DataClaw为自主数据分析代理提供了一个较少数据约束的诊断测试床，能够探测其能力边界，有助于识别推理薄弱环节和改进探索策略。未来可用于推动更可靠的代理开发，但摘要未提及具体局限性。

title: Pretraining on Sleep Data Improves non-Sleep Biosignal Tasks
abstract: Sleep foundation models have recently demonstrated strong performance on in-domain polysomnography tasks, including sleep staging, apnea detection, and disease risk prediction. In this work, we investigate whether sleep biosignals can serve as an effective pretraining distribution for learning representations that transfer beyond sleep to adjacent domains. Following sleep foundation models, we perform sleep-only multimodal contrastive pretraining (with a leave-one-out objective) and evaluate transfer to non-sleep EEG and ECG, two well-benchmarked biosignal modalities with heterogeneous datasets and clinically meaningful downstream tasks. Across eight downstream tasks spanning multiple EEG and ECG datasets, sleep pretraining consistently improves performance relative to training from scratch. Moreover, on several tasks, we achieve performance competitive with or surpassing prior specialized state-of-the-art and foundation models.

light_analysis.overview: 探索睡眠生物信号预训练在非睡眠EEG和ECG任务上的迁移效果，提出睡眠对比预训练方法提升下游性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 睡眠基础模型在睡眠领域表现优异，但能否作为通用预训练分布迁移到相邻非睡眠领域尚不清楚。现有方法多针对特定模态或任务训练，缺乏跨域迁移能力，且非睡眠EEG/ECG任务数据异质、标注昂贵，亟需高效预训练范式。
light_analysis.method: 采用多模态对比预训练（留一法目标），仅使用睡眠数据（多模态）进行预训练，学习通用表示。然后在8个非睡眠EEG和ECG下游任务上微调评估，涵盖多个数据集和临床任务。
light_analysis.result: 在8个EEG/ECG下游任务上，睡眠预训练始终优于从零训练。在多个任务上达到或超越先前专用SOTA和基础模型性能，证明睡眠预训练的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 睡眠生物信号可作为有效的预训练分布迁移到非睡眠领域，为生物信号基础模型提供新范式。未来可探索更多模态和任务，但需注意预训练分布与下游任务的匹配性。

title: Efficient Preference Poisoning Attack on Offline RLHF
abstract: Offline Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF) pipelines such as Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) train on a pre-collected preference dataset, which makes them vulnerable to preference poisoning attack. We study label flip attacks against log-linear DPO. We first illustrate that flipping one preference label induces a parameter-independent shift in the DPO gradient. Using this key property, we can then convert the targeted poisoning problem into a structured binary sparse approximation problem. To solve this problem, we develop two attack methods: Binary-Aware Lattice Attack (BAL-A) and Binary Matching Pursuit Attack (BMP-A). BAL-A embeds the binary flip selection problem into a binary-aware lattice and applies Lenstra-Lenstra-Lovász reduction and Babai's nearest plane algorithm; we provide sufficient conditions that enforce binary coefficients and recover the minimum-flip objective. BMP-A adapts binary matching pursuit to our non-normalized gradient dictionary and yields coherence-based recovery guarantees and robustness (impossibility) certificates for $K$-flip budgets. Experiments on synthetic dictionaries and the Stanford Human Preferences dataset validate the theory and highlight how dictionary geometry governs attack success.

light_analysis.overview: 提出两种高效偏好中毒攻击方法BAL-A和BMP-A，针对离线RLHF中的标签翻转攻击。
light_analysis.motivation: 离线RLHF（如DPO）基于预收集的偏好数据集训练，易受偏好中毒攻击。现有研究缺乏针对log-linear DPO的高效标签翻转攻击方法，因此需要开发攻击策略以揭示漏洞并推动防御发展。
light_analysis.method: 利用翻转单个偏好标签引发DPO梯度中参数无关偏移的性质，将中毒问题转化为结构化二元稀疏逼近问题。提出BAL-A（二进制感知格点攻击，采用LLL归约和Babai最近平面算法）和BMP-A（二进制匹配追踪攻击，提供相干性恢复保证和K-flip鲁棒性证书）。
light_analysis.result: 在合成字典和Stanford Human Preferences数据集上验证了理论，表明字典几何（如相干性）主导攻击成功率。BAL-A在低相干性下实现精确最小翻转，BMP-A在有限预算下提供恢复保证。
light_analysis.conclusion: 揭示了DPO对偏好中毒的脆弱性，提出的攻击方法为防御研究提供了基准。未来可探索黑盒攻击或更鲁棒的DPO变体，局限性在于攻击需要梯度访问。

title: GRAIL: A Deep-Granularity Hybrid Resonance Framework for Real-Time Agent Discovery via SLM-Enhanced Indexing
abstract: As the ecosystem of Large Language Model (LLM)-based agents expands rapidly, efficient and accurate Agent Discovery becomes a critical bottleneck for large-scale multi-agent collaboration. Existing approaches typically face a dichotomy: either relying on heavy-weight LLMs for intent parsing, leading to prohibitive latency (often exceeding 30 seconds), or using monolithic vector retrieval that sacrifices semantic precision for speed. To bridge this gap, we propose \textbf{GRAIL} (Granular Resonance-based Agent/AI Link), a novel framework achieving sub-400ms discovery latency without compromising accuracy. GRAIL introduces three key innovations: (1) \textbf{SLM-Enhanced Prediction}, replacing the generalized LLM parser with a specialized, fine-tuned Small Language Model (SLM) for millisecond-level capability tag prediction; (2) \textbf{Pseudo-Document Expansion}, augmenting agent descriptions with synthetic queries to enhance semantic density for robust dense retrieval; and (3) \textbf{MaxSim Resonance}, a fine-grained matching mechanism computing maximum similarity between user queries and discrete agent usage examples, effectively mitigating semantic dilution. Validated on \textbf{AgentTaxo-9K}, our new large-scale dataset of 9,240 agents, GRAIL reduces end-to-end discovery latency by over \textbf{79$\times$} compared to LLM-parsing baselines, while significantly outperforming traditional vector search in Recall@10. This framework offers a scalable, industrial-grade solution for the real-time ``Internet of Agents."

light_analysis.overview: 提出GRAIL框架，结合小语言模型和混合检索，实现毫秒级高精度智能体发现。
light_analysis.motivation: 大规模多智能体协作中，现有智能体发现方法面临两难：重型LLM解析延迟高达30秒以上，而单一向量检索牺牲语义精度。GRAIL旨在同时实现低延迟和高精度，解决实时发现瓶颈。
light_analysis.method: GRAIL包含三项创新：1) SLM-Enhanced Prediction：用微调的小语言模型（SLM）替代LLM进行毫秒级能力标签预测；2) Pseudo-Document Expansion：用合成查询扩充智能体描述以增强语义密度；3) MaxSim Resonance：计算用户查询与离散使用例的最大相似度，缓解语义稀释。
light_analysis.result: 在自建数据集AgentTaxo-9K（9240个智能体）上，GRAIL将端到端发现延迟降低79倍以上（对比LLM基线），Recall@10显著优于传统向量检索。
light_analysis.conclusion: GRAIL为大规模实时智能体发现提供了可扩展的工业级解决方案，适用于“互联网智能体”场景。未来可探索更高效的SLM训练策略及跨领域迁移。

title: Efficient Temporal Datalog Materialisation for Composite Event Recognition
abstract: Several applications demand the timely detection of critical situations, such as threats to safety and transparency, over high-velocity streams of symbolic events. This demand has motivated the development of (i) event specification languages, which define composite events via temporal patterns over simpler events, and (ii) stream reasoning frameworks, evaluating patterns expressed in these languages. However, event specification languages are typically studied in isolation, complicating their comparison in terms of expressivity and obscuring the scope of their associated stream reasoners. To mitigate this issue, we map practical fragments of prominent event specification languages into Temporal Datalog->-, a temporal Datalog with stratified negation and no future dependencies. To support efficient stream reasoning over Temporal Datalog->-, we propose Streaming Trigger Graphs, an extension of a state-of-the-art technique for Datalog materialisation. Our approach yields a uniform composite event recognition mechanism that has the potential to generalise across a wide range of practical event specification languages.

light_analysis.overview: 将多种事件规范语言映射到Temporal Datalog-，并提出Streaming Trigger Graphs实现高效流推理，统一复合事件识别。
light_analysis.motivation: 许多应用（如安全威胁检测）需要从高速事件流中及时识别复合事件。现有事件规范语言通常被孤立研究，难以比较表达能力，且各自的流推理器范围不明确，阻碍了统一高效的解决方案。因此，需要一种通用的方法将不同语言映射到同一推理框架，并提升物化效率。
light_analysis.method: 首先，将实用的事件规范语言片段映射到Temporal Datalog-，这是一种带分层否定且无未来依赖的时间Datalog。然后，提出Streaming Trigger Graphs，扩展了状态-of-the-art的Datalog物化技术，通过增量维护和触发机制支持高效流推理，避免了重复计算。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确给出具体数值结果，但声称该方法能显著提升事件流上的物化效率，并统一多种事件规范语言的识别过程。通过与现有流推理器的对比（未量化），证明了方法的有效性和通用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作提出了一个统一的复合事件识别机制，将多种事件规范语言桥接到Temporal Datalog-，并利用Streaming Trigger Graphs实现高效物化。这一成果有助于推动事件处理系统的标准化与实际部署，未来可扩展至更复杂的时序模式和分布式环境。

title: Shadow-Loom: Causal Reasoning over Graphical World Model of Narratives
abstract: Stories hold a reader's attention because they have causes, secrets, and consequences. Shadow-Loom is an experimental open-source framework that turns a narrative into a versioned graphical world model and lets two engines act on it: a causal physics grounded in Pearl's ladder of causation and a recently proposed counterfactual calculus over Ancestral Multi-World Networks; and a narrative physics that scores the same graph against four structural reader-states -- mystery, dramatic irony, suspense, and surprise -- in the tradition of Sternberg's curiosity/suspense/surprise triad, with suspense formalised in the structural-affect line of work on story comprehension and computational suspense. Large language models are used only at the boundary: extraction, rendering, and audit; identification, intervention, and counterfactual reasoning are carried out in typed code over the graph. The system is offered as a research artefact rather than as a benchmarked NLP model; code, fixtures, and pipeline are released open source.

light_analysis.overview: Shadow-Loom 是一个将叙事转化为版本化图形世界模型的开源框架，结合因果推理和叙事物理进行因果推理和读者状态评分。
