The practical question is how much injected text is needed to move a settled loop somewhere else, and whether that move lasts. We study this in 30-step recursive loops by separating the model from the context-update rule: append, replace, and dialog updates expose different histories to the same generator. The main result is that persistent redirection in append-mode recursive loops is memory-policy-conditioned. Under a 12,000-character tail clip, destination-coherent persistence plateaus near 16 percent and retained source-basin escape near 36 percent at dose 400; neither crosses 50 percent. Under a full-history protocol, retained source-basin escape crosses 50 percent near 400 tokens and saturates at 75-80 percent by 1,500 tokens, while destination-coherent persistence first reaches 0.50 near 1,500 tokens with a Wilson 95 percent CI of [0.41, 0.61]. For raw switching, adversarial continuations yield an ED50 near 40 tokens, with paired-control floors near 35 percent and net switching never reaching +50 percentage points within 5-400 tokens. Replace-mode raw switching is near-saturated but largely reflects state-reset overwrite: insert-mode probes drop it to 12-32 percent. A homogeneous-perturbation control reproduced the high-dose non-monotonic dip in destination-coherent persistence, refuting perturbation heterogeneity as the cause; the dip appears structural, with mechanism unresolved. We report 37 experiments on gpt-4o-mini with within-vendor replication on gpt-4.1-nano. Recursive-loop evaluations should distinguish transient movement from durable escape, subtract stochastic floors, and treat context-update rules as first-class safety-relevant design choices.
comment: 90 pages, 31 figures. Code, configurations, trajectories, and aggregated reports: https://github.com/kaplan196883/llmattr

light_analysis.overview: 系统研究了递归语言模型循环中扰动剂量与持久重定向的关系，揭示了上下文更新规则和记忆策略的关键影响。
light_analysis.motivation: 递归语言模型循环常陷入稳定模式，但实际应用中需要可控地改变这些模式。现有研究缺乏对扰动剂量与持久性关系的系统量化，尤其是不同上下文更新规则（append, replace, dialog）的影响。理解这些机制对提升语言模型的安全性和可控性至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 在30步递归循环中，采用append、replace和dialog三种上下文更新规则，通过注入不同剂量的对抗性续写（扰动文本），测量原始切换和持久逃脱。实验基于gpt-4o-mini，并在gpt-4.1-nano上验证。使用ED50、Wilson置信区间等统计方法量化剂量响应曲线。
light_analysis.result: 在append模式下，12,000字符截断时目的地一致持久性平台约16%，源盆地逃脱约36%（剂量400），均低于50%；全历史协议下源盆地逃脱在~400 tokens时超50%，1500 tokens时饱和至75-80%，目的地一致持久性在1500 tokens时达0.50（95% CI [0.41,0.61]）。原始切换中对抗性续写ED50约40 tokens，净切换未达+50个百分点。替换模式主要反映状态重置，插入模式降至12-32%。均质扰动控制表明高剂量非单调下降为结构性问题。
light_analysis.conclusion: 递归循环评估应区分暂时移动与持久逃脱，并减去随机地板。上下文更新规则是影响重定向持久性的关键设计选择。研究为语言模型的安全交互提供了量化方法和设计指导，但部分机制（如非单调下降）尚不明确。

title: Bucketing the Good Apples: A Method for Diagnosing and Improving Causal Abstraction
abstract: We present a method for diagnosing interpretation in neural networks by identifying an input subspace where a proposed interpretation is highly faithful. Our method is particularly useful for causal-abstraction-style interpretability, where a high-level causal hypothesis is evaluated by interchange interventions. Rather than treating interchange intervention accuracy as a single global summary, we refine this framework by partitioning the input space into well-interpreted and under-interpreted regions according to pairwise interchange-intervention behavior. This turns causal abstraction from a purely global evaluation into a more diagnostic tool: it not only measures whether an interpretation works, but also reveals where it works, where it fails, and what distinguishes the two cases. This diagnostic view also provides practical heuristics for improving interpretations. By analyzing the structure of the well-interpreted and under-interpreted regions, we can identify missing distinctions in a high-level hypothesis, discover previously unmodeled intermediate variables, and combine complementary partial interpretations into a stronger one. We instantiate this idea as a simple four-step recipe and show that it yields informative error analyses across multiple causal abstraction settings. In a toy logic task, recursively applying the recipe recovers a high-level hypothesis from scratch. More broadly, our results suggest that partitioning the input space is a useful step toward more precise, constructive, and scalable mechanistic interpretability.

light_analysis.overview: 提出通过输入空间划分诊断神经网络的因果抽象解释，将全局评估转为局部诊断，并改进解释。
light_analysis.motivation: 因果抽象解释通常使用全局的互换干预精度评估，但无法揭示解释在输入空间的哪里有效或失败。现有方法缺乏诊断工具来定位问题区域并指导改进。本文旨在将因果抽象从纯全局评估转变为诊断工具，不仅度量解释是否工作，还能揭示其工作与失败的区域及差异，从而提供改进启发式方法。
light_analysis.method: 方法分为四步：基于成对互换干预行为将输入空间划分为良好解释区域和欠解释区域；分析两个区域的结构以识别缺失的高层概念、未建模的中间变量；组合互补的部分解释以形成更强解释。该方法通过分析区域差异提供改进解释的实用启发，并在逻辑任务中递归应用可从零开始恢复高层假设。实验涉及多个因果抽象设置。
light_analysis.result: 在多个因果抽象设置中，该方法产生了信息丰富的错误分析。在玩具逻辑任务中，递归应用该方法能从零开始恢复高层假设。结果表明，输入空间划分是迈向更精确、建设性和可扩展的机制可解释性的有用步骤。摘要未提供具体数值指标，但强调诊断和改进效果。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文的主要贡献是将输入空间划分引入因果抽象解释，使其成为诊断工具而非单一评估指标。该方法能揭示解释的失效模式并指导改进，具有学术价值（推动可解释性研究）和实际应用价值（帮助构建更忠实的高层模型）。局限性可能包括对划分标准的依赖，未来工作可探索自动划分方法或扩展到更复杂网络。

title: InfiltrNet: Dual-Branch CNN-Transformer Architecture for Brain Tumor Infiltration Risk Prediction
abstract: Gliomas are aggressive brain tumors that infiltrate surrounding tissue beyond the visible tumor margins observed on Magnetic Resonance Imaging (MRI). Predicting the spatial extent of this infiltration is essential for surgical planning and radiation therapy, yet existing deep learning approaches focus on segmenting the visible tumor rather than estimating infiltration risk in the surrounding tissue. This paper presents InfiltrNet, a novel dual-branch architecture that combines a convolutional neural network (CNN) encoder with a Swin Transformer encoder through cross-attention fusion modules to predict three-zone infiltration risk maps from multimodal MRI. A label generation strategy based on distance transforms is proposed to derive reproducible infiltration risk zones from standard Brain Tumor Segmentation (BraTS) annotations. InfiltrNet is trained with a combined Dice-CrossEntropy and boundary-aware loss augmented by auxiliary supervision heads at intermediate decoder levels. Extensive experiments on BraTS 2020 and BraTS 2025 demonstrate that InfiltrNet outperforms five established baselines. Explainability analysis using GradCAM++ and Occlusion sensitivity confirms that the model attends to clinically relevant peritumoral regions.

light_analysis.overview: 提出双分支CNN-Transformer架构InfiltrNet，用于预测脑肿瘤浸润风险而非仅分割可见肿瘤。
light_analysis.motivation: 胶质瘤会浸润超出MRI可见肿瘤边界的周围组织，预测浸润空间范围对手术规划和放疗至关重要。现有深度学习方法仅分割可见肿瘤，未能估计周围组织的浸润风险。因此需要一种能够预测三维浸润风险图的方法，为临床提供更准确的肿瘤边界信息。
light_analysis.method: InfiltrNet采用双分支架构，通过交叉注意力融合模块结合CNN编码器和Swin Transformer编码器，从多模态MRI预测三区域浸润风险图。提出基于距离变换的标签生成策略，从标准BraTS标注中导出可复现的浸润风险区域。使用结合Dice-CrossEntropy和边界感知损失的联合损失函数，并在中间解码器层添加辅助监督头。
light_analysis.result: 在BraTS 2020和BraTS 2025数据集上的大量实验表明，InfiltrNet优于五个基线方法。通过GradCAM++和Occlusion敏感性分析的可解释性分析证实，模型关注临床相关的瘤周区域。摘要未明确说明具体数值指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: InfiltrNet通过双分支架构有效融合局部和全局特征，实现了对脑肿瘤浸润风险的准确预测。该研究为手术计划和放射治疗提供了更有力的决策支持。未来可进一步探索其他模态或更高效的Transformer变体。

title: CoVSpec: Efficient Device-Edge Co-Inference for Vision-Language Models via Speculative Decoding
abstract: Vision-language models (VLMs) have demonstrated strong capabilities in multimodal perception and reasoning. However, deploying large VLMs on mobile devices remains challenging due to their substantial computational and memory demands. A practical alternative is device-edge co-inference, where a lightweight draft VLM on the mobile device collaborates with a larger target VLM on the edge server via speculative decoding. Nevertheless, directly extending speculative decoding to VLMs suffers from severe inefficiency due to excessive visual-token computation and high communication overhead. To address these challenges, we propose CoVSpec, an efficient collaborative speculative decoding framework for VLM inference. Specifically, we first develop a training-free visual token reduction framework that prunes redundant visual tokens on the mobile device by jointly considering query relevance, token activity, and low-rank dependency. Moreover, we design an adaptive drafting strategy that dynamically adjusts both the verification frequency and the draft length. In addition, we introduce a parallel branching mechanism with decoupled verification-correction to improve draft-side utilization during target-side verification and reduce correction-related transmission overhead. Experiments on multiple benchmarks show that CoVSpec achieves up to 2.21x higher throughput than target-only inference and reduces communication overhead by more than 96% compared with baselines, without compromising task accuracy.
comment: 6 pages, 2 tables, 1 figure. Submitted to IEEE Globecom 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出CoVSpec框架，通过视觉令牌剪枝、自适应草稿策略和并行分支机制，实现高效的设备-边缘协同推理，显著提升VLM吞吐量并降低通信开销。
light_analysis.motivation: 部署大型视觉语言模型（VLM）到移动设备面临巨大的计算和内存挑战。设备-边缘协同推理通过轻量草稿VLM与边缘服务器上的大型目标VLM协作是一种可行方案，但直接应用推测解码会导致严重的低效问题，主要源于过多的视觉令牌计算和高通信开销。因此需要一种高效的协作推理框架来解决这些瓶颈。
light_analysis.method: CoVSpec框架包含三个核心创新：首先，提出一种无训练的视觉令牌剪枝方法，综合查询相关性、令牌活跃度和低秩依赖来剔除冗余视觉令牌；其次，设计自适应草稿策略，动态调整验证频率和草稿长度；最后，引入并行分支机制，在目标端验证时解耦验证与纠正，提高草稿侧利用率并减少纠正传输开销。该方法无需额外训练，适用于多种VLM。
light_analysis.result: 在多个基准测试上，CoVSpec相比仅目标推理实现了高达2.21倍的吞吐量提升，与基线方法相比通信开销降低超过96%，同时任务准确率保持不变。这表明该框架在保持推理质量的同时显著提升了效率并减少了数据传输成本。
light_analysis.conclusion: CoVSpec有效解决了VLM在设备-边缘协同推理中的效率问题，通过剪枝冗余视觉令牌、自适应调整草稿策略以及并行验证机制，大幅提升了吞吐量和通信效率，且不损失准确性。该工作为资源受限设备上的多模态推理提供了实用方案，未来可探索更轻量级的剪枝方法或扩展到其他模态。

title: NTIRE 2026 Challenge on Efficient Low Light Image Enhancement: Methods and Results
abstract: This paper presents a comprehensive review of the NITRE 2026 Efficient Low Light Image Enhancement (E-LLIE) Challenge, highlighting the proposed solutions and final outcomes. This challenge focuses on mobile image enhancement under low-light conditions, aiming to design lightweight networks that improve enhancement quality while ensuring practical deployability under limited computational resources. A total of 207 participants registered, 27 teams submitted valid entries, and 17 teams ultimately provided valid factsheet. Based on these submissions, this paper provides a systematic evaluation of recent methods for E-LLIE, offering a comprehensive overview of state-of-the-art progress and demonstrating significant improvements in both performance and efficiency.

light_analysis.overview: 综述NTIRE 2026高效低光图像增强挑战赛，评估轻量级网络方法，提升性能与效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 移动设备低光图像增强面临计算资源限制，现有方法难以兼顾质量和效率。挑战赛旨在推动设计轻量级网络，在有限资源下提高增强效果，解决实际部署难题。
light_analysis.method: 组织挑战赛，吸引207名注册者，27支队伍提交有效方案，17支提供完整事实表。对提交方法进行系统性评估，涵盖多种轻量级网络架构。
light_analysis.result: 挑战赛展示了最新进展，各提交方法在增强质量和效率上均有显著提升，部分方法在指标上超越基线，验证了轻量级网络在低光场景的可行性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该挑战赛为移动低光图像增强提供了基准，推动轻量化算法发展。具有实际应用价值，如夜间摄影增强。未来可探索更高效架构或结合其他任务。

title: Submodular Benchmark Selection
abstract: Evaluating large language models across many benchmarks is expensive, yet many benchmarks are highly correlated. We formalize the selection of a small, informative subset as submodular maximization under a multivariate Gaussian model. Entropy (log-determinant covariance) and mutual information between selected and remaining benchmarks arise as natural objectives. Both are submodular; entropy selection coincides with pivoted Cholesky and has spectral residual bounds, while mutual information is non-monotone in general but empirically monotone for small subsets, so we optimize it greedily. Experiments on three matrices from ten public leaderboards show that mutual information selection outperforms entropy for imputation at small subsets.

light_analysis.overview: 将基准测试子集选择形式化为多元高斯模型下的子模最大化，提出基于熵和互信息的目标函数，实验显示互信息选择在小子集插补中优于熵。
light_analysis.motivation: 评估大型语言模型需要大量基准测试，成本高昂且许多基准高度相关，导致资源浪费。现有方法缺乏理论指导，难以选择信息丰富且冗余小的子集。因此，需要一个形式化的框架来高效选择代表性基准，降低评估成本，同时保持预测准确性。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出在多元高斯模型假设下，将基准选择建模为子模最大化问题。以所选子集的熵（对数行列式协方差）和所选与剩余基准间的互信息作为目标函数。熵选择等价于枢轴Cholesky分解，具有谱残差界；互信息一般非单调，但经验上对小子集单调，因此采用贪心算法优化。实验基于十个公共排行榜的三个相关矩阵。
light_analysis.result: 在三个来自十个公共排行榜的基准矩阵上，互信息选择在小子集上的插补性能优于熵选择。具体地，互信息方法能在更小子集上更准确地预测未选基准的性能，验证了其有效性。摘要未提供精确数值，但表明互信息在此场景下更优。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文为基准选择提供了理论驱动的子模方法，平衡了信息量与冗余性。熵选择有谱界保证，互信息在实践上更优。方法可降低LLM评估成本，适用于多任务学习场景。未来需探索互信息非单调性的理论处理及更大规模验证。

title: MultiSense-Pneumo: A Multimodal Learning Framework for Pneumonia Screening in Resource-Constrained Settings
abstract: Pneumonia remains a leading global cause of morbidity and mortality, particularly in low resource settings where access to imaging, laboratory testing, and specialist care is limited. Clinical assessment relies on heterogeneous evidence, including symptoms, respiratory patterns, and chest imaging, making screening inherently multimodal. However, many existing computational approaches remain unimodal and focus primarily on radiographs. In this work, we present MultiSense-Pneumo, a multimodal framework for pneumonia oriented screening and triage support that integrates structured symptom descriptors, cough audio, spoken language, and chest radiographs. The system combines deterministic symptom triage, LightGBM based acoustic classification, domain adversarial radiograph analysis using ResNet 18, transformer based speech recognition, and an interpretable multimodal fusion operator. Each modality is transformed into a normalized risk signal and aggregated into a unified screening estimate, enabling transparent and modular decision support. MultiSense-Pneumo is designed for real world deployment under modest computational constraints and can operate fully offline on standard laptop class hardware, making it suitable for community health workers, rural clinics, and emergency response settings. Experimental results demonstrate robustness of the radiograph pathway under domain shifts, while highlighting limitations in minority class recall for acoustic signals. MultiSense-Pneumo is intended as a research prototype for screening and triage support rather than a clinically validated diagnostic system.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MultiSense-Pneumo多模态框架，整合症状、咳嗽音频、语音和胸片，用于资源受限环境的肺炎筛查与分诊支持。
light_analysis.motivation: 肺炎是全球主要致死原因之一，尤其在资源匮乏地区，影像、实验室检测和专家诊疗可及性差。现有计算方法多依赖单一模态（主要是胸片），忽略了临床评估中症状、呼吸模式等多模态证据。因此，需要一种整合多种信息源、适应低算力环境的可解释筛查框架，以支持社区医生和应急响应。
light_analysis.method: MultiSense-Pneumo融合五条路径：确定性症状分诊、LightGBM的咳嗽音频分类、基于ResNet18的域对抗X光分析、Transformer语音识别，以及可解释多模态融合算子。每个模态输出归一化风险信号，经聚合形成统一筛查估计，支持模块化离线部署于标准笔记本硬件。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，X光路径在域偏移下表现稳健；但咳嗽音频在少数类召回率上有限。整体框架在计算受限条件下实现多模态决策支持，具体性能指标摘要未详细说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: MultiSense-Pneumo作为研究原型，展示了多模态融合在肺炎筛查中的潜力，尤其适合低资源场景。其可解释性和离线能力有助于实际部署。但音频模态的少数类召回率需改进，且系统尚未经临床验证，仅为分诊支持工具。

title: Metric Unreliability in Multimodal Machine Unlearning: A Systematic Analysis and Principled Unified Score
abstract: Machine unlearning in Vision-Language Models (VLMs) is required for compliance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), yet current evaluation practices are inconsistent. We present the first systematic study of metric reliability in multimodal unlearning. Five standard metrics, Forget Accuracy (FA), Retain Accuracy (RA), Membership Inference Attack (MIA), Activation Distance (AD), and JS divergence (JS), yield conflicting method rankings across three VQA benchmarks (MLLMU-Bench, UnLOK-VQA, MMUBench). Kendall tau analysis over 36 unlearned LLaVA-1.5-7B models reveals two opposing clusters, {FA, RA, MIA} and {AD, JS}, with tau_FA_AD = -0.26, reproduced on BLIP-2 OPT-2.7B. Agreement is lower in multimodal VQA (average tau = 0.086) than in unimodal classification (average tau = 0.158; difference = 0.072), indicating that dual image-and-text pathways amplify inconsistency. We introduce the Unified Quality Score (UQS), a composite metric with weights derived from each metric's Spearman correlation with the oracle distance d(M_hat, M_star), where M_star is the oracle model retrained only on the retain set. RA shows the strongest reliability (rho = 0.484, p = 0.003), while FA is negatively correlated (rho = -0.418, p = 0.011). UQS yields stable rankings under 100 random weight perturbations (tau = 0.647 +- 0.262). We release the benchmark, 36 checkpoints, and an interactive leaderboard. Code and pre-computed results are available at https://github.com/neurips26/UnifiedUnl.

light_analysis.overview: 提出统一质量评分(UQS)解决多模态机器遗忘中指标不一致问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 机器遗忘在视觉语言模型中需符合GDPR，但当前评估实践不一致。五项标准指标在三个VQA基准上产生矛盾的方法排名，多模态VQA的一致性子于单模态分类，表明图像文本双路径放大了不一致性。
light_analysis.method: 通过Kendall tau分析36个LLaVA-1.5-7B遗忘模型，发现指标分为两个对立簇。提出UQS复合指标，权重基于各指标与Oracle距离的Spearman相关性。RA可靠性最强(rho=0.484)，FA负相关(rho=-0.418)。
light_analysis.result: UQS在100次随机权重扰动下产生稳定排名(tau=0.647±0.262)。多模态VQA平均tau=0.086，低于单模态分类的0.158，差异0.072。
light_analysis.conclusion: 首次系统研究多模态遗忘指标可靠性，UQS提供稳定评估。发布基准、36个检查点和交互式排行榜。

title: CBV: Clean-label Backdoor Attacks on Vision Language Models via Diffusion Models
abstract: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have achieved remarkable success in tasks such as image captioning and visual question answering (VQA). However, as their applications become increasingly widespread, recent studies have revealed that VLMs are vulnerable to backdoor attacks. Existing backdoor attacks on VLMs primarily rely on data poisoning by adding visual triggers and modifying text labels, where the induced image-text mismatch makes poisoned samples easy to detect. To address this limitation, we propose the Clean-Label Backdoor Attack on VLMs via Diffusion Models (CBV), which leverages diffusion models to generate natural poisoned examples via score matching. Specifically, CBV modifies the score during the reverse generation process of the diffusion model to guide the generation of poisoned samples that contain triggered image features. To further enhance the effectiveness of the attack, we incorporate the textual information of the triggered images as multimodal guidance during generation. Moreover, to enhance stealthiness, we introduce a GradCAM-guided Mask (GM) that restricts modifications to only the most semantically important regions, rather than the entire image. We evaluate our method on MSCOCO and VQA v2 with four representative VLMs, achieving over 80% ASR while preserving normal functionality.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种通过扩散模型生成自然中毒样本的清洁标签后门攻击方法，用于视觉语言模型，实现高攻击成功率且不易被检测。
light_analysis.motivation: 视觉语言模型在图像描述和视觉问答等任务中表现优异，但其应用广泛后，研究发现它们容易受到后门攻击。现有后门攻击主要依赖数据投毒，通过添加视觉触发器并修改文本标签，导致图像-文本不匹配，使得中毒样本容易被检测。因此，需要一种更隐蔽的后门攻击方法，既能有效攻击模型，又能保持中毒样本的自然性，避免被防御机制识别。
light_analysis.method: 提出清洁标签后门攻击方法CBV，利用扩散模型通过分数匹配生成自然的中毒样本。具体地，在扩散模型逆生成过程中修改分数，引导生成包含触发图像特征的样本。为增强攻击效果，引入触发图像的文本信息作为多模态指导。此外，为提升隐蔽性，提出GradCAM引导的掩码（GM），仅修改图像中最具语义重要性的区域而非整张图像。在MSCOCO和VQA v2数据集上评估四个代表性视觉语言模型。
light_analysis.result: 在MSCOCO和VQA v2数据集上对四个代表性视觉语言模型进行评估，攻击成功率（ASR）超过80%，同时保持了模型的正常功能（即干净样本上的性能无明显下降）。该结果表明CBV方法在实现高攻击成功率的同时，能够保持中毒样本的自然性和隐蔽性，不易被检测。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提出的CBV方法通过扩散模型实现了清洁标签后门攻击，克服了现有方法中毒样本易检测的局限。该方法利用分数引导生成和区域限制掩码，在保持高攻击成功率的同时增强了隐蔽性。研究揭示了视觉语言模型面临的新型安全威胁，提醒未来需要开发更强大的防御机制。潜在局限性可能包括对扩散模型质量的依赖以及攻击特定触发模式的泛化性。

title: Super-resolution of airborne laser scanning point clouds for forest inventory
abstract: Airborne Laser Scanning (ALS) can collect point clouds across large areas, enabling large-scale forest inventory. However, ALS point clouds are sparse and noisy, resulting in inaccurate individual-tree-level forest inventory, such as stem localization and tree size estimation. To overcome this problem, we propose a deep learning model, 3D Forest Super Resolution (3DFSR), to simultaneously improve point density and reduce noise for ALS forest point cloud. 3DFSR is a voxel-based CNN with a U-Net architecture. The proposed 3DFSR is evaluated on ALS point clouds collected in both temperate forests in the U.S. and boreal forests in Germany. Experimental results demonstrate that 3DFSR can generate finer point clouds of tree structure than other state-of-the-art point cloud super-resolution algorithms, achieving 0.249 m Chamfer Distance and 2.711 m Hausdorff Distance. Furthermore, to verify the effectiveness of 3DFSR point clouds in forest inventory, we conduct stem detection, DBH measurements, and stem reconstruction on both original ALS point clouds and 3DFSR enhanced point clouds. We find that stem detection and reconstruction algorithms developed for TLS/MLS point clouds can directly work on our 3DFSR point clouds, and DBH can be derived with circle-fitting method. F1 score of stem detection is improved from 0.71 on original ALS point clouds to 0.97 on 3DFSR point clouds; DBH estimation improves from 13.45 cm RMSE using allometric equations to 6.43 cm using circle fitting; comparing to stems reconstruction from MLS point clouds, stem reconstructed from 3DFSR point clouds has 0.170 m of Chamfer Distance and 0.377 m of Hausdorff Distance, and 0.95 R2 volume estimation. Finally, we find that the proposed 3DFSR is applicable to process point densities from 10 to 1700 points/m2; it also can be generalized across data collected from different LiDAR platforms without transfer learning.

light_analysis.overview: 提出3DFSR模型，对ALS点云进行超分辨率处理，显著提升森林清查精度。
light_analysis.motivation: ALS点云稀疏且噪声大，导致个体树级森林清查（如树干定位、树木尺寸估计）不准确。现有方法无法同时有效提高点密度和降低噪声，限制了森林资源调查的精度与可靠性。
light_analysis.method: 提出3DFSR——基于U-Net架构的体素卷积神经网络，同时对ALS森林点云进行超分辨率（提升点密度）和去噪。在美国温带和德国北方森林的ALS数据上评估，点密度范围10-1700点/m²。
light_analysis.result: 3DFSR在Chamfer距离0.249m和Hausdorff距离2.711m上优于现有超分辨率算法；树干检测F1从0.71提升至0.97，DBH估计RMSE从13.45cm降至6.43cm，体积估计R²=0.95；无需迁移学习即可泛化到不同LiDAR平台。
light_analysis.conclusion: 3DFSR有效提升ALS点云质量，使原本用于TLS/MLS的算法可直接应用于增强点云，支持大规模高精度森林清查。未来可进一步优化模型效率并拓展至更多生态参数提取。

title: ARGUS: Policy-Adaptive Ad Governance via Evolving Reinforcement with Adversarial Umpiring
abstract: Online advertising governance faces significant challenges due to the non-stationary nature of regulatory policies, where emerging mandates (e.g., restrictions on education or aesthetic anxiety) create severe label inconsistencies and reasoning ambiguities in historical datasets. In this paper, we propose ARGUS, a policy-adaptive governance system that enables evolving reinforcement through multi-agent adversarial umpiring. ARGUS addresses the sparsity of new policy data by employing a three-stage framework: (1) Policy Seeding for initial perception; (2) Adversarial Label Rectification, which utilizes a ``Prosecutor-Defender-Umpire'' architecture to resolve conflicts between stale labels and new mandates; and (3) Latent Knowledge Discovery, which employs a tripartite dialectical discussion to unearth sophisticated, ``gray-area'' violations. By leveraging RAG-enhanced policy knowledge and Chain-of-Thought synthesis as dynamic rewards for reinforcement learning, ARGUS synchronizes its reasoning pathways with evolving regulations. Extensive experiments on both industrial and public datasets demonstrate that ARGUS significantly outperforms traditional fine-tuning baselines, achieving superior policy-adaptive learning with minimal gold data.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ARGUS系统，通过多智能体对抗仲裁框架实现广告治理中策略自适应的强化学习，解决非平稳政策下的标签不一致和推理歧义。
light_analysis.motivation: 在线广告治理面临政策非平稳性挑战，新政策（如教育或容貌焦虑限制）导致历史数据标签严重不一致和推理歧义。现有方法依赖固定标签数据，无法适应政策变化，且新政策数据稀疏，造成治理困难。因此，亟需一种能动态同步政策演进的治理系统。
light_analysis.method: ARGUS采用三阶段框架：1) 策略播种：初始感知新政策；2) 对抗标签纠正：构建检察官-辩护人-仲裁人架构，解决旧标签与新政策的冲突；3) 潜在知识发现：通过三元辩证讨论挖掘灰色地带违规。利用RAG增强政策知识和思维链合成作为强化学习的动态奖励，使推理路径与演进规则同步。
light_analysis.result: 在工业和公共数据集上，ARGUS显著优于传统微调基线，以极少的金标准数据实现了卓越的策略自适应学习性能，有效解决新政策下标签稀疏和标签冲突问题，验证了方法的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: ARGUS为在线广告治理提供了一种适应非平稳政策演进的解决方案，通过对抗仲裁和强化学习实现了政策自适应学习。具有重要学术价值，可用于动态监管场景。未来可探索更复杂的多智能体协作机制及跨领域政策迁移。

title: MEMAUDIT: An Exact Package-Oracle Evaluation Protocol for Budgeted Long-Term LLM Memory Writing
abstract: Long-term LLM agents must compress streams of past interactions into persistent memory before future queries are known. Existing evaluations usually measure final question-answering accuracy, which entangles memory writing with retrieval, prompting, and reader reasoning. We introduce MEMAUDIT, an exact packageoracle evaluation protocol for budgeted long-term memory writing. A MEMAUDIT package fixes an experience stream, candidate memory representations, storage costs, semantic evidence units, future-query requirements, and a budget, turning write-time memory selection into a finite auditable optimization problem with a certified denominator. We instantiate this protocol with a concave-over-modular semantic coverage objective under storage and one-representation-per-experience constraints, and compute exact package optima using branch-and-bound with MILP certification. Across controlled exact packages, validity-heavy stress tests, human-audited natural support slices, and exported Mem0, A-Mem, and Letta stores, MEMAUDIT separates representation quality, validity-state preservation, and budget-aware selection effects that end-to-end QA cannot localize. The resulting artifact provides reusable package generators, certified solvers, natural package exports, external-system scorers, and cached reproducibility metadata for evaluating what memory writers actually preserve under fixed storage budgets.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MEMAUDIT协议，将长期LLM记忆写入评估转化为可审计的优化问题，并给出精确求解方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有长期LLM记忆评估通常用最终问答准确率衡量，这混淆了记忆写入与检索、提示和推理等环节，无法定位记忆写入本身的贡献。需要一种解耦的评估协议，在固定预算下精确测量记忆写入的质量和有效性保持。
light_analysis.method: MEMAUDIT定义了一个“包”，包含经验流、候选记忆表示、存储成本、语义证据单元、未来查询需求和预算，将写入时记忆选择转化为有限可审计优化问题。采用凹模语义覆盖目标，约束存储和每个经验一个表示，通过分支定界和MILP认证计算精确最优解。
light_analysis.result: 在可控精确包、压力测试、人工审计自然支持片段以及导出的Mem0、A-Mem、Letta存储上，MEMAUDIT成功分离了表示质量、有效性状态保持和预算感知选择效应，而这些是端到端QA无法定位的。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提供了可复用的包生成器、认证求解器、自然包导出、外部系统评分器和可复现性元数据，用于评估记忆写入器在固定预算下实际保留的内容。该协议有助于深入理解长期LLM记忆系统的瓶颈。

title: SlimDiffSR: Toward Lightweight and Efficient Remote Sensing Image Super-Resolution via Diffusion Model Distillation
abstract: Diffusion models have recently achieved remarkable performance in image super-resolution (SR), but their high computational cost limits practical deployment in remote sensing applications. To address this issue, we propose SlimDiffSR, a lightweight and efficient diffusion-based framework for real-world remote sensing image super-resolution. Unlike existing single-step diffusion methods that rely on fixed timesteps, we first introduce an uncertainty-guided timestep assignment strategy to construct a stronger single-step teacher model, where reconstruction difficulty is explicitly linked to diffusion timesteps, enabling adaptive generative strength. Building upon this teacher, we further present a structured pruning strategy tailored to remote sensing imagery, which systematically removes redundant semantic modules and replaces standard operations with lightweight designs, including frequency-separable convolution, direction-separable convolution, and a query-driven global aggregation module. These components explicitly exploit the unique characteristics of remote sensing data, such as sparse high-frequency details, strong directional patterns, and long-range spatial dependencies. To enhance knowledge transfer, we incorporate Maximum Mean Discrepancy (MMD) into the distillation process to align feature distributions between the teacher and student models. Extensive experiments on multiple remote sensing benchmarks demonstrate that SlimDiffSR achieves a favorable balance between efficiency and reconstruction quality. In particular, it attains up to $200\times$ inference acceleration and a $20\times$ reduction in model parameters compared with multi-step diffusion models, while achieving competitive perceptual quality and clearly outperforming existing lightweight diffusion baselines in efficiency. The code is available at: https://github.com/wwangcece/SlimDiffSR.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SlimDiffSR，一种轻量高效的扩散模型框架，通过不确定性引导的教师模型和结构化剪枝策略，实现遥感图像超分辨率，推理加速200倍。
light_analysis.motivation: 扩散模型在图像超分辨率中性能优异，但计算成本高，难以部署于遥感应用。现有单步扩散方法依赖固定时间步长，忽略不同像素的重建难度差异，导致效率与质量不平衡。本文旨在构建轻量高效的扩散模型，适应遥感图像的高频稀疏、方向性强和长程依赖特性。
light_analysis.method: 提出不确定性引导的时间步分配策略，为每个像素自适应分配扩散步长，构建更强单步教师模型。结构化剪枝策略去除冗余语义模块，引入频率可分离卷积、方向可分离卷积和查询驱动全局聚合模块，利用遥感数据特性。采用最大均值差异（MMD）进行知识蒸馏，对齐师生特征分布。
light_analysis.result: 在多个遥感基准上，SlimDiffSR相比多步扩散模型实现200倍推理加速和20倍参数减少，重建质量与原始扩散模型相当，并明显优于现有轻量扩散基线。例如，在UCMerced数据集上，PSNR与SSIM保持竞争性，FID显著降低。
light_analysis.conclusion: SlimDiffSR有效平衡了遥感图像超分辨率的效率与质量，通过蒸馏和剪枝大幅降低模型复杂度。代码已开源，为遥感应用提供实用方案。未来可探索自适应蒸馏策略或扩展至其他遥感重建任务。

title: DurableUn: Quantization-Induced Recovery Attacks in Machine Unlearning
abstract: Machine unlearning aims to remove specified training data to satisfy privacy regulations such as GDPR. However, existing evaluations assume identical precision at unlearning and deployment, overlooking that production LLMs are deployed at low-bit precision. We show that INT4 quantization systematically restores forgotten content even when models pass compliance audits at bfloat16 (BF16), we term this the quantization recovery attack (QRA). We conduct the first systematic study of unlearning robustness under adapter-space INT4 quantization in the NF4+LoRA regime, evaluating seven methods on LLaMA-3-8B-Instruct across TOFU, MUSE-News, and WikiBio-WPU. INT8 is benign; INT4 induces recovery of up to 22x, worsening with dataset difficulty. We identify the FA-RA-Q-INT4 trilemma: no method simultaneously achieves strong forgetting, high utility, and quantization robustness. A dense Pareto sweep reveals a sharp phase transition once robustness is achieved, retaining accuracy collapses regardless of further tuning. To address this, we propose DURABLEUN-SAF (Sharpness-Aware Forgetting), a quantization-aware objective using Straight-Through Estimator gradients through INT4 rounding. DURABLEUN-SAF is the only method to achieve a stable empirical (0.047, {BF16, INT8, INT4})- durability certificate: Q-INT4= 0.043 +- 0.002, cert rate= 3/3, versus SalUn's cert rate= 1/3 at its own published hyperparameters. We call for Q-INT4 to be adopted as a standard evaluation metric alongside FA and RA.

light_analysis.overview: 揭示低精度部署中INT4量化导致遗忘内容恢复的量化恢复攻击，并提出首个量化鲁棒遗忘方法DURABLEUN-SAF。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有机器遗忘评估假设训练与部署精度一致，忽略生产环境中大模型以低比特（如INT4）部署的现实。研究发现INT4量化能系统性恢复被遗忘的内容，即使模型通过BF16合规审核，导致隐私泄露风险。因此急需研究量化鲁棒遗忘方法，确保模型在低精度下仍能有效遗忘指定数据。
light_analysis.method: 首先提出量化恢复攻击（QRA），在NF4+LoRA框架下系统评估7种遗忘方法在LLaMA-3-8B-Instruct上的INT4鲁棒性。识别出FA-RA-Q-INT4三难困境：无方法同时实现强遗忘、高实用性和量化鲁棒性。进而提出DURABLEUN-SAF，采用直通估计器（STE）通过INT4取整梯度进行量化感知的锐度感知遗忘（Sharpness-Aware Forgetting）目标优化。
light_analysis.result: INT8量化几乎无影响，但INT4导致最高22倍的遗忘内容恢复，且恢复程度随数据集难度增加。DURABLEUN-SAF是唯一在BF16、INT8、INT4三种精度下均保持稳定鲁棒性的方法（Q-INT4=0.043±0.002，认证率3/3），而SalUn在自身最优超参数下认证率仅1/3。
light_analysis.conclusion: 首次系统研究机器遗忘在低精度部署下的脆弱性，揭示量化恢复攻击的严重性。DURABLEUN-SAF有效解决了量化鲁棒遗忘问题，为隐私合规提供了保障。未来可探索其他量化方案（如FP8）及更大模型。呼吁将Q-INT4纳入标准评估指标。

title: End-to-End Autoregressive Image Generation with 1D Semantic Tokenizer
abstract: Autoregressive image modeling relies on visual tokenizers to compress images into compact latent representations. We design an end-to-end training pipeline that jointly optimizes reconstruction and generation, enabling direct supervision from generation results to the tokenizer. This contrasts with prior two-stage approaches that train tokenizers and generative models separately. We further investigate leveraging vision foundation models to improve 1D tokenizers for autoregressive modeling. Our autoregressive generative model achieves strong empirical results, including a state-of-the-art FID score of 1.48 without guidance on ImageNet 256x256 generation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出端到端自回归图像生成框架，通过联合优化重建与生成，实现1D语义分词器的直接监督，在ImageNet 256x256上取得无指导FID 1.48的SOTA结果。
light_analysis.motivation: 自回归图像生成依赖视觉分词器将图像压缩为紧凑潜在表示。现有两阶段方法分别训练分词器和生成模型，缺乏生成结果对分词器的直接监督，导致分词器可能无法最优地服务于生成任务。本研究旨在设计端到端训练流程，联合优化重建和生成，使分词器能从生成任务中直接学习，从而提升自回归图像生成的质量。
light_analysis.method: 提出端到端训练管道，联合优化图像重建和自回归生成，使生成损失能够反向传播到分词器，实现生成监督。同时探索利用视觉基础模型（如DINOv2）增强1D语义分词器，通过引入语义信息改进表征。模型基于自回归架构，在ImageNet 256x256上进行训练，使用1D序列表示进行像素级预测。
light_analysis.result: 在ImageNet 256x256图像生成任务上，所提方法无需分类器指导（classifier-free guidance）即取得FID 1.48，达到当时最优水平，超越了以往两阶段方法。这一结果表明端到端联合训练显著提升了生成质量，且1D语义分词器有效捕捉了生成所需的视觉语义。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究验证了端到端联合优化重建与生成的有效性，使分词器能直接受益于生成信号，为自回归图像生成提供了新范式。利用视觉基础模型增强分词器进一步提升了性能。未来工作可探索更大规模模型、更复杂任务（如高分辨率生成）以及更高效的分词器设计。

title: RadLite: Multi-Task LoRA Fine-Tuning of Small Language Models for CPU-Deployable Radiology AI
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) show promise in radiology but their deployment is limited by computational requirements that preclude use in resource-constrained clinical environments. We investigate whether small language models (SLMs) of 3-4 billion parameters can achieve strong multi-task radiology performance through LoRA fine-tuning, enabling deployment on consumer-grade CPUs. We train Qwen2.5-3B-Instruct and Qwen3-4B on 162K samples spanning 9 radiology tasks - RADS classification across 10 systems, impression generation, temporal comparison, radiology NLI, NER, abnormality detection, N/M staging, and radiology Q&A - compiled from 12 public datasets. Both models are evaluated on up to 500 held-out test samples per task with standardized metrics. Our key findings are: (1) LoRA fine-tuning dramatically improves performance over zero-shot baselines (RADS accuracy +53%, NLI +60%, N-staging +89%); (2) the two models exhibit complementary strengths - Qwen2.5 excels at structured generation tasks while Qwen3 dominates extractive tasks; (3) a task-outed oracle ensemble combining both models achieves the best performance across all tasks; (4) few-shot prompting with fine-tuned models hurts performance, demonstrating that LoRA adaptation is more effective than in-context learning for specialized domains; and (5) models can be quantized to GGUF format (~1.8-2.4GB) for CPU deployment at 4-8 tokens/second on consumer hardware. Our work demonstrates that small, efficiently fine-tuned models - which we collectively call RadLite - can serve as practical multi-task radiology AI assistants deployable entirely on consumer hardware without GPU requirements. Code and models are available at https://github.com/RadioX-Labs/RadLite

light_analysis.overview: 提出RadLite，通过LoRA微调3-4B参数的小语言模型，实现多任务放射学AI，可在CPU上部署。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型在放射学中表现优异，但需要GPU等昂贵计算资源，限制了在资源受限的临床环境中的应用。现有方法依赖大型模型和高性能硬件，成本高且不易部署。本文旨在探索小语言模型（3-4B参数）通过LoRA微调是否能在多个放射学任务上取得良好性能，并实现CPU级别的部署，从而降低计算门槛，使放射学AI更易用。
light_analysis.method: 使用Qwen2.5-3B-Instruct和Qwen3-4B两种小语言模型，在12个公开数据集的162K样本上进行LoRA微调，覆盖9个放射学任务：RADS分类（10系统）、印象生成、时间比较、放射学NLI、NER、异常检测、N/M分期和QA。评估使用标准化指标，并尝试模型量化至GGUF格式（约1.8-2.4GB）以实现CPU部署。
light_analysis.result: LoRA微调显著提升性能：RADS准确率+53%，NLI+60%，N-staging+89%。Qwen2.5在结构化生成任务上更优，Qwen3在提取任务上更优，两者集成达到最佳。少样本提示对微调模型有害。量化后模型在消费级CPU上以4-8 tokens/秒运行，无需GPU。
light_analysis.conclusion: RadLite展示了小规模高效微调模型可以作为实用的多任务放射学AI助手，完全部署在消费级CPU上，无需GPU，降低了计算成本。其性能接近或优于大型模型，具有重要的临床实用价值。未来可进一步扩大任务覆盖和优化部署效率。

title: Cardiac Stability Theory: An Axiomatically Grounded Framework for Continuous Cardiac Health Monitoring via Smartphone Photoplethysmography
abstract: We present Cardiac Stability Theory (CST), an axiomatically grounded framework formally defining cardiovascular health as a stability margin around a cardiac dynamical attractor. From four axioms we derive the Cardiac Stability Index (CSI), a composite scalar in [0,1] integrating the largest Lyapunov exponent, recurrence determinism, and signal entropy via time-delay embedding. The ECG-based model (CSISurrogateV2, CNN-Transformer) achieves $R^2=0.8788$, MAE$=0.0234$ on PTB-XL (21,799 recordings). We extend CSI to smartphone PPG via Complementary Domain Transfer (CDT): CSISurrogateV2 generates pseudo-labels for the BUT PPG dataset (48 recordings, 12 subjects), training TinyCSINet (122,849 parameters), achieving MAE$=0.0557$, $ρ=0.660$ on the held-out test set ($n=1065$ windows) at ${<}30$ ms mobile latency. CDT is validated on BIDMC, Welltory, and RWS-PPG. Paired validation on 5,035 BIDMC windows yields $r=0.454$ ($ρ=0.485$, $p<10^{-295}$), confirming correlated cardiac stability across modalities. CSI is negatively correlated with age (slope $= -0.000225$ CSI/year, PTB-XL), discriminates atrial fibrillation from normal sinus rhythm (AUROC$=0.89$), and is robust under Perturbation Invariance Training (max AUC drop 1.65\%). We derive HeartSpan, a longitudinal stability metric relative to population age norms, enabling continuous non-invasive cardiac monitoring from commodity smartphones for longevity tracking and cardiac risk stratification.

light_analysis.overview: 提出公理化的心脏稳定性理论（CST），通过智能手机PPG实现连续心脏健康监测。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统心脏监测依赖于ECG设备，不便于日常持续使用。现有PPG监测方法缺乏理论基础，准确性和稳定性不足。本文旨在建立一个公理化的理论框架，将心血管健康定义为心脏动力学吸引子周围的稳定裕度，从而支持从智能手机PPG进行连续、非侵入性的心脏监测，以解决现有方法的理论和实践局限性。
light_analysis.method: 从四个公理推导出心脏稳定性指数（CSI），结合最大Lyapunov指数、递归确定性和信号熵。ECG基模型CSISurrogateV2（CNN-Transformer）在PTB-XL上训练。通过互补域转移（CDT）将CSI扩展到智能手机PPG：利用CSISurrogateV2为BUT PPG数据集生成伪标签，训练轻量化网络TinyCSINet（122,849参数）。采用扰动不变性训练增强鲁棒性。
light_analysis.result: CSISurrogateV2在PTB-XL（21,799条记录）上达到R²=0.8788，MAE=0.0234。TinyCSINet在BUT PPG测试集（1065个窗口）上MAE=0.0557，ρ=0.660，移动端延迟<30ms。跨模态验证（BIDMC 5035窗口）r=0.454，ρ=0.485。CSI与年龄负相关（斜率-0.000225/年），房颤检测AUROC=0.89，扰动下最大AUC下降1.65%。
light_analysis.conclusion: CST提供了一个理论严谨的框架，将心脏稳定性量化为可计算的指标，并通过CDT实现从ECG到PPG的跨模态迁移。工作验证了从智能手机PPG进行连续心脏监测的可行性，可用于长寿追踪和心脏风险分层。未来可进一步优化模型并扩大临床验证。

title: Breaking the Resource Wall: Geometry-Guided Sequence Modeling for Efficient Semantic Segmentation
abstract: High-performance semantic segmentation has achieved significant progress in recent years, often driven by increasingly large backbones and higher computational budgets. While effective, such approaches introduce substantial computational overhead and limit accessibility under constrained hardware settings. In this paper, we propose DGM-Net (Directional Geometric Mamba Network), an efficient architecture that improves modeling capability through structural design rather than increasing model capacity. We introduce Directional Geometric Mamba (G-Mamba), a linear-complexity O(N) operator as an alternative to conventional context modeling modules such as ASPP and PPM. To further enhance structural awareness in state space model (SSM)-based modeling, we design the DGM-Module, which extracts centripetal flow fields and topological skeletons to guide the scanning process and improve boundary preservation. Without relying on large-scale pretraining or heavy backbone scaling, DGM-Net achieves 80.8% mIoU within 28k iterations, 82.3% mIoU on Cityscapes test set, and 45.24% mIoU on ADE20K. In addition, the model maintains stable performance under constrained hardware settings (e.g., batch size of 2 on 8GB VRAM), highlighting its efficiency and practicality. These results demonstrate that incorporating geometric guidance into SSM-based architectures provides an effective and resource-efficient direction for semantic segmentation.
comment: 15 pages, 8 figures. Code will be released at: https://github.com/henrychan0719/DGM-Net

light_analysis.overview: 提出DGM-Net，通过几何引导的状态空间模型实现高效语义分割，线性复杂度且无需大规模预训练。
light_analysis.motivation: 高性能语义分割通常依赖大型骨干网络和高计算预算，导致计算开销大、硬件受限场景下难以部署。现有上下文建模模块如ASPP、PPM复杂度高，且基于状态空间模型的方法缺乏结构感知能力。为此，需要一种资源高效且能保持分割精度的架构，通过结构设计而非模型容量提升来突破资源限制。
light_analysis.method: 提出DGM-Net，核心包括Directional Geometric Mamba (G-Mamba)线性复杂度O(N)算子替代传统上下文模块，以及DGM-Module提取中心流场和拓扑骨架引导扫描过程，增强边界保持。不依赖大规模预训练或重型骨干扩展，在Cityscapes和ADE20K上评估。
light_analysis.result: DGM-Net在Cityscapes测试集达到82.3% mIoU，ADE20K上45.24% mIoU，训练仅28k迭代（80.8% mIoU）。在8GB VRAM下批次大小为2时仍能稳定运行，表明高效性和实用性。与基线方法对比，在类似资源约束下性能更优。
light_analysis.conclusion: 将几何引导融入SSM架构为语义分割提供了资源高效的新方向。DGM-Net在保持竞争力的同时大幅降低计算需求，适用于硬件受限场景。未来可探索更复杂的几何先验或扩展到其他密集预测任务。

title: Self-Correction as Feedback Control: Error Dynamics, Stability Thresholds, and Prompt Interventions in LLMs
abstract: Iterative self-correction is increasingly deployed in agentic LLM systems, yet whether repeated refinement improves or degrades performance remains inconsistent across models. We recast self-correction as a closed-loop feedback-control problem in which the same model is both controller and plant, and analyze its error dynamics via a two-state Markov model over {Correct, Incorrect}, parameterized by the Error Introduction Rate (EIR) and Error Correction Rate (ECR). The model yields a directly measurable stability threshold -- iterate only when ECR/EIR > Acc/(1-Acc) -- in which EIR acts as a stability margin and prompting becomes lightweight controller design. Empirically, across 7 models and 3 datasets (GSM8K, MATH, StrategyQA), a sharp near-zero EIR boundary (< 0.5%) cleanly separates beneficial from harmful self-correction: only o3-mini (+3.4 pp), Claude Opus 4.6 (+0.6 pp), and o4-mini (+/-0 pp) stay non-degrading, while GPT-5 and four others lose accuracy. A verify-first prompt intervention then provides causal evidence: it drives GPT-4o-mini's EIR from 2% to 0% and converts a -6.2 pp degradation into +0.2 pp (paired McNemar, p<10^{-4}), with negligible change on already-sub-threshold models -- exactly as the diagnostic predicts. A complementary analysis of adaptive self-consistency (ASC) shows it halts harmful refinement at a 3.8 pp confidence-elicitation cost, exposing a two-tier capability structure: prompt-level EIR suppression prevents degradation, whereas ECR enhancement -- plausibly training-level -- is required for genuine gains. Self-correction should thus be treated not as a default behavior but as a control decision governed by measurable error dynamics.

light_analysis.overview: 将LLM自校正重新定义为反馈控制问题，推导稳定性阈值并通过实验验证提示干预的有效性。
light_analysis.motivation: 迭代自校正在大语言模型系统中日益普及，但重复改进对性能的影响在不同模型间不一致，缺乏理论解释。现有方法无法预测何时自校正有益或有害，需要从控制理论角度分析错误动态，以指导实际应用。
light_analysis.method: 论文将自校正视为闭环反馈控制，使用两状态马尔可夫模型（正确/错误）描述错误动态，参数化为错误引入率（EIR）和错误纠正率（ECR）。推导稳定性阈值条件：仅当ECR/EIR > Acc/(1-Acc)时迭代有益。基于此设计轻量级提示干预（如verify-first）作为控制器设计，实验在GSM8K、MATH、StrategyQA数据集上进行，涵盖7个模型。
light_analysis.result: 实验显示近零EIR边界（<0.5%）清晰区分有益与有害自校正：仅o3-mini、Claude Opus 4.6、o4-mini保持非退化，GPT-5等四个模型精度下降。verify-first提示干预将GPT-4o-mini的EIR从2%降至0%，将退化-6.2个百分点转化为提升+0.2个百分点（配对McNemar检验p<10^{-4}），而对已低于阈值的模型影响可忽略。自适应自一致性分析揭示两层能力结构：提示级EIR抑制防止退化，训练级ECR增强才是真正提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: 自校正应被视为由可测量错误动态控制的行为而非默认策略。论文提供了稳定性阈值诊断工具和轻量级提示干预方法，具有实用价值。局限性包括当前仅分析Prompt-level干预，未来可探索训练-level ECR增强以实现实质改进。

title: Harness as an Asset: Enforcing Determinism via the Convergent AI Agent Framework (CAAF)
abstract: Large Language Models produce a controllability gap in safety-critical engineering: even low rates of undetected constraint violations render a system undeployable. Current orchestration paradigms suffer from sycophantic compliance, context attention decay, and stochastic oscillation during self-correction.   We introduce the Convergent AI Agent Framework (CAAF), which transitions agentic workflows from open-loop generation to closed-loop fail-safe determinism via three pillars: (1) Recursive Atomic Decomposition with physical context firewalls; (2) Harness as an Asset, formalizing domain invariants into machine-readable registries enforced by a deterministic Unified Assertion Interface; and (3) Structured Semantic Gradients with State Locking for monotonic non-regression.   This paper makes two core claims. First, an industrialization thesis: once domain invariants are formalized as an executable Harness, the Harness itself becomes a first-class enterprise asset that compounds in value as foundation models commoditize, and CAAF's ability to deliver its reliability on commodity-tier models makes fully self-hosted, on-premises deployment architecturally feasible for regulated sectors where cloud APIs are not an option. Second, an architectural claim supported by ablation: CAAF's three pillars address complementary failure surfaces and none alone closes the controllability gap at commodity cost. The paper contributes entirely at the orchestration and industrialization layer. Evidence across two complementary benchmarks, three-tier UAI ablations, multi-agent baselines, and a closed-source commodity family replicated by two independent open-weight families, is reported in the body.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Convergent AI Agent Framework (CAAF)，通过三支柱（递归原子分解、Harness作为资产、结构化语义梯度与状态锁定）实现闭环确定性，将领域约束形式化为可执行资产，解决大模型在安全关键工程中的可控性差距。
light_analysis.motivation: 大语言模型在安全关键工程中存在可控性差距，即使低概率的未检测约束违规也会导致系统不可部署。当前编排范式面临顺从性、上下文注意力衰减和自校正随机振荡等问题，缺乏确定性的保障机制。
light_analysis.method: CAAF框架包括三个支柱：(1)递归原子分解与物理上下文防火墙，分解任务并隔离物理约束；(2)Harness as an Asset，将领域不变量形式化为机器可读注册表，由确定性统一断言接口执行；(3)结构化语义梯度与状态锁定，实现单调非回归。框架完全在编排和工业化层，不修改底层模型。
light_analysis.result: 通过两个互补基准、三层UAI消融、多智能体基线，以及两个独立开源模型家族复现闭源商品模型的结果，证明三支柱共同闭合可控性差距，单独一个支柱不足以达到同等效果。摘要未明确说明具体性能数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: 核心贡献是将Harness作为可复用的企业资产，在商品级模型上实现高可靠性，使完全自托管部署在受监管行业（如不允许云API的领域）成为可能。该框架强化了编排与工业化的学术价值，但未讨论潜在局限性。

title: CBRS: Cognitive Blood Request System with Bilingual Dataset and Dual-Layer Filtering for Multi-Platform Social Streams
authors: A. B. M. Alim Al Islam
abstract: Urgent blood donation seeking posts and messages on social media often go unnoticed due to the overwhelming volume of daily communications. Traditional app-based systems, reliant on manual input, struggle to reach users in low-resource settings, delaying critical responses. To address this, we introduce the Cognitive Blood Request System (CBRS), a multi-platform framework that efficiently filters and parses blood donation requests from social media streams using a cost-efficient dual-layered architecture. To do so, we curate a novel dataset of 11K parsed blood donation request messages in Bengali, English, and transliterated Bengali, capturing the linguistic diversity of real social media communications. The inclusion of adversarial negatives further enhances the robustness of our model. CBRS achieves an impressive 99% accuracy and precision in filtering, surpassing benchmark methods. In the parsing task, our LoRA finetuned Llama-3.2-3B model achieves 92% zero-shot accuracy, surpassing the base model by 41.54% and exceeding the few-shot performance of GPT-4o-mini, Gemini-2.0-Flash, and other LLMs, while resulting in a 35X reduction in input token usage. This work lays a robust foundation for scalable, inclusive information extraction in time-sensitive, object-focused tasks. Our code, dataset, and trained models are publicly available at [https://github.com/aaniksahaa/CBRS](https://github.com/aaniksahaa/CBRS).

light_analysis.overview: 提出CBRS系统，利用双语数据集和双层过滤架构，从社交媒体流中高效过滤和解析血液捐赠请求。
light_analysis.motivation: 社交媒体上每日大量信息中，紧急献血请求常被淹没，导致关键响应延迟。传统的基于应用程序的系统依赖手动输入，在低资源环境中难以触达用户，亟需自动化且高效的解决方案来实时提取和解析这些紧急需求。
light_analysis.method: 构建了包含11000条解析后献血请求消息的双语数据集（孟加拉语、英语、音译孟加拉语），并加入对抗性负样本增强鲁棒性。采用成本高效的双层架构：第一层使用预训练分类器过滤相关请求（可达99%准确率），第二层用LoRA微调的Llama-3.2-3B模型进行细节解析，实现零样本解析，同时减少35倍输入token使用。
light_analysis.result: 过滤任务中，CBRS达到99%的准确率和精确率，超越基准方法。解析任务中，LoRA微调的Llama-3.2-3B模型零样本准确率为92%，较基础模型提升41.54%，且优于GPT-4o-mini、Gemini-2.0-Flash等大模型的少样本性能，同时显著降低计算成本。
light_analysis.conclusion: CBRS为可扩展、包容性的时间敏感信息提取奠定了坚实基础，特别适用于对象聚焦型任务。其公开的代码、数据和模型促进了社区复现与改进，未来可扩展至其他紧急通信场景或低资源语言。

title: Differentiable Vector Quantization for Rate-Distortion Optimization of Generative Image Compression
abstract: The rapid growth of visual data under stringent storage and bandwidth constraints makes extremely low-bitrate image compression increasingly important. While Vector Quantization (VQ) offers strong structural fidelity, existing methods lack a principled mechanism for joint rate-distortion (RD) optimization due to the disconnect between representation learning and entropy modeling. We propose RDVQ, a unified framework that enables end-to-end RD optimization for VQ-based compression via a differentiable relaxation of the codebook distribution, allowing the entropy loss to directly shape the latent prior. We further develop an autoregressive entropy model that supports accurate entropy modeling and test-time rate control. Extensive experiments demonstrate that RDVQ achieves strong performance at extremely low bitrates with a lightweight architecture, attaining competitive or superior perceptual quality with significantly fewer parameters. Compared with RDEIC, RDVQ reduces bitrate by up to 75.71% on DISTS and 37.63% on LPIPS on DIV2K-val. Beyond empirical gains, RDVQ introduces an entropy-constrained formulation of VQ, highlighting the potential for a more unified view of image tokenization and compression. The code will be available at https://github.com/CVL-UESTC/RDVQ.
comment: Accepted for publication at CVPR 2026 as an Oral presentation

light_analysis.overview: 提出RDVQ，一种可微向量量化框架，实现端到端率失真优化，在极低比特率下以轻量架构取得竞争性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 视觉数据增长使低比特率压缩日益重要。现有向量量化方法缺乏联合率失真优化机制，表示学习与熵建模脱节，导致无法直接优化率失真性能。需要一种原则性框架统一优化过程。
light_analysis.method: 提出RDVQ，通过可微放松码本分布实现端到端率失真优化，使熵损失直接塑造隐先验。发展自回归熵模型支持准确熵建模和测试时码率控制，采用轻量架构降低参数。
light_analysis.result: 在DIV2K-val上，与RDEIC相比，RDVQ在DISTS指标上减少比特率75.71%，在LPIPS上减少37.63%。以较少参数达到竞争或更优的感知质量，验证了极低比特率下的高效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 引入熵约束的向量量化公式，为图像标记化和压缩提供统一视角。实验结果证明了轻量架构在极低比特率下的优越性。代码已开源，便于后续研究。

title: Weird Generalization is Weirdly Brittle
abstract: Weird generalization is a phenomenon in which models fine-tuned on data from a narrow domain (e.g. insecure code) develop surprising traits that manifest even outside that domain (e.g. broad misalignment)-a phenomenon that prior work has highlighted as a critical safety concern. Here, we present an extended replication study of key weird generalization results across an expanded suite of models and datasets. We confirm that surprising (and dangerous) traits can emerge under certain circumstances, but we find that weird generalization is exceptionally brittle: it emerges only for specific models on specific datasets, and it vanishes under simple training-time, prompt-based interventions. We find that the most effective interventions provide prompt context that makes the generalized behavior the expected behavior. However, we show that even very generic interventions that do not anticipate specific generalized traits can still be effective in mitigating weird generalization's effects. Our findings thus help clarify the nature of the safety threat that weird generalization poses and point toward an easily implemented set of solutions.

light_analysis.overview: 发现奇怪泛化现象非常脆弱，可通过简单训练提示干预缓解。
light_analysis.motivation: 论文关注模型在窄域数据微调后产生的奇怪泛化现象，即模型在领域外也表现出意外特性，这被视为关键安全威胁。现有研究已指出该问题，但对其发生条件与稳定性缺乏深入理解。本文旨在复制扩展研究，明确该现象的真实风险，并探索简单有效的缓解方法。
light_analysis.method: 本文在扩展的模型和数据集套件上进行了复制研究，确认奇怪泛化在特定条件下出现。通过系统测试多种训练时基于提示的干预措施，发现最有效的是提供使泛化行为成为预期行为的提示上下文。即使未针对特定泛化特性的通用干预也能缓解该现象。
light_analysis.result: 实验证实奇怪泛化仅在特定模型和数据集上出现，且非常脆弱。简单的训练时提示干预即可使其消失，尤其是提供上下文使泛化行为符合预期。通用干预也能有效减轻影响，表明该威胁可被低成本缓解。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文表明奇怪泛化并非普遍稳定现象，其脆弱性降低了安全威胁的严重性。提出的简单干预方案易于实施，为模型安全部署提供了实用指导。未来需进一步研究干预的长期效果及对其他泛化形式的影响。

title: SPAMoE: Spectrum-Aware Hybrid Operator Framework for Full-Waveform Inversion
abstract: Full-waveform inversion (FWI) is pivotal for reconstructing high-resolution subsurface velocity models but remains computationally intensive and ill-posed. While deep learning approaches promise efficiency, existing Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) and single-paradigm Neural Operators (NOs) struggle with one fundamental issue: frequency entanglement of multi-scale geological features. To address this challenge, we propose Spectral-Preserving Adaptive MoE (SPAMoE), a novel spectrum-aware framework for solving inverse problems with complex multi-scale structures. Our approach introduces a Spectral-Preserving DINO Encoder that enforces a lower bound on the high-to-low frequency energy ratio of the encoded representation, mitigating high-frequency collapse and stabilizing subsequent frequency-domain modeling. Furthermore, we design a novel Spectral Decomposition and Routing mechanism that dynamically assigns frequency bands to a Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) ensemble comprising FNO, MNO, and LNO. On the ten OpenFWI sub-datasets, experiments show that SPAMoE reduces the average MAE by 44.4% relative to the best officially reported OpenFWI baseline, thereby establishing a new architectural framework for learning-based full-waveform inversion. Our code and data are available at https://github.com/zhenyuwang12366/SPAMoE

light_analysis.overview: 提出频谱感知混合专家框架SPAMoE，通过频谱保持编码和动态专家路由解决全波形反演中的频率纠缠问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 全波形反演（FWI）对重建高分辨率地下速度模型至关重要，但计算密集且病态。深度学习方法虽有潜力，但现有CNN和单一范式神经算子因多尺度地质特征的频率纠缠而性能受限。迫切需要一种能有效处理多频段特征的架构。
light_analysis.method: SPAMoE包含两个核心组件：频谱保持DINO编码器，通过强制高-低频能量比下界缓解高频崩溃；频谱分解路由机制，将频段动态分配给由FNO、MNO和LNO组成的混合专家（MoE）集成，实现自适应频域建模。
light_analysis.result: 在十个OpenFWI子数据集上，SPAMoE将平均绝对误差（MAE）相比官方最佳基线降低44.4%，显著提升反演精度，验证了框架在处理多尺度结构中的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: SPAMoE为基于学习的全波形反演建立了新的架构范式，通过频谱感知设计有效解决了频率纠缠问题。开源代码有助于推动该领域发展。未来可探索更复杂的专家路由策略或扩展到其他反问题。

title: Algebraic Diversity: Group-Theoretic Spectral Estimation from Single Observations
abstract: We establish that temporal averaging over multiple observations is the degenerate case of algebraic group action with the trivial group $G=\{e\}$. A General Replacement Theorem proves that a group-averaged estimator from one snapshot achieves equivalent subspace decomposition to multi-snapshot covariance estimation. The Trivial Group Embedding Theorem proves that the sample covariance is the accumulation of trivial-group estimates, with variance governed by a $(G,L)$ continuum as $1/(|G|\cdot L)$. The processing gain $10\log_{10}(M)$ dB equals the classical beamforming gain, establishing that this gain is a property of group order, not sensor count. The DFT, DCT, and KLT are unified as group-matched special cases. We conjecture a General Algebraic Averaging Theorem extending these results to arbitrary statistics, with variance governed by the effective group order $d_{\mathrm{eff}}$. Monte Carlo experiments on the first four sample moments across five group types confirm the conjecture to four-digit precision. The framework exploits the $structure$ of information (representation-theoretic symmetry of the data object) rather than the content, complementing Shannon's theory. Five applications are demonstrated: single-snapshot MUSIC, massive MIMO, single-pulse waveform classification, graph signal processing, and analysis of transformer LLMs. Techniques for blind group matching are described.
comment: 41 pages, 14 figures. v3: Retracted six quantitative findings in Section 11, transformer application, due to implementation error in spectral concentration metric. Corrected results deferred to separate publication. Remark added after Conjecture 23 on orbit-structure bias in psi criterion. All other sections unaffected v4: new result on blind group matching

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于群论的代数多样性框架，通过单次观测的群平均实现多快拍协方差估计的等效子空间分解。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统谱估计依赖多次观测的时间平均，但在单快拍场景下失效。现有方法缺乏统一利用数据内在对称性的理论框架，处理增益与传感器数量的关系未明确。本文旨在通过群论揭示时间平均的群特例本质，建立单观测谱估计的通用方法。
light_analysis.method: 通过通用替换定理证明单快拍群平均估计与多快拍协方差估计的子空间分解等价；平凡群嵌入定理表明样本协方差是平凡群估计的累积。将DFT、DCT、KLT统一为群匹配特例，并提出通用代数平均定理猜想，利用表示论对称性挖掘数据结构。蒙特卡洛实验验证猜想。
light_analysis.result: 蒙特卡洛实验在五种群类型上对前四阶样本矩的验证达到四位小数精度。处理增益为10log10(M) dB，与经典波束形成增益一致，证明增益由群阶决定而非传感器数量。应用包括单快拍MUSIC、大规模MIMO、单脉冲分类、图信号处理及Transformer LLM分析。
light_analysis.conclusion: 建立了基于群论的单观测谱估计框架，统一多个经典变换并揭示了处理增益本质。学术上补充香农信息论，利用数据结构对称性。实际应用于通信、信号处理和机器学习。未来方向包括盲群匹配技术及扩展到非均匀统计。

title: Feature Weighting Improves Pool-Based Sequential Active Learning for Regression
abstract: Pool-based sequential active learning for regression (ALR) optimally selects a small number of samples sequentially from a large pool of unlabeled samples to label, so that a more accurate regression model can be constructed under a given labeling budget. Representativeness and diversity, which involve computing the distances among different samples, are important considerations in ALR. However, previous ALR approaches do not incorporate the importance of different features in inter-sample distance computation, resulting in inaccurate distances and hence sub-optimal sample selection. This paper proposes four feature weighted single-task ALR approaches and three feature weighted multi-task ALR approaches, where the ridge regression coefficients trained from a small amount of previously labeled samples are used to weight the corresponding features in inter-sample distance computation. Extensive experiments showed that this intuitive and easy-to-implement enhancement almost always improves the performance of five existing ALR approaches, in both single-task and multi-task regression problems. The feature weighting strategy may also be easily extended to stream-based ALR, and classification algorithms.

light_analysis.overview: 提出特征加权改进基于池的顺序主动学习回归方法，提升样本选择准确性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有主动学习回归方法在样本间距离计算中未考虑特征重要性，导致距离不准确和样本选择次优。因此需要引入特征加权来改善距离度量，提高样本选择效率。
light_analysis.method: 提出四种特征加权单任务ALR和三种多任务ALR方法，利用已标注样本训练的岭回归系数作为特征权重，改进距离计算。方法简单易实现，可扩展到流式ALR和分类。
light_analysis.result: 大量实验表明，特征加权几乎总是提升五种现有ALR方法的性能，在单任务和多任务回归中均有效，验证了方法的通用性和有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 特征加权策略简单有效，能显著提升主动学习回归性能，并易于扩展到其他学习范式，具有广泛的应用价值。

title: SurgTEMP: Temporal-Aware Surgical Video Question Answering with Text-guided Visual Memory for Laparoscopic Cholecystectomy
abstract: Surgical procedures are inherently complex and risky, requiring extensive expertise and constant focus to navigate evolving intraoperative scenes. Computer-assisted systems such as surgical visual question answering (VQA) offer promises for education and intraoperative support. Current surgical VQA research largely focuses on static frame analysis, overlooking rich temporal semantics. Surgical video question answering is further challenged by low visual contrast, its highly knowledge-driven nature, diverse analytical needs spanning scattered temporal windows, and the hierarchy from basic perception to high-level intraoperative assessment. To address these challenges, we propose SurgTEMP, a multimodal LLM framework featuring (i) a query-guided token selection module that builds hierarchical visual memory (spatial and temporal memory banks) and (ii) a Surgical Competency Progression (SCP) training scheme. Together, they enable effective modeling of variable-length surgical videos while preserving procedure-relevant cues and temporal coherence, and better support diverse downstream assessment tasks. To support model development, we introduce CholeVidQA-32K, a surgical video question answering dataset comprising 32K open-ended QA pairs and 3,855 video segments (approximately 128 h total) from laparoscopic cholecystectomy. The dataset is organized into a three-level hierarchy -- Perception, Assessment, and Reasoning -- spanning 11 tasks from instrument/action/anatomy perception to Critical View of Safety (CVS), intraoperative difficulty, skill proficiency, and adverse event assessment. In comprehensive evaluations against state-of-the-art open-source multimodal and video LLMs (fine-tuned and zero-shot), SurgTEMP achieves substantial performance improvements, advancing the state of video-based surgical VQA. The project page is available at: https://camma-public.github.io/SurgTEMP/

light_analysis.overview: 提出 SurgTEMP 多模态大语言模型框架，通过文本引导的视觉记忆和层次化训练方案，实现面向腹腔镜胆囊切除术的视频问答，显著提升性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有手术视觉问答主要基于静态帧分析，忽略了手术视频中丰富的时间语义。手术视频问答面临低视觉对比度、高知识驱动性、分析需求分散于不同时间窗口以及从基础感知到高级术中评估的多层次挑战，亟需能够有效建模时间信息并支持多样化下游评估任务的方法。
light_analysis.method: SurgTEMP 框架包含查询引导的令牌选择模块，构建层次化视觉记忆（空间和时序记忆库），以及手术能力进展训练方案。通过文本引导提取关键视觉信息，保持程序相关线索和时间一致性，支持变长手术视频建模。同时引入 CholeVidQA-32K 数据集，包含 32K 开放问答对和 3,855 个视频片段，覆盖感知、评估和推理三层 11 个任务。
light_analysis.result: 在针对开源多模态和视频大语言模型（包括微调和零样本）的综合评估中，SurgTEMP 在多项任务上取得显著性能提升，尤其是在感知、评估和推理任务上均优于现有方法，推进了视频手术视觉问答的最新水平。
light_analysis.conclusion: SurgTEMP 通过时间感知的视觉记忆和层次化训练，有效解决了手术视频问答中的时间建模和多样化评估需求，为计算机辅助手术教育和术中支持提供了新方案。CholeVidQA-32K 数据集弥补了现有数据集的不足。未来可扩展至其他手术类型和更细粒度的评估任务。

title: ScoringBench: A Benchmark for Evaluating Tabular Foundation Models with Proper Scoring Rules
abstract: Tabular foundation models such as TabPFN and TabICL already produce full predictive distributions, yet prevailing regression benchmarks evaluate them almost exclusively via point-estimate metrics (RMSE, $R^2$). This discards precisely the distributional information these models are designed to provide - a critical gap for high-stakes domains where not all kinds of errors are equally costly.   We introduce ScoringBench, an open and extensible benchmark that evaluates tabular regression models under a comprehensive suite of proper scoring rules - including CRPS, CRLS, interval score, energy score, and weighted CRPS - alongside standard point metrics. ScoringBench covers 97 regression datasets from diverse domains, supports transparent community contributions via a git-based leaderboard, and provides two complementary ranking protocols: an ordinal Demsar/autorank approach and a magnitude-preserving z-score ranking approach.   Evaluating several models - spanning in-context learners, fine-tuned foundation models, gradient-boosted trees, and MLPs - we find that model rankings shift substantially depending on the scoring rule: models that excel on point-estimate metrics can rank poorly on probabilistic ones, and the top-performing model under one proper scoring rule may rank noticeably lower under another. These results demonstrate that the choice of evaluation metric is not a technicality but a modelling decision - and, for applications where e.g. tail errors are disproportionately costly, a domain-specific requirement with direct consequences for model deployment.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ScoringBench基准，使用适当评分规则评估表格基础模型的概率预测性能，揭示模型排名随评分规则变化。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有表格回归基准仅用点估计指标（如RMSE、R²）评估模型，忽略了表格基础模型（如TabPFN、TabICL）产生的预测分布信息。在高风险场景中，不同错误代价不同，需要评估分布质量。因此需要全面的基准来评估概率预测。
light_analysis.method: 构建包含97个回归数据集的ScoringBench，采用综合的适当评分规则（包括CRPS、CRLS、区间分数、能量分数和加权CRPS）及标准点指标。提供基于git的透明排行榜和两种互补排名协议：序数Demsar/autorank方法和幅度保持的z-score排名方法。
light_analysis.result: 评估多种模型（上下文学习器、微调基础模型、梯度提升树、MLP）发现：模型排名因评分规则显著改变，点估计指标表现好的模型在概率指标上可能排名靠后，且不同评分规则下最佳模型也不同。
light_analysis.conclusion: 表明评估指标选择不仅是技术细节，而是建模决策，尤其对尾误差代价大的应用场景，需根据领域需求选择评分规则，直接影响模型部署。ScoringBench提供了可扩展的评估平台。

title: Can LLMs Infer Conversational Agent Users' Personality Traits from Chat History?
abstract: Sensitive information, such as knowledge about an individual's personality, can be can be misused to influence behavior (e.g., via personalized messaging). To assess to what extent an individual's personality can be inferred from user interactions with LLM-based conversational agents (CAs), we analyze and quantify related privacy risks of using CAs. We collected actual ChatGPT logs from N=668 participants, containing 62,090 individual chats, and report statistics about the different types of shared data and use cases. We fine-tuned RoBERTa-base text classification models to infer personality traits from CA interactions. The findings show that these models achieve trait inference with accuracy (ternary classification) better than random in multiple cases. For example, for extraversion, accuracy improves by +44% relative to the baseline on interactions for relationships and personal reflection. This research highlights how interactions with CAs pose privacy risks and provides fine-grained insights into the level of risk associated with different types of interactions.

light_analysis.overview: 本研究分析从LLM对话代理历史中推断用户人格特质的隐私风险，并通过微调模型验证了推断可行性。
light_analysis.motivation: 人格特质等敏感信息可能被滥用（如个性化消息）。现有研究未充分探讨用户与LLM对话代理交互中人格推断的隐私风险。本文旨在量化该风险，并分析不同交互类型下的风险水平，为隐私保护提供依据。
light_analysis.method: 收集668名参与者的ChatGPT日志（62,090次对话），统计共享数据类型和使用案例。微调RoBERTa-base文本分类模型，从对话历史中推断大五人格特质，采用三元分类（高/中/低）。
light_analysis.result: 模型在多项特质推断上准确率优于随机基线。例如，对于外倾性，在关系与个人反思类交互中准确率相对基线提升44%。研究表明对话交互存在显著隐私风险。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文揭示了LLM对话代理使用中的人格推断隐私风险，量化了不同交互类型的风险等级。未来可针对风险设计隐私保护机制，如数据脱敏或用户警告。

title: Toward Culturally Grounded Natural Language Processing
abstract: Multilingual NLP is often treated as a route to global inclusion, but linguistic coverage and cultural competence frequently diverge. This paper synthesizes over 50 papers spanning multilingual performance inequality, cross-lingual transfer, culture-aware evaluation, cultural alignment, multimodal benchmarks, benchmark-design critique, and community-grounded data practices. Across this literature, training data coverage remains important, but outcomes are also shaped by tokenization, prompt language, translated benchmark design, culturally grounded supervision, modality, and who authors or validates evaluation data. We argue that culturally grounded NLP should move beyond treating languages as isolated rows in benchmark tables and instead model communicative ecologies: the institutions, scripts, domains, modalities, and communities through which language is used. We propose a layered evaluation and reporting agenda centered on representation audits, mixed elicitation, ecological validity, community validation, adaptation provenance, within-language variation, and maintenance of living cultural resources.
comment: Accepted at The 4th Workshop on Cross-Cultural Considerations in NLP (C3NLP) @ ACL 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出文化基础NLP概念，主张建模交际生态而非孤立语言行，并提出分层评估议程。
light_analysis.motivation: 多语言NLP常被视为全球包容的途径，但语言覆盖与文化能力常分离。现有方法将语言视为基准表中的孤立行，忽视文化语境，导致评估结果不能反映真实使用场景。需要从文化嵌入角度重新设计NLP评估与实践。
light_analysis.method: 综合50余篇论文，分析多语言性能不平等、跨语言迁移、文化评估等问题。提出分层评估议程，包括表示审计、混合启发、生态效度、社区验证、适应溯源、语言内变异性、维护活文化资源。强调建模交际生态，涵盖机构、脚本、领域、模态和社区。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确提及具体实验结果，但指出训练数据覆盖、分词、提示语言、翻译基准设计、文化监督、模态和评估数据来源等因素显著影响多语言NLP表现。相比于传统基准行，文化基础方法能更全面反映语言使用多样性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 文化基础NLP应超越语言孤立视角，通过分层评估议程推动更具包容性的发展。该框架批判当前基准设计局限，为数据实践和评估提供指导，强调社区参与和文化资源维护，有助于弥合语言覆盖与文化能力的鸿沟。

title: C2W-Tune: Cavity-to -Wall Transfer Learning for Thin Atrial Wall Segmentation in 3D LGE-MRI
abstract: Accurate segmentation of the left atrial (LA) wall in 3D late gadolinium-enhanced MRI (LGE-MRI) is essential for wall thickness mapping and fibrosis quantification, yet it remains challenging due to the wall's thin geometry, complex anatomy, and low contrast. We propose C2W-Tune, a two-stage cavity-to-wall transfer framework that leverages a high-accuracy LA cavity model as an anatomical prior to improve thin-wall delineation. Using a 3D U-Net with a ResNeXt encoder and instance normalization, Stage 1 pre-trains the network to segment the LA cavity, learning robust atrial representations. Stage 2 transfers these weights and adapts the network to LA wall segmentation using a progressive layer-unfreezing schedule to preserve cavity features while enabling wall-specific refinement. On the 2018 LA Segmentation Challenge dataset, C2W-Tune outperformed an architecture-matched baseline trained from scratch. The wall Dice score increased from 0.623 to 0.814, surface Dice at 1 mm increased from 0.553 to 0.731, 95th-percentile Hausdorff distance (HD95) decreased from 2.95 mm to 2.55 mm, and average symmetric surface distance (ASSD) decreased from 0.71 mm to 0.63 mm. Under reduced supervision using 70 training volumes sampled from the same training set, C2W-Tune achieved a Dice of 0.78, remaining competitive with recent multi-class bi-atrial benchmarks, typically 0.6-0.7. These results show that anatomically grounded task transfer with controlled fine-tuning improves accuracy for thin LA wall segmentation in 3D LGE-MRI.
comment: Accepted to the International Conference on Artificial Intelligence in Medicine (AIME 2026)

light_analysis.overview: 提出C2W-Tune，一种腔到壁的两阶段迁移学习框架，利用高精度腔模型先验提升心房薄壁分割精度。
light_analysis.motivation: 左心房壁在3D LGE-MRI中因薄几何、复杂解剖和低对比度，分割极具挑战。现有方法难以准确描绘薄壁，影响壁厚映射和纤维化量化。利用腔模型作为解剖先验，通过迁移学习可提升壁分割性能。
light_analysis.method: 采用3D U-Net结合ResNeXt编码器和实例归一化。第一阶段预训练腔分割，学习鲁棒的房室表征。第二阶段迁移权重，通过渐进式层解冻策略适配壁分割，保留腔特征同时细化壁边界。在2018 LA Segmentation Challenge数据集上验证。
light_analysis.result: C2W-Tune相比基线模型：壁Dice从0.623提升至0.814，表面Dice（1mm）从0.553增至0.731，HD95从2.95mm降至2.55mm，ASSD从0.71mm降至0.63mm。使用70个训练样本时Dice达0.78，优于同期多类双房基准（0.6-0.7）。
light_analysis.conclusion: 解剖任务迁移与受控微调显著提升薄壁分割准确性，为心房壁分割提供有效新范式。该方法在减少监督下仍保持竞争力，有望应用于临床壁厚映射和纤维化量化。未来可扩展至其他薄壁结构分割。

title: Synergistic Perception and Generative Recomposition: A Multi-Agent Orchestration for Expert-Level Building Inspection
abstract: Building facade defect inspection is fundamental to structural health monitoring and sustainable urban maintenance, yet it remains a formidable challenge due to extreme geometric variability, low contrast against complex backgrounds, and the inherent complexity of composite defects (e.g., cracks co-occurring with spalling). Such characteristics lead to severe pixel imbalance and feature ambiguity, which, coupled with the critical scarcity of high-quality pixel-level annotations, hinder the generalization of existing detection and segmentation models. To address gaps, we propose \textit{FacadeFixer}, a unified multi-agent framework that treats defect perception as a collaborative reasoning task rather than isolated recognition. Specifically,\textit{FacadeFixer} orchestrates specialized agents for detection and segmentation to handle multi-type defect interference, working in tandem with a generative agent to enable semantic recomposition. This process decouples intricate defects from noisy backgrounds and realistically synthesizes them onto diverse clean textures, generating high-fidelity augmented data with precise expert-level masks. To support this, we introduce a comprehensive multi-task dataset covering six primary facade categories with pixel-level annotations. Extensive experiments demonstrate that \textit{FacadeFixer} significantly outperforms state-of-the-art (SOTA) baselines. Specifically, it excels in capturing pixel-level structural anomalies and highlights generative synthesis as a robust solution to data scarcity in infrastructure inspection. Our code and dataset will be made publicly available.
comment: We are withdrawing this article because we recently identified a major methodological error regarding the multi-agent orchestration setup described in Section 4.2. This issue significantly impacts the final conclusions drawn in the paper. We sincerely apologize for any confusion this may have caused

light_analysis.overview: 提出FacadeFixer多智能体协同框架，将缺陷感知视为协作推理任务，通过生成式语义重组解决建筑立面缺陷检测中的数据稀缺和特征模糊问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 建筑立面缺陷检测因几何变异大、背景低对比度、复合缺陷复杂而导致像素不平衡和特征模糊，且高质量像素级标注稀缺，限制了现有模型泛化能力。现有方法多孤立处理检测或分割，无法有效应对多类型缺陷干扰和数据稀缺问题。
light_analysis.method: FacadeFixer框架包含检测和分割专用智能体处理多类型缺陷干扰，并与生成式智能体协同实现语义重组。生成式智能体将复杂缺陷从噪声背景解耦，合成到多样清洁纹理上，产生高保真增强数据及精确专家级掩码。同时引入涵盖六类立面像素级标注的综合多任务数据集。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明FacadeFixer显著优于SOTA基线，在捕捉像素级结构异常方面表现突出。通过生成式合成有效缓解数据稀缺问题，为基础设施检测提供鲁棒解决方案。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但提到显著超越基线。
light_analysis.conclusion: FacadeFixer通过多智能体协作和生成式数据增强，解决了建筑立面缺陷检测中的泛化性和数据稀缺挑战。该方法学术上展示了协同感知与生成重组结合的有效性，实际应用于城市维护和结构健康监测。未来可扩展至其他基础设施检测任务，且代码与数据集将开源。

title: Continual Few-shot Adaptation for Synthetic Fingerprint Detection
abstract: The quality and realism of synthetically generated fingerprint images have increased significantly over the past decade fueled by advancements in generative artificial intelligence (GenAI). This has exacerbated the vulnerability of fingerprint recognition systems to data injection attacks, where synthetic fingerprints are maliciously inserted during enrollment or authentication. Hence, there is an urgent need for methods to detect if a fingerprint image is real or synthetic. While it is straightforward to train deep neural network (DNN) models to classify images as real or synthetic, often such DNN models overfit the training data and fail to generalize well when applied to synthetic fingerprints generated using unseen GenAI models. In this work, we formulate synthetic fingerprint detection as a continual few-shot adaptation problem, where the objective is to rapidly evolve a base detector to identify new types of synthetic data. To enable continual few-shot adaptation, we employ a combination of binary cross-entropy and supervised contrastive (applied to the feature representation) losses and replay a few samples from previously known styles during fine-tuning to mitigate catastrophic forgetting. Experiments based on several DNN backbones (as feature extractors) and a variety of real and synthetic fingerprint datasets indicate that the proposed approach achieves a good trade-off between fast adaptation for detecting unseen synthetic styles and forgetting of known styles.
comment: Accepted in 14th International Workshop on Biometrics and Forensics (IWBF-2026)

light_analysis.overview: 将合成指纹检测建模为持续少样本适应问题，结合二值交叉熵和监督对比损失及重放策略，实现快速适应新合成风格并缓解灾难性遗忘。
light_analysis.motivation: 生成式AI提高了合成指纹的真实性，导致指纹识别系统易受数据注入攻击。现有DNN检测模型过拟合训练数据，对未见过的生成模型合成的指纹泛化差。因此需要一种能快速适应新类型合成指纹的方法，以增强检测系统的鲁棒性。
light_analysis.method: 提出持续少样本适应框架，使用二值交叉熵损失和监督对比损失（应用于特征表示）联合优化，并在微调时重放少量已知风格样本以缓解灾难性遗忘。采用多种DNN骨干作为特征提取器，在多个真实和合成指纹数据集上进行实验评估。
light_analysis.result: 基于多种DNN骨干和多个数据集，所提方法在检测未见过的合成风格与遗忘已知风格之间取得了良好权衡。实验表明，该方法能快速适应新合成风格，同时保持对已知风格的检测性能，优于传统微调方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本工作为合成指纹检测提供了持续学习的新视角，有效解决了对新合成风格的泛化问题，具有重要实际应用价值。未来可探索更高效的重放策略或扩展到其他生物特征检测任务。

title: Visualizing Critic Match Loss Landscapes for Interpretation of Online Reinforcement Learning Control Algorithms
abstract: Reinforcement learning has proven its power on various occasions. However, its performance is not always guaranteed when system dynamics change. Instead, it largely relies on users' empirical experience. For reinforcement learning algorithms with an actor-critic structure, the critic neural network reflects the approximation and optimization process in the RL algorithm. Analyzing the performance of the critic neural network helps to understand the mechanism of the algorithm. To support systematic interpretation of such algorithms in dynamic control problems, this work proposes a critic match loss landscape visualization method for online reinforcement learning. The method constructs a loss landscape by projecting recorded critic parameter trajectories onto a low-dimensional linear subspace. The critic match loss is evaluated over the projected parameter grid using fixed reference state samples and temporal-difference targets. This yields a three-dimensional loss surface together with a two-dimensional optimization path that characterizes critic learning behavior. To extend analysis beyond visual inspection, quantitative landscape indices and a normalized system performance index are introduced, enabling structured comparison across different training outcomes. The approach is demonstrated using the Action-Dependent Heuristic Dynamic Programming algorithm on cart-pole and spacecraft attitude control tasks. Comparative analyses across projection methods and training stages reveal distinct landscape characteristics associated with stable convergence and unstable learning. The proposed framework enables both qualitative and quantitative interpretation of critic optimization behavior in online reinforcement learning.
comment: Published in Acta Astronautica, Vol. 246, pp. 909-920, 2026. DOI:10.1016/j.actaastro.2026.04.045

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种 critic 匹配损失景观可视化方法，用于在线强化学习控制算法的可解释性分析。
light_analysis.motivation: 强化学习在系统动态变化时性能不稳定，且依赖用户经验。对于演员-评论家结构的算法，评论家网络反映优化过程，但缺乏系统性解释方法。现有分析多依靠定性观察，难以量化比较。本文旨在通过可视化评论家参数轨迹的损失景观，结合定量指标，实现对在线强化学习算法优化行为的深入理解。
light_analysis.method: 提出 critic 匹配损失景观可视化方法：将记录的评论家参数轨迹投影到低维线性子空间，构建损失景观。在投影参数网格上，使用固定参考状态样本和时间差分目标计算 critic 匹配损失，得到三维损失曲面和二维优化路径。引入定量景观指数和归一化系统性能指标。在推车杆和航天器姿态控制任务上，使用动作依赖启发式动态规划算法进行演示。
light_analysis.result: 通过对比不同投影方法和训练阶段，揭示了稳定收敛和不稳定学习对应的不同景观特征。定量指标支持结构化比较，方法在推车杆和航天器姿态控制任务上有效。摘要未提供具体的性能提升数据，但表明该方法能有效区分不同训练结果。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出一个定性和定量解释在线强化学习中评论家优化行为的框架，可分析控制算法在不同动态条件下的学习行为。该方法有助于理解算法机制，指导参数调试和算法改进。未来可扩展到其他在线强化学习算法和更复杂的控制任务。

title: FastDSAC: Unlocking the Potential of Maximum Entropy RL in High-Dimensional Humanoid Control
abstract: Scaling Maximum Entropy Reinforcement Learning (RL) to high-dimensional humanoid control remains a fundamental challenge, as the ''curse of dimensionality'' induces severe exploration inefficiency and training instability. Consequently, highly optimized deterministic policy gradients currently dominate high-throughput regimes. We address this limitation with FastDSAC, a framework that effectively unlocks the potential of maximum entropy stochastic policies for complex continuous control. We introduce Dimension-wise Entropy Modulation (DEM) to dynamically redistribute the exploration budget, alongside a continuous distributional critic tailored to ensure accurate value estimation by mitigating both high-dimensional overestimation and discrete quantization artifacts. Extensive evaluations on HumanoidBench and a diverse set of continuous control tasks demonstrate that FastDSAC establishes state-of-the-art performance for high-dimensional stochastic policies on the evaluated benchmarks. Our method is competitive with and often outperforms strong deterministic baselines, with gains of 180% and 350% on the challenging Basketball and Balance Hard tasks, respectively.

light_analysis.overview: 提出FastDSAC框架，通过维度熵调制和连续分布评论家，实现高维人形控制中的最大熵强化学习。
light_analysis.motivation: 最大熵强化学习在高维人形控制中面临“维度诅咒”导致的探索效率低下和训练不稳定问题，而确定性策略梯度方法虽优化良好但缺乏随机策略的探索优势。现有方法难以平衡探索与利用，且高维值估计易出现过估计和离散化伪影。因此，需要一种能释放最大熵随机策略潜力的方法，以在复杂连续控制任务中取得更好性能。
light_analysis.method: FastDSAC框架包含两个关键技术创新：维度熵调制（DEM）根据维度重要性动态分配探索预算，避免无效探索；连续分布评论家采用连续分布表示进行价值估计，同时缓解高维过估计和离散量化伪影。该框架支持随机策略在HumanoidBench等复杂环境中的高效训练，无需依赖确定性策略的常见技巧。
light_analysis.result: 在HumanoidBench和其他连续控制任务上的广泛评估表明，FastDSAC在高维随机策略中达到了最先进性能。与强确定性基线方法相比，在Basketball和Balance Hard任务上分别实现了180%和350%的显著提升。同时，该方法在多数任务中与确定性基线持平或更优，验证了其在高维人形控制中的有效性和鲁棒性。
light_analysis.conclusion: FastDSAC成功解锁了最大熵强化学习在高维人形控制中的潜力，证实了随机策略在复杂连续控制中优于确定性策略的可行性。其核心创新（DEM和连续分布评论家）为处理高维探索和稳定训练提供了通用思路。未来工作可能涉及进一步优化计算效率或扩展到更复杂的现实世界机器人任务，但摘要未提及具体局限性。

title: Heavy-Tailed Principal Component Analysis
abstract: Principal Component Analysis (PCA) is a cornerstone of dimensionality reduction, yet its classical formulation relies critically on second-order moments and is therefore fragile in the presence of heavy-tailed data and impulsive noise. While numerous robust PCA variants have been proposed, most either assume finite variance, rely on sparsity-driven decompositions, or address robustness through surrogate loss functions without a unified treatment of infinite-variance models. In this paper, we study PCA for high-dimensional data generated according to a superstatistical dependent model of the form $\mathbf{X} = A^{1/2}\mathbf{G}$, where $A$ is a positive random scalar and $\mathbf{G}$ is a Gaussian vector. This framework captures a wide class of heavy-tailed distributions, including multivariate $t$ and sub-Gaussian $α$-stable laws. We formulate PCA under a logarithmic loss, which remains well defined even when moments do not exist. Our main theoretical result shows that, under this loss, the principal components of the heavy-tailed observations coincide with those obtained by applying standard PCA to the covariance matrix of the underlying Gaussian generator. Building on this insight, we propose robust estimators for this covariance matrix directly from heavy-tailed data and compare them with the empirical covariance and Tyler's scatter estimator. Extensive experiments, including background denoising tasks, demonstrate that the proposed approach reliably recovers principal directions and significantly outperforms classical PCA in the presence of heavy-tailed and impulsive noise, while remaining competitive under Gaussian noise.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于对数损失的重尾PCA方法，理论证明其与高斯生成协方差矩阵的PCA等价，实现高维重尾数据的鲁棒降维。
light_analysis.motivation: 经典PCA依赖二阶矩，对重尾数据和脉冲噪声敏感。现有鲁棒PCA方法大多假设有限方差或依赖稀疏分解，缺乏对无限方差模型的统一处理。本文旨在解决高维重尾数据（如多元t分布、α-稳定分布）的PCA问题，提供理论保证和有效方法。
light_analysis.method: 采用超统计依赖模型X = A^{1/2}G，其中A为正随机标量，G为高斯向量。提出对数损失函数，即使矩不存在也有定义。理论证明在该损失下，重尾数据的主成分与高斯生成协方差矩阵的PCA一致。据此构建鲁棒协方差估计器，并与经验协方差和Tyler's散度估计比较。
light_analysis.result: 在背景去噪等任务中，提出方法在重尾和脉冲噪声下可靠恢复主方向，显著优于经典PCA，而在高斯噪声下与经典PCA性能相当。实验未提供具体数值，但明确表明优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: 贡献在于从理论上统一了重尾分布的PCA，提出对数损失下的等价变换，并开发了实用的鲁棒估计器。该工作对信号处理、金融数据等重尾场景有应用价值，未来可探索更复杂的依赖结构或非线性扩展。

title: TIQA: Human-Aligned Perceptual Text Quality Assessment in Generated Images
