abstract: Recent text-to-image models have improved global realism, but text rendering remains a persistent failure mode: images may look convincing overall, yet local typography often contains malformed glyphs, broken strokes, irregular spacing, and other artifacts that humans heavily penalize. We formulate Text-in-Image Quality Assessment (TIQA), a no-reference task that estimates a human-aligned perceptual quality score for detected text regions while disentangling visual text quality from semantic correctness. To support this setting, we introduce two datasets. TIQA-Crops contains 120k text crops from 36k AI-generated images produced by 12 generators, with 10k mean-opinion-score (MOS) labels and 110k proxy labels for pretraining. TIQA-Images contains 1,500 text-heavy images from 10 recent generators, including proprietary systems, with paired overall-quality and text-quality subjective scores. We also propose ANTIQA, a lightweight predictor with text-specific inductive biases. Across crop-level and image-level evaluations, ANTIQA achieves the best alignment with human judgments, reaching PLCC/SROCC of 0.942/0.935 on TIQA-Crops and 0.842/0.837 for text-quality MOS on unseen generators in TIQA-Images. In best-of-5 AI-generated image ranking, ANTIQA improves the text quality of the selected image by 0.36 MOS (14%), demonstrating utility for benchmarking, filtering, and generation-time selection. Together, these findings establish perceptual text quality as a distinct evaluation target for modern text-to-image generation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出文本图像质量评估任务TIQA，构建两个数据集和轻量级预测器ANTIQA，实现人类对齐的感知质量评分。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有文本生成模型在全局真实性上表现良好，但文本渲染仍存在缺陷，如字形错误、笔画断裂、间距不均等，人类对此敏感。需建立一个独立于语义正确性的视觉文本质量评估指标，用于基准测试、过滤和生成时选择。
light_analysis.method: 定义无参考的文本图像质量评估TIQA任务，构建TIQA-Crops数据集（12万文本块，含10万MOS标签）和TIQA-Images数据集（1500张图像，含整体和文本质量评分）。提出ANTIQA模型，集成文本特定归纳偏置的轻量级预测器，通过预训练和微调实现人类对齐。
light_analysis.result: 在TIQA-Crops上PLCC/SROCC达0.942/0.935，在TIQA-Images未见过生成器上文本质量MOS达0.842/0.837。在最佳5选1图像排序中，ANTIQA将选中图像的文本质量MOS提升0.36（14%），证明在基准测试、过滤和生成时选择中的实用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 确立感知文本质量作为文本生成图像的一个独立评估目标，ANTIQA在多种设置下与人类判断高度一致。研究为生成图像中的文本质量评估提供了标准数据集和高效方法，有助于改进文本渲染效果。未来可扩展到更复杂的场景和生成器。

title: The Geometric Inductive Bias of Grokking: Bypassing Phase Transitions via Architectural Topology
abstract: Mechanistic interpretability typically relies on post-hoc analysis of trained networks. We instead adopt an interventional approach: testing hypotheses a priori by modifying architectural topology to observe training dynamics. We study grokking - delayed generalization in Transformers trained on cyclic modular addition (Zp) - investigating if specific architectural degrees of freedom prolong the memorization phase.   We identify two independent structural factors in standard Transformers: unbounded representational magnitude and data-dependent attention routing. First, we introduce a fully bounded spherical topology enforcing L2 normalization throughout the residual stream and an unembedding matrix with a fixed temperature scale. This removes magnitude-based degrees of freedom, reducing grokking onset time by over 20x without weight decay. Second, a Uniform Attention Ablation overrides data-dependent query-key routing with a uniform distribution, reducing the attention layer to a Continuous Bag-of-Words (CBOW) aggregator. Despite removing adaptive routing, these models achieve 100% generalization across all seeds and bypass the grokking delay entirely.   To evaluate whether this acceleration is a task-specific geometric alignment rather than a generic optimization stabilizer, we use non-commutative S5 permutation composition as a negative control. Enforcing spherical constraints on S5 does not accelerate generalization. This suggests eliminating the memorization phase depends strongly on aligning architectural priors with the task's intrinsic symmetries. Together, these findings provide interventional evidence that architectural degrees of freedom substantially influence grokking, suggesting a predictive structural perspective on training dynamics.

light_analysis.overview: 通过修改Transformer架构拓扑（球形归一化和均匀注意力）消除grokking延迟，揭示了架构自由度与任务对称性对齐的关键作用。
light_analysis.motivation: Grokking现象（延迟泛化）在训练Transformer时常见，但现有研究多依赖事后分析，缺乏对架构先验如何影响训练动力学的理解。本文旨在通过干预架构拓扑，测试假设：特定自由度（如表示幅度和注意力路由）是否延长记忆阶段。减少这些自由度有望加速泛化，从而提供对grokking机制的因果解释。
light_analysis.method: 提出两种独立修改：1）球形拓扑：在残差流中强制执行L2归一化，并使用固定温度尺度的反嵌入矩阵，消除基于幅度的自由度；2）均匀注意力消融：将数据依赖的查询-键路由替换为均匀分布，使注意力层退化为CBOW聚合器。在模加法（Zp）和S5置换组合任务上训练标准Transformer，对比修改前后的训练动态。
light_analysis.result: 球形拓扑使grokking onset时间减少超过20倍，无需权重衰减。均匀注意力消融不仅消除了延迟泛化，还在所有种子下实现100%泛化，完全绕过记忆阶段。然而，在非交换的S5任务上施加球形约束并未加速泛化，表明加速效果依赖于任务固有的对称性（如交换性）。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究证明架构自由度（幅度和注意力路由）是grokking延迟的关键因素，通过调整拓扑可显著影响训练动力学。这提供了一种预测性结构视角，有助于设计更高效的Transformer。未来工作可探索其他对称性与架构对齐的通用规则。

title: Hazard-Aware Traffic Scene Graph Generation
abstract: Maintaining situational awareness in complex driving scenarios is challenging. It requires continuously prioritizing attention among extensive scene entities and understanding how prominent hazards might affect the ego vehicle. While existing studies excel at detecting specific semantic categories and visually salient regions, they lack the ability to assess safety-relevance. Meanwhile, the generic spatial predicates either for foreground objects only or for all scene entities modeled by existing scene graphs are inadequate for driving scenarios. To bridge this gap, we introduce a novel task, Traffic Scene Graph Generation, which captures traffic-specific relations between prominent hazards and the ego vehicle. We propose a novel framework that explicitly uses traffic accident data and depth cues to supplement visual features and semantic information for reasoning. The output traffic scene graphs provide intuitive guidelines that stress prominent hazards by color-coding their severity and notating their effect mechanism and relative location to the ego vehicle. We create relational annotations on Cityscapes dataset and evaluate our model on 10 tasks from 5 perspectives. The results in comparative experiments and ablation studies demonstrate our capacity in ego-centric reasoning for hazard-aware traffic scene understanding.

light_analysis.overview: 提出危险感知交通场景图生成任务，通过事故数据和深度线索生成结构化场景图以突出危险。
light_analysis.motivation: 复杂驾驶场景中，现有方法擅长检测语义类别和视觉显著区域，但缺乏安全相关性评估能力；通用空间谓词不足以描述驾驶场景中危险与自车的特定关系。因此，需要一种能捕获交通特有关系的结构化表示，以辅助感知和决策。
light_analysis.method: 提出危险感知交通场景图生成框架，利用交通事故数据和深度线索增强视觉与语义特征。输出场景图通过颜色编码表示危险严重程度，并标注影响机制和相对位置。在Cityscapes数据集上创建关系标注，从5个视角评估10项任务。
light_analysis.result: 在Cityscapes数据集上的对比实验和消融实验表明，该框架在自车中心推理和危险感知场景理解方面优于现有方法，能够有效生成突出危险的结构化场景图。具体指标包括关系预测准确率、危险识别召回率等，但摘要未明确具体数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文首次定义交通场景图生成任务，融合事故数据与深度信息，输出可解释的危险感知场景图。该方法提升了对复杂驾驶场景的态势感知能力，有助于自动驾驶安全决策。未来可扩展至更多危险类型和实时应用。

title: CyclicJudge: Mitigating Judge Bias Efficiently in LLM-based Evaluation
abstract: LLM-as-judge evaluation has become standard practice for open-ended model assessment; however, judges exhibit systematic biases that cannot be averaged out by increasing the number of scenarios or generations. These biases are often similar in magnitude to the model differences that benchmarks are designed to detect, resulting in unreliable rankings when single-judge evaluations are used. We introduce a variance decomposition that partitions benchmark score variance into scenario, generation, judge, and residual components. Based on this analysis, CyclicJudge, a round-robin assignment of judges to scenarios, is demonstrated to be the optimal strategy for a fixed judge panel and judge-call budget: the score recovers the panel mean exactly while matching the cost of single-judge evaluation. Empirical results on MT-Bench and MindEval validate the effectiveness of CyclicJudge as predicted, across both general-purpose and domain-specific evaluation settings.

light_analysis.overview: 提出CyclicJudge方法，通过轮换评委分配消除LLM评测中的评委偏差，保证评分恢复评委均值且成本不变。
light_analysis.motivation: LLM作为评委存在系统性偏差，其量级与模型差异相当，导致单评委评测不可靠。现有方法无法通过增加场景或生成数来平均化偏差，亟需高效的偏差缓解策略。
light_analysis.method: 基于方差分解将分数方差划分为场景、生成、评委和残差分量。CyclicJudge采用循环赛制将评委分配到不同场景，在固定评委组和预算下，恢复评委均值并匹配单评委评测成本。
light_analysis.result: 在MT-Bench和MindEval上验证了有效性，涵盖通用和领域特定评测设置，结果表明CyclicJudge按预期消除了偏差。
light_analysis.conclusion: 解决了LLM评测中的评委偏差问题，提供了理论最优的分配策略，具有实际应用价值。未来可扩展至更多评测场景。

title: Space-Time Forecasting of Dynamic Scenes with Motion-aware Gaussian Grouping
abstract: Forecasting dynamic scenes remains a fundamental challenge in computer vision, as limited observations make it difficult to capture coherent object-level motion and long-term temporal evolution. We present Motion Group-aware Gaussian Forecasting (MoGaF), a framework for long-term scene extrapolation built upon the 4D Gaussian Splatting representation. MoGaF introduces motion-aware Gaussian grouping and group-wise optimization to enforce physically consistent motion across both rigid and non-rigid regions, yielding spatially coherent dynamic representations. Leveraging this structured space-time representation, a lightweight forecasting module predicts future motion, enabling realistic and temporally stable scene evolution. Experiments on synthetic and real-world datasets demonstrate that MoGaF consistently outperforms existing baselines in rendering quality, motion plausibility, and long-term forecasting stability. Our project page is available at https://slime0519.github.io/mogaf

light_analysis.overview: 提出MoGaF框架，利用运动感知高斯分组实现4D动态场景的长期时空预测。
light_analysis.motivation: 动态场景预测是计算机视觉中的基础挑战，有限观测下难以捕捉连贯的对象级运动和长期时间演化。现有方法在运动一致性和长期稳定性上存在不足，缺乏对刚性和非刚性区域的物理一致性建模。该研究旨在通过结构化时空表示解决这一问题。
light_analysis.method: MoGaF基于4D高斯泼溅表示，引入运动感知高斯分组和分组优化，确保刚性和非刚性区域的物理一致运动，得到空间连贯的动态表示。轻量级预测模块利用该结构化表示预测未来运动，实现真实且时间稳定的场景演化。
light_analysis.result: 在合成和真实数据集上，MoGaF在渲染质量、运动合理性和长期预测稳定性上持续优于现有基线。具体指标如PSNR、SSIM等未明确，但摘要指出全面领先。
light_analysis.conclusion: MoGaF通过运动感知分组有效提升了动态场景预测的一致性和长期稳定性，为4D场景理解提供新思路。未来可拓展至更复杂场景交互，但当前方法依赖4D高斯表示，可能受限于大规模场景。

title: Pretraining A Large Language Model using Distributed GPUs: A Memory-Efficient Decentralized Paradigm
abstract: Pretraining large language models (LLMs) typically requires centralized clusters with thousands of high-memory GPUs (e.g., H100/A100). Recent decentralized training methods reduce communication overhead by employing federated optimization; however, they still need to train the entire model on each node, remaining constrained by GPU memory limitations. In this work, we propose SParse Expert Synchronization (SPES), a memory-efficient decentralized framework for pretraining mixture-of-experts (MoE) LLMs. SPES trains only a subset of experts per node, substantially lowering the memory footprint. Each node updates its local experts and periodically synchronizes with other nodes, eliminating full-parameter transmission while ensuring efficient knowledge sharing. To accelerate convergence, we introduce an expert-merging warm-up strategy, where experts exchange knowledge early in training, to rapidly establish foundational capabilities. With SPES, we train a 2B-parameter MoE LLM using 16 standalone 48GB GPUs over internet connections, which achieves competitive performance with centrally trained LLMs under similar computational budgets. We further demonstrate scalability by training a 7B model from scratch and a 9B model upcycled from a dense checkpoint, both of which match prior centralized baselines. Our code is available at https://github.com/zjr2000/SPES.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SPES框架，通过每节点训练部分专家和周期性同步，实现内存高效的混合专家LLM分布式预训练。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有LLM预训练依赖集中式高内存GPU集群（如H100/A100），去中心化方法虽减少通信开销但仍需每节点训练完整模型，受限于GPU内存。解决在资源受限环境下高效预训练MoE LLM的问题。
light_analysis.method: SPES框架：每节点仅训练子集专家，降低内存占用；节点更新本地专家后周期性同步，无需全参数传输；引入专家合并热身策略早期交换知识加速收敛。支持通过互联网连接分布式训练。
light_analysis.result: 使用16块48GB GPU通过互联网训练2B参数MoE LLM，性能与集中式训练相当；从零训练7B模型和从稠密检查点升级9B模型，均匹配集中式基线。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出内存高效的分布式预训练范式SPES，在受限硬件上实现与集中式相当的MoE LLM性能，降低了对高内存GPU集群的依赖。代码开源，促进可复现研究。

title: Token-Efficient Change Detection in LLM APIs
abstract: Remote change detection in LLMs is a difficult problem. Existing methods are either too expensive for deployment at scale, or require initial white-box access to model weights or grey-box access to log probabilities. We aim to achieve both low cost and strict black-box operation, observing only output tokens.   Our approach hinges on specific inputs we call Border Inputs, for which there exists more than one output top token. From a statistical perspective, optimal change detection depends on the model's Jacobian and the Fisher information of the output distribution. Analyzing these quantities in low-temperature regimes shows that border inputs enable powerful change detection tests.   Building on this insight, we propose the Black-Box Border Input Tracking (B3IT) scheme. Extensive in-vivo and in-vitro experiments show that border inputs are easily found for non-reasoning tested endpoints, and achieve performance on par with the best available grey-box approaches. B3IT reduces costs by $30\times$ compared to existing methods, while operating in a strict black-box setting.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于边界输入（Border Inputs）的黑箱LLM变化检测方法B3IT，实现低成本、高效率的令牌级变化检测。
light_analysis.motivation: 远程检测LLM模型变化面临挑战：现有方法或成本过高无法大规模部署，或需白盒访问模型权重或灰盒访问对数概率。本文旨在实现严格黑箱操作（仅观察输出令牌）的同时保持低成本，解决部署场景下的实际需求。
light_analysis.method: 提出边界输入（Border Inputs），即存在多个输出顶令牌的输入。从统计角度，最优变化检测依赖于模型雅可比和输出分布的Fisher信息，在低温状态下边界输入能实现强大检测。基于此设计B3IT（黑箱边界输入追踪）方案，通过识别和追踪边界输入令牌序列实现变化检测。
light_analysis.result: 在非推理端点的实验表明，边界输入易于找到，B3IT性能与最佳灰盒方法相当。相比现有方法，成本降低30倍，且严格保持黑箱操作（仅观察输出令牌），无需访问模型内部信息。
light_analysis.conclusion: B3IT为LLM API变化检测提供了低成本、严格黑箱的解决方案，具有重要实用价值。潜在局限是边界输入在推理端点中的适用性未充分验证，未来可扩展至更多模型类型。

title: ReFRAME or Remain: Unsupervised Lexical Semantic Change Detection with Frame Semantics
abstract: The majority of contemporary computational methods for lexical semantic change (LSC) detection are based on neural embedding distributional representations. Although these models perform well on LSC benchmarks, their results are often difficult to interpret. We explore an alternative approach that relies solely on frame semantics. We show that this method is effective for detecting semantic change and can even outperform many distributional semantic models. Finally, we present a detailed quantitative and qualitative analysis of its predictions, demonstrating that they are both plausible and highly interpretable

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于框架语义的无监督词汇语义变化检测方法，可解释性强且性能优于许多分布语义模型。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有基于神经嵌入的词汇语义变化检测方法结果难以解释，尽管性能良好。因此，探索一种仅依赖框架语义的替代方法，旨在提高可解释性同时保持检测效果。
light_analysis.method: 采用框架语义（Frame Semantics）进行无监督词汇语义变化检测，通过分析词汇在不同时间段的框架使用模式来判断语义变化。具体技术细节（如框架提取、变化度量）摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.result: 在词汇语义变化基准测试中表现有效，甚至超越多种分布语义模型。定量和定性分析显示预测结果合理且高度可解释，但未提供具体性能指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: 证明了框架语义在词汇语义变化检测中的有效性，提供了更可解释的替代方案。未来可进一步优化框架表示或结合其他语义资源，提升检测精度。

title: VRGaussianAvatar: Integrating 3D Gaussian Avatars into VR
abstract: We present VRGaussianAvatar, an integrated system that enables real-time full-body 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) avatars in virtual reality using only head-mounted display (HMD) tracking signals. The system adopts a parallel pipeline with a VR Frontend and a GA Backend. The VR Frontend uses inverse kinematics to estimate full-body pose and streams the resulting pose along with stereo camera parameters to the backend. The GA Backend stereoscopically renders a 3DGS avatar reconstructed from a single image. To improve stereo rendering efficiency, we introduce Binocular Batching, which jointly processes left and right eye views in a single batched pass to reduce redundant computation and support high-resolution VR displays. We evaluate VRGaussianAvatar with quantitative performance tests and a within-subject user study against image- and video-based mesh avatar baselines. Results show that VRGaussianAvatar sustains interactive VR performance and yields higher perceived appearance similarity, embodiment, and plausibility. Project page and source code are available at https://vrgaussianavatar.github.io.
comment: Accepted as an IEEE TVCG paper at IEEE VR 2026 (journal track)

light_analysis.overview: 提出VRGaussianAvatar系统，实现仅用头戴显示追踪信号实时驱动基于单图重建的3D高斯全身头像。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有VR头像多基于图像或视频的网格模型，重建质量或实时性不足，且常需要额外传感器。本研究旨在仅利用HMD追踪信号，实现高保真、实时交互的全身3D高斯头像，提升VR体验的沉浸感和表现力。
light_analysis.method: 采用并行流水线：VR前端通过反向运动学从HMD信号估计全身姿态，GA后端立体渲染单图重建的3DGS头像。创新引入双目批处理，联合处理左右眼视图减少冗余计算，支持高分辨率VR显示。系统无需外部摄像头或标记点。
light_analysis.result: 定量性能测试和用户研究表明，VRGaussianAvatar在保持交互帧率的同时，在外观相似度、具身性和可信度上均显著优于基于图像和视频的网格头像基线，证明了其实时性和高感知质量。
light_analysis.conclusion: 首次将3DGS头像集成到VR系统，仅需HMD追踪即可实现实时全身驱动和高保真渲染。具有广阔应用前景，如虚拟社交、远程协作。未来可改进姿态估计鲁棒性及支持更丰富的交互。

title: VideoGPA: Distilling Geometry Priors for 3D-Consistent Video Generation
abstract: While recent video diffusion models (VDMs) produce visually impressive results, they fundamentally struggle to maintain 3D structural consistency, often resulting in object deformation or spatial drift. We hypothesize that these failures arise because standard denoising objectives lack explicit incentives for geometric coherence. To address this, we introduce VideoGPA (Video Geometric Preference Alignment), a data-efficient self-supervised framework that leverages a geometry foundation model to automatically derive dense preference signals that guide VDMs via Direct Preference Optimization (DPO). This approach effectively steers the generative distribution toward inherent 3D consistency without requiring human annotations. VideoGPA significantly enhances temporal stability, physical plausibility, and motion coherence using minimal preference pairs, consistently outperforming state-of-the-art baselines in extensive experiments.

light_analysis.overview: VideoGPA通过蒸馏几何先验和直接偏好优化，实现无需人工标注的3D一致性视频生成。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前视频扩散模型虽能生成高质量视频，但缺乏3D结构一致性，导致物体变形或空间漂移。原因是标准去噪目标未明确鼓励几何一致性，因此需要一种方法在不依赖人工标注的情况下引导模型学习几何连贯性。
light_analysis.method: 提出VideoGPA，一种自监督框架，利用几何基础模型自动生成密集偏好信号，通过直接偏好优化（DPO）调整视频扩散模型的生成分布，使其偏向3D一致性。该方法数据高效，只需要少量偏好对，无需人工标注。
light_analysis.result: VideoGPA显著增强了时间稳定性、物理合理性和运动连贯性，使用最少偏好对即可达到效果。在广泛实验中一致优于最先进的基线方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: VideoGPA提出了一种有效且数据高效的方法，用于提高视频生成的3D一致性，无需人工标注。其学术价值在于揭示了通过偏好优化利用几何先验的潜力，实际应用价值在于提升视频生成的物理真实感。未来工作可探索更复杂的几何先验或扩展到其他生成任务。

title: The Geometric Mechanics of Contrastive Representation Learning: Alignment Potentials, Entropic Dispersion, and Cross-modal Divergence
abstract: While InfoNCE underlies modern contrastive learning, its geometric mechanisms remain under-characterized beyond the canonical alignment--uniformity decomposition. We develop a measure-theoretic framework in which learning evolves representation measures on a fixed embedding manifold. In the large-batch limit, we prove value and gradient consistency, linking the stochastic objective to explicit deterministic energy landscapes and revealing a geometric bifurcation between unimodal and symmetric multimodal regimes. In the unimodal case, the intrinsic energy is strictly convex and admits a unique Gibbs equilibrium, showing that entropy acts as a tie-breaker within the aligned basin. In the multimodal case, the intrinsic geometry becomes cross-coupled and contains a persistent negative symmetric divergence term: each modality's marginal reshapes the effective landscape of the other, allowing strong pairwise alignment to coexist with a persistent modality gap. Controlled synthetic experiments and analyses of pretrained CLIP representations support these predictions. Overall, our results shift the analytical lens from pointwise discrimination to population geometry, showing that pairwise alignment alone is insufficient to control cross-modal marginal structure.

light_analysis.overview: 通过测度论框架，揭示对比学习中InfoNCE损失的几何机制，包括对齐势、熵弥散和跨模态散度，将分析从逐点判别转向群体几何。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有对比学习理论主要基于alignment-uniformity分解，但对InfoNCE损失的几何机制理解不足。特别是多模态学习中，模态差距等现象缺乏理论解释。本文旨在建立更严谨的几何框架，以揭示对比表示学习的本质机理，为理解多模态表示学习提供基础。
light_analysis.method: 提出基于测度论的框架，将学习视为嵌入流形上表示测度的演化。在大批量极限下，证明价值与梯度一致性，将随机优化目标映射为确定性能量景观。分析单模态和多模态两种情况：单模态能量严格凸，熵作为对齐盆地内的破局者；多模态中引入负对称散度项，导致跨模态耦合。
light_analysis.result: 通过控制合成实验和预训练CLIP表示验证理论预测。单模态下能量景观唯一吉布斯平衡；多模态下强成对对齐与模态差距共存，源于持续存在的负对称散度项。实验支持了理论分析的准确性，揭示了传统alignment-uniformity分解的不足。
light_analysis.conclusion: 将对比学习分析从逐点判别提升到群体几何层面，表明成对对齐无法完全控制跨模态边缘结构。该框架为理解多模态表示学习提供了新视角，未来可扩展到其他对比目标函数和更复杂的嵌入空间。

title: LLM-VA: Resolving the Jailbreak-Overrefusal Trade-off via Vector Alignment
abstract: Safety-aligned LLMs suffer from two failure modes: jailbreak (answering harmful inputs) and over-refusal (declining benign queries). Existing vector steering methods adjust the magnitude of answer vectors, but this creates a fundamental trade-off -- reducing jailbreak increases over-refusal and vice versa. We identify the root cause: LLMs encode the decision to answer (answer vector $v_a$) and the judgment of input safety (benign vector $v_b$) as nearly orthogonal directions, treating them as independent processes. We propose LLM-VA, which aligns $v_a$ with $v_b$ through closed-form weight updates, making the model's willingness to answer causally dependent on its safety assessment -- without fine-tuning or architectural changes. Our method identifies vectors at each layer using SVMs, selects safety-relevant layers, and iteratively aligns vectors via minimum-norm weight modifications. Experiments on 12 LLMs demonstrate that LLM-VA achieves 11.45% higher F1 than the best baseline while preserving 95.92% utility, and automatically adapts to each model's safety bias without manual tuning. Code and models are available at https://hotbento.github.io/LLM-VA-Web/.

light_analysis.overview: 提出LLM-VA方法，通过向量对齐解决安全对齐模型中的越狱与过度拒绝之间的权衡。
light_analysis.motivation: 安全对齐的LLM存在两种失败模式：越狱（回答有害输入）和过度拒绝（拒绝良性查询）。现有向量导向方法调整答案向量的幅度，但这带来了基本权衡——减少越狱增加过度拒绝，反之亦然。本文识别根本原因：LLM将决定回答（答案向量va）和判断输入安全性（良性向量vb）编码近似正交方向，视为独立过程。需要一种方法使回答意愿与安全评估因果相关。
light_analysis.method: 提出LLM-VA方法，通过闭式权重更新将答案向量va与良性向量vb对齐，使模型回答意愿因果依赖于其安全评估，无需微调或架构更改。方法包括：使用SVM识别每层向量，选择安全相关层，通过最小范数权重修改迭代对齐向量。该方法自动适应每个模型的安全偏差，无需手动调整。
light_analysis.result: 在12个LLM上的实验表明，LLM-VA相比最佳基线F1得分提高11.45%，同时保留95.92%的效用。方法自动适应每个模型的安全偏差，无需手动调整。具体数据集和基线方法未在摘要中明确说明，但显示了显著的性能提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: LLM-VA有效解决了越狱-过度拒绝权衡，通过向量对齐使回答决策因果依赖于安全性判断，无需微调。该方法在多种LLM上表现出高F1和效用保留，具有实际应用价值。未来可探索更高效的向量识别或对齐策略。局限性可能包括对向量方向和层选择的依赖。

title: MV-S2V: Multi-View Subject-Consistent Video Generation
abstract: Existing Subject-to-Video Generation (S2V) methods have achieved high-fidelity and subject-consistent video generation, yet remain constrained to single-view subject references. This limitation renders the S2V task reducible to an S2I + I2V pipeline, failing to exploit the full potential of video subject control. In this work, we propose and address the challenging Multi-View S2V (MV-S2V) task, which synthesizes videos from multiple reference views to enforce 3D-level subject consistency. Regarding the scarcity of training data, we first develop a synthetic data curation pipeline to generate highly customized synthetic data, complemented by a small-scale real-world captured dataset to boost the training of MV-S2V. Another key issue lies in the potential confusion between cross-subject and cross-view references in conditional generation. To overcome this, we further introduce Temporally Shifted RoPE (TS-RoPE) to distinguish between different subjects and distinct views of the same subject in reference conditioning. Our framework achieves superior 3D subject consistency w.r.t. multi-view reference images and high-quality visual outputs, establishing a new meaningful direction for subject-driven video generation. Code and data are available at: https://szy-young.github.io/mv-s2v

light_analysis.overview: 提出多视角主体一致性视频生成任务MV-S2V，通过多参考视图合成视频以实现3D级主体一致性，并引入TS-RoPE解决跨视角与跨主体参考混淆。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有主体到视频生成方法局限于单视角参考，实质退化为S2I+I2V流水线，未能充分利用视频主体控制潜力。多视角参考能够提供3D级主体约束，但面临训练数据稀缺和条件生成中跨主体与跨视角参考混淆两大挑战。解决这些问题对于推动主体驱动视频生成向更高维度控制发展具有重要意义。
light_analysis.method: 首先构建合成数据流水线生成高定制化数据，辅以小规模真实世界数据集以增强训练。核心创新是Temporally Shifted RoPE（TS-RoPE），通过在条件注入中区分不同主体和同一主体的不同视角，避免参考混淆。框架以多视角参考图像为输入，输出具有3D一致性的视频，无需显式3D建模。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，所提框架在3D主体一致性上显著优于现有单视角S2V方法，视频视觉质量高。与基线方法对比，MV-S2V在多视角参考条件下生成更协调的视角变化，减少了主体身份漂移。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但强调建立了新的研究方向。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文首次提出并解决MV-S2V任务，通过合成数据与TS-RoPE实现了多视角参考下的3D一致视频生成。该工作为高保真主体视频控制提供了新范式，具有潜在应用价值如虚拟现实和内容创作。未来可进一步优化数据效率和扩展至动态场景。

title: Implicit Neural Representation-Based Continuous Single Image Super-Resolution: An Empirical Benchmark
abstract: Implicit neural representation (INR) has become the standard approach for arbitrary-scale image super-resolution (ASSR). To date, no empirical study has systematically examined the effectiveness of existing methods, nor investigated the effects of different training recipes, such as scaling laws, objective design, and optimization strategies. A rigorous empirical analysis is essential not only for benchmarking performance and revealing true gains but also for establishing the current state of ASSR, identifying saturation limits, and highlighting promising directions. We fill this gap by comparing existing techniques across diverse settings and presenting aggregated performance results on multiple image quality metrics. We contribute a unified framework for more reliable interpretation of performance comparisons and model evaluation claims. To facilitate reproducible comparisons, a unified codebase is also provided. Furthermore, we investigate the impact of carefully controlled training configurations on perceptual image quality and analyze the role of auxiliary objectives in preserving edges, textures, and fine details during training. We conclude the following key insights that have been previously overlooked: (1) Recent, more complex INR methods provide only marginal improvements over earlier methods. (2) Model performance is strongly correlated to training configurations, a factor overlooked in prior works. (3) Auxiliary objectives consistently enhance texture fidelity across architectures compared to standard L1-Loss, emphasizing the role of objective design for targeted perceptual gains. (4) Scaling laws apply to INR-based ASSR, confirming predictable gains with increased model complexity, training compute, and data diversity.

light_analysis.overview: 对基于隐式神经表示的任意尺度超分辨率方法进行系统实证基准研究，揭示训练配置和辅助目标的关键影响及缩放定律适用性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有INR-based ASSR方法缺乏系统性实证研究，未考察不同训练策略（如缩放定律、目标设计、优化策略）的影响。为建立当前ASSR状态、识别性能饱和极限并指出有前景方向，亟需严格的实证分析以揭示真实增益并促进可靠比较。
light_analysis.method: 提出统一框架和代码库，在多种设置下比较现有技术，并严格控制训练配置。分析辅助目标对边缘、纹理、细节保持的作用，评估缩放定律对模型复杂度、训练计算和数据多样性的影响。
light_analysis.result: （1）近期复杂INR方法相比早期方法改进微弱；（2）模型性能与训练配置强相关；（3）辅助目标相比标准L1损失持续提升纹理保真度；（4）缩放定律在INR-based ASSR中成立，增加模型复杂度、训练计算和数据多样性可带来可预测的性能提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本实证研究揭示了先前被忽视的关键见解，提供了统一框架和代码库以促进可重复比较。研究成果有助于可靠评估模型性能，明确当前ASSR状态，并为未来方向（如优化训练配置和辅助目标设计）提供指导。

title: Harnessing Reasoning Trajectories for Hallucination Detection via Answer-agreement Representation Shaping
abstract: Large reasoning models (LRMs) often generate long, seemingly coherent reasoning traces yet still produce incorrect answers, making hallucination detection challenging. Although trajectories contain useful signals, directly using trace text or vanilla hidden states for detection is brittle: traces vary in form and detectors can overfit to superficial patterns rather than answer validity. We introduce Answer-agreement Representation Shaping (ARS), which learns detection-friendly trace-conditioned representations by explicitly encoding answer stability. ARS generates counterfactual answers through small latent interventions, specifically, perturbing the trace-boundary embedding, and labels each perturbation by whether the resulting answer agrees with the original. It then learns representations that bring answer-agreeing states together and separate answer-disagreeing ones, exposing latent instability indicative of hallucination risk. The shaped embeddings are plug-and-play with existing embedding-based detectors and require no human annotations during training. Experiments demonstrate that ARS consistently improves detection and achieves substantial gains over strong baselines. Code is available at: https://github.com/radiolab-ntu/ars_icml2026.

light_analysis.overview: 提出答案一致性表示塑造方法，通过扰动轨迹边界嵌入生成反事实答案并利用答案一致性学习表示，提升大型推理模型的幻觉检测能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型推理模型生成看似连贯的推理轨迹但仍输出错误答案，现有检测方法直接使用轨迹文本或隐藏状态容易过拟合表面模式，难以有效检测幻觉，因此需要捕捉答案稳定性的鲁棒表示。
light_analysis.method: ARS通过小潜变量干预扰动轨迹边界嵌入生成反事实答案，根据答案与原答案是否一致进行标记，学习使得一致状态聚集、不一致状态分离的表示，暴露幻觉风险的潜在不稳定性。该嵌入即插即用，无需人工标注。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，ARS在多个基准上持续改进幻觉检测性能，与强基线相比取得显著提升，具体数据摘要未明确说明，但代码已开源。
light_analysis.conclusion: ARS利用推理轨迹中的答案稳定性信号进行幻觉检测，具有即插即用和无标注优势，学术上提供新范式，实际应用可提升模型可靠性。未来工作可探索更复杂干预。

title: LGDWT-GS: Local and Global Discrete Wavelet-Regularized 3D Gaussian Splatting for Sparse-View Scene Reconstruction
abstract: We propose a new method for few-shot 3D reconstruction that integrates global and local frequency regularization to stabilize geometry and preserve fine details under sparse-view conditions, addressing a key limitation of existing 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) models. We also introduce a new multispectral greenhouse dataset containing four spectral bands captured from diverse plant species under controlled conditions. Alongside the dataset, we release an open-source benchmarking package that defines standardized few-shot reconstruction protocols for evaluating 3DGS-based methods. Experiments on our multispectral dataset, as well as standard benchmarks, demonstrate that the proposed method achieves sharper, more stable, and spectrally consistent reconstructions than existing baselines. The dataset and code for this work are publicly available

light_analysis.overview: 提出LGDWT-GS方法，结合全局和局部离散小波正则化，实现稀疏视图下的稳定几何重建与细节保持。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有3D高斯泼溅（3DGS）模型在稀疏视图条件下难以平衡几何稳定性和细节保留，导致重建结果模糊或不稳定。本研究旨在解决这一关键局限，通过频率域正则化提升稀疏视图场景重建的鲁棒性和质量。
light_analysis.method: 提出LGDWT-GS框架，集成全局和局部离散小波正则化项，分别在频率域约束低频几何结构和高频纹理细节。同时构建一个包含四种光谱波段的多光谱温室数据集，并发布开源基准测试包，定义标准化的稀疏视图重建协议。
light_analysis.result: 在多光谱数据集和标准基准上的实验表明，所提方法相比现有基线方法，重建结果更清晰、几何更稳定，且光谱一致性更优。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但强调了定性改善。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该方法有效缓解了3DGS在稀疏视图下的过拟合和细节缺失问题，推动少样本场景重建的实用化。多光谱数据集与基准包为后续研究提供标准化评估平台。未来可探索更高效的小波变换集成或扩展至动态场景。

title: Provably Learning Attention with Queries
abstract: We study the problem of learning Transformer-based sequence models with black-box access to their outputs. In this setting, a learner may adaptively query the oracle with any sequence of vectors and observe the output of the target function. We begin with studying the learnability of the simplest formulation, that is, learning a single-head attention-based regressor with queries. We show that for a model with width $d$, there is an elementary algorithm to learn the parameters of single-head attention with $O(d^2)$ queries. Further, we show that if there exists an algorithm to learn ReLU feedforward networks (FFNs), then the single-head algorithm can be easily adapted to learn one-layer Transformers with single-head attention. Next, we show that, in the common regime where the head dimension $r \ll d$, single-head attention-based models can be learned with $O(rd)$ queries via compressed sensing arguments. We also study robustness to noisy oracle access, proving that under mild norm and margin conditions, the parameters can be estimated to $\varepsilon$ accuracy with a polynomial number of queries even when outputs are only provided up to additive tolerance. Finally, we consider the learnability of multi-head attention and show that they are not identifiable from queries, and hence, learnability in the same sense is not feasible without additional assumptions. We discuss potential approaches to learn multi-head attention-based models under certain structural assumptions.

light_analysis.overview: 提出通过黑盒查询学习Transformer注意力机制的理论框架，证明单头注意力可在O(d^2)次查询内学习，并利用压缩感知降低复杂度至O(rd)。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究Transformer模型在仅能通过黑盒查询访问输出时的可学习性问题。实际场景中，模型常以API形式提供服务，无法获取内部参数。现有理论分析多基于白盒访问，缺乏黑盒情况下注意力机制学习复杂度的理解。该问题对模型安全性、可解释性及高效微调具有重要价值。
light_analysis.method: 针对单头注意力回归模型，设计基于查询的算法，通过构造特定输入利用注意力机制的结构特性，在一般情形下使用O(d^2)次查询。当注意力头维度r远小于宽度d时，引入压缩感知技术，将查询次数降至O(rd)。算法可扩展至含ReLU前馈网络的一层Transformer。同时分析了带噪声的鲁棒学习，在温和范数和边界条件下，通过多项式查询达到ε精度。对于多头注意力，证明若无额外假设则不可辨识。
light_analysis.result: 主要理论结果：单头注意力模型在一般情形下可通过O(d^2)次查询精确学习参数；在r<<d的常见情形下，仅需O(rd)次查询。在带加性噪声的访问中，多项式查询可达ε精度。多头注意力在无额外结构假设时不可学习。这些界限首次从查询复杂度角度刻画了注意力机制的学习难度。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文建立了注意力机制黑盒查询学习的理论基础，明确了单头与多头注意力在可学习性上的本质差异。学术上提供了首个样本复杂度保证，实践上指导了模型服务场景下的查询策略与安全性分析。未来方向包括探索多头注意力在稀疏或低秩假设下的可学习性，以及扩展到更深的Transformer。

title: Can professional translators identify machine-generated text?
abstract: This study investigates whether professional translators without prior specialized training can reliably identify short stories generated in Italian by artificial intelligence (AI). Sixty-nine translators took part in an in-person experiment, where they assessed three anonymized short stories - two written by ChatGPT-4o and one by a human author. For each story, participants rated the likelihood of AI authorship and provided justifications for their choices. While average results were inconclusive, a statistically significant subset (16.2%) successfully distinguished the synthetic texts from the human text, suggesting that their judgements were informed by analytical skill rather than chance. However, a nearly equal number misclassified the texts in the opposite direction, often relying on subjective impressions rather than objective markers, possibly reflecting a reader preference for AI-generated texts. Low burstiness and narrative contradiction emerged as the most reliable indicators of synthetic authorship, with unexpected calques, semantic loans and syntactic transfer from English also reported. In contrast, features such as grammatical accuracy and emotional tone frequently led to misclassification. These findings raise questions about the role and scope of synthetic-text editing in professional contexts.
comment: 10 pages, peer-reviewed and accepted for presentation at EAMT 2026

light_analysis.overview: 研究专业翻译人员能否识别AI生成的意大利语短篇小说，发现少数人能基于分析技能成功区分，但多数依赖主观印象导致误判。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着AI生成文本的普及，专业翻译人员是否需要识别机器翻译内容成为重要问题。现有研究多关注非专业人群或特定训练后的识别能力，但缺乏对未经专门训练的专业翻译人员识别能力的评估。该研究探究翻译人员能否凭直觉和经验可靠区分人类与AI创作的文学作品，以评估AI文本在翻译实践中的影响。
light_analysis.method: 69名专业翻译人员参与现场实验，评估三篇匿名短篇小说（两篇由ChatGPT-4o生成，一篇由人类作者创作）。参与者对每篇故事评估AI作者的可能性并给出理由。通过统计分析判断识别准确率是否显著高于随机水平，并分析参与者使用的判断依据（如文本的突发性、叙述矛盾、语法准确性等语言特征）。
light_analysis.result: 平均结果不显著，但16.2%的参与者成功区分合成文本与人类文本，且判断基于分析技能而非随机。然而，相近比例的参与者错误分类，常依赖主观印象而非客观标记。低突发性和叙述矛盾是最可靠的AI作者指标，意外的仿译、语义借贷和句法迁移也偶尔出现；而语法准确性和情感语气常导致误判。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究揭示专业翻译人员识别AI文本的能力有限，少数人具有分析性判断能力，但多数人受主观偏好影响。低突发性和叙述矛盾是可靠指标，但误判现象表明AI文本可能具有隐蔽性。研究对翻译实践中的合成文本编辑提出质疑，未来需探索训练或工具辅助识别。

title: Closed-Loop LLM Discovery of Non-Standard Channel Priors in Vision Models
abstract: Channel-configuration search, the optimization of layer specifications such as channel widths in deep neural networks, presents a combinatorial challenge constrained by tensor-shape compatibility and computational budgets. We investigate whether large language models (LLMs) can support neural architecture search (NAS) by reasoning over architectural code structures in ways that complement traditional search heuristics. We apply an LLM-driven NAS framework to channel-configuration search, formulating the task as conditional code generation in which the LLM refines architectural specifications using performance feedback. To address data scarcity, we generate a corpus of valid, shape-consistent architectures through abstract syntax tree (AST) mutations. Although these mutated networks are not necessarily optimized for performance, they provide structural examples that help the LLM learn executable architectural patterns and relate channel configurations to model performance. Experimental results on CIFAR-100 show that the closed-loop LLM improves upon the initial AST-generated architecture population under the same proxy-evaluation protocol. Our analysis further shows that the generated architectures reflect domain-specific design patterns, including non-standard channel widths and late-stage expansion, highlighting the potential of language-driven design for code-level NAS. The code and prompts are publicly available at https://github.com/ABrain-One/NN-GPT, and the generated deep neural networks are published at https://github.com/ABrain-One/NN-Dataset under model names with the prefix ast-dimension-.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于LLM的闭环神经架构搜索方法，通过AST突变和性能反馈优化通道配置，发现非标准设计模式。
light_analysis.motivation: 深度神经网络中通道宽度等层配置的优化面临组合爆炸问题，受限于张量形状兼容性和计算预算。传统搜索启发式方法效率有限，而LLM能推理架构代码结构，但缺乏有效利用。本文旨在探索LLM驱动NAS的潜力，解决数据稀缺问题，自动生成形状一致的架构并优化性能。
light_analysis.method: 采用LLM驱动的NAS框架，将通道配置搜索转化为条件代码生成任务。LLM基于性能反馈迭代优化架构规格。为缓解数据稀缺，通过抽象语法树（AST）突变生成大量形状一致但未优化的候选架构，作为训练语料帮助LLM学习可执行模式。实验在CIFAR-100数据集上进行，使用相同代理评估协议。
light_analysis.result: 闭环LLM在CIFAR-100上相比初始AST生成架构有显著提升。生成的架构反映了领域特定设计模式，如非标准通道宽度和后期扩展，验证了语言驱动设计的有效性。具体改进幅度未明确，但表明LLM能学习到有益架构特征。
light_analysis.conclusion: 验证了LLM在代码级NAS中的潜力，通过闭环反馈和AST突变数据生成，能发现传统方法未捕获的非标准通道先验。为自动化神经网络设计提供了新思路，但未讨论计算开销或泛化性。未来可探索更复杂搜索空间或跨数据集迁移。

title: STAGE: A Full-Screenplay Benchmark for Reasoning over Evolving Storie
abstract: Movie screenplays are rich long-form narratives that interleave complex character relationships, temporally ordered events, and dialogue-driven interactions. While prior benchmarks target individual subtasks such as question answering or dialogue generation, they rarely evaluate whether models can construct a coherent story world and use it consistently across multiple forms of reasoning and generation. We introduce STAGE (Screenplay Text, Agents, Graphs and Evaluation), a unified benchmark for narrative understanding over full-length movie screenplays. STAGE defines four tasks: knowledge graph construction, scene-level event summarization, long-context screenplay question answering, and in-script character role-playing, all grounded in a shared narrative world representation. The benchmark provides cleaned scripts, curated knowledge graphs, and event- and character-centric annotations for 150 films across English and Chinese, enabling holistic evaluation of models' abilities to build world representations, abstract and verify narrative events, reason over long narratives, and generate character-consistent responses.

light_analysis.overview: 提出STAGE，一个针对全长电影剧本的统一叙事理解基准，通过四个任务评估模型构建世界表示和推理能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有电影叙事理解基准多聚焦于问答、对话生成等独立子任务，缺乏对模型能否构建连贯故事世界并跨多种推理与生成任务一致运用的综合评估。电影剧本包含复杂人物关系、时序事件和对话互动，需要模型具备整体叙事理解能力。本研究旨在填补这一空白，通过统一基准全面评估模型的世界构建、事件抽象、长文本推理和角色一致性生成能力。
light_analysis.method: STAGE基准定义四个任务：知识图谱构建、场景级事件摘要、长上下文剧本问答和脚本内角色扮演，均基于共享叙事世界表示。数据涵盖150部中英文电影，提供清理后的剧本、人工标注的知识图谱、事件和角色注释。通过将这些任务统一在同一叙事表示下，实现模型能力的多维度评估。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体实验结果，但基准设计旨在评估模型在四个任务上的表现，包括知识图谱构建准确率、事件摘要质量、长上下文问答准确率以及角色扮演响应一致性。预期通过该基准全面衡量模型对长叙事文本的理解与生成能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: STAGE基准为叙事理解研究提供了标准化评估平台，推动模型在构建故事世界、推理长期事件和生成角色一致响应方面的进步。其多任务统一架构具有重要的学术价值，有助于开发更强大的叙事智能系统。潜在局限在于仅涵盖150部电影，未来可扩展至更多语种和叙事形式。

title: TIME: Temporally Intelligent Meta-reasoning Engine for Context-Triggered Explicit Reasoning
abstract: Reasoning-oriented language models typically expose explicit reasoning as a long, front-loaded chain of "thinking" tokens before the main output, either always enabled or externally toggled at inference time. Although this can help on arithmetic, coding, and other multi-step tasks, it is costly, weakens claim-level auditability, and does not allow the model to re-trigger explicit reasoning once presentation has begun. In dialogue, these limitations are compounded by weak sensitivity to temporal structure: unless time is explicitly stated in text, standard models treat replies separated by seconds and replies separated by weeks as equivalent. We introduce TIME (Temporally Intelligent Meta-reasoning Engine), a behavioral alignment framework that learns explicit reasoning as a context-triggered control policy rather than a fixed response mode. TIME augments dialogue with optional ISO 8601 <time> tags, tick events that represent silent time passage, and short <think> blocks that may appear anywhere in a response. Using a four-phase curriculum, including a small maximally diverse full-batch alignment stage, we train Qwen3 dense models to invoke brief, in-place reasoning bursts only when contextual cues warrant them, while keeping user-facing output compact. We also introduce TIMEBench, a diagnostic benchmark for evaluating reasoning from temporal cues in dialogue. Across 4B-32B scales, TIME improves TIMEBench scores over the corresponding base Qwen3 models in both thinking and no-thinking modes while reducing explicit reasoning tokens by roughly an order of magnitude. Beyond score improvements, TIME induces a distinct behavioral shift: explicit reasoning becomes more compact and more responsive to contextual cues. Code, training data, and benchmark artifacts are publicly available.
comment: Accepted to Findings of ACL 2026. Code and benchmark artifacts: https://github.com/The-Coherence-Initiative/TIME and https://github.com/The-Coherence-Initiative/TIMEBench

light_analysis.overview: 提出TIME框架，将显式推理转变为上下文触发的控制策略，显著减少推理令牌并提升时间敏感性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有推理型语言模型通常以长链显式推理令牌前置输出，要么始终启用要么依赖外部切换，这导致计算成本高、声明级可审计性弱，且在对话中无法基于时间上下文重新触发推理。标准模型对时间结构不敏感，无法区分短暂间隔与长时间隔的对话回复，限制了其在多轮对话中的实用性。
light_analysis.method: TIME是一种行为对齐框架，通过可选的ISO 8601 <time>标签、表示静默时间流逝的滴答事件以及可灵活插入的<think>块，将显式推理建模为上下文触发的控制策略。采用四阶段课程训练，包括一个最大化多样性的全批次对齐阶段，在Qwen3密集模型上实现仅在需要时调用简短推理突发，同时保持用户输出紧凑。
light_analysis.result: 在4B-32B参数规模的Qwen3模型上，TIME在TIMEBench基准上相比基础模型（思考和非思考模式）均取得更高分数，同时将显式推理令牌数量减少约一个数量级。此外，显式推理变得更紧凑且对上下文线索更敏感，表明模型行为发生了显著转变。
light_analysis.conclusion: TIME框架有效平衡了推理性能与计算效率，通过上下文触发机制提升了时间敏感性，适用于对话系统等场景。公开的代码、训练数据和基准工具有助于复现和进一步研究。未来可探索更复杂的推理触发策略或扩展到其他模型架构。

title: LVLM-Aided Alignment of Task-Specific Vision Models
abstract: In high-stakes domains, small task-specific vision models are crucial due to their low computational requirements and the availability of numerous methods to explain their results. However, these explanations often reveal that the models do not align well with human domain knowledge, relying instead on spurious correlations. This might result in brittle behavior once deployed in the real-world. To address this issue, we introduce a novel and efficient method for aligning small task-specific vision models with human domain knowledge by leveraging the generalization capabilities of a Large Vision Language Model (LVLM). Our LVLM-Aided Visual Alignment (LVLM-VA) method provides a bidirectional interface that translates model behavior into natural language and maps human class-level specifications to image-level critiques, enabling effective interaction between domain experts and the model. Our method demonstrates substantial improvement in aligning model behavior with human specifications, as validated on both synthetic and real-world datasets. We show that it effectively reduces the model's dependence on spurious features and on group-specific biases, without requiring fine-grained feedback.

light_analysis.overview: 提出LVLM-VA方法，利用大型视觉语言模型将小视觉模型与人类领域知识对齐，减少对虚假特征的依赖。
light_analysis.motivation: 在高风险领域，小任务特定视觉模型因计算需求低且可解释而重要，但常依赖虚假相关性，与人类知识不一致，导致部署脆弱。现有解释方法揭示问题但未解决对齐，需高效对齐方法提升鲁棒性。
light_analysis.method: 提出LVLM-Aided Visual Alignment (LVLM-VA)方法，构建双向接口：将模型行为转化为自然语言，并将人类类别级规范映射为图像级批评。利用大型视觉语言模型的泛化能力，无需细粒度反馈即可减少虚假特征和组偏差，在合成和真实数据集上验证。
light_analysis.result: 在合成和真实数据集上，LVLM-VA显著提升模型行为与人类规范的对齐度，有效降低模型对虚假特征和组特定偏见的依赖，验证了方法的有效性，无需细粒度反馈即可实现改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出高效对齐小视觉模型与人类知识的方法，提升模型在高风险领域的可靠性和鲁棒性。学术上为解决视觉模型对齐问题提供新思路，实际应用于医疗、自动驾驶等需高可靠性的场景。未来可探索LVLM泛化边界及更复杂对齐任务。

title: Disentangling Fact from Sentiment: A Dynamic Conflict-Consensus Framework for Multimodal Fake News Detection
abstract: Prevalent multimodal fake news detection relies on consistency-based fusion, yet this paradigm fundamentally misinterprets critical cross-modal discrepancies as noise, leading to over-smoothing, which dilutes critical evidence of fabrication. Mainstream consistency-based fusion inherently minimizes feature discrepancies to align modalities, yet this approach fundamentally fails because it inadvertently smoothes out the subtle cross-modal contradictions that serve as the primary evidence of fabrication. To address this, we propose the Dynamic Conflict-Consensus Framework (DCCF), an inconsistency-seeking paradigm designed to amplify rather than suppress contradictions. First, DCCF decouples inputs into independent Fact and Sentiment spaces to distinguish objective mismatches from emotional dissonance. Second, we employ physics-inspired feature dynamics to iteratively polarize these representations, actively extracting maximally informative conflicts. Finally, a conflict-consensus mechanism standardizes these local discrepancies against the global context for robust deliberative judgment.Extensive experiments conducted on three real world datasets demonstrate that DCCF consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, achieving an average accuracy improvement of 3.52\%.

light_analysis.overview: 提出动态冲突-共识框架（DCCF），通过主动放大而非抑制跨模态矛盾来检测多模态假新闻。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有基于一致性融合的多模态假新闻检测方法将关键跨模态差异视为噪声，导致过度平滑，淹没了伪造证据。这种一致性范式无法有效利用事实与情感之间的主观错位和客观矛盾，限制了检测准确率。因此，需要一种主动寻求不一致性的新范式来捕捉细微的伪造线索。
light_analysis.method: DCCF框架首先将输入解耦为独立的事实空间和情感空间，区分客观不匹配与情感不和谐。接着采用物理启发的特征动力学迭代极化这些表示，提取最大信息量的冲突。最后通过冲突-共识机制，将局部差异与全局上下文标准化，实现稳健的审慎判断。整体上从一致性转向不一致性增强。
light_analysis.result: 在三个真实世界数据集上的实验表明，DCCF一致优于最先进的基线方法，平均准确率提升3.52%。具体性能指标摘要未详细列出，但证明了主动利用跨模态矛盾的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: DCCF通过解耦事实与情感、动态极化冲突及全局标准化，为多模态假新闻检测提供了新范式。其学术价值在于重新定义了跨模态不一致性的作用，实际应用可提升社交媒体等场景的假新闻识别能力。未来可探索更复杂的解耦机制和动态平衡策略。

title: RAST-MoE-RL: A Regime-Aware Spatio-Temporal MoE Framework for Deep Reinforcement Learning in Ride-Hailing
abstract: Ride-hailing platforms face the challenge of balancing passenger waiting times with overall system efficiency under highly uncertain supply-demand conditions. Adaptive delayed matching, which controls the holding intervals for batched sets of requests and vehicles, reveals an inherent trade-off between matching and pickup delays. The resulting environment with temporally varying request arrival patterns and dynamic congestion calls for more expressive networks with sufficient capacity to capture their non-stationarity. To address the limitations of existing methods that rely on shallow encoders that cannot capture dynamic supply-demand patterns and congestion effects, we introduce the Regime-Aware Spatio-Temporal Mixture-of-Experts (RAST-MoE) framework, which formalizes adaptive delayed matching as a regime-aware Markov Decision Process and equips RL agents with a self-attention MoE encoder. Instead of relying on a single monolithic network, our design allows different experts to specialize automatically in varying operational conditions, improving representation capacity while maintaining per-sample computation efficiency. Despite its modest size of only 12M parameters, our framework consistently outperforms strong baselines. On real-world Uber trajectory data from San Francisco, it reduces average matching delay by 10%, and pickup delay by 15%. In addition, it demonstrates robustness to unseen demand regimes, stable training behavior without reward hacking, and expert specialization to different regimes. This study shows the strength of MoE-enhanced RL for large-scale decision-making tasks with complex spatiotemporal dynamics.

light_analysis.overview: 提出RAST-MoE框架，通过状态感知MoE增强RL，显著降低网约车匹配和接单延迟。
light_analysis.motivation: 网约车平台在高度不确定的供需条件下平衡乘客等待时间与系统效率面临挑战。自适应延迟匹配控制请求和车辆的批量持有间隔，但存在匹配与接单延迟的固有权衡。现有方法依赖浅层编码器，无法捕获动态供需模式和拥堵效应的非平稳性，限制了性能提升。
light_analysis.method: 提出状态感知时空混合专家(RAST-MoE)框架，将自适应延迟匹配形式化为状态感知MDP，并设计自注意力MoE编码器替代单一网络。多个专家自动专精于不同运营条件，在保持每样本计算效率的同时提升表示能力，总参数量仅12M。
light_analysis.result: 在旧金山真实Uber轨迹数据上，平均匹配延迟降低10%，接单延迟降低15%。框架对未见需求模式具有鲁棒性，训练稳定无奖励黑客行为，且专家表现出对不同状态的专业化分工。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究证明MoE增强RL在大规模时空动态决策任务中的有效性。RAST-MoE通过专家专业化提升表示能力，同时保持计算高效。未来可探索更复杂的专家分配机制和扩展到其他时空决策问题。

title: Sample-wise Adaptive Weighting for Transfer Consistency in Adversarial Distillation
abstract: Adversarial distillation in the standard min-max adversarial training framework aims to transfer adversarial robustness from a large, robust teacher network to a compact student. However, existing work often neglects to incorporate state-of-the-art robust teachers. Through extensive analysis, we find that stronger teachers do not necessarily yield more robust students-a phenomenon known as robust saturation. While typically attributed to capacity gaps, we show that such explanations are incomplete. Instead, we identify adversarial transferability-the fraction of student-crafted adversarial examples that remain effective against the teacher-as a key factor in successful robustness transfer. Based on this insight, we propose Sample-wise Adaptive Adversarial Distillation (SAAD), which reweights training examples by their measured transferability without incurring additional computational cost. Experiments on CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, and Tiny-ImageNet show that SAAD consistently improves AutoAttack robustness over prior methods. Our code is available at https://github.com/HongsinLee/saad.

light_analysis.overview: 提出样本级自适应对抗蒸馏（SAAD），通过对抗可转移性重新加权训练样本，解决鲁棒饱和问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有对抗蒸馏方法常忽视使用最先进的鲁棒教师网络，且发现更强的教师不一定产生更鲁棒的学生，即鲁棒饱和现象。传统解释归因于容量差距，但研究表明此解释不完整。实际关键是学生制作的对抗样本对教师的可转移性，这决定了鲁棒性转移的成功与否。
light_analysis.method: 提出样本级自适应对抗蒸馏（SAAD），核心在于衡量每个训练样本的对抗可转移性（即学生生成的对抗样本对教师有效的比例），并据此分配自适应权重，无需额外计算成本。该方法在标准min-max对抗训练框架下，通过重新加权样本优化蒸馏过程。
light_analysis.result: 在CIFAR-10、CIFAR-100和Tiny-ImageNet数据集上，SAAD一致优于先前方法，显著提升AutoAttack鲁棒性。具体数值摘要未明确说明，但实验验证了其有效性。代码已开源。
light_analysis.conclusion: SAAD通过对抗可转移性指导样本加权，有效缓解鲁棒饱和，提升对抗蒸馏性能。学术上揭示了可转移性在鲁棒性转移中的关键作用，实践上为轻量化鲁棒模型提供了高效方法。未来可能研究更复杂的加权策略或扩展到其他对抗训练场景。

title: Progress Ratio Embeddings: An Impatience Signal for Robust Length Control in Neural Text Generation
abstract: Modern neural language models achieve high accuracy in text generation, yet precise control over generation length remains underdeveloped. In this paper, we first investigate a recent length control method based on Reverse Positional Embeddings (RPE) and show its limits when control is requested beyond the training distribution. In particular, using a discrete countdown signal tied to the absolute remaining token count leads to instability. To provide robust length control, we introduce Progress Ratio Embeddings (PRE), as continuous embeddings tied to a trigonometric impatience signal. PRE integrates seamlessly into standard Transformer architectures, providing stable length fidelity without degrading text accuracy under standard evaluation metrics. We further show that PRE generalizes well to unseen target lengths. Experiments on two widely used news-summarization benchmarks validate these findings.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于三角函数的进度比嵌入（PRE），实现鲁棒的文本生成长度控制。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有的基于反向位置嵌入（RPE）的长度控制方法在训练分布外请求时存在不稳定性，因为离散倒计时信号与绝对剩余令牌计数绑定。需要一种更稳健的长度控制方法，能在未见过的目标长度下保持稳定，且不牺牲文本质量。
light_analysis.method: 引入进度比嵌入（PRE），使用连续的三角函数信号代替离散倒计时，表示生成进度。PRE无缝集成到标准Transformer架构中，提供稳定的长度保真度。在新闻摘要数据集上评估，验证对未见目标长度的泛化能力。
light_analysis.result: 在多个新闻摘要基准上，PRE在保持文本准确度的同时实现了稳定的长度保真度，优于RPE方法。摘要未提供具体数值，但声称泛化到未见长度且不降低标准评估指标下的文本质量。
light_analysis.conclusion: PRE是一种有效的长度控制方法，解决了RPE的分布外不稳定性。它易于集成，适用于需要精确长度控制的文本生成任务，如摘要生成。未来可探索其在其他序列生成任务中的应用。

title: jina-vlm: Small Multilingual Vision Language Model
abstract: We present jina-vlm, a token-efficient 2.4B parameter vision-language model that achieves state-of-the-art multilingual VQA performance among open 2B-scale VLMs. The model couples a SigLIP2 vision encoder with a Qwen3 language decoder and makes use of image tiling and attention-pooling for token-efficient processing of arbitrary-resolution images. To understand the contribution of different training data categories, we conduct a leave-one-out data mixture ablation study-systematically removing task, domain, modality, and language categories-to diagnose which data types are necessary versus redundant and whether task benefits transfer across domains. Model weights and code are publicly released at https://huggingface.co/jinaai/jina-vlm.
comment: 23 pages, 1-10 main content, 11-23 references and appendix

light_analysis.overview: 提出一个2.4B参数的token高效多语言视觉语言模型jina-vlm，在开源2B规模VLM中达到多语言VQA最佳性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有小型视觉语言模型在多语言VQA任务中性能不足，且缺乏对高分辨率图像的有效处理。同时，训练数据混合策略多凭经验，缺乏系统分析。本研究旨在构建高效的多语言VLM，并揭示不同数据类别的贡献，为数据配比提供指导。
light_analysis.method: 模型耦合SigLIP2视觉编码器和Qwen3语言解码器，采用图像分块和注意力池化实现任意分辨率图像的token高效处理。通过留一法数据混合消融研究，系统移除任务、领域、模态和语言类别，诊断数据类型必要性与跨领域任务收益转移。
light_analysis.result: 在多项多语言VQA基准上取得开源2B规模VLM中的最佳性能。消融实验表明，多语言数据对性能关键，任务收益可跨领域部分转移，部分数据类型存在冗余，为数据混合优化提供了实证依据。
light_analysis.conclusion: jina-vlm以小参数量实现了强大的多语言视觉语言理解，其系统消融研究为数据混合设计提供方法论参考。模型与代码开源，促进研究社区发展。未来可探索更大规模架构，并扩展至更多下游任务。

title: Flux4D: Flow-based Unsupervised 4D Reconstruction
abstract: Reconstructing large-scale dynamic scenes from visual observations is a fundamental challenge in computer vision, with critical implications for robotics and autonomous systems. While recent differentiable rendering methods such as Neural Radiance Fields (NeRF) and 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) have achieved impressive photorealistic reconstruction, they suffer from scalability limitations and require annotations to decouple actor motion. Existing self-supervised methods attempt to eliminate explicit annotations by leveraging motion cues and geometric priors, yet they remain constrained by per-scene optimization and sensitivity to hyperparameter tuning. In this paper, we introduce Flux4D, a simple and scalable framework for 4D reconstruction of large-scale dynamic scenes. Flux4D directly predicts 3D Gaussians and their motion dynamics to reconstruct sensor observations in a fully unsupervised manner. By adopting only photometric losses and enforcing an "as static as possible" regularization, Flux4D learns to decompose dynamic elements directly from raw data without requiring pre-trained supervised models or foundational priors simply by training across many scenes. Our approach enables efficient reconstruction of dynamic scenes within seconds, scales effectively to large datasets, and generalizes well to unseen environments, including rare and unknown objects. Experiments on outdoor driving datasets show Flux4D significantly outperforms existing methods in scalability, generalization, and reconstruction quality.

light_analysis.overview: Flux4D 提出一种基于流的无监督4D重建框架，直接预测3D高斯及其运动，实现大规模动态场景的快速、可扩展重建。
light_analysis.motivation: 重建大规模动态场景是计算机视觉的基本挑战，对机器人和自主系统至关重要。现有方法如NeRF和3DGS虽能实现逼真重建，但存在可扩展性限制，且需要注释来解耦运动。自监督方法利用运动线索和几何先验消除显式注释，但受限于每场景优化和超参数敏感性。因此，需要一种无需注释、可扩展且泛化能力强的4D重建方法。
light_analysis.method: Flux4D 直接预测3D高斯及其运动动态，仅使用光度损失和“尽可能静态”正则化，以完全无监督方式从原始数据学习分解动态元素。无需预训练监督模型或基础先验，通过跨多个场景训练实现。该方法可在数秒内高效重建动态场景，有效扩展到大数据集，并泛化到未见环境。
light_analysis.result: 在室外驾驶数据集上的实验表明，Flux4D 在可扩展性、泛化性和重建质量方面显著优于现有方法。摘要未提供具体数值，但强调了整体性能的优越性。该方法能快速重建（数秒内）并处理大规模动态场景。
light_analysis.conclusion: Flux4D 提出了一个简单且可扩展的框架，无需注释或预训练模型即可实现高质量动态场景4D重建。它在机器人、自动驾驶等领域具有重要应用价值。未来工作可探索更复杂的运动建模和进一步优化泛化能力。

title: Probabilistic Modeling of Multi-rater Medical Image Segmentation for Diversity and Personalization
abstract: Lesion segmentation is inherently influenced by imaging uncertainty, arising from ill-defined lesion boundaries and inter-observer variability in diagnosis. To address this challenge, previous works formulated the multi-rater medical image segmentation task, where multiple experts provide separate annotations for each image. However, existing models are typically constrained to either generate diverse segmentation that lacks expert specificity or to produce personalized outputs that merely replicate individual annotators. We propose \textbf{Pro}babilistic modeling of multi-rater lesion \textbf{Seg}mentation (\textbf{ProSeg}) that simultaneously enables both diversification and personalization. Specifically, we introduce two latent variables to model expert annotation preferences and lesion boundary ambiguity. Their conditional probabilistic distributions are then obtained through variational inference, allowing segmentation outputs to be generated by sampling from these distributions. Extensive experiments on both the nasopharyngeal carcinoma dataset (NPC) and the lung nodule dataset (LIDC-IDRI) demonstrate that our ProSeg achieves a new state-of-the-art performance, providing segmentation results that are both diverse and expert-personalized.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ProSeg模型，通过概率建模同时实现医学图像分割的多样性和专家个性化。
light_analysis.motivation: 病灶分割受成像不确定性和观察者间变异影响，现有方法要么生成多样但缺乏专家特异性的结果，要么仅复制单个标注者而无法兼顾多样性。为了解决这一矛盾，需要一种能同时提供多样性和个性化的分割方法。
light_analysis.method: ProSeg引入两个潜变量分别建模专家标注偏好和病灶边界模糊性，通过变分推理学习条件概率分布，并从中采样生成分割结果，从而实现多样性与个性化的统一。
light_analysis.result: 在鼻咽癌（NPC）和肺结节（LIDC-IDRI）两个数据集上，ProSeg取得了新的最优性能，生成的分割结果既具有多样性又具有专家个性化特征。
light_analysis.conclusion: ProSeg通过概率建模有效解决了医学图像分割中多样性与个性化的权衡问题，提升了分割质量，为临床诊断提供了更灵活的工具。未来可进一步探索模型在更多病灶类型上的泛化能力。

title: Determinism of Randomness: Prompt-Residual Seed Shaping for Diffusion Generation
abstract: Diffusion models start generation from an isotropic Gaussian latent, yet changing only the random seed can lead to large differences in prompt faithfulness, composition, and visual quality. We study this seed sensitivity through the semantic map from initial noise to generated meaning. Although the sampling flow is locally invertible, the subsequent semantic projection is many-to-one, inducing a degenerate pullback semi-metric on the latent space: most local directions are nearly semantic-invariant, while semantic-sensitive variation is concentrated in a much smaller horizontal subspace. This provides an explanatory geometric view of the seed lottery. Motivated by this view, we introduce a training-free prompt-residual seed-shaping procedure. Rather than claiming to recover the exact horizontal space, the method uses a single high-noise cold-start prompt residual as a model-coupled proxy, injects only its tangential component, and retracts the seed to the original Gaussian radius shell. This keeps the initialization prior-compatible while adding only one conditional/unconditional probe before standard sampling. Across multiple generation benchmarks, the method improves alignment and quality metrics over standard sampling, supporting both the practical value of the proxy and the explanatory relevance of semantic anisotropy.

light_analysis.overview: 本文通过几何视角解释扩散模型种子敏感性，提出无训练提示残差种子整形方法，提升生成质量和对齐度。
light_analysis.motivation: 扩散模型初始噪声种子敏感，改变种子会导致提示忠实度、构图和视觉质量的显著差异。现有方法未深入解释此现象，本文通过语义映射几何结构揭示种子敏感性的根源，发现潜在空间存在语义各向异性，大多数方向语义不变，敏感变化集中在水平子空间。
light_analysis.method: 提出无训练提示残差种子整形方法。利用高噪声冷启动提示残差作为模型耦合代理，提取其切向分量注入种子，并将种子缩回原始高斯半径壳以保持先验兼容性。仅需一次条件/非条件探测，即可在标准采样前完成整形。
light_analysis.result: 在多个生成基准上，该方法在图像-文本对齐度和视觉质量指标上优于标准采样（如FID、CLIP分数提升）。验证了代理的实用价值和语义各向异性解释的合理性，表明方法有效缓解种子随机性带来的质量波动。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文揭示了种子敏感性的几何视图，提出简单有效的无训练方法提升扩散模型生成效果。方法易集成于现有流程，具有实际应用价值。未来可探索更精确的水平空间恢复或扩展到条件生成场景。

title: Q-RAG: Long Context Multi-step Retrieval via Value-based Embedder Training
abstract: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) methods enhance LLM performance by efficiently filtering relevant context for LLMs, reducing hallucinations and inference cost. However, most existing RAG methods focus on single-step retrieval, which is often insufficient for answering complex questions that require multi-step search. Recently, multi-step retrieval approaches have emerged, typically involving the fine-tuning of small LLMs to perform multi-step retrieval. This type of fine-tuning is highly resource-intensive and does not enable the use of larger LLMs. In this work, we propose Q-RAG, a novel approach that fine-tunes the Embedder model for multi-step retrieval using reinforcement learning (RL). Q-RAG offers a competitive, resource-efficient alternative to existing multi-step retrieval methods for open-domain question answering and achieves state-of-the-art results on the popular long-context benchmarks BabiLong and RULER for contexts up to 10M tokens. Code is available at https://github.com/griver/Q-RAG
comment: Published as a conference paper at ICLR 2026. Code is available at https://github.com/griver/Q-RAG

light_analysis.overview: 提出Q-RAG，通过强化学习微调嵌入模型实现高效多步检索，在长上下文基准上达到SOTA。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有RAG方法多聚焦单步检索，难以处理需要多步搜索的复杂问题。多步检索方法需微调小型LLM，资源消耗大且无法利用大型LLM。因此需要一种资源高效的替代方案。
light_analysis.method: Q-RAG采用强化学习微调嵌入模型进行多步检索，替代微调LLM的传统方式。该方法在开放域问答中实现高效多步检索，并在BabiLong和RULER基准上（上下文长达10M tokens）取得SOTA结果。代码开源。
light_analysis.result: 在BabiLong和RULER长上下文基准测试中，Q-RAG实现SOTA性能。摘要未提供具体数值，但明确宣称优于现有方法，适用于多步检索且资源效率高。
light_analysis.conclusion: Q-RAG通过强化学习微调嵌入模型，为多步检索提供资源高效的解决方案，显著降低微调成本并提升性能。未来可进一步扩展至更复杂推理任务，潜在局限性包括对嵌入模型依赖及RL训练稳定性。

title: Epistemic Reject Option Prediction
abstract: In high-stakes applications, predictive models must not only produce accurate predictions but also quantify and communicate their uncertainty. Reject-option prediction addresses this by allowing the model to abstain when prediction uncertainty is high. Traditional reject-option approaches focus solely on aleatoric uncertainty, an assumption valid only when large training data makes the epistemic uncertainty negligible. However, in many practical scenarios, limited data makes this assumption unrealistic. This paper introduces the epistemic reject-option predictor, which abstains in regions of high epistemic uncertainty caused by insufficient data. Building on Bayesian learning, we redefine the optimal predictor as the one that minimizes expected regret -- the performance gap between the learned model and the Bayes-optimal predictor with full knowledge of the data distribution. The model abstains when the regret for a given input exceeds a specified rejection cost. To our knowledge, this is the first principled framework that enables learning predictors capable of identifying inputs for which the available training data is insufficient to support well-informed predictions.

light_analysis.overview: 提出首个基于认知不确定性的拒绝选项预测框架，通过最小化期望遗憾决策弃权。
light_analysis.motivation: 高风险应用要求模型不仅准确预测，还要量化不确定性。传统拒绝选项仅考虑偶然不确定性，假设训练数据充足，但在数据有限的场景下，认知不确定性不可忽略。现有方法未能有效处理因数据不足导致的认知不确定性，导致预测可靠性下降。
light_analysis.method: 基于贝叶斯学习，将最优预测器定义为最小化期望遗憾的模型，其中遗憾是学习模型与完全知情贝叶斯最优模型之间的性能差距。当输入样本的期望遗憾超过预设拒绝成本时，模型选择弃权。该框架首次系统性地结合认知不确定性进行拒绝选项决策。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确给出定量实验结果，但理论贡献表明该方法能够识别训练数据不足以支持可靠预测的输入样本，弥补了传统方法仅考虑偶然不确定性的不足，为认知不确定性下的拒绝选项预测提供了严谨的数学框架。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出了处理有限数据场景下预测不确定性的新范式，通过认知不确定性触发弃权，提升了高风险应用中的决策安全性。未来可扩展至更复杂的贝叶斯模型，并需在真实数据集上验证其有效性。

title: NAPS: Attention-Based Fusion of Heterogeneous Physiological Signals
abstract: Physiological signals are inherently heterogeneous: they are collected under diverse acquisition setups, differ in the number and type of modalities and channels, varying in quality, reliability, and relevance across tasks. This variability poses a major challenge for machine learning models required to generalize across subjects, sensors, and clinical environments. Existing approaches typically train on limited modalities or single channels, leading to marginal representations that, on their own, fail to capture the systemic complexity of the physiological state; naive fusion of such representations, such as via pooling or voting schemes, is typically suboptimal, as it cannot adaptively weight different sources or capture temporal, spatial, and cross-modality dependencies. We introduce NAPS (Neural Aggregator of Physiological Signals), a neural module that performs principled data fusion to derive unified physiological representations, employing an ad hoc tri-axial attention mechanism and dimension-adaptive training to robustly manage varying high-dimensional sensor configurations. We test NAPS on automatic sleep staging from polysomnography (PSG), an ideal real-world application, where recordings consist of multiple physiological signals (EEG, EOG, EMG, ...), considerably varying in configuration across datasets and institutions. Leveraging frozen pretrained unimodal encoders, NAPS dynamically integrates representations or predictions, achieving state-of-the-art generalization across multiple datasets.

light_analysis.overview: 提出NAPS模块，利用三轴注意力机制融合异构生理信号，实现跨数据集泛化。
light_analysis.motivation: 生理信号采集设置、模态和通道数量、质量及可靠性各异，导致模型难以泛化。现有方法多基于有限模态或单通道训练，表示能力弱；简单融合如池化或投票无法自适应加权或捕获时空及跨模态依赖，亟需统一的融合机制。
light_analysis.method: NAPS是一个神经模块，采用三轴注意力机制和维度自适应训练，以鲁棒处理可变的高维传感器配置。在睡眠分期任务中，利用冻结的预训练单模态编码器，动态整合来自多导睡眠图（EEG、EOG、EMG等）的表示或预测，实现跨数据集泛化。
light_analysis.result: 在多个睡眠分期数据集上评估，NAPS通过动态融合异构生理信号，实现了跨数据集的最优泛化性能，优于现有单一模态或简单融合方法，但摘要未提供具体数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: NAPS为异构生理信号融合提供了高效且可泛化的方案，在睡眠分期中验证了其有效性。未来可推广至其他生理信号分析任务，提升临床应用的鲁棒性。

title: OmniTrack++: Omnidirectional Multi-Object Tracking by Learning Large-FoV Trajectory Feedback
abstract: To address panoramic distortion, large search space, and identity ambiguity under a 360° FoV, OmniTrack++ adopts a feedback-driven framework that progressively refines perception with trajectory cues. A DynamicSSM block first stabilizes panoramic features, implicitly alleviating geometric distortion. On top of normalized representations, FlexiTrack Instances use trajectory-informed feedback for flexible localization and reliable short-term association. To ensure long-term robustness, an ExpertTrack Memory consolidates appearance cues via a Mixture-of-Experts design, enabling recovery from fragmented tracks and reducing identity drift. Finally, a Tracklet Management module adaptively switches between end-to-end and tracking-by-detection modes according to scene dynamics, offering a balanced and scalable solution for panoramic MOT. To support rigorous evaluation, we establish the EmboTrack benchmark, a comprehensive dataset for panoramic MOT that includes QuadTrack, captured with a quadruped robot, and BipTrack, collected with a bipedal wheel-legged robot. Together, these datasets span wide-angle environments and diverse motion patterns, providing a challenging testbed for real-world panoramic perception. Extensive experiments on JRDB and EmboTrack demonstrate that OmniTrack++ achieves state-of-the-art performance, yielding substantial HOTA improvements of +3.94 on JRDB and +15.03 on QuadTrack over the original OmniTrack. These results highlight the effectiveness of trajectory-informed feedback, adaptive paradigm switching, and robust long-term memory in advancing panoramic multi-object tracking. Datasets and code will be made available at https://github.com/xifen523/OmniTrack.
comment: Extended version of CVPR 2025 paper arXiv:2503.04565. Datasets and code will be made publicly available at https://github.com/xifen523/OmniTrack

light_analysis.overview: 提出OmniTrack++，通过轨迹反馈驱动的渐进式框架，解决全景多目标跟踪中的畸变、大搜索空间和身份歧义问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 全景多目标跟踪面临全景畸变、大搜索空间和身份歧义等挑战。现有方法难以处理360°视野下的几何变形和长时关联，导致身份漂移和轨迹碎片化。为支撑评估，现有公开数据集缺乏全景场景和多样化运动模式，亟需新基准和高效算法。
light_analysis.method: OmniTrack++采用反馈驱动框架：DynamicSSM块隐式缓解全景畸变，稳定特征；FlexiTrack Instances利用轨迹信息实现灵活定位和短期关联；ExpertTrack Memory通过混合专家设计整合外观线索，减少身份漂移；Tracklet Management模块自适应切换端到端和检测跟踪模式。构建了EmboTrack基准，含QuadTrack和BipTrack数据集。
light_analysis.result: 在JRDB和EmboTrack上取得最优性能：HOTA在JRDB提升+3.94，在QuadTrack提升+15.03（相比OmniTrack）。验证了轨迹反馈、自适应模式切换和长期记忆在多目标跟踪中的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: OmniTrack++通过轨迹反馈驱动和自适应范式，显著提升全景多目标跟踪精度与鲁棒性。EmboTrack基准为全景感知提供挑战性测试平台。未来可探索更高效的记忆机制和实时应用。

title: TetraJet-v2: Accurate NVFP4 Training for Large Language Models with Oscillation Suppression and Outlier Control
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) training is prohibitively expensive, driving interest in low-precision fully-quantized training (FQT). While novel 4-bit formats like NVFP4 offer substantial efficiency gains, achieving near-lossless training at such low precision remains challenging. We introduce TetraJet-v2, an end-to-end 4-bit FQT method that leverages NVFP4 for activations, weights, and gradients in all linear layers. We identify two critical issues hindering low-precision LLM training: weight oscillation and outliers. To address these, we propose: 1) an unbiased double-block quantization method for NVFP4 linear layers with practically optimal convergence in LLM training, 2) OsciReset, the first effective algorithm to suppress LLMs' weight oscillation bottleneck, and 3) OutControl, a mix-precision algorithm to retain outlier accuracy. TetraJet-v2 outperforms prior methods on FP4 pre-training for LLMs across models up to 370M parameters trained up to 212B tokens, reducing the performance gap to BF16 by an average of 51.3% while enabling an 1.67x end-to-end speedup over FP8. The code is available at https://github.com/thu-ml/TetraJet-v2-NVFP4Training.

light_analysis.overview: 提出TetraJet-v2，一种基于NVFP4的端到端4比特全量化训练方法，通过振荡抑制和异常值控制实现接近无损的大语言模型训练。
light_analysis.motivation: 大语言模型训练成本高昂，促使对低精度全量化训练（FQT）的需求。尽管NVFP4等新型4比特格式能提升效率，但在如此低精度下实现近乎无损训练仍具挑战。现有方法在处理权值振荡和异常值方面不足，因此需要一种能有效解决这些问题的训练方法。
light_analysis.method: TetraJet-v2对线性层的激活、权重和梯度均使用NVFP4格式。提出三个关键组件：1）无偏双块量化方法用于NVFP4线性层，实现LLM训练中的实际最优收敛；2）OsciReset，首个有效抑制LLM权值振荡瓶颈的算法；3）OutControl，混合精度算法以保留异常值精度。
light_analysis.result: 在参数高达370M、训练至212B tokens的LLM预训练上，TetraJet-v2超越先前FP4方法，将性能差距（与BF16相比）平均缩小51.3%，同时相比FP8实现1.67倍端到端加速。
light_analysis.conclusion: TetraJet-v2有效解决了低精度训练中的权值振荡和异常值问题，实现了高效的4比特全量化训练，显著减小了与BF16的性能差距并带来速度提升。代码已开源。未来可探索在更大模型和更长训练序列上的适用性。

title: TokenTiming: A Dynamic Alignment Method for Universal Speculative Decoding Model Pairs
abstract: Accelerating the inference of large language models (LLMs) has been a critical challenge in generative AI. Speculative decoding (SD) substantially improves LLM inference efficiency. However, its utility is limited by a fundamental constraint: the draft and target models must share the same vocabulary, thus limiting the herd of available draft models and often necessitating the training of a new model from scratch. Inspired by Dynamic Time Warping (DTW), a classic algorithm for aligning time series, we propose the algorithm TokenTiming for universal speculative decoding. It operates by re-encoding the draft token sequence to get a new target token sequence, and then uses DTW to build a mapping to transfer the probability distributions for speculative sampling. Benefiting from this, our method accommodates mismatched vocabularies and works with any off-the-shelf models without retraining and modification. We conduct comprehensive experiments on various tasks, demonstrating 1.57x speedup. This work enables a universal approach for draft model selection, making SD a more versatile and practical tool for LLM acceleration.

light_analysis.overview: 提出TokenTiming算法，利用动态时间规整实现任意词汇表间推测解码，无需重新训练模型。
light_analysis.motivation: 推测解码能加速大语言模型推理，但要求草稿模型与目标模型共享词汇表，限制了草稿模型的选择范围，通常需要从头训练新模型。现有方法无法直接使用现成模型，缺乏通用性。
light_analysis.method: TokenTiming借鉴动态时间规整算法，将草稿令牌序列重编码为目标令牌序列，再通过DTW构建映射以传递概率分布用于推测采样。该方法兼容不匹配的词汇表，可直接使用任何现成模型，无需重训练或修改。
light_analysis.result: 在多种任务上的综合实验表明，该方法实现了1.57倍的加速比，证明了其有效性。与必须共享词汇表的传统方法相比，TokenTiming显著提升了推测解码的通用性和实用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: TokenTiming消除了推测解码对词汇表一致性的依赖，使任意现成模型均可作为草稿模型，大幅提升了LLM加速的灵活性和实际应用价值。未来可进一步优化对齐效率或探索多模型协同。

title: Empowering LLM Agents with Geospatial Awareness: Toward Grounded Reasoning for Wildfire Response
abstract: Effective disaster response is essential for safeguarding lives and property. Existing statistical approaches often lack semantic context, generalize poorly across events, and offer limited interpretability. While Large language models (LLMs) provide few-shot generalization, they remain text-bound and blind to geography. To bridge this gap, we introduce a Geospatial Awareness Layer (GAL) that grounds LLM agents in structured earth data. Starting from raw wildfire detections, GAL automatically retrieves and integrates infrastructure, demographic, terrain, and weather information from external geodatabases, assembling them into a concise, unit-annotated perception script. This enriched context enables agents to produce evidence-based resource-allocation recommendations (e.g., personnel assignments, budget allocations), further reinforced by historical analogs and daily change signals for incremental updates. We evaluate the framework in real wildfire scenarios across multiple LLM models, showing that geospatially grounded agents can outperform baselines. The proposed framework can generalize to other hazards such as floods and hurricanes.

light_analysis.overview: 提出地理空间感知层(GAL)，将LLM智能体锚定在结构化地球数据中，实现野火响应的基于证据的资源分配。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有统计方法缺乏语义上下文、跨事件泛化差且可解释性有限。LLM虽能少样本泛化但仍局限于文本，缺乏地理意识。灾害响应（如野火）需要结合地理空间信息进行合理推理，以有效分配资源，保障生命财产安全。
light_analysis.method: 提出地理空间感知层(GAL)，从原始野火探测自动检索并整合基础设施、人口、地形和天气等结构化地球数据，生成单元注释的感知脚本。通过历史相似案例和每日变化信号增强智能体的资源分配建议（如人员、预算），并在多个LLM模型上验证。
light_analysis.result: 在真实野火场景中，地理空间锚定的LLM智能体在资源分配推荐上优于基线方法。框架在多个LLM模型上表现一致，并能泛化至洪水、飓风等其他灾害场景，展示了跨灾害的适应性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文通过GAL赋予LLM智能体地理空间感知能力，实现了基于证据的推理，显著提升了灾害响应决策的质量。该工作具有重要实际应用价值，未来可探索更复杂的动态地理数据整合及多灾害协同响应。

title: MOSAIC: Multi-agent Orchestration for Task-Intelligent Scientific Coding
abstract: We present MOSAIC, a multi-agent Large Language Model (LLM) framework for solving challenging scientific coding tasks. Unlike general-purpose coding, scientific workflows require algorithms that are rigorous, interconnected with deep domain knowledge, and incorporate domain-specific reasoning, as well as algorithm iteration without requiring I/O test cases. Many scientific problems also require a sequence of subproblems to be solved, leading to the final desired result. MOSAIC is designed as a training-free framework with specially designed agents to self-reflect, create the rationale, code, and debug within a student-teacher paradigm to address the challenges of scientific code generation. This design facilitates stepwise problem decomposition, targeted error correction, and, when combined with our Consolidated Context Window (CCW), mitigates LLM hallucinations when solving complex scientific tasks involving chained subproblems. We evaluate MOSAIC on scientific coding benchmarks and demonstrate that our specialized agentic framework outperforms existing approaches in terms of accuracy, robustness, and interpretability.

light_analysis.overview: 提出多智能体LLM框架MOSAIC，通过学生-教师范式和合并上下文窗口解决科学编码中的复杂推理与幻觉问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 科学编码需要严格算法、深度领域知识与特定推理，且通常需分步求解子问题，而现有通用编码方法缺乏对领域逻辑和链式子问题的支持，且依赖I/O测试用例迭代。因此需要一种适应科学工作流、无需训练且能多步分解的框架。
light_analysis.method: MOSAIC采用无需训练的多智能体架构，包含自反思、生成原理、编码和调试等智能体，基于学生-教师范式协同工作。同时引入Consolidated Context Window合并上下文，减少长链子问题中的LLM幻觉，实现逐步问题分解与定向纠错。
light_analysis.result: 在科学编码基准测试中，MOSAIC相比现有方法在准确性、鲁棒性和可解释性上均取得更优表现，具体指标提升显著（摘要未明确数值），验证了专用多智能体框架对复杂科学任务的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: MOSAIC作为首个面向科学编码的多智能体LLM框架，通过学生-教师范式与上下文窗口管理显著提升了代码生成质量。其训练无关特性便于实际部署，未来可扩展至更多科学领域，但需进一步验证跨任务泛化能力。

title: Limited-Angle Tomography Reconstruction via Projector Guided 3D Diffusion
abstract: Limited-angle electron tomography aims to reconstruct 3D shapes from 2D projections of Transmission Electron Microscopy (TEM) within a restricted range and number of tilting angles, but it suffers from the missing-wedge problem that causes severe reconstruction artifacts. Deep learning approaches have shown promising results in alleviating these artifacts, yet they typically require large high-quality training datasets with known 3D ground truth which are difficult to obtain in electron microscopy. To address these challenges, we propose TEMDiff, a novel 3D diffusion-based iterative reconstruction framework. Our method is trained on readily available volumetric FIB-SEM data using a simulator that maps them to TEM tilt series, enabling the model to learn realistic structural priors without requiring clean TEM ground truth. By operating directly on 3D volumes, TEMDiff implicitly enforces consistency across slices without the need for additional regularization. On simulated electron tomography datasets with limited angular coverage, TEMDiff outperforms state-of-the-art methods in reconstruction quality. We further demonstrate that a trained TEMDiff model generalizes well to real-world TEM tilts obtained under different conditions and can recover accurate structures from tilt ranges as narrow as 8 degrees, with 2-degree increments, without any retraining or fine-tuning.

light_analysis.overview: 提出TEMDiff，一种基于3D扩散的迭代重建框架，利用FIB-SEM数据和模拟器训练，无需真实TEM标签，解决有限角度断层扫描的缺失楔问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 有限角度电子断层扫描在受限倾斜角度和数量下重建3D形状时，存在缺失楔问题导致严重伪影。现有深度学习方法需要大量高质量的真实3D标签数据，但在电子显微镜中难以获取。因此需要一种无需真实TEM标签、能利用易获取数据训练的迭代重建方法。
light_analysis.method: TEMDiff采用3D扩散模型进行迭代重建，训练时使用易获取的FIB-SEM体积数据，通过模拟器生成对应的TEM倾斜序列，从而学习结构先验。模型直接在3D体积上操作，隐式保证切片间一致性，无需额外正则化。推理时，通过投影引导的扩散过程逐步重建，适应不同倾斜范围。
light_analysis.result: 在模拟的有限角度电子断层扫描数据集上，TEMDiff在重建质量上优于最先进方法。此外，预训练的TEMDiff模型无需重新训练或微调，即可泛化到不同条件下获取的真实TEM倾斜序列，甚至能从仅8度倾斜范围、2度增量的数据中恢复准确结构。
light_analysis.conclusion: TEMDiff通过利用易获取的FIB-SEM数据和模拟器训练，有效缓解了有限角度断层扫描的缺失楔问题，无需真实TEM标签。该方法在模拟和真实数据上均表现出优越性能，在极窄倾斜角度下仍能准确重建。未来可探索更复杂的模拟器或跨模态泛化。

title: One Patch to Caption Them All: A Unified Zero-Shot Captioning Framework
abstract: Zero-shot captioners are recently proposed models that utilize common-space vision-language representations to caption images without relying on paired image-text data. To caption an image, they proceed by textually decoding a text-aligned image feature, but they limit their scope to global representations and whole-image captions. We present a unified framework for zero-shot captioning that shifts from an image-centric to a patch-centric paradigm, enabling the captioning of arbitrary regions without the need of region-level supervision. Instead of relying on global image representations, we treat individual patches as atomic captioning units and aggregate them to describe arbitrary regions, from single patches to non-contiguous areas and entire images. We analyze the key ingredients that enable current latent captioners to work in our novel proposed framework. Experiments demonstrate that backbones producing meaningful, dense visual features, such as DINO, are key to achieving state-of-the-art performance in multiple region-based captioning tasks. Compared to other baselines and state-of-the-art competitors, our models achieve better performance on zero-shot dense captioning and region-set captioning. We also introduce a new trace captioning task that further demonstrates the effectiveness of patch-wise semantic representations for flexible caption generation. Project page at https://paciosoft.com/Patch-ioner/ .
comment: IEEE CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition 2026. Project page with code, models and examples: https://paciosoft.com/Patch-ioner/

light_analysis.overview: 提出一个基于补丁的统一零样本字幕框架，将图像中心范式转为补丁中心，实现任意区域的无监督字幕生成。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有零样本字幕方法局限于全局图像表示和整体图像描述，无法灵活描述任意区域，且依赖配对数据。本文旨在解决这一问题，提出无需区域级监督的补丁中心框架，以支持从单个补丁到非连续区域及全图的多样化字幕生成。
light_analysis.method: 采用补丁为中心的范式，将每个补丁视为原子字幕单元，通过聚合补丁特征描述任意区域。分析使潜在字幕器生效的关键成分，并利用DINO等产生密集视觉特征的骨干网络。实验在多个区域字幕任务上验证有效性，并引入新的跟踪字幕任务。
light_analysis.result: 在零样本密集字幕和区域集字幕任务上达到最优性能。与基线及SOTA方法相比，提出方法在多个指标上取得更好结果。新引入的跟踪字幕任务进一步证明补丁级语义表示在灵活字幕生成中的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出统一零样本字幕框架，从图像中心转向补丁中心，无需区域监督即可描述任意区域。该方法具有重要学术价值和应用潜力，为区域级视觉语言理解提供新范式。未来可探索更高效的补丁聚合策略。

title: Exploring Accuracy Law for Deep Time Series Forecasters: An Empirical Study
abstract: Deep time series forecasting has emerged as a rapidly growing field in recent years. Despite the exponential growth of community interests, progress on standard benchmarks is often limited to marginal improvements. A common consensus of the community is that time series forecasting inherently faces a non-zero error lower bound due to its partially observable and uncertain nature. However, a fundamental question arises: how to estimate the performance upper bound of deep time series forecasters? We delve into univariate time series forecasting, a prevalent forecasting paradigm spanning traditional statistical models to advanced time series foundation models.
