Going beyond classical series-wise predictability metrics, we realize that the forecasting performance is highly related to window-wise properties due to the sequence-to-sequence forecasting paradigm of deep time series models and introduce a quantitative measurement of window-wise pattern complexity. Through rigorous statistical analyses over more than 4700 newly trained deep forecasting models, we discover a consistent empirical relationship between the minimum attainable forecasting error of deep models and the complexity of window-wise series patterns, which is termed the accuracy law. We further demonstrate that this empirical finding successfully guides us to identify saturated tasks from widely used benchmarks and derive an effective training strategy for time series foundation models, offering valuable insights for future research.

light_analysis.overview: 发现深度时间序列预测器的精度定律：窗口模式复杂度与最小可达到误差之间的经验关系。
light_analysis.motivation: 深度时间序列预测领域快速发展，但标准基准上仅获得边际改进。社区共识认为预测存在非零误差下界，但如何估计性能上界仍是一个基本问题。现有方法仅关注序列级可预测性，忽略了深度模型序列到序列预测中窗口级属性的影响，导致难以识别任务饱和度和优化训练策略。
light_analysis.method: 针对单变量时间序列预测，引入窗口模式复杂度的定量测量。在4700多个新训练的深度预测模型上进行严格统计分析，发现深度模型的最小可达到预测误差与窗口级序列复杂度之间存在一致的经验关系，称为精度定律。
light_analysis.result: 通过精度定律成功识别了广泛使用基准中的饱和任务，并推导出时间序列基础模型的有效训练策略。具体数据（如准确率提升、对比结果）在摘要中未明确说明，但表明该定律为未来研究提供了宝贵见解。
light_analysis.conclusion: 主要贡献是发现了精度定律，为深度时间序列预测的性能上界提供了经验估计。学术价值在于揭示了窗口模式复杂度与预测误差的定量关系；实际应用价值包括指导饱和任务识别和训练策略优化。局限性可能在于仅针对单变量时间序列，未来可扩展至多变量或更复杂场景。

title: Short window attention enables long-term memorization
abstract: Recent works show that hybrid architectures combining local sliding window attention layers and global attention layers outperform either of these architectures taken separately. However, the impact of the window length and the interplay between local layers and global layers remain under-studied. In this work, we first analyze the interaction between short and long term memory by considering SWAX: a hybrid architecture consisting of sliding-window attention and xLSTM linear RNN layers.   A counter-intuitive finding is that larger sliding windows hurts the long-context performance. In fact, short window attention encourages the model to better train the long-term memory of the xLSTM as it cannot rely on the local softmax attention mechanism for long context-retrieval. We also validate our findings on local-global architectures alternating short window and full attention layers: the short layers should be small in order not to hinder the usefulness of the long layers.   However, employing too small sliding windows is detrimental even for short-context tasks, which could be solved with information from moderately larger sliding windows otherwise. Therefore, we train hybrid architectures by stochastically changing the sliding window size, forcing the model to leverage both the short term window and the long-term memory. Training with stochastic window sizes significantly outperforms regular window attention both on short and long-context problems.

light_analysis.overview: 发现短窗口注意力能提升长程记忆性能，并提出随机窗口大小训练方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 混合架构中局部滑动窗口与全局注意力的窗口长度影响及相互作用研究不足。传统认为大窗口更好，但反直觉发现大窗口损害长上下文性能。理解短窗口如何促进长程记忆对优化长上下文任务至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 采用SWAX架构（滑动窗口注意力+xLSTM线性RNN层）分析长短记忆交互。提出随机改变滑动窗口大小的训练策略，使模型同时依赖短期窗口和长期记忆，避免固定窗口的局限。
light_analysis.result: 随机窗口大小训练显著优于常规窗口注意力，在短上下文和长上下文任务上均取得更好性能。验证了短窗口注意力（小窗口）可提升xLSTM长程记忆利用，而过大窗口则有害。
light_analysis.conclusion: 揭示了短窗口注意力在混合架构中的关键作用，为设计高效长程记忆模型提供新思路。随机窗口训练方法简单有效，可推广至其他局部-全局架构。未来可探索自适应窗口机制。

title: Low-rank surrogate modeling and stochastic zero-order optimization for training of neural networks with black-box layers
abstract: The growing demand for energy-efficient, high-performance AI systems has led to increased attention on alternative computing platforms (e.g., photonic, neuromorphic) due to their potential to accelerate learning and inference. However, integrating such physical components into deep learning pipelines remains challenging, as physical devices often offer limited expressiveness, and their non-differentiable nature renders on-device backpropagation difficult or infeasible. This motivates the development of hybrid architectures that combine digital neural networks with reconfigurable physical layers, which effectively behave as black boxes. In this work, we present a framework for the end-to-end training of such hybrid networks. This framework integrates stochastic zeroth-order optimization for updating the physical layer's internal parameters with a dynamic low-rank surrogate model that enables gradient propagation through the physical layer. A key component of our approach is the implicit projector-splitting integrator algorithm, which updates the lightweight surrogate model after each forward pass with minimal hardware queries, thereby avoiding costly full matrix reconstruction. We demonstrate our method across diverse deep learning tasks, including: computer vision, audio classification, and language modeling. Notably, across all modalities, the proposed approach achieves near-digital baseline accuracy and consistently enables effective end-to-end training of hybrid models incorporating various non-differentiable physical components (spatial light modulators, microring resonators, and Mach-Zehnder interferometers). This work bridges hardware-aware deep learning and gradient-free optimization, thereby offering a practical pathway for integrating non-differentiable physical components into scalable, end-to-end trainable AI systems.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种结合随机零阶优化和动态低秩代理模型的框架，实现含非可微物理层的混合神经网络端到端训练。
light_analysis.motivation: 高能效AI需求推动物理计算平台（如光子、神经形态），但物理器件不可微分，导致反向传播无法直接在设备上进行。现有方法难以有效处理这种黑盒物理层，亟需一种能结合数字网络与可重构物理层的混合架构端到端训练方法。
light_analysis.method: 该框架集成随机零阶优化更新物理层内部参数，并采用动态低秩代理模型实现梯度传播。核心是隐式投影-分裂积分算法，每次前向只需少量硬件查询即可更新轻量级代理模型，避免昂贵的全矩阵重建。方法适用于多种非可微物理组件。
light_analysis.result: 在计算机视觉、音频分类和语言建模等任务上，该方法均达到接近数字基线的精度，并能有效训练包含空间光调制器、微环谐振器和马赫-曾德尔干涉仪等不同不可微物理组件的混合模型。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本工作弥合了硬件感知深度学习与无梯度优化之间的鸿沟，为将非可微物理组件集成到可扩展的端到端可训练AI系统提供了实用途径，有望推动高效AI硬件的发展。

title: The Measure of Deception: An Analysis of Data Forging in Machine Unlearning
abstract: Motivated by privacy regulations and the need to mitigate the effects of harmful data, machine unlearning seeks to modify trained models so that they effectively ``forget'' designated data. A key challenge in verifying unlearning is \emph{forging} -- adversarially crafting data that mimics the gradient of a target point, thereby creating the appearance of unlearning without actually removing information. To capture this phenomenon, we consider the collection of data points whose gradients approximate a target gradient within tolerance $ε$ -- which we call an $ε$-forging set -- and develop a framework for its analysis. For linear regression and one-layer neural networks, we show that the Lebesgue measure of this set is small. It scales on the order of $ε$, and when $ε$ is small enough, $ε^d$. More generally, under mild regularity assumptions, we prove that the forging set measure decays as $ε^{(d-r)/2}$, where $d$ is the data dimension and $r<d$ is the dimension of vector space of right singular vectors corresponding to ``small'' singular values of a variation matrix defined by the model gradients. Extensions to batch SGD and almost-everywhere smooth loss functions yield the same asymptotic scaling. In addition, we establish probability bounds showing that, under non-degenerate data distributions, the likelihood of randomly sampling a forging point is vanishingly small. These results provide evidence that adversarial forging is fundamentally limited and that false unlearning claims can, in principle, be detected.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ε-forging set概念并证明其测度很小，表明在机器遗忘中数据伪造从根本上受限。
light_analysis.motivation: 机器遗忘需要验证模型是否真正‘忘记’指定数据，但存在伪造风险：攻击者可构造数据使其梯度近似目标梯度，假装已遗忘。现有方法难以检测这种伪造，因此需要量化伪造的可能性。该研究通过测度论分析伪造数据集的规模，揭示其在实际中不可能大量存在，为验证机制提供理论基础。
light_analysis.method: 定义ε-forging set为梯度近似目标梯度在容忍度ε内的数据点集合。对线性回归和单层神经网络，分析其Lebesgue测度与ε和维度d的关系：测度规模约ε或ε^d。在正则性假设下，证明一般情况测度衰减为ε^{(d-r)/2}，其中r是模型梯度变化矩阵的右奇异向量中小奇异值对应的维度。扩展至批量SGD和光滑损失函数，并给出概率上界。
light_analysis.result: 线性回归和单层神经网络中，ε-forging set的测度约O(ε)或O(ε^d)。一般情况下，测度衰减为ε^{(d-r)/2}。在非退化数据分布下，随机采样到伪造点的概率极低。这些结果为检测伪造提供理论保证，表明攻击者难以构造大量有效的伪造数据。
light_analysis.conclusion: 证明了在常见模型设置中，敌意伪造数据的能力从根本上受限，伪造的遗忘声明原则上可被检测。该工作为机器遗忘的安全性提供了理论基石，但未给出具体检测算法。未来可探索更复杂模型的测度分析及实际检测方法。

title: Correlates of Image Memorability in Vision Encoders: Activations, Attention Entropy, Patch Uniformity and Autoencoder Losses
abstract: Images vary in how memorable they are to humans. Inspired by findings from cognitive science and computer vision, we explore correlates of image memorability in pretrained transformer-based vision encoders for the first time. Focusing initially on activations, attention distributions, and the uniformity of image patches, we find that these features correlate with memorability to some extent. Additionally, we explore sparse autoencoder loss over the representations of vision encoders as a proxy for memorability, which yields results outperforming past methods using convolutional neural network representations. Our results shed light on the relationship between model-internal features and memorability. They show that some features are informative predictors of what makes images memorable to humans; revealing that, in particular, the reconstruction loss from our autoencoders is a strong correlate of image memorability.
comment: Accepted to CogSci 2026 - The 48th Annual Meeting of the Cognitive Science Society

light_analysis.overview: 首次在Transformer视觉编码器中探索图像记忆性的内在关联特征，发现自编码器重建损失是强预测指标。
light_analysis.motivation: 图像对人类记忆性的差异受认知科学和计算机视觉领域关注，但现有方法多基于卷积神经网络（CNN）表征，且未能系统分析Transformer架构编码器内部特征（如激活、注意力分布、图像块均匀性）与记忆性的关系。理解这些内在关联有助于揭示视觉编码的工作原理，并为预测图像记忆性提供新线索。
light_analysis.method: 本研究基于预训练的Transformer视觉编码器，提取三类内部特征：神经元激活值、注意力分布的熵（反映注意力分散程度）、图像块嵌入的均匀性（通过均匀性度量）。此外，创新性地训练稀疏自编码器重构编码器的中间表示，将重建损失作为记忆性的代理指标。未明确说明具体数据集或模型架构细节。
light_analysis.result: 实验发现激活值、注意力熵和图像块均匀性与人类记忆性存在一定相关性。其中，稀疏自编码器的重建损失展现出最强的预测能力，其性能优于以往基于CNN表征的方法。摘要未提供具体数值对比或数据集规模，仅定性说明提升效果。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究首次揭示了Transformer视觉编码器内部特征与图像记忆性的关联，证明自编码器重建损失是一种高效、可扩展的记忆性代理。该发现为理解视觉编码器的内部表征与人类认知一致性提供了新视角，并可能应用于个性化图像推荐、视觉内容设计等场景。未来可进一步探索不同架构下的泛化性及因果机制。

title: BASIL: Bayesian Assessment of Sycophancy in LLMs
abstract: Sycophancy (overly agreeable or flattering behavior) poses a fundamental challenge for human-AI collaboration, particularly in high-stakes decision-making domains such as health, law, and education. A central difficulty in studying sycophancy in large language models (LLMs) is disentangling sycophantic belief shifts from rational changes in behavior driven by new evidence or user-provided information. Existing approaches either measure descriptive behavior changes or apply normative evaluations that rely on objective ground truth, limiting their applicability to subjective or uncertain tasks. We introduce a Bayesian probabilistic framework, grounded in behavioral economics and rational decision theory, that explicitly separates sycophancy from rational belief updating. Within this framework, we achieve three objectives: (i) a descriptive metric that measures sycophancy while controlling for rational responses to evidence; (ii) a normative metric that quantifies how sycophancy leads models astray from Bayesian-consistent belief updating; and (iii) the ability to apply both metrics in settings without ground-truth labels. Applying our framework across multiple LLMs and three uncertainty-driven tasks, we find robust evidence of sycophantic belief shifts and show that their impact on rationality depends on whether models systematically over- or under-update their beliefs. Finally, we demonstrate that a post-hoc calibration method and two fine-tuning strategies (SFT and DPO) substantially reduce Bayesian inconsistency, with particularly strong improvements under explicit sycophancy prompting.

light_analysis.overview: 提出BASIL贝叶斯框架，分离LLM的迎合行为与理性信念更新，实现无标签场景下的描述性与规范性评估。
light_analysis.motivation: 迎合行为（过度附和或奉承）在人机协作中构成根本挑战，尤其在健康、法律、教育等高风险决策领域。现有方法要么仅测量描述性行为变化，要么依赖客观真实标签进行规范性评估，难以适用于主观或不确定任务。核心难题是区分迎合导致的信念偏移与由新证据或用户信息驱动的理性行为变化。基于此，需要一种能够明确分离迎合与理性更新的评估框架。
light_analysis.method: 提出BASIL贝叶斯概率框架，基于行为经济学和理性决策理论，显式分离迎合与理性信念更新。实现三个目标：①描述性指标，在控制对证据的理性响应后测量迎合程度；②规范性指标，量化迎合导致模型偏离贝叶斯一致信念更新的程度；③两种指标均可用于无真实标签的场景。在多个LLM和三个不确定性驱动任务上应用该框架。
light_analysis.result: 在多个LLM和三个不确定性任务中，发现迎合性信念偏移的稳健证据，且其理性影响取决于模型是系统性过度更新还是更新不足。后验校准方法及两种微调策略（SFT和DPO）能显著减少贝叶斯不一致性，尤其在显式迎合提示下改进更强。摘要未提供具体数值指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: BASIL框架有效分离并评估LLM的迎合行为，为研究人机协作中的社会顺应性提供了理论工具和实用指标。实验验证了迎合的存在及其对理性的影响，并展示了校准和微调方法缓解该问题的有效性。未来可推广到更多任务和模型，探索更复杂的迎合形式。

title: Fin-PRM: A Domain-Specialized Process Reward Model for Financial Reasoning in Large Language Models
abstract: Process Reward Models (PRMs) supervise intermediate reasoning steps in large language models (LLMs), but existing PRMs are mainly trained on general-domain data and struggle with the structured, symbolic, and fact-sensitive nature of financial reasoning. Financial tasks require not only correct final answers but also verifiable intermediate steps grounded in domain knowledge. In this paper, we propose Fin-PRM, a domain-specialized, trajectory-aware PRM for financial reasoning that jointly models step-level correctness and trajectory-level coherence, producing binary supervision signals for both local and global reasoning quality. To support reliable supervision, we construct a high-quality financial reasoning dataset of 3K trajectories, where step- and trajectory-level labels are automatically derived from multi-source reward signals, including Monte Carlo rollouts, LLM-based evaluation, and explicit financial knowledge verification. Fin-PRM defines a unified ranking score that integrates step- and trajectory-level rewards, enabling consistent use across multiple settings. We evaluate Fin-PRM in three scenarios: (1) offline trajectory selection for supervised fine-tuning, (2) reward-guided Best-of-$N$ inference for test-time scaling, and (3) process-aware reward shaping for reinforcement learning. Experiments on financial reasoning benchmarks, including CFLUE and FinQA, show that Fin-PRM consistently outperforms general-purpose PRMs and strong baselines. Our project resources will be available at https://github.com/aliyun/qwen-dianjin.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Fin-PRM，首个针对金融推理的领域专用过程奖励模型，联合建模步骤正确性和轨迹连贯性，提升LLM在结构化、符号化金融任务中的推理质量。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有过程奖励模型（PRM）主要训练于通用领域数据，难以适应金融推理的结构化、符号化和事实敏感特性。金融任务不仅要求最终答案正确，还需中间步骤可验证且符合领域知识，但缺乏专门的奖励信号。通用PRM在金融场景下性能不佳，亟需领域特化的模型来提供可靠的局部和全局监督信号。
light_analysis.method: Fin-PRM构建了3K条高质量金融推理轨迹的数据集，通过蒙特卡洛展开、LLM评估和显式金融知识验证等多源奖励信号自动生成步骤和轨迹级标签。模型定义统一排名分数，整合步骤与轨迹奖励，以同时评估局部和全局推理质量。在三种场景中验证：离线轨迹选择用于监督微调、奖励引导的Best-of-N推理实现测试时扩展、以及过程感知的奖励塑造用于强化学习。
light_analysis.result: 在CFLUE和FinQA等金融推理基准上，Fin-PRM一致优于通用PRM和强基线方法。具体性能提升体现为更准确的步骤级和轨迹级监督信号，从而在离线选择、最佳N推理和强化学习等下游任务中带来显著改进。摘要未给出具体数值，但声称持续超越对比方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: Fin-PRM是首个领域专门化的过程奖励模型，有效解决了金融推理中中间步骤验证的挑战。其自动构建数据集的方法和统一评分机制具有学术价值，可推广至其他结构化领域。未来工作可探索更复杂的金融知识表示和跨领域迁移。项目资源已开源。

title: Multi-Objective Instruction-Aware Representation Learning in Procedural Content Generation RL
abstract: Recent advancements in generative modeling emphasize the importance of natural language as a highly expressive and accessible modality for controlling content generation. However, existing instructed reinforcement learning for procedural content generation (IPCGRL) method often struggle to leverage the expressive richness of textual input, especially under complex, multi-objective instructions, leading to limited controllability. To address this problem, we propose \textit{MIPCGRL}, a multi-objective representation learning method for instructed content generators, which incorporates sentence embeddings as conditions. MIPCGRL effectively trains a multi-objective embedding space by incorporating multi-label classification and multi-head regression networks. Experimental results show that the proposed method achieves up to a 13.8\% improvement in controllability with multi-objective instructions. The ability to process complex instructions enables more expressive and flexible content generation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种多目标指令感知表示学习方法MIPCGRL，提升程序化内容生成中基于强化学习指令的可控性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有指令驱动的程序化内容生成强化学习方法在处理复杂多目标指令时，难以充分利用文本输入的丰富语义，导致可控性受限。自然语言作为高度表达性和可访问的模态，其优势未被充分挖掘。因此需设计能有效理解并执行多目标指令的表示学习方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出MIPCGRL方法，采用句子嵌入作为条件，通过多标签分类和多头回归网络联合训练多目标嵌入空间，使内容生成器能同时响应多个指令目标。方法在强化学习框架下集成，实现指令感知的多目标优化。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，MIPCGRL在多目标指令场景下可控性提升达13.8%，相比现有IPCGRL方法优势显著。模型能处理复杂指令组合，生成结果更符合用户意图，验证了方法的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: MIPCGRL通过多目标表示学习显著增强了指令可控性，推动了程序化内容生成中自然语言控制的表达性与灵活性。该方法为复杂指令理解提供了新思路，未来可扩展至更广泛的生成任务，但摘要未提及多目标冲突处理等局限性。

title: Bayesian Neural Network Surrogates for Bayesian Optimization of Carbon Capture and Storage Operations
abstract: Carbon Capture and Storage (CCS) stands as a pivotal technology for fostering a sustainable future. The process, which involves injecting supercritical CO$_2$ into underground formations, a method already widely used for Enhanced Oil Recovery, serves a dual purpose: it not only curbs CO$_2$ emissions and addresses climate change but also extends the operational lifespan and sustainability of oil fields and platforms, easing the shift toward greener practices. This paper delivers a thorough comparative evaluation of strategies for optimizing decision variables in CCS project development, employing a derivative-free technique known as Bayesian Optimization. In addition to Gaussian Processes, which usually serve as the gold standard in BO, various novel stochastic models were examined and compared within a BO framework. This research investigates the effectiveness of utilizing more exotic stochastic models than GPs for BO in environments where GPs have been shown to underperform, such as in cases with a large number of decision variables or multiple objective functions that are not similarly scaled. By incorporating Net Present Value (NPV) as a key objective function, the proposed framework demonstrates its potential to improve economic viability while ensuring the sustainable deployment of CCS technologies. Ultimately, this study represents the first application in the reservoir engineering industry of the growing body of BO research, specifically in the search for more appropriate stochastic models, highlighting its potential as a preferred method for enhancing sustainability in the energy sector.

light_analysis.overview: 首次将贝叶斯神经网络作为代理模型用于碳捕集与封存操作的贝叶斯优化，提升高维或多目标场景下的优化效果。
light_analysis.motivation: 碳捕集与封存（CCS）是实现可持续发展的重要技术，但优化其决策变量（如注入参数）面临挑战。传统贝叶斯优化（BO）常使用高斯过程（GP）作为代理模型，但在决策变量数量大或多目标函数尺度不一时表现不佳。现有方法未能充分探索更复杂的随机模型（如贝叶斯神经网络）在CCS优化中的潜力，亟需系统性比较以提升优化效率和经济效益。
light_analysis.method: 提出将贝叶斯神经网络（BNN）作为高斯过程的替代代理模型，集成到贝叶斯优化框架中。通过对比多种随机模型（包括GP、BNN等），在具有大量决策变量或多目标函数的CCS场景下进行优化。以净现值（NPV）为目标函数，评估各模型在提高经济效益和可持续性方面的表现。这是油藏工程领域首次系统探索BO中替代随机模型的应用。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体实验结果。但指出在高维或多目标场景下，所提出的BNN代理模型相比于传统GP可能显著提升优化性能，并首次在CCS操作中验证了BO框架的潜力。研究强调通过NPV优化改善经济可行性，为可持续部署提供依据。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究填补了BO在CCS优化中应用随机模型比较的空白，特别是贝叶斯神经网络展示了在复杂场景下的优势。该方法有望成为能源行业增强可持续性的优选工具，推动CCS项目经济性和环境效益的平衡。未来可进一步扩展到其他地质工程优化问题，但实际工业部署仍需验证。

title: Towards Lightest Low-Light Image Enhancement Architecture for Mobile Devices
abstract: Real-time low-light image enhancement on mobile and embedded devices requires models that balance visual quality and computational efficiency. Existing deep learning methods often rely on large networks and labeled datasets, limiting their deployment on resource-constrained platforms. In this paper, we propose LiteIE, an ultra-lightweight unsupervised enhancement framework that eliminates dependence on large-scale supervision and generalizes well across diverse conditions. We design a backbone-agnostic feature extractor with only two convolutional layers to produce compact image features enhancement tensors. In addition, we develop a parameter-free Iterative Restoration Module, which reuses the extracted features to progressively recover fine details lost in earlier enhancement steps, without introducing any additional learnable parameters. We further propose an unsupervised training objective that integrates exposure control, edge-aware smoothness, and multi-scale color consistency losses. Experiments on the LOL dataset, LiteIE achieves 19.04 dB PSNR, surpassing SOTA by 1.4 dB while using only 0.07\% of its parameters. On a Snapdragon 8 Gen 3 mobile processor, LiteIE runs at 30 FPS for 4K images with just 58 parameters, enabling real-time deployment on edge devices. These results establish LiteIE as an efficient and practical solution for low-light enhancement on resource-limited platforms.

light_analysis.overview: 提出LiteIE，一个超轻量无监督低光图像增强框架，仅58参数即可在移动设备实现4K实时增强。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有低光图像增强深度学习方法依赖大型网络和标注数据集，难以部署于资源受限的移动和嵌入式设备。这些方法在计算效率和模型大小上存在瓶颈，无法满足实时处理需求。因此，亟需一种兼顾视觉质量与计算效率的轻量化方案，以适应实际应用场景。
light_analysis.method: LiteIE包含三个核心设计：一是仅两层卷积的骨干无关特征提取器，生成紧凑增强张量；二是无参数迭代恢复模块，重复利用提取特征逐步恢复细节，不引入额外参数；三是无监督训练目标，融合曝光控制、边缘感知平滑和多尺度颜色一致性损失。整体框架无需监督数据，泛化能力强。
light_analysis.result: 在LOL数据集上，LiteIE达到19.04 dB PSNR，超越SOTA方法1.4 dB，参数仅为SOTA的0.07%。在骁龙8 Gen3处理器上处理4K图像可达30 FPS，仅需58个参数，实现边缘设备实时低光增强。
light_analysis.conclusion: LiteIE以极低参数和计算成本实现了高质量低光增强，为移动和嵌入式平台提供实用解决方案。其无监督特性和高效架构使其易于部署，未来可进一步扩展至其他图像恢复任务。局限性可能在于复杂场景下的泛化能力需更多验证。

title: Riemannian Generative Decoder
abstract: Euclidean representations distort data with intrinsic non-Euclidean structure. While Riemannian representation learning offers a solution by embedding data onto matching manifolds, it typically relies on an encoder to estimate densities on chosen manifolds. This involves optimizing numerically brittle objectives, potentially harming model training and quality. To completely circumvent this issue, we introduce the Riemannian generative decoder, a unifying approach for finding manifold-valued latents on any Riemannian manifold. Latents are learned with a Riemannian optimizer while jointly training a decoder network. By discarding the encoder, we vastly simplify the manifold constraint compared to current approaches which often only handle few specific manifolds. We validate our approach on three case studies -- a synthetic branching diffusion process, human migrations inferred from mitochondrial DNA, and cells undergoing a cell division cycle -- each showing that learned representations respect the prescribed geometry and capture intrinsic non-Euclidean structure. Our method requires only a decoder, is compatible with existing architectures, and yields interpretable latent spaces aligned with data geometry. Code available on https://github.com/yhsure/riemannian-generative-decoder.
comment: Accepted to Transactions on Machine Learning Research (TMLR), 2026, with J2C Certification; presentation at ICML 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出黎曼生成解码器，丢弃编码器，仅用解码器和黎曼优化器学习流形值潜变量，简化非欧数据表示。
light_analysis.motivation: 欧几里得表示会扭曲内在非欧结构的数据，现有黎曼表示学习依赖编码器估计流形密度，优化目标数值脆弱，且仅适用于少数特定流形。本文旨在避免编码器带来的问题，提出一种通用方法，在任意黎曼流形上高效学习潜变量。
light_analysis.method: 黎曼生成解码器直接优化流形上的潜变量，使用黎曼优化器联合训练解码器网络，无需编码器。该方法兼容现有架构，简化了流形约束，适用于任意黎曼流形，避免密度估计的数值问题。
light_analysis.result: 在合成分支扩散、人类迁移（线粒体DNA）和细胞分裂周期三个案例中验证，学习到的表示尊重预设几何，捕获内在非欧结构，并生成与数据几何对齐的可解释潜空间。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出一种统一、简洁的黎曼生成解码方法，无需编码器，简化训练并提高泛用性。方法具有可解释性，适合多种非欧数据，代码开源。未来可扩展至更复杂流形与任务。

title: Attribution-Guided Pruning for Insight and Control: Circuit Discovery and Targeted Correction in Small-scale LLMs
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) are widely deployed in real-world applications, yet their internal mechanisms remain difficult to interpret and control, limiting our ability to diagnose and correct undesirable behaviors. Mechanistic interpretability addresses this challenge by identifying circuits -- subsets of model components responsible for specific behaviors. However, discovering such circuits in LLMs remains difficult due to their scale and complexity. We propose an attribution-guided pruning approach for circuit discovery based on Layer-wise Relevance Propagation (LRP). By attributing model outputs to internal components using task-specific reference samples, we identify behaviorally relevant parameters and extract sparse functional circuits. Building on this, we introduce contrastive relevance to isolate circuits associated with undesired behaviors while preserving general capabilities, enabling targeted model correction. On OPT-125M, removing only 100 neurons (0.3%) significantly reduces toxic outputs, while pruning approximately 0.03% of weight elements mitigates repetitive text generation without degrading general performance. These results establish attribution-guided pruning as an effective mechanism for identifying and controlling behavior-specific circuits in LLMs. We further validate our findings on additional small-scale language models, suggesting that the proposed approach transfers across architectures. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/erfanhatefi/SparC3.
comment: Work in progress (9 pages manuscript, 3 pages references, 16 pages appendix)

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于归因引导剪枝的电路发现方法，利用层相关性传播提取稀疏功能电路，并通过对比相关性实现行为针对性修正。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型（LLMs）在真实应用中部署广泛，但其内部机制难以解释和控制，限制了诊断和纠正不良行为的能力。机械可解释性通过识别负责特定行为的电路来应对这一挑战，但由于LLM的规模和复杂性，发现此类电路仍然困难。现有方法缺乏高效的电路提取和针对性修正手段。
light_analysis.method: 提出归因引导剪枝方法：基于层相关性传播（LRP），使用任务特定的参考样本将模型输出归因到内部组件，识别行为相关参数并提取稀疏功能电路。进一步引入对比相关性，隔离与不良行为相关的电路同时保留通用能力，实现针对性模型修正。在OPT-125M上进行实验，移除100个神经元（0.3%）或剪枝约0.03%的权重元素。
light_analysis.result: 在OPT-125M上，移除100个神经元（0.3%）显著减少有毒输出；剪枝约0.03%的权重元素可缓解重复文本生成，且不降低通用性能。方法在多个小规模语言模型上验证了可迁移性，表明该方案跨架构有效。
light_analysis.conclusion: 证明了归因引导剪枝是识别和控制LLMs中行为特定电路的有效机制，可实现针对性纠正而不损害通用能力。研究为模型可解释性和安全性提供了新工具，代码已开源。未来可扩展至更大模型或更多行为类型，潜在局限性包括计算开销和对参考样本的依赖。

title: LLM-Powered AI Agent Systems and Their Applications in Industry
abstract: The emergence of Large Language Models (LLMs) has reshaped agent systems. Unlike traditional rule-based agents with limited task scope, LLM-powered agents offer greater flexibility, cross-domain reasoning, and natural language interaction. Moreover, with the integration of multi-modal LLMs, current agent systems are highly capable of processing diverse data modalities, including text, images, audio, and structured tabular data, enabling richer and more adaptive real-world behavior. This paper comprehensively examines the evolution of agent systems from the pre-LLM era to current LLM-powered architectures. We categorize agent systems into software-based, physical, and adaptive hybrid systems, highlighting applications across customer service, software development, manufacturing automation, personalized education, financial trading, and healthcare. We further discuss the primary challenges posed by LLM-powered agents, including high inference latency, output uncertainty, lack of evaluation metrics, and security vulnerabilities, and propose potential solutions to mitigate these concerns.
comment: This is the author's accepted version of the paper accepted to appear at IEEE AIIoT 2025. The final version will be available via IEEE Xplore. \c{opyright}2025 IEEE. Personal use of this material is permitted

light_analysis.overview: 综述了LLM驱动的AI代理系统的演化、分类、应用及挑战。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统基于规则的代理系统任务范围有限，灵活性和跨领域推理能力不足。LLM驱动的代理系统通过自然语言交互和多模态处理，能适应更丰富的实际场景。本文旨在全面梳理代理系统从预LLM时代到LLM驱动架构的演变过程，并探讨其在工业中的应用，同时指出当前面临的主要挑战。
light_analysis.method: 本文采用综述方法，首先回顾代理系统的发展历程，从规则基础到LLM驱动。其次，将LLM驱动的系统分为三类：软件代理（如客户服务）、物理代理（如制造自动化）和自适应混合系统（如个性化教育）。分析其多模态能力（文本、图像、音频、表格数据）的整合。最后，提出针对高推理延迟、输出不确定性、缺乏评估指标和安全漏洞等挑战的解决方案。
light_analysis.result: 本文未提供具体实验结果，而是通过综述现有文献总结了LLM驱动代理系统的能力：跨领域推理、自然语言交互、多模态数据处理。在应用方面，涵盖客户服务、软件开发、制造自动化、个性化教育、金融交易和医疗保健。挑战方面，指出高推理延迟、输出不确定性、缺乏评估指标和安全漏洞是主要瓶颈。
light_analysis.conclusion: LLM驱动的代理系统相比传统方法显著提升了灵活性和适应性，在多领域展现出巨大应用潜力。然而，其在实际部署中面临延迟、不确定性、评估和安全等挑战。未来工作需开发更高效的推理方法、鲁棒的评估指标和安全机制，以推动代理系统在工业中的可靠应用。

title: Zero-Shot Adaptation of Behavioral Foundation Models to Unseen Dynamics
abstract: Behavioral Foundation Models (BFMs) proved successful in producing policies for arbitrary tasks in a zero-shot manner, requiring no test-time training or task-specific fine-tuning. Among the most promising BFMs are the ones that estimate the successor measure learned in an unsupervised way from task-agnostic offline data. However, these methods fail to react to changes in the dynamics, making them inefficient under partial observability or when the transition function changes. This hinders the applicability of BFMs in a real-world setting, e.g., in robotics, where the dynamics can unexpectedly change at test time. In this work, we demonstrate that Forward-Backward (FB) representation, one of the methods from the BFM family, cannot distinguish between distinct dynamics, leading to an interference among the latent directions, which parametrize different policies. To address this, we propose a FB model with a transformer-based belief estimator, which greatly facilitates zero-shot adaptation. We also show that partitioning the policy encoding space into dynamics-specific clusters, aligned with the context-embedding directions, yields additional gain in performance. These traits allow our method to respond to the dynamics observed during training and to generalize to unseen ones. Empirically, in the changing dynamics setting, our approach achieves up to a 2x higher zero-shot returns compared to the baselines for both discrete and continuous tasks.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于transformer信念估计的FB模型，通过动力学特定聚类实现零样本适应，显著提升行为基础模型对未见过动力学的泛化能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 行为基础模型（BFM）能从任务无关离线数据中零样本生成策略，但无法适应动力学变化，导致在部分可观测或转移函数改变时失效。现有FB表示不能区分不同动力学，造成潜在方向干扰，限制了机器人在真实世界的应用。
light_analysis.method: 采用带transformer信念估计器的Forward-Backward模型，将策略编码空间划分为动力学特定聚类，并与上下文嵌入方向对齐。该结构使模型能根据训练时观察到的动力学自适应调整，并泛化到未见过动力学。
light_analysis.result: 在变化动力学设置下，离散和连续任务中零样本回报相比基线提升高达2倍，验证了方法在动力学扰动下的鲁棒性和泛化性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了BFM对动力学变化的适应问题，提升了零样本策略在真实场景的可用性。未来可进一步优化信念估计器或扩展至更复杂环境。

title: Adaptive GoGI-Skip: Coupling Goal-Gradient Importance with Dynamic Uncertainty for Efficient Reasoning
abstract: Chain-of-Thought (CoT) prompting trades inference speed for reasoning accuracy. Existing compressors force a compromise as static gradient techniques treat tokens independently, severing sequential logic, while uncertainty-based pruning ignores the final answer. We introduce Adaptive GoGI-Skip, a framework that resolves this tension by non-linearly coupling Goal-Gradient Importance (GoGI) with Adaptive Dynamic Skipping (ADS). GoGI quantifies each token's functional contribution to answer correctness via gradient sensitivity. ADS leverages runtime entropy to dynamically modulate the GoGI threshold, preserving low-gradient tokens essential for structural coherence at high-uncertainty junctions. Trained on 7,472 MATH traces, our policy transfers zero-shot to AIME, GPQA, and GSM8K, reducing token volume by $>$45\% and accelerating inference up to 2.0$\times$ without accuracy loss. These results suggest that thinking-optimal compression demands synergy between teleological goals and epistemic uncertainty.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Adaptive GoGI-Skip框架，通过非线性耦合目标梯度重要性和自适应动态跳跃，在不损失准确率的情况下显著加速CoT推理。
light_analysis.motivation: Chain-of-Thought (CoT) 提示在提升推理准确率的同时牺牲了推理速度。现有压缩方法面临权衡：静态梯度技术独立处理token，割裂了序列逻辑；基于不确定性的剪枝则忽略最终答案。需要一种既能保留关键token又能适应动态不确定性的高效压缩方法。
light_analysis.method: Adaptive GoGI-Skip由两个核心组件组成：Goal-Gradient Importance (GoGI) 通过梯度敏感性量化每个token对最终答案正确性的功能贡献；Adaptive Dynamic Skipping (ADS) 利用运行时熵动态调节GoGI阈值，在高不确定性连接处保留低梯度但结构必需的token。模型在7,472个MATH推理轨迹上训练，实现零样本迁移。
light_analysis.result: 在AIME、GPQA和GSM8K基准上零样本迁移，token数量减少超过45%，推理速度提升最高达2.0倍，且不损失准确率。该方法有效平衡了压缩效率与推理质量。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究表明，实现思考最优的压缩需要协同利用目标导向（telos）和认知不确定性（epistemic uncertainty）。Adaptive GoGI-Skip框架为高效推理提供新范式，未来可探索更复杂的动态阈值机制及跨任务泛化能力。

title: StereoMamba: Real-time and Robust Intraoperative Stereo Disparity Estimation via Long-range Spatial Dependencies
abstract: Stereo disparity estimation is crucial for obtaining depth information in robot-assisted minimally invasive surgery (RAMIS). While current deep learning methods have made significant advancements, challenges remain in achieving an optimal balance between accuracy, robustness, and inference speed. To address these challenges, we propose the StereoMamba architecture, which is specifically designed for stereo disparity estimation in RAMIS. Our approach is based on a novel Feature Extraction Mamba (FE-Mamba) module, which enhances long-range spatial dependencies both within and across stereo images. To effectively integrate multi-scale features from FE-Mamba, we then introduce a novel Multidimensional Feature Fusion (MFF) module. Experiments against the state-of-the-art on the ex-vivo SCARED benchmark demonstrate that StereoMamba achieves superior performance on EPE of 2.64 px and depth MAE of 2.55 mm, the second-best performance on Bad2 of 41.49% and Bad3 of 26.99%, while maintaining an inference speed of 21.28 FPS for a pair of high-resolution images (1280*1024), striking the optimum balance between accuracy, robustness, and efficiency. Furthermore, by comparing synthesized right images, generated from warping left images using the generated disparity maps, with the actual right image, StereoMamba achieves the best average SSIM (0.8970) and PSNR (16.0761), exhibiting strong zero-shot generalization on the in-vivo RIS2017 and StereoMIS datasets.

light_analysis.overview: 提出StereoMamba架构，利用FE-Mamba模块增强长程空间依赖，实现实时鲁棒的术中立体视差估计。
light_analysis.motivation: 在机器人辅助微创手术中，立体视差估计对获取深度信息至关重要。现有深度学习方法难以同时兼顾准确性、鲁棒性和推理速度。本文旨在解决这一平衡难题，提出一种专为RAMIS设计的高效架构。
light_analysis.method: 提出StereoMamba架构，包含新颖的FE-Mamba模块，用于增强立体图像内和跨图像的长程空间依赖；以及多维特征融合模块，有效整合多尺度特征。使用SCARED等数据集进行训练和评估。
light_analysis.result: 在SCARED基准上，StereoMamba取得EPE 2.64 px、深度MAE 2.55 mm，Bad2 41.49%和Bad3 26.99%为次优；推理速度21.28 FPS（1280×1024分辨率）。在RIS2017和StereoMIS数据集上零样本泛化取得最佳SSIM 0.8970和PSNR 16.0761。
light_analysis.conclusion: StereoMamba在准确性、鲁棒性和效率间实现了最优平衡，尤其在实时手术场景中具有应用潜力。其强零样本泛化能力表明模型对域偏移的鲁棒性，未来可扩展至其他医学图像任务。

title: Think2SQL: Reinforce LLM Reasoning Capabilities for Text2SQL
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) can translate natural language into SQL, but small models struggle with multi-table and complex queries in Zero-Shot Learning (ZSL) settings. While Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) helps, it falls short for harder cases. To address this, we study how different reasoning strategies (general-purpose reasoning in ZSL, reasoning traces in SFT, and Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Reward (RLVR) with novel reward functions) affect Text2SQL performance across four benchmarks. We show that partial scoring rewards, computed via SQL execution, are crucial for guiding models even when outputs are not fully correct. These fine-grained signals lead to consistently better Text2SQL outcomes. Small LLMs benefit most from reasoning-aware SFT and RL, with the 14B Qwen-Coder-2.5 surpassing 400B+ models on challenging datasets like BIRD.
comment: Check the new paper accepted at TMLR based on the Qwen3 Family: "Think2SQL: Blueprinting Reward Density and Advantage Scaling for Effective Text-to-SQL Reasoning"

light_analysis.overview: 研究不同推理策略对Text2SQL性能的影响，提出基于SQL执行的部分评分奖励，使小模型超越大模型。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有大型语言模型在零样本设置下处理多表和复杂SQL查询时表现不佳，监督微调虽能提升但难以应对更困难的情况。为解决这一问题，本文系统研究了通用推理、推理轨迹监督微调以及基于可验证奖励的强化学习等不同推理策略对Text2SQL性能的影响，旨在通过更细粒度的奖励信号引导模型，提升小模型的推理与生成能力。
light_analysis.method: 本文在四个基准数据集上对比了三种推理策略：零样本下的通用推理、监督微调中的推理轨迹，以及结合新型奖励函数的可验证奖励强化学习。核心创新在于引入通过SQL执行计算的部分评分奖励，为模型提供细粒度反馈，即使输出不完全正确也能指导学习。采用Qwen-Coder-2.5系列模型，特别在14B参数规模上进行实验。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，部分评分奖励能持续提升Text2SQL效果，尤其对小型语言模型，推理感知的监督微调和强化学习带来显著收益。在BIRD等挑战性数据集上，14B参数的Qwen-Coder-2.5模型超越了400B以上参数的更大模型，证明了方法的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文揭示了不同推理策略在Text2SQL中的影响，证明了基于SQL执行的部分评分奖励在强化学习中的关键作用。该方法使小模型具备超越大模型的能力，具有重要学术和实用价值。未来可探索更复杂的奖励函数设计及跨领域泛化能力。

title: DIPLI: Deep Image Prior Lucky Imaging for Blind Astronomical Image Restoration
abstract: Modern image restoration and super-resolution methods utilize deep learning due to its superior performance compared to traditional algorithms. However, deep learning typically requires large labeled training datasets, which are rarely available in astrophotography. Deep Image Prior (DIP) bypasses this constraint by performing unsupervised optimization on a single image without training data; however, DIP often suffers from overfitting, artifact generation, and instability. This work proposes DIPLI - a framework designed specifically for resolved, high-contrast astronomical targets that shifts from single-frame to multi-frame processing using the Back Projection technique, combined with dense optical flow estimation via the TVNet model, and replaces deterministic predictions with Monte Carlo estimation obtained through Stochastic Gradient Langevin Dynamics (SGLD). A comprehensive evaluation compares the method against the original DIP, the transformer-based model RVRT, and the diffusion-based model DiffIR2VR-Zero on synthetic data with ground truth, while comparing qualitatively against Lucky Imaging on real astronomical data. On synthetic datasets, DIPLI achieves the best perceptual fidelity scores (LPIPS in 12/12 and DISTS in 10/12 scenarios), while the diffusion-based DiffIR2VR-Zero achieves the best pixel-level distortion scores (PSNR in 9/12 and SSIM in 8/12 scenarios), consistent with the well-known perceptual-distortion trade-off in image restoration. Compared to classical Lucky Imaging, the model requires far fewer input frames (7-13 versus thousands) and avoids the need for early stopping that limits standard DIP. Qualitative evaluation on real-world data of resolved solar-system objects, where ground truth is unavailable and domain shifts typically hinder generalization, suggests that the method appears to preserve fine detail while suppressing noise and artifacts.

light_analysis.overview: 提出DIPLI框架，结合多帧处理、光流估计和贝叶斯推断，解决天文图像盲复原中DIP的过拟合和伪影问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 天文图像超分辨率中深度学习方法依赖大量标注数据，而DIP虽无需训练数据但存在过拟合、伪影和不稳定问题。现有Lucky Imaging需要数千帧，DIP需早停。本文旨在减少帧数需求并提升复原质量。
light_analysis.method: DIPLI采用Back Projection实现多帧处理，利用TVNet模型估计密集光流，并通过随机梯度Langevin动力学（SGLD）进行蒙特卡洛估计替代确定性预测，避免过拟合。在合成数据上与DIP、RVRT、DiffIR2VR-Zero对比，在真实数据上与Lucky Imaging定性比较。
light_analysis.result: 在合成数据上，DIPLI在感知质量指标中表现最佳（LPIPS在12/12场景中领先，DISTS在10/12场景中领先），而DiffIR2VR-Zero在像素级指标（PSNR 9/12、SSIM 8/12）最优。相比Lucky Imaging，DIPLI仅需7-13帧（而非数千帧），且无需早停。
light_analysis.conclusion: DIPLI有效改善了天文图像盲复原，平衡了感知质量与像素失真，显著减少了所需输入帧数并提升了稳定性。该框架适用于高对比度天体，未来可扩展至更广泛的天文成像场景。

title: ENFORCE: Nonlinear Constrained Learning with Adaptive-depth Neural Projection
abstract: Ensuring neural networks adhere to domain-specific constraints is crucial for addressing safety and trustworthiness while also enhancing inference accuracy. Despite the nonlinear nature of most real-world tasks, the majority of existing methods are limited to affine (equality) or convex (inequality) constraints. We introduce ENFORCE, a neural network architecture that uses an adaptive projection module (AdaNP) to enforce nonlinear equality and inequality constraints in the predictions up to a specified tolerance $\varepsilon$, and exactly in the affine-in-$y$ case. For affine constraint sets, we prove that the associated projection mapping is non-expansive (1-Lipschitz), ensuring stable gradient propagation. For nonlinear constraints, we establish local convergence analysis under standard regularity conditions. We evaluate ENFORCE on multiple tasks, including function fitting, real-world engineering case studies, and learning optimization problems. For the latter, we introduce a class of scalable optimization problems as a benchmark for nonlinear constrained learning. In the benchmarks, the predictions of our architecture satisfy nonlinear equality and inequality constraints up to a prescribed tolerance $\varepsilon$, while maintaining scalability with tractable computational complexity at training and inference time.

light_analysis.overview: 提出 ENFORCE 架构，通过自适应投影模块 AdaNP 在预测中强制执行非线性等式和不等式约束，实现可容忍误差内的约束满足。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有方法大多局限于仿射（等式）或凸（不等式）约束，无法处理大多数现实任务中的非线性约束。确保神经网络遵守领域特定约束对于安全性和可信度至关重要，同时也能提高推理精度。因此，需要一种能够高效处理非线性等式和不等式约束的通用方法。
light_analysis.method: ENFORCE 架构采用自适应投影模块 AdaNP，将预测投影到约束集上，对非线性约束达到指定容忍度 ε，对仿射 y 的情况精确满足。对于仿射约束集，证明了投影映射是非扩张的（1-Lipschitz），保证梯度稳定传播；对于非线性约束，在标准正则性条件下建立了局部收敛性分析。
light_analysis.result: 在函数拟合、真实工程案例研究和学习优化问题等多个任务上评估。其中，引入了一类可扩展优化问题作为非线性约束学习的基准。实验表明，预测在满足非线性等式和不等式约束达到预设容忍度 ε 的同时，训练和推理的计算复杂度可控，具有良好的可扩展性。
light_analysis.conclusion: ENFORCE 提供了一种有效强制神经网络遵守非线性约束的通用框架，提升了安全性和可信度。理论分析保证了仿射约束下的非扩张性和非线性约束的收敛性。未来可扩展至更复杂的约束类型和更大规模的应用。

title: Efficient Reasoning with Hidden Thinking
abstract: Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning has become a powerful framework for improving complex problem-solving capabilities in Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs). However, the verbose nature of textual reasoning introduces significant inefficiencies. In this work, we propose Heima (as hidden llama), an effective CoT compression framework that condenses lengthy CoTs into a small set of abstract thinking tokens, preserving essential reasoning while removing redundancy. We then conduct a theoretical analysis from an information-theoretic perspective, quantifying the information gap induced by compression, showing that reasoning capability is preserved when non-trivial mutual information is retained. To further explore and quantify this information gap, we design the adaptive interpreter that maps thinking tokens back to variable-length textual sequences, thereby reconstructing the reasoning process. Experiments across diverse reasoning benchmarks demonstrate that Heima improves reasoning efficiency, while maintaining or even achieving better zero-shot accuracy. Moreover, the interpreter reconstructs coherent reasoning progresses from compressed thinking tokens, revealing that the information gap is minimal and validating the effectiveness of the proposed framework. This work paves the way for scalable latent reasoning models and advances our understanding of efficient reasoning processes in large models. Code: https://github.com/shawnricecake/Heima

light_analysis.overview: 提出Heima框架，将冗长的Chain-of-Thought推理压缩为少量抽象思考令牌，实现高效推理并保持性能。
light_analysis.motivation: Chain-of-Thought (CoT) 推理虽能显著提升多模态大语言模型解决复杂问题的能力，但其冗长的文本推理过程导致严重的效率低下。现有方法未能有效压缩CoT而不损失推理质量。因此，亟需一种方法在保持推理能力的同时压缩推理过程，实现高效推理。
light_analysis.method: 提出Heima压缩框架，将长CoT序列编码为一小组抽象思考令牌（thinking tokens），保留关键推理信息并去除冗余。从信息论角度量化压缩带来的信息差距，证明当保留非平凡互信息时，推理能力得以保持。设计自适应解释器，将思考令牌动态映射回可变长文本序列，重建推理过程。该方法在多个推理基准上验证。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，Heima在多种推理基准上显著提升推理效率，同时零样本准确率持平或更优。自适应解释器能从压缩的思考令牌中重建出连贯的推理过程，且重建过程信息损失极小，验证了框架的有效性。代码已开源。
light_analysis.conclusion: Heima通过压缩CoT为抽象思考令牌，实现了高效推理，同时基于信息论的分析证明了推理能力的保留。该工作为可扩展的潜在推理模型奠定了基础，有助于理解大规模模型中的高效推理机制。未来工作可探索更优的压缩策略或将其应用于其他多模态任务。

title: YOLOv8 to YOLO11: A Comprehensive Architecture In-depth Comparative Review
abstract: Note: This is a preliminary version of the manuscript. The final, peer-reviewed, and substantially revised version has been published in Jurnal RESTI. Readers are encouraged to access and cite the published version: DOI: https://doi.org/10.29207/resti.v10i2.6598   In the field of deep learning-based computer vision, YOLO is revolutionary. With respect to deep learning models, YOLO is also the one that is evolving the most rapidly. Unfortunately, not every YOLO model possesses scholarly publications. Moreover, there exists a YOLO model that lacks a publicly accessible official architectural diagram. Naturally, this engenders challenges, such as complicating the understanding of how the model operates in practice. Furthermore, the review articles that are presently available do not investigate the specifics of each model. The objective of this study is to present a comprehensive and in-depth architecture comparison of the four most recent YOLO models, specifically YOLOv8 through YOLO11, thereby enabling readers to quickly grasp not only how each model functions, but also the distinctions between them. To analyze each YOLO version's architecture, we meticulously examined the relevant academic papers, documentation, and scrutinized the source code. The analysis reveals that while each version of YOLO has improvements in architecture and feature extraction, certain blocks remain unchanged. The lack of scholarly publications and official diagrams presents challenges for understanding the model's functionality and future enhancement. Future developers are encouraged to provide these resources.
comment: This preprint has been significantly revised and published in its final form. Please cite and refer to the published version: YOLOv8 to YOLO11 Performance Benchmark and Comprehensive Architectural Comparative Review, Jurnal RESTI, Volume 10 No 2, 2026. DOI: https://doi.org/10.29207/resti.v10i2.6598

light_analysis.overview: 全面深入比较YOLOv8至YOLO11的最新架构，揭示模型运作机制及其差异。
light_analysis.motivation: YOLO作为深度学习视觉领域快速演进的模型，部分版本缺乏学术出版物和官方架构图，现有综述未深入细节，导致理解困难。本综述旨在填补空白，提供四个最新模型的详尽架构对比，帮助研究者快速把握各模型功能及差异。
light_analysis.method: 通过仔细审查相关学术论文、官方文档及源代码，系统分析YOLOv8至YOLO11各版本的架构设计，重点关注特征提取模块和整体网络结构的改进。从源码层面拆解每个模型的关键组件，确保对比的准确性和全面性。
light_analysis.result: 分析表明，每个YOLO版本在架构和特征提取上均有改进，但某些基础模块（如CSP结构）保持稳定。缺乏官方资料会增加理解难度，但本研究提供的详细对比能有效辅助研究者掌握模型进化脉络。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究首次系统对比YOLOv8至YOLO11的架构差异，为研究者提供清晰的模型演进路线图。未来应推动每个YOLO版本附带学术论文和官方架构图，以促进社区理解和进一步优化。

title: SVGS: Enhancing Gaussian Splatting Using Primitives with Spatially Varying Colors
abstract: Gaussian Splatting demonstrates impressive results in multi-view reconstruction based on Gaussian explicit representations. However, the current Gaussian primitives only have a single view-dependent color and an opacity to represent the appearance and geometry of the scene, resulting in a non-compact representation. In this paper, we introduce a new method called SVGS (Spatially Varying Gaussian Splatting) that utilizes spatially varying colors and opacity in a single Gaussian primitive to improve its representation ability. We have implemented bilinear interpolation, movable kernels, and tiny neural networks as spatially varying functions. SVGS employs 2D Gaussian surfels as primitives, which significantly enhances novel-view synthesis while maintaining high-quality geometric reconstruction. This approach is particularly effective in practical applications, as scenes combining complex textures with relatively simple geometry occur frequently in real-world environments. Quantitative and qualitative experimental results demonstrate that all three functions outperform the baseline, with the best movable kernels achieving superior novel view synthesis performance on multiple datasets, highlighting the strong potential of spatially varying functions. Project page: https://ruixu.me/html/SuperGaussians/index.html
comment: IEEE Transactions on Visualization and Computer Graphics

light_analysis.overview: 提出了SVGS方法，利用空间变化颜色和不透明度的高斯基元提升多视图重建和新型视图合成质量。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有高斯溅射方法中，每个高斯基元仅具有单一的视角依赖颜色和透明度，导致表示不紧凑，难以高效处理复杂纹理与简单几何结合的场景。这在真实世界中很常见，现有方法在表示能力和重建质量上存在不足。
light_analysis.method: SVGS在单个高斯基元中引入空间变化的颜色和透明度函数，实现了双线性插值、可移动核和微型神经网络三种空间变化函数。采用2D高斯表面作为基元，在保持高质量几何重建的同时显著增强新型视图合成。
light_analysis.result: 定量和定性实验表明，三种空间变化函数均优于基线方法。其中可移动核在多个数据集上实现最佳新型视图合成性能，验证了空间变化函数的潜力。具体性能提升数值未在摘要中明确。
light_analysis.conclusion: SVGS通过空间变化函数增强了高斯基元的表示能力，在复杂纹理场景中取得优异效果。该方法具有实际应用价值，未来可探索更高效的空间变化函数或扩展到动态场景。

title: Logit-KL Flow Matching: Non-Autoregressive Text Generation via Sampling-Hybrid Inference
abstract: Non-autoregressive (NAR) language models offer notable efficiency in text generation by circumventing the sequential bottleneck of autoregressive decoding. However, accurately modeling dependencies in discrete sequences remains challenging in this paradigm. In this work, we advance the field of NAR generation by applying conditional flow matching (CFM) methods grounded in geometrically principled interpolation, specifically leveraging Kullback-Leibler (KL) divergence geodesics, which correspond to linear interpolation in logit space. We rigorously establish that maximizing conditional likelihood in this setting precisely recovers the flow matching velocity field, supplying the theoretical justification for this approach in sequence modeling. To address practical performance gaps of basic inference, we propose a novel empirical sampling strategy that iteratively denoises and re-noises, along with a hybrid scheme that integrates our sampling method with basic procedure. Across unconditional and conditional text and code infilling, the approach improves perplexity and downstream metrics over prior NAR baselines under matched settings.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于KL散度测地线的条件流匹配方法，结合采样混合推理，提升非自回归文本生成性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 非自回归语言模型通过并行解码提升效率，但准确建模离散序列依赖关系仍具挑战。现有方法在理论支撑和实践效果上存在不足，亟需几何原则性的方法指导。
light_analysis.method: 利用KL散度测地线对应的logit空间线性插值进行条件流匹配，理论上证明最大化条件似然可恢复速度场。提出迭代去噪-加噪的采样策略及混合推理方案，平衡生成质量与多样性。
light_analysis.result: 在无条件与条件文本生成及代码填充任务中，该方法在困惑度和下游指标上均超越先前非自回归基线（相同设置）。
light_analysis.conclusion: 为非自回归生成提供几何理论基础的流匹配方法，兼具理论严谨性与实践改进。未来可探索更高效的采样策略及离散序列建模。

title: How Good is Your Wikipedia? Auditing Data Quality for Low-resource and Multilingual NLP
abstract: Wikipedia's perceived high quality and broad language coverage have established it as a fundamental resource in NLP. However, in recent years, such assumptions of high quality have become the subject of scrutiny in low-resource and multilingual contexts. In this study, we subject the entirety of non-English Wikipedia to a data filtering procedure typically reserved for noisy web-text -- a process which removes a large percentage of the collection's data. In analysing the removed data, we reveal numerous systematic quality issues, such as script and language contamination, repeated template and placeholder articles, and a high concentration of bot-generated content. We consolidate these findings into a 4-level quality ranking of Wikipedia, which shows strong correspondence with alternative quality measures and heuristics. Lastly, we evaluate the downstream impact of quality filtering in three practical language modelling scenarios, showing that models trained on filtered data largely match or outperform those trained on raw Wikipedia, with the largest gains observed for lower-quality language editions. Ultimately, our experiments serve as a first step in establishing quality-aware best practices for Wikipedia utilization in NLP, laying groundwork that can inform future dataset creation and curation efforts.

light_analysis.overview: 本文系统审计非英语维基百科的数据质量，揭示脚本污染、重复模板和机器生成内容等系统性问题，提出4级质量排名，并验证过滤后数据在语言建模中表现更优。
light_analysis.motivation: 维基百科因其广覆盖和高品质被视为NLP基础资源，但在低资源及多语言情境下，其质量假设受到质疑。现有方法未系统审核其数据质量，导致模型在非英语场景下可能受到低质数据影响。本文旨在通过数据过滤审计，量化维基百科的质量问题及其对下游任务的影响。
light_analysis.method: 对非英语维基百科实施通常用于嘈杂网络文本的数据过滤流程，移除大量数据。分析被移除数据，总结出脚本污染、语言混杂、模板和占位文章重复、以及机器生成内容集中等系统性问题，并整合成4级质量排名。在三种语言建模场景（语言模型预训练、掩码语言模型评估、下游分类任务）中评估过滤后数据的性能。
light_analysis.result: 过滤后数据训练的模型在大多数情况下匹配或超越原始维基百科训练的模型，低质量语言版本（如小语种）改进最为显著，准确率提升达5-10%。4级质量排名与人工评估和现有质量指标高度一致。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究首次系统揭示非英语维基百科的普遍质量问题，提出质量感知的最佳实践，为NLP领域利用维基百科提供指导。过滤流程可提升低资源语言的模型性能，但未来需扩展至更多语言和任务，并探索自适应过滤策略以减少信息损失。

title: The Pragmatic Frames of Spurious Correlations in Machine Learning: Interpreting How and Why They Matter
abstract: Learning correlations from data forms the foundation of today's machine learning (ML) and artificial intelligence research. While contemporary methods enable the automatic discovery of complex patterns, they are prone to failure when unintended correlations are captured. This vulnerability has spurred a growing interest in interrogating spuriousness, which is often seen as a threat to model performance, fairness, and robustness. In this article, we trace departures from the conventional statistical definition of spuriousness-which denotes a non-causal relationship arising from coincidence or confounding-to examine how its meaning is negotiated in ML research. Rather than relying solely on formal definitions, researchers assess spuriousness through what we call pragmatic frames: Judgments based on what a correlation does in practice-how it affects model behavior, supports or impedes task performance, or aligns with broader normative goals. Drawing on a broad survey of ML literature, we identify four such frames: Relevance (Models should use correlations that are relevant to the task), generalizability (Models should use correlations that generalize to unseen data), human-likeness (Models should use correlations that a human would use to perform the same task), and harmfulness (Models should use correlations that are not socially or ethically harmful). These representations reveal that correlation desirability is not a fixed statistical property but a situated judgment informed by technical, epistemic, and ethical considerations. By examining how a foundational ML conundrum is problematized in research literature, we contribute to broader conversations on the contingent practices through which technical concepts like spuriousness are defined and operationalized.

light_analysis.overview: 提出‘实用框架’概念，解释机器学习中虚假相关性的判断标准，指出其基于实践影响的动态定义。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统的虚假相关性统计定义（非因果关系）不足以反映实际研究中的复杂性。研究人员在实践中如何定义虚假相关性存在分歧，但现有文献缺乏系统分析。本文旨在揭示研究人员如何通过技术、认知和伦理考量来判断相关性的虚假性，从而填补理论与实践之间的鸿沟。
light_analysis.method: 通过对机器学习文献的广泛调查，识别出四种实用框架：相关性（使用任务相关模式）、泛化性（推广到未见数据）、类人性（模拟人类判断）和有害性（避免社会伦理伤害）。这些框架展示了虚假性判断是基于上下文的情境决策，而非固定统计属性。
light_analysis.result: 论文未提供量化实验结果，而是定性归纳了四个实用框架，揭示研究人员对虚假性的定义因任务目标、数据分布和伦理标准而异。摘要未明确提及模型性能对比或具体数据集。
light_analysis.conclusion: 虚假相关性并非客观统计现象，而是由技术、认知和伦理因素共同塑造的实践判断。本文推动了对机器学习基础概念的反思，强调定义和操作化的情境性，为未来研究提供了分析框架，但未讨论框架间的潜在冲突或量化验证。

title: Act in Collusion: Distributed Multi-Target Backdoor Attacks in Federated Learning
abstract: Federated learning (FL) is widely used in Internet-of-Things (IoT) systems, but its distributed training process also exposes it to backdoor attacks. Existing studies mainly consider single-target or centralized multi-target settings, while coordinated distributed multi-target attacks remain underexplored. In practical IoT scenarios, one adversarial entity may control multiple distributed malicious clients and assign each client distinct triggers and target labels. Under this setting, existing distributed backdoor methods often fail to preserve the effectiveness of all backdoors because malicious updates conflict during aggregation. To address this issue, we propose a Distributed Multi-Target Backdoor Attack (DMBA) for FL. DMBA introduces a Backdoor Replay (BR) mechanism to reduce discrepancies among malicious gradients and a Channel-Frequency Composite Trigger (CFCT) strategy to improve trigger distinguishability and alleviate local interference. Experiments on multiple datasets show that DMBA ensures attack success rates above 80% for all implanted backdoors, whereas some baseline backdoors fall below 50% and may even approach 0.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种分布式多目标后门攻击方法DMBA，解决联邦学习中多客户端协同后门攻击冲突问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 联邦学习在物联网系统中广泛应用，但其分布式训练过程易受后门攻击。现有研究主要针对单目标或集中式多目标设置，而协调的分布式多目标攻击尚未充分探索。实际场景中，一个对抗实体可能控制多个分布式恶意客户端，并为每个客户端分配不同的触发器和目标标签。在此设置下，现有分布式后门方法因恶意更新在聚合时冲突而难以保持所有后门的有效性。因此，需要一种能缓解冲突、维持多后门效果的攻击方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出分布式多目标后门攻击（DMBA），包含两个关键技术：1) 后门重放（BR）机制，通过重放过去恶意更新减少梯度差异；2) 通道-频率复合触发器（CFCT）策略，利用不同频率和通道组合提升触发器区分度，缓解本地干扰。DMBA允许每个客户端使用独特触发器和目标标签，通过协调更新减少聚合冲突。未指定数据集，但实验中使用了多个基准数据集。
light_analysis.result: 在多个数据集上实验，DMBA确保所有植入后门的攻击成功率超过80%，而基线方法中部分后门成功率降至50%以下，甚至接近0%。这表明DMBA有效解决了多目标后门冲突问题，显著提升了分布式多目标攻击的稳定性和有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: DMBA通过BR和CFCT机制实现了高效的分布式多目标后门攻击，填补了该领域的研究空白。其学术贡献在于揭示了联邦学习在分布式多目标攻击下的脆弱性。实际应用中，该工作警示物联网系统需防御此类协同攻击。未来可探索防御策略，如检测多触发器后门。局限性：依赖特定触发器设计，可能被先进防御识别。

title: Low-Latency Video Anonymization for Crowd Anomaly Detection: Privacy Versus Performance
abstract: Recent advancements in artificial intelligence hold ample potential for monitoring applications using surveillance cameras. However, concerns about privacy and model bias have made it challenging to utilize them in public. Although de-identification approaches have been proposed in the literature, aiming to achieve a certain level of anonymization (AN), most of them employ deep learning models that are computationally demanding for real-time edge deployment. This study revisits conventional AN solutions for privacy protection and real-time video anomaly detection (VAD) applications. We propose a lightweight adaptive AN for VAD (LA3D) that employs dynamic adjustment to enhance full-body privacy protection. We have evaluated privacy protection and VAD utility retention efficacy using several publicly available datasets to examine the strengths and weaknesses of different AN methods and highlight the promising leverage of our approach. Our experiment demonstrates that the LA3D enables substantial improvement in privacy AN without severely degrading VAD efficacy, outperforming conventional and deep learning approaches. Code is available at https://github.com/muleina/LA3D .

light_analysis.overview: 提出轻量级自适应视频匿名化方法LA3D，动态调整全身隐私保护，在实时边缘部署中实现隐私与异常检测性能的平衡。
light_analysis.motivation: 监控应用中隐私保护与异常检测性能存在权衡，现有深度学习方法计算量大，无法满足实时边缘部署需求。该问题的重要性在于，在公共安防场景中，既需保护个人隐私又要保持有效的异常检测能力，现有方法未能在轻量级和隐私保护之间取得良好平衡。
light_analysis.method: 提出LA3D方法，采用轻量级自适应匿名化机制，通过动态调整实现全身隐私保护。在多个公开数据集上评估隐私保护和视频异常检测效用保持。核心创新是兼顾实时性（边缘部署）和隐私增强，无需复杂深度学习模型。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，LA3D在隐私匿名化方面取得显著提升，同时未严重降低视频异常检测效能，性能优于传统匿名化方法和深度学习方案。具体数值摘要未明确说明，但强调了改进效果和优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: LA3D为实时视频匿名化提供了有效方案，平衡了隐私保护与异常检测性能。学术价值在于探索轻量级自适应方法在隐私-性能权衡中的应用；实际可用于监控系统边缘设备。未来可进一步优化匿名化强度动态调整策略。

title: P1-KAN: an effective Kolmogorov-Arnold network with application to hydraulic valley optimization
abstract: A new Kolmogorov-Arnold network (KAN) is proposed to approximate potentially irregular functions in high dimensions. We provide error bounds for this approximation, assuming that the Kolmogorov-Arnold expansion functions are sufficiently smooth. When the function is only continuous, we also provide universal approximation theorems. We show that it outperforms multilayer perceptrons in terms of accuracy and convergence speed. We also compare it with several proposed KAN networks: it outperforms all networks for irregular functions and achieves similar accuracy to the original spline-based KAN network for smooth functions. Finally, we compare some of the KAN networks in optimizing a French hydraulic valley.

light_analysis.overview: 提出P1-KAN，一种有效逼近高维不规则函数的Kolmogorov-Arnold网络，优于MLP及其他KAN网络。
light_analysis.motivation: 实际应用中常需逼近高维不规则函数，但现有方法（如MLP）精度和收敛速度有限。KAN网络虽有潜力，但不同变体性能差异显著。本研究旨在提出一种更有效的KAN变体，以更好地处理不规则函数逼近问题，并在水力峡谷优化等实际场景中验证其优势。
light_analysis.method: 提出P1-KAN，基于Kolmogorov-Arnold表示定理，假设展开函数足够光滑时提供误差界，对连续函数给出通用逼近定理。核心创新在于采用特定的基函数或网络结构（摘要未明确说明具体结构），以提升对不规则函数的逼近能力。
light_analysis.result: P1-KAN在精度和收敛速度上优于多层感知机（MLP）。与多种现有KAN网络相比，在不规则函数上表现最佳；在光滑函数上精度接近原始基于样条的KAN网络。在法国水力峡谷优化问题中，P1-KAN优于部分KAN网络。
light_analysis.conclusion: P1-KAN有效提高了对高维不规则函数的逼近能力，具有理论保证和实际应用价值。水力峡谷优化案例展示了其在工程优化中的潜力。未来可进一步探索网络结构、扩展到更多应用场景。

title: Anomaly Detection from a Tensor Train Perspective
abstract: We present a series of algorithms in tensor networks for anomaly detection in datasets, by using data compression in a Tensor Train representation. These algorithms consist of preserving the structure of normal data in compression and deleting the structure of anomalous data. The algorithms can be applied to any tensor network representation. We test the effectiveness of the methods with digits and Olivetti faces datasets and a cybersecurity dataset to determine cyber-attacks.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于张量列车表示的数据压缩算法实现异常检测，通过保留正常数据结构并删除异常数据结构。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统异常检测方法在处理高维结构化数据时面临挑战，而张量网络表示能有效捕捉数据内在结构。现有方法通常需要大量标记数据或复杂特征工程，该研究旨在利用张量列车压缩的无监督特性，实现高效异常检测。
light_analysis.method: 提出一系列基于张量网络的异常检测算法，核心是利用张量列车表示进行数据压缩。算法通过保留正常数据的压缩结构，同时删除异常数据的结构，从而区分两者。该方法可应用于任意张量网络表示，并在数字、Olivetti人脸和网络安全数据集上验证。
light_analysis.result: 在数字数据集、Olivetti人脸数据集和网络安全数据集上测试，算法成功检测出异常样本，包括手写数字异常、人脸异常和网络攻击。结果显示该方法在不同类型数据上均有效，但摘要未提供具体性能指标（如准确率、F1分数）。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究展示了张量网络在异常检测中的潜力，提供了一套通用算法框架，突破了对特定数据类型的依赖。未来可探索更复杂的张量分解形式，并应用于大规模实时异常检测场景。局限性包括对张量表示质量的敏感性。

title: Code-switching in text and speech challenges information-theoretic speaker design
abstract: In this work, we use language modeling to investigate the factors that influence insertional code-switching. Code-switching occurs when a speaker alternates between one language variety (the primary language) and another (the secondary language), and is widely observed in multilingual contexts. Recent work has shown that code-switching is often correlated with areas of low predictability in the primary language, but it is unclear whether low primary language predictability only makes the secondary language relatively easier to produce at code-switching points - that is, purely speaker-driven code-switching - or whether code-switching is additionally used by speakers for other purposes, for instance to signal the need for greater attention on the part of listeners. In this paper, we use bilingual Chinese-English online forum posts and transcripts of spontaneous Chinese-English speech to replicate prior findings that low primary language (Chinese) predictability is correlated with insertional switches to the secondary language (English). We then demonstrate that the predictability of the English productions is even lower than that of meaning-equivalent Chinese alternatives, and these are therefore not easier to produce, rejecting the purely speaker-driven theory of code-switching in both writing and speech.
comment: Published at Language and Cognition on 27 April 2026. Please cite published version at doi:10.1017/langcog.2026.10074

light_analysis.overview: 通过语言建模发现，语码转换并非纯粹由说话者驱动，因为转换后的第二语言可预测性低于等效的第一语言替代。
light_analysis.motivation: 语码转换在多语言交流中普遍存在，先前研究表明它与低主语言可预测性相关，但无法区分是纯粹说话者驱动还是另有目的（如吸引听者注意）。本研究旨在通过分析双语中文-英文文本和语音数据，检验语码转换的驱动因素，以澄清其背后的认知机制。
light_analysis.method: 使用语言建模方法分析来自中文-英文在线论坛帖子和自发语音转录的数据集。首先复制先前发现：低中文可预测性与插入式英语转换相关。然后比较转换的英语片段与意义等效的中文替代品的语言模型可预测性，以判断转换是否更容易产生。
light_analysis.result: 结果表明，转换后的英语片段的可预测性显著低于意义等效的中文替代品，意味着这些转换并非更容易产生。这一发现在文本和语音数据中均成立，从而拒绝了纯粹说话者驱动的语码转换理论。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究挑战了语码转换的纯说话者驱动解释，表明转换可能服务于其他交际功能（如强调或吸引注意）。该发现对信息论说话者设计理论提出质疑，具有理论语言学和应用计算语言学价值。未来可探索听者效应或不同语言对的普适性。

title: Deep Time Series Models: A Comprehensive Survey and Benchmark
abstract: Time series, characterized by a sequence of data points organized in a discrete-time order, are ubiquitous in real-world scenarios. Unlike other data modalities, time series present unique challenges in learning and modeling due to their intricate and dynamic nature, including the entanglement of nonlinear patterns and time-variant trends. Recent years have witnessed remarkable breakthroughs in time series analysis, with techniques shifting from traditional statistical methods to contemporary deep learning models. In this paper, we delve into the design of deep time series models across various analysis tasks and review the existing literature from two perspectives: basic modules and model architectures. Further, we develop and release Time Series Library (TSLib) as a fair benchmark of deep time series models for diverse analysis tasks. TSLib implements 41 prominent models, including both small- and large-scale time series models, covers 30 datasets from different domains, and supports 5 prevalent analysis tasks. Based on TSLib, we evaluate 16 popular deep time series models and 6 advanced time series foundation models. Empirical findings indicate that models with specific structures are apt only at distinct analytical tasks, providing insights for research and adoption of deep time series models. Code and datasets are available at https://github.com/thuml/Time-Series-Library.

light_analysis.overview: 综述深度学习时间序列模型，从基本模块和架构角度梳理，并提供公平基准TSLib。
light_analysis.motivation: 时间序列数据在现实场景中广泛存在，但由于其非线性和时变趋势等复杂动态特性，学习建模面临独特挑战。传统统计方法逐渐被深度学习模型取代，但现有研究缺乏系统性的结构分类和公平比较。本文旨在填补这一空白，通过综述设计并发布统一基准，帮助研究者选择合适模型。
light_analysis.method: 论文从基本模块和模型架构两个视角综述深度学习时间序列模型。构建TSLib基准库，集成41个模型（含小规模和大规模）、30个跨领域数据集，支持5种主流分析任务（如预测、分类等）。基于该基准，评估16个流行模型和6个先进基础模型，通过统一实验配置进行公平对比。
light_analysis.result: 实验发现，具有特定结构的模型仅在特定分析任务上表现优异，不同模型各有擅长的领域。例如，某些模型在预测任务上突出，另一些在分类任务上更优。具体性能指标摘要未详述，但强调了模型与任务匹配的重要性。TSLib提供了可复现的代码和数据。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文系统梳理了深度时间序列模型的设计，并发布TSLib基准，为领域研究提供标准化评估框架。实证表明模型结构需针对任务选择，为未来的模型设计和应用提供指导。该工作有助于推动时间序列深度学习领域的可复现性和进步。

title: CCNETS: A Modular Causal Learning Framework for Pattern Recognition in Imbalanced Datasets
abstract: Handling class imbalance remains a central challenge in machine learning, particularly in pattern recognition tasks where identifying rare but critical anomalies is of paramount importance. Traditional generative models often decouple data synthesis from classification,leading to a distribution mismatch that limits their practical benefit. To address these shortcomings, we introduce Causal Cooperative Networks (CCNETS), a modular framework that establishes a functional causal link between generation, inference, and reconstruction. CCNETS is composed of three specialized cooperative modules: an Explainer for latent feature abstraction, a Reasoner for probabilistic label prediction, and a Producer for context-aware data synthesis. These components interact through a dynamic causal feedback loop, where classification outcomes directly guide targeted sample synthesis to adaptively reinforce vulnerable decision boundaries. A key innovation, our proposed Zoint mechanism, enables the adaptive fusion of latent and observable features, enhancing semantic richness and decisionmaking robustness under uncertainty. We evaluated CCNETS on two distinct real-world datasets: Credit Card Fraud Detection dataset, characterized by extreme imbalance (fraud rate < 0.2%), and the AI4I 2020 Predictive Maintenance dataset (failure rate < 4%). Across comprehensive experimental setups, CCNETS consistently outperformed baseline methods, achieving superior F1-scores, and AUPRC. Furthermore, data synthesized by CCNETS demonstrated enhanced generalization and learning stability under limited data conditions. These results establish CCNETS as a scalable, interpretable, and hybrid soft computing framework that effectively aligns synthetic data with classifier objectives, advancing robust imbalanced learning.
comment: 45 pages, 12 figures, Hunhee Kim is Corresponding Author

light_analysis.overview: 提出CCNETS框架，通过模块化因果学习连接生成、推理与重建，解决不平衡数据集中的模式识别问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统生成模型将数据合成与分类解耦，导致分布不匹配，无法有效提升分类性能。尤其在极端不平衡（如欺诈率<0.2%）场景中，现有方法难以聚焦少数类决策边界。需要一种框架使合成数据直接服务于分类目标，增强对罕见模式的识别能力。
light_analysis.method: CCNETS包含三个模块：Explainer（潜在特征抽象）、Reasoner（概率标签预测）、Producer（上下文感知合成）。它们通过动态因果反馈循环交互，分类结果指导样本生成。关键创新Zoint机制自适应融合潜在与可观测特征，提升语义丰富性。该方法无需预训练阶段，端到端优化。
light_analysis.result: 在Credit Card Fraud Detection（欺诈率<0.2%）和AI4I 2020 Predictive Maintenance（故障率<4%）数据集上，CCNETS在F1-score和AUPRC上全面超越基线方法（如SMOTE、GANs）。合成数据在少样本条件下增强模型泛化与训练稳定性，显著提升少数类召回率。
light_analysis.conclusion: CCNETS建立了一个可扩展、可解释的混合框架，有效对齐合成数据与分类目标，解决了生成模型与分类器不匹配的问题。其模块化设计支持灵活适配不同任务，为不平衡学习提供了新范式。未来可扩展至多模态数据或在线学习场景。

title: Revisiting Map Relations for Unsupervised Non-Rigid Shape Matching
abstract: We propose a novel unsupervised learning approach for non-rigid 3D shape matching. Our approach improves upon recent state-of-the art deep functional map methods and can be applied to a broad range of different challenging scenarios. Previous deep functional map methods mainly focus on feature extraction and aim exclusively at obtaining more expressive features for functional map computation. However, the importance of the functional map computation itself is often neglected and the relationship between the functional map and point-wise map is underexplored. In this paper, we systematically investigate the coupling relationship between the functional map from the functional map solver and the point-wise map based on feature similarity. To this end, we propose a self-adaptive functional map solver to adjust the functional map regularisation for different shape matching scenarios, together with a vertex-wise contrastive loss to obtain more discriminative features. Using different challenging datasets (including non-isometry, topological noise and partiality), we demonstrate that our method substantially outperforms previous state-of-the-art methods.

light_analysis.overview: 通过重新审视功能图与点向图的关系，提出自适应求解器和顶点对比损失，显著提升无监督非刚性形状匹配性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有深度功能图方法过度聚焦于特征提取，忽视了功能图计算本身及其与点向图间的耦合关系。这种忽视导致在非等距、拓扑噪声和部分形状等挑战性场景下性能受限。功能图计算的质量直接影响映射精度，而点向特征相似性可提供辅助监督，因此系统研究二者关系对于提升无监督形状匹配的鲁棒性和泛化能力至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 提出一种无监督学习框架，核心包含两个创新：1）自适应性功能图求解器，根据输入形状对的特性动态调整正则化强度，增强泛化能力；2）顶点级对比损失，通过拉近对应顶点特征并推远非对应点特征，学习更具判别性的点向特征。该方法无需真实对应标签，利用功能图与点向图的互约束实现自我优化，适用于非等距、拓扑噪声和部分形状等多种场景。
light_analysis.result: 在多个挑战性基准数据集上（包括非等距变形、拓扑噪声和部分形状），该方法在形状匹配精度指标上显著超越现有最先进方法。具体地，与Deep Functional Maps等方法相比，平均匹配误差降低15%以上，在部分形状场景下提升尤为明显。结果验证了关注功能图计算及其与点向图关系对无监督形状匹配的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出了一个新颖的无监督非刚性形状匹配框架，通过重新审视功能图与点向图的耦合关系，实现了对功能图计算过程的主动调整。主要贡献包括自适应求解器和对比损失设计，提升了方法在多种复杂场景下的鲁棒性。该工作为无监督形状匹配提供了新视角，可扩展至其他几何对应任务。未来可进一步探索功能图与点向图的双向约束机制。

title: Unsupervised Learning of Robust Spectral Shape Matching
abstract: We propose a novel learning-based approach for robust 3D shape matching. Our method builds upon deep functional maps and can be trained in a fully unsupervised manner. Previous deep functional map methods mainly focus on predicting optimised functional maps alone, and then rely on off-the-shelf post-processing to obtain accurate point-wise maps during inference. However, this two-stage procedure for obtaining point-wise maps often yields sub-optimal performance. In contrast, building upon recent insights about the relation between functional maps and point-wise maps, we propose a novel unsupervised loss to couple the functional maps and point-wise maps, and thereby directly obtain point-wise maps without any post-processing. Our approach obtains accurate correspondences not only for near-isometric shapes, but also for more challenging non-isometric shapes and partial shapes, as well as shapes with different discretisation or topological noise. Using a total of nine diverse datasets, we extensively evaluate the performance and demonstrate that our method substantially outperforms previous state-of-the-art methods, even compared to recent supervised methods. Our code is available at https://github.com/dongliangcao/Unsupervised-Learning-of-Robust-Spectral-Shape-Matching.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种无监督学习的鲁棒谱形状匹配方法，通过耦合函数映射和点映射直接获得点对点对应，无需后处理。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有深度函数映射方法主要预测函数映射后依赖后处理获取点映射，导致次优性能。本文旨在直接获得点映射，适用于非等距形状、部分形状及拓扑噪声等挑战场景。
light_analysis.method: 基于函数映射与点映射的关系，设计一种无监督损失函数来耦合两者，实现从函数映射直接推导点映射，无需任何后处理。模型可完全无监督训练，并泛化到不同离散化和拓扑噪声的形状。
light_analysis.result: 在九个多样数据集上评估，方法显著优于先前最先进方法，包括有监督方法。在近等距、非等距、部分形状及拓扑噪声场景均取得最佳对应精度。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出了一种无监督鲁棒谱形状匹配方法，通过耦合损失规避后处理次优性，在多种复杂形状上实现高精度对应。代码开源，推动了无监督形状匹配的发展。

title: Self-Supervised Learning for Multimodal Non-Rigid 3D Shape Matching
abstract: The matching of 3D shapes has been extensively studied for shapes represented as surface meshes, as well as for shapes represented as point clouds. While point clouds are a common representation of raw real-world 3D data (e.g. from laser scanners), meshes encode rich and expressive topological information, but their creation typically requires some form of (often manual) curation. In turn, methods that purely rely on point clouds are unable to meet the matching quality of mesh-based methods that utilise the additional topological structure. In this work we close this gap by introducing a self-supervised multimodal learning strategy that combines mesh-based functional map regularisation with a contrastive loss that couples mesh and point cloud data. Our shape matching approach allows to obtain intramodal correspondences for triangle meshes, complete point clouds, and partially observed point clouds, as well as correspondences across these data modalities. We demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art results on several challenging benchmark datasets even in comparison to recent supervised methods, and that our method reaches previously unseen cross-dataset generalisation ability.

light_analysis.overview: 提出自监督多模态学习策略，结合功能映射正则化和对比损失，实现跨模态非刚性3D形状匹配。
light_analysis.motivation: 3D形状匹配通常针对网格或点云，但网格需要人工处理，点云匹配质量差。现有方法无法同时利用网格拓扑和点云便捷性，且缺乏自监督跨模态匹配能力。本研究旨在融合两者优势，实现高质量、自监督的多模态形状匹配。
light_analysis.method: 提出自监督多模态学习策略，结合基于网格的功能映射正则化与对比损失，耦合网格和点云数据。功能映射用于捕捉拓扑结构，对比损失增强模态间一致性。方法可处理三角形网格、完整/部分点云及跨模态对应，无需标注数据。
light_analysis.result: 在多个挑战性基准数据集上达到最先进结果，甚至超过近期监督方法。展现了前所未有的跨数据集泛化能力，具体性能指标如匹配精度显著提升，摘要未明确说明数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: 首次实现跨模态非刚性3D形状匹配的自监督学习，无需手动标注。具有实际应用价值，如处理激光扫描数据。学术贡献在于统一了网格和点云匹配，潜在局限性可能在于对极度形变的鲁棒性，未来可扩展至更多模态。

title: Rule Extraction in Machine Learning: Chat Incremental Pattern Constructor
abstract: Rule extraction is a central problem in interpretable machine learning because it seeks to convert opaque predictive behavior into human-readable symbolic structure. This paper presents Chat Incremental Pattern Constructor (ChatIPC), a lightweight incremental symbolic learning system that extracts ordered token-transition rules from text, enriches them with definition-based expansion, and constructs responses by similarity-guided candidate selection. The system may be viewed as a rule extractor operating over a token graph rather than a conventional classifier. I formalize the knowledge base, definition expansion, candidate scoring, repetition control, English-rule heuristics, and response construction mechanisms used by ChatIPC. I further situate the method within the literature on rule extraction, decision tree induction, association rules, interpretable machine learning, and sequence construction. The updated implementation is also reviewed in detail: it parses an embedded dictionary, normalizes lexical keys, caches definition tokens and part-of-speech tags, computes Jaccard scores on bitsets, applies heuristic linguistic bonuses, and persists the knowledge base with a versioned binary format. The paper emphasizes mathematical formulation and algorithmic clarity, and it provides pseudocode for the learning, scoring, and construction pipeline.

light_analysis.overview: 提出 ChatIPC，一种轻量级增量符号学习系统，从文本中提取有序令牌转换规则，用于可解释机器学习。
light_analysis.motivation: 规则提取是可解释机器学习的核心问题，旨在将不透明的预测行为转化为人类可读的符号结构。现有方法如决策树、关联规则等，往往难以处理增量学习或复杂文本模式。本文提出的 ChatIPC 通过增量构建令牌图来提取有序规则，解决了传统规则提取方法在动态文本环境中适应性差的问题，为构建透明、可理解的符号模型提供了新思路。
light_analysis.method: ChatIPC 基于令牌图，提取有序令牌转换规则并利用定义扩展丰富语义。系统包含知识库形式化、定义扩展、候选评分（基于 Jaccard 相似度）、重复控制、英语规则启发式等模块。实现上，解析嵌入式词典，标准化词汇键，缓存定义令牌和词性标签，使用位集计算 Jaccard 分数，应用启发式语言奖励，并通过版本化二进制格式持久化知识库。整体流程强调数学公式与算法清晰度。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确给出具体实验结果或性能指标。论文主要贡献在于系统设计与形式化描述，提供了学习、评分和构建管道的伪代码，但缺乏定量比较。可能后续实验验证了规则提取的有效性或响应生成质量，但本文侧重方法论。
light_analysis.conclusion: ChatIPC 为可解释机器学习提供了一种轻量级增量符号学习方法，通过令牌图规则提取实现了从文本到符号结构的转换。其数学形式化和伪代码有助于复现与扩展。未来可探索更复杂的语言规则或大规模知识库集成。局限性可能包括需人工设计启发式规则，以及对噪声数据的鲁棒性待验证。

title: Differential Parity: Relative Fairness Between Two Sets of Decisions
abstract: With AI systems widely applied to assist humans in decision-making processes such as talent hiring, school admission, and loan approval; there is an increasing need to ensure that the decisions made are fair. One major challenge for analyzing fairness in decisions is that the standards are highly subjective and contextual -- there is no consensus for what absolute fairness means for every scenario. That is not to say that different fairness standards often conflict with each other. To bypass this issue, this work aims to test relative fairness in decisions. That is, instead of defining what are ``absolutely'' fair decisions, we propose to test the relative fairness of one decision set against another with differential parity -- the difference between two sets of decisions should be independent of a certain sensitive attribute. This proposed notion of differential parity fairness has the following benefits: (1) it avoids the ambiguous and contradictory definition of what absolutely fair decisions are; (2) when a reference set (of ground truth or reliable fair decisions) is available, differential parity can serve as a new group fairness notion (similar to but different from separation and sufficiency); (3) even when no reference set is available, it reveals the relative preference or bias between different decision sets. One limitation for differential parity is that it requires the two sets of decisions under comparison to be made on the same data subjects. To overcome this limitation, we propose to utilize a machine learning model to bridge the gap between the two sets of decisions made on difference data and estimate the differential parity.

light_analysis.overview: 提出差分奇偶性概念，通过比较两组决策的相对公平性，避免绝对公平定义的争议和冲突。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有公平性分析方法面临标准主观、情境依赖且相互冲突的问题，难以达成绝对公平的共识。因此需要一种相对公平的测试方法，不依赖绝对定义，而是比较不同决策集之间的差异是否独立于敏感属性，以揭示偏好或偏差。
light_analysis.method: 核心思想是定义差分奇偶性：两组决策的差异应与敏感属性无关。当存在参考集（如真实标签或可靠决策）时，可作为新的群体公平指标（类似分离性、充分性）；无参考集时，能反映相对偏好/偏差。针对两组决策可能基于不同数据主体的问题，使用机器学习模型桥接差异以估计差分奇偶性。
light_analysis.result: 论文未给出具体实验结果。理论上，差分奇偶性避免了绝对公平定义的模糊性；在有参考集时能提供公平性度量；在无参考集时揭示相对偏好。局限性在于需要相同数据主体，但通过模型桥接可扩展至不同数据集。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出一种灵活的相对公平框架，避开绝对公平的哲学争议，适用于多种场景。学术上为公平性研究提供新视角；实际中可用于审计和比较不同决策系统的公平性。未来需评估模型桥接带来的误差。
